Please note: clicking on external links means you will be leaving this profile page and website and that you assume total responsibility and risk for your use of the site(s) you are visiting. This information is provided solely as a convenience to you.

Name: Harbert Management Corporation
Description: Harbert Management Corporation (“HMC”) is an investment management firm focusing on alternative assets, with approximately $8.0 billion in Regulatory Assets Under Management as of December 31, 2025; asset classes include: Power, U.S. Real Estate, European Real Estate, Seniors Housing, Seniors Housing Development, Growth Equity and Credit Solutions.  HMC is headquartered in Birmingham, AL, USA and has offices in Atlanta, Charlotte, Dallas, Nashville, New York, Richmond, San Francisco, London, Luxembourg, Madrid and Paris. HMC and its affiliates make significant co-investments on the same terms as other investors in all their sponsored funds helping ensure a sharp focus on returns and strict controls around fund administration, legal, compliance and reporting.

Name: Commonfund
Description: Commonfund is a leading asset management firm that empowers educational institutions, foundations, pension funds, family offices, RIAs, and other sophisticated investors to achieve their most important goals. Through our Outsourced CIO business, we provide nonprofits access to world-class investment management solutions. Our CF Private Equity business provides access to private equity investments for both nonprofit and for-profit organizations seeking to diversify their portfolios with private investments. Our Commonfund Institute is among the nation’s most trusted sources for relevant, useful, and proprietary data, analytics, and best practices in financial management. All our businesses are united by a relentless commitment to investment performance matched by an equally relentless commitment to the values of trust, transparency, and ethical behavior that have inspired us since our founding more than fifty years ago.  www.commonfund.org

Name: Redwheel
Description:
Redwheel is a specialist, independent investment organisation. Our active investment heritage is built on a foundation of innovation, origination and high conviction. 

Our business was established in 2000 with a simple ambition: to create an environment in which exceptional fund managers can operate in a manner that allows them to maximise the benefits of their skills over the long-term.
 
We have always remained true to that ambition. Today, we have more than 150 people aligned to that goal, including 56 dedicated investment professionals working across seven independent investment teams. 

There are three key attributes that define who we are: 
•	Autonomy
•	Independence 
•	Ownership

None of these are unique, but together they make us a distinctive fund management business with a strong, supportive culture and a genuine focus on the long-term. These core elements of our business combine to deliver a robust and sustainable culture, which is crucial for our future success.

Follow us to stay informed. Visit our website for further information.

Name: Moneta Asset Management
Description:
Moneta Asset Management (Moneta AM) est une société de gestion indépendante qui appartient à 100% à ses dirigeants et salariés. 

Notre seul métier est la gestion de fonds actions, avec une approche résolument fondamentale. Notre équipe est essentiellement composée de gérants qui partagent la passion de l'analyse des sociétés.

Créée en 2003 et dirigée par Romain Burnand et Andrzej Kawalec, Moneta AM gérait au 31 décembre 2024 près de 3 milliards d’euros répartis sur sept fonds actions dotés d’un track record long : Moneta Micro Entreprises, Moneta Multi Caps, Moneta Long Short, MME 2026, MME 2027, MME 2028 et MME 2029.

Name: Crestline Investors
Description: Crestline is a global alternative investment management firm founded in 1997 and based in Fort Worth, Texas, with affiliate offices in London, New York, Tokyo, and Toronto. The firm offers a diverse range of investment solutions across its capital solutions, direct lending, and portfolio finance platforms.

Name: Vise
Description:
Vise is a technology-powered asset manager that helps financial advisors build, manage, and explain personalized portfolios at scale.

Vise’s mission is to enable financial advisors to deliver better investment outcomes to their clients while scaling to their maximum potential. 

The company is leading the industry-wide shift toward Wealth 3.0—the next step beyond mutual funds, ETFs, and index funds into personalized, automated portfolios. 

Backed by investors like Sequoia, and Founders Fund, Vise has raised nearly $130 million since its founding in 2016. The company has over 45 employees based across the U.S. with headquarters in New York.

Name: Startup Norway
Description:
Startup Norway is a private impact organization started in 2010 by passionate entrepreneurs, wanting to create a stronger and more inclusive startup community.

Creating a strong startup ecosystem is a long-term mission. It is about the "circle of startup life" where the older generation entrepreneurs support the new in an eternal loop of paying it forward. We are in it for the long run, and are excited that every day we see a new sign that the ecosystem is getting stronger and stronger, with more and more new companies being on the track to success. And it's all with one goal: Setting the stage for tomorrow's startup success stories from our region.

Name: Syailendra Capital
Description:
Syailendra Capital was founded in 2006 by three individuals who have been through thick and thin in Indonesia's capital market since the very early 90s. The basic premise behind the firm's foundation was simple: We aspire to become the best local, independent fund management firm providing value-added investment solutions to our clients.

Our deep understanding of the Indonesia market has fueled our rapid growth, and we are currently one of the top 20 biggest asset management company with a diverse investment portfolio. 
Over the last decade, SYAILENDRA has successfully established a robust financial foothold in the Indonesian capital markets industry. We owe our superior performance to our innate strengths, our experience and to our unwavering commitment to deliver the highest standards of quality and expertise in the industry. 
SYAILENDRA structures and distributes a comprehensive range of unit trust funds, and manages customized portfolio mandates for corporations, pension funds, insurance companies as well as high net worth individuals. 
SYAILENDRA Management team brings a wealth of experience in both the capital markets and investment management fields. Our expertise coupled with their deep-bench strength experiences ranging from the capital market, sector-skills, operational knowledge, and multi-border business relationships, make for a dedicated investment partnership for our clients.

Name: CWP Energy
Description: CWP Energy is a player on the North American power and natural gas markets. Our team of traders, analysts and developers research artificial intelligence, machine learning and proprietary trading opportunities to disrupt an already-evolving industry. We seek solutions that keep the world in #perpetualmotion.

Name: Pilay Uruguay
Description: Pilay es un sistema de ahorro e inversión, autorizado por el Banco Central del Uruguay, que comprende dos productos: por un lado, podés convertirte en inversor comprando online desde medio metro cuadrado, o respaldar tu capital en ladrillos.

Name: TDJ
Description:
TDJ is a Polish family-owned investment firm that for over 45 years has been investing in various enterprises. It has been carrying out its activity in five sectors; Equity, Estate, Finance, Venture, and Foundation. 
The firm is deeply committed to building and sustaining long-term internal and external partnerships, grounded in its values. 
Here at TDJ, we measure success in terms of years rather than by quarter to quarter. We are also actively engaged in prosocial activities supporting the education and development of children and teenagers.

Name: ADBlick Agro
Description:
ADBlick Agro desarrolla y gestiona proyectos de inversión en distintas especialidades del agro.

Estructura negocios a través de fideicomisos o S.A. desarrollando alianzas estratégicas por proyecto con especialistas líderes en cada rubro.

ADBlick cuenta con un equipo de profesionales con experiencia en el desarrollo y gerenciamiento de negocios lo que, sumado al soporte de su comité asesor, le asegura una sólida estructura y una visión integral de los negocios.

Name: MCI Capital
Description:
MCI Capital, founded in 1999, is one of the most dynamic private equity groups in EU-CEE focused on digital transformation. The strategy of MCI is focused on investments in digital economy, in the expansion and buyout area in northern and central Europe (Poland, the Baltics, Czechia, Slovakia, Hungary),  southern Europe (Romania, Bulgaria, Slovenia, Croatia, Greece) and DACH (Germany, Austria, Switzerland). The preferred size of investments is EUR 25-100 M in a single project.
In 2020 the fund has completed exits worth over PLN 1 bilion. The current portfolio includes 14 active investments in the areas of e-commerce, fintech, SaaS, cloud gaming and marketplaces including the area of green transformation/climatech. It is expected that investments in clean technologies will constitute approximately 20% of the entire MCI portfolio. Until 2020 MCI has invested approximately PLN 2.5 billion in 14 buyout investments achieving 27% IRR.

Name: Geode Capital Management
Description:
Founded in 2001, Geode is headquartered in Boston’s financial district, the center of one of the world’s most vibrant finance and technology hubs and employs approximately 180 employees. 

Geode is a systematic asset manager providing core beta exposures across a range of equity and niche asset classes, with over $1 trillion in AUM. With a robust infrastructure and experienced investment professionals, Geode offers the scale of a large asset management firm with the benefits of a smaller organization. 

Geode is proud to be an equal opportunity employer and support a diversified work environment.

Name: AlNahla Group | مجموعة النهلة
Description:
History

Leadership in national development work

Al-Nahla Company is one of the oldest leading Saudi business companies. The founder, late H.E Mr. Hasan Abbas Sharbatly played a pivotal role in the early social and economic development in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Further, Mr. Hasan has made significant national contributions during his life to support education, culture, and the constant development of community service.

his positive role led His Majesty, the late King Abdulaziz bin Abdulrahman Al Saud, the founder of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, to bestow upon Mr. Hasan Sharbatly the title of “His Excellency” in 1934, as well as the title of an “Honorary Minister of State” in recognition of his efforts and contributions to the country and the community. Such titles were the first of their kind in the history of KSA.
Some of the most important companies and foundations founded by His Excellency since the beginning of his business life include:
- Riyad Bank
- Arabian Automobiles Company
- Saudi Arabian Refineries Company (SARCO)
- Sinalco International
- Printing Press & Publishing Est.
- A Group of companies that operate in real estate, automotive and trade.

Name: Quilvest Capital Partners
Description:
Quilvest Capital Partners is a leading global investment firm, focused exclusively on the mid-market. As one of the earliest pioneers in the alternative investment industry, we pride ourselves on our rich and extensive history, with decades of experience deploying capital across multiple business cycles and environments. We operate four investment strategies: Primaries, Co-investments & Secondaries, Buyout and Private Debt.

With five offices around the world, our team is well-positioned to identify the global trends and themes that underpin each of our investment strategies. We overlay this thematic approach with an extensive global network of highly valued relationships, enabling us to identify and invest in the most attractive opportunities.

Our heritage dates back more than a century to 1917, managing the wealth of our founding shareholder, the Bemberg family, which we continue to do today. As the custodian of our founder’s wealth, we ensure we are fully aligned with all those across the globe who entrust us with their capital.

Name: Cevian Capital
Description: Cevian Capital is an international investment firm acquiring significant ownership positions in European public companies where long-term value can be enhanced through active ownership.

Name: The Industrial Bank of Kuwait
Description: Established in 1973 with the initiative of Government of Kuwait, The Industrial Bank of Kuwait is a specialized bank dedicated to supporting industry in Kuwait. The Bank provides medium and long term financing for the establishment, expansion and modernization of industrial units in the country. It also offers full range of commercial banking and treasury products to meet the working capital needs of its industrial customers.

Name: Enko Capital
Description: Enko Capital is an asset management firm focused on debt, private debt, equity and private equity investments in Africa.

Name: Alchemy Capital Management Pvt Ltd
Description:
Alchemy Capital Management, established in 1999, is one of the leading providers of bespoke Portfolio Management Services in India. The SEBI-Registered firm caters to high-net-worth individuals, family offices and institutions. 

Pioneers in bottom-up stock picking approach, Alchemy places a strong emphasis on research and long-term investments. Guided by a disciplined investment approach, the company aims to deliver sustainable returns. With a legacy of over two decades, Alchemy has built a reputation for trust, integrity, and expertise. Its stable and experienced team of investment professionals possesses deep industry knowledge, enabling the firm to adeptly navigate market cycles and trends. 

The discussion/material is for informational purposes only. Please read the Disclosures & Disclaimers on our website https://www.alchemycapital.com/disclaimer-disclosure.aspx.

Name: ITI Mutual Fund
Description:
ITI Mutual Fund is promoted by ITI Group which has 180 offices, 3000 employees and present across India in all major cities. 

Investment Trust of India Ltd (ITI) was the promoter of the first private sector Mutual Fund launched in Indian history by the name, Pioneer ITI Mutual Fund, which later on was taken over by Franklin Templeton Mutual Fund in the year 2002. Investment Trust of India is the promoter of ITI Mutual Fund.

Mr.Sudhir Valia is the mentor and one of the shareholders of ITI Group. He is a member of Institute of Chartered Accountants of India,  and carries more than three decades of experience in taxation and finance. He has been a director of Sun Pharma since the inception of the company and he was also instrumental in the excellent growth and profitability of the company over the last two decades. 

Acting CEO - Mr. Hitesh Thakkar has over 22 years of experience predominantly in the Asset Management & Banking within financial service category. Mr. Thakkar joined ITI Asset Management Limited in March 2019 as Head - Operations and Customer Service and was the Chief Operating Officer, managing Operations, Finance and Customer Service.
Past Experience: Prior to joining ITI Asset Management Limited, he was associated with ERDA (Electrical Research & Development Association) as Assistant Director & Head Corporate. He has been also associated with Nippon India Life Asset Management Ltd., IDBI Bank and HDFC Bank.

Mr. Rajesh Bhatia, CIO, has 30+ years of investment experience in Indian equities and 10+ years in the field of Alternative Investments.

He has worked as the:

- CIO of Simto Investments, a subsidiary of Tata Investments.

- Co-founder & CIO in Heritage India Advisors, Indian advisor to New York based, Heritage Capital.

- SVP & Head, PMS, Reliance Capital Asset Management.

He is a Commerce graduate from H.R. College of Commerce & Economics and holds a degree in ACMA and CFA from the CFA Institute of USA.

Name: Ollkom
Description:
We Build. We Scale. We Lead.

OllKom is a Riyadh-based Company Venture Builder (CVB) that incubates, builds, and strategically invests in high-growth eCommerce, logistics, marketing, and technology ventures across the GCC.

From early-stage concepts to IPO-ready businesses, we combine capital, operational firepower, and deep market expertise to create category-defining companies.

Our portfolio includes some of the fastest-growing brands in the region—AyMakan (logistics), SmartKom (marketing), Marketeers Hub (affiliate marketing), Alhome.com (home & furniture), Zrafh.com (baby furniture brand), and OllTek (cross-border commerce technology).

At OllKom, we don't follow trends. We set them.

Name: DAR ALEIMAN CO
Description:
Established in 1981, specialized in Hajj & Umrah services and Hotel Investment. The company was registered as first Saudi Co. obtaining ISO international certificate in that field.

More than 8700 rooms in Makkah & Madinah.

Over more than 3 decades of dedicated efforts of serving pilgrims , Dar Al Eiman succeeded of supplying unique services which have always been in line with all its activities to be a Global company striving with pride for leadership and excellence in the management and delivery of tourism programs and supportive services according to the applied regulations through the application of international quality standards to ensure customers loyalty which complies with the greatness of the holy cities

Dar Al Eiman is managing and operating 14 hotels in Makkah and Madina at different levels in addition to allotments in the most significant hotels making Dar Al Eiman a leading company in Saudi Arabia in hotel Investment

Name: L1 Capital
Description:
L1 Capital is a global investment manager with offices in Melbourne, Sydney, Miami and London. The business was established by Raphael Lamm and Mark Landau in 2007 and is majority owned by its founders and staff. The team is committed to offering clients best of breed investment products through strategies that include long-short equities, international equities, activist equities, global convertible debt and U.K. residential property funds.

L1 Capital manages money for a range of clients including large superannuation funds, pension funds, asset consultants, financial planning groups, family offices, high net worth individuals, wholesale and retail investors.

Name: PanAgora Asset Management
Description:
PanAgora Asset Management is a quantitative investment manager whose proprietary approach is designed to capitalize on inefficiencies across market cycles and to deliver relative and absolute returns through distinct and innovative equity, multi-asset and risk premia strategies. PanAgora’s approach combines the firm’s fundamental investment philosophy and original research with an advanced quantitative framework. These elements come together in an open, collaborative environment that builds upon the intellectual versatility of its team and leverages their complementary strengths — essential to serving the evolving objectives of institutional investors worldwide.

PanAgora was founded in 1989 and is based in Boston, MA. Shareholders include the Firm’s employees and Great-West Life of Canada, a member of the Power Financial Corporation Group of Companies.

Name: Infracapital
Description:
Infracapital invests in, builds and manages a diverse range of essential infrastructure to meet the changing needs of society and deliver the significant investment required to help build the future. We take an active role in all of our investments, to ensure they are adaptable and resilient with the scope for stable and sustainable growth. Our portfolio companies work closely with the communities where they are based, to the benefit of all stakeholders.
 
Infracapital is one of the longest standing European infrastructure platforms, founded in 2001. The team has worked with more than 60 companies around Europe and has raised and managed over €9 billion of client capital across seven funds.
 
Infracapital is part of M&G Plc, a leading international savings and investments business. M&G manages the long-term savings for around 5 million retail clients and more than 800 institutional clients in 26 markets. Total assets under management and administration are £332.8 billion (as at 30 June 2023)

Name: United Investments Portugal
Description:
United Investments Portugal (UIP) is a member of the IFA Hotels & Resorts consortium and the supporting name for Pine Cliffs Resort, Sheraton Cascais Resort, YOTEL Porto, Quinta Marques Gomes, the award-winning Wellness and SPA brand Serenity - The Art of Well Being and the new Hyatt Regency Lisboa. 
 
As an iconic development, Pine Cliffs Resort has set the benchmark for all IFA Hotels & Resorts projects, combining excellent investment opportunities such as real estate and holiday property products with luxury experiences.

Name: SPE Capital
Description:
SPE Capital is an independent asset management firm focused on investing responsibly and consistently delivering superior returns. SPE capital is led by an experienced senior team, working hand-in-hand with our partners to create lasting value and drive transformative impact.
SPE Capital is active in Europe, Africa and Middle East with more than USD 500m deployed predominantly in growth equity across a variety of countries and sectors including Healthcare, Education, Business Services and Manufacturing.
SPE Capital has offices in Abidjan, Cairo, Casablanca, Paris and Tunis and covers more than 30 markets.

Name: Sentinel Property Group
Description:
Sentinel Property Group is an industry-leading property investment firm focused on opportunistic investments in Australia’s commercial property market.

Our Trusts are consistently ranked as the best performing of their kind in Australia and are ideal for SMSF investors.

Sentinel aims to deliver wealth for its investors through strategic property purchases, hands-on asset administration, and identification and realisation of a value-add potential.

Our experienced and dedicated approach means we are able to identify investments with a strong mix of income revenue, capital growth potential and tax benefits. Drawing on our wide-ranging industry networks, we provide straight forward and transparent investment opportunities for investors. Sentinel is dedicated to the maximisation of investment growth opportunity (return on equity as well as capital value uplift) while seeking to control risk.

Name: Bluevale Capital Group
Description:
Bluevale is an ESG driven real estate investment firm. Our focus is optimizing commercial real estate, hospitality and affordable housing by minimizing construction waste and increasing energy efficiencies. 

We provide housing solutions for middle income citizens in the communities we invest in. We work closely and are heavily involved with local communities through outreach and philanthropy.

We are headquartered in Connecticut and Toronto. We operate and invest across North America.

Name: Purpose Investments
Description:
Purpose Investments is built around a simple yet powerful idea – creating better investment outcomes for all investors. We manage over $20B in assets through some of the highest-quality investment funds in Canada. We have built a modern discipline of investment management, rooted in our history of rules-based processes and complemented with the best active management in specialized asset classes and strategies, and strengthened by our commitment to managing risk every step of the way. We know that we have to be at the forefront of innovation, driving change to make investing smarter, safer, fairer and more open. We do everything with one person in mind – you, the investor. We fundamentally believe that achieving goals is about more than just beating a benchmark; it’s about building a resilient portfolio with strategies designed for specific outcomes, such as sustainable growth, reliable income, capital protection and uncorrelated returns.

Commissions, trailing commissions, management fees and expenses all may be associated with investment fund investments. Always read the prospectus before investing. There is no assurance that any fund will achieve its investment objective, and its net asset value, yield, and investment return will fluctuate from time to time with market conditions. If the securities are purchased or sold on a stock exchange, you may pay more or receive less than the current net asset value. Investment funds are not guaranteed, their values change frequently and past performance may not be repeated.

Certain statements presented are prepared as a general source of information and are not intended to provide any specific individual advice to purchase funds.  The opinions and any forward-looking statements, are solely those of Purpose at the date of posting, are subject to change without notice and are not guarantees of future performance or events and involve risks and uncertainties.

Important disclosures: https://www.purposeinvest.com/legal

Name: Aseel | أصيل
Description:
Saudi Real Estate Crowd Investing Platform.

الحساب الرسمي لـشركة أصيل المالية|منصتك للاستثمار الجماعي في الأصول الاستثمارية والعقارية.

Name: Global X ETFs Europe
Description: Global X ETFs was founded in 2008. For more than a decade, our mission has been empowering investors with unexplored and intelligent solutions. Global X is a member of Mirae Asset Global Investments, a Seoul-based global enterprise which offers asset management expertise worldwide. Explore our ETFs, research and insights, and more at globalxetfs.eu/explore. Capital at risk.

Name: Asia Bankers Club
Description:
Asia Bankers Club, part of IFCX group, is a premium property investment club for banking and finance executives, business owners, and their private guests. The Club has a growing member base regionally and offers physical asset market insight events to its members, including properties, fine wines, art, timepieces, antiques, diamonds, and other collectibles. Founded by Mr. Kingston Lai, a seasoned investment banker with extensive experience at Morgan Stanley and other leading financial institutions, the Club provides a unique platform for exclusive investment experience.

Asia Bankers Club is proud to announce its strategic partnership with Black Spade Capital. This collaboration will strengthen the group’s presence in China and internationally. With Black Spade’s strong industry connections, Asia Bankers Club is poised to enhance its offerings and continue to expand internationally. The partnership underscores a shared vision for growth and innovation in the property and business sectors.

Name: Manulife | CQS Investment Management
Description: CQS has been managing research-driven credit strategies for over 20 years, across multiple market cycles. Today, as a company of Manulife Investment Management, Manulife | CQS Investment Management offers investors a multi-sector alternative credit platform, focused on what our teams know best: global credit. The firm’s core capabilities span corporate credit (loans and bonds), asset backed securities (ABS), regulatory capital, collateralised loan obligations (CLOs), and convertible bonds. Manulife | CQS Investment Management's ambition is to continue to help investors achieve their goals across market cycles by selecting good quality credits and generating income.

Name: Cutter Associates
Description:
Cutter Associates serves the operational, technology, and client experience needs of the global investment management industry, providing our research members and consulting clients the tools and services they need to be successful.

By leveraging multi-faceted expertise and an unrivaled knowledgebase, we have established ourselves as a well-respected and trusted provider of truly independent research, a global consultancy for delivery of operational excellence, and a provider of revealing and actionable capability metrics.

Cutter Associates has helped some of the largest investment management firms around the world to realize business value from every process. Wide-ranging resources enable our clients to recognize strategic opportunities, keep pace with their competition, and stay ahead of the technology curve. They appreciate our deep understanding of the industry and our commitment to surpass their expectations in delivering measurable and sustainable process transformation. Wherever they are located and whatever their challenge, our clients look to us to have a lasting impact on their infrastructure.

Cutter Associates has offices in Massachusetts, USA, London, UK and Sydney, Australia and is on the web at www.cutterassociates.com.

Name: TwentyFour Asset Management LLP
Description: We are specialists in fixed income, headquartered in the City of London and now a boutique of the Swiss based Vontobel Group. Since our inception in 2008, we have built an enviable reputation for performance, expertise and innovation in our chosen sector. All of our people, resources and experience are dedicated to this one asset class, without any distractions. For professional investors only.

Name: Oman National Investments Development Company S.A.O.C. "TANMIA"
Description: Oman National Investments Development Company SAOC (formerly known as the National Investment Funds Company) was established in 1998 by Royal Decree No. 81/98, with the exclusive mandate to establish and manage investment funds. With the economic developments witnessed in the Sultanate of Oman over the years, the company gained significant expertise throughout its successful journey. Subsequently, Royal Decree No. 55/2013 was issued, allowing the company to expand its investments into diverse sectors such as industry, tourism, services, real estate development, and others. As part of these updates and to strengthen its developmental identity, the company adopted the name “TANMIA” as its commercial brand, reflecting its vision and future goals to enhance sustainable economic development in the Sultanate of Oman.

Name: Catalio Capital Management
Description: New York-based investment firm focused on the full lifecycle of innovative healthcare investing, across private, public and credit markets.

Name: APS Holding S.A.
Description:
APS is a distressed assets investment company and debt recovery platform with a prime position in Central and South-Eastern Europe and further expansion goals. Our business consists of acquiring, advising, and servicing non- performing loan (NPL) portfolios.

APS as an asset manager manages the entire investment process.
- Due diligence, portfolio valuation, collateral analyses, bidding processes
- Recovery process and exit

APS as a fund manager
- Manages private non-regulated funds and regulated funds

APS also provides 3rd party servicing
Consumer and secured loans (including mortgage loans)

APS was established in 2004 in Prague, the Czech Republic. Nowadays, APS is present in 11 countries enabling the coverage of entire CE and SEE.

Name: Ghrghar Group
Description:
Ghrghar Group is a multinational group of companies with a 22-year track record of deploying capabilities across multiple asset classes, covering various global jurisdictions. 

Our journey of capital investing and international trading has given us strong fiscal and commercial leverage, leading to higher rates of returns. 

Our philosophy is based on good governance, integrity and trust. Our values are to continue to be the harbingers for business growth; working with the single-minded focus of driving positive change through qualitative products and exceptional services.  

Our industries include Real Estate, Construction, Hospitality, F&B, Agro-industries, Motor and motor spare parts trading, Clothing Manufacturing, Facilities Management, Consumer Products, Luxury Fashion, Industrial Goods, Logistics, Private Equity and General Trading.

Our businesses are exceptionally fast-paced, where brilliant professionals lead various transformational mandates & investment strategies to drive value and growth. Our companies create a dynamic, rewarding environment, providing a collaborative and agile working space.
 
The Ghrghar Group is a career-driven organisation which believes in creating value for its employees, rewarding the best professionals with unwavering loyalty. 

Our partners and customers appreciate our knowledge base and commitment to increasing value because our total commitment and vested interest in the process can be found within our working culture.

The group will continue to pride itself in creating positive change through business activities. Today we are one of the fastest-growing conglomerates in the MENA region. Our mission is to stay true to our values and ethical practices as we aim for the highest standards of professionalism.

The Ghrghar Group represents the collective business interests of the Ghrghar family.

Name: Mohamed & Obaid Almulla Group
Description:
Mohamad and Obaid Almulla Group, a Dubai-based family-owned business launched in 1942, is a market leader in key strategic sectors of the country’s economy such as Hospitality, Healthcare & Pharmaceuticals, Real Estate, Travel & Tourism and Investments. 

Our flagship brand, American Hospital Dubai, is a benchmark in the UAE’s healthcare, and our pharmaceutical division, Monrol, is the first Radiopharmaceuticals manufacturer in Dubai. 

Our hospitality portfolio, with leading hotel names including Crowne Plaza Dubai–Deira, Ramada Jumeirah and Holiday Inn Express hotels, vigorously promotes UAE’s burgeoning medical tourism in tandem with American Hospital Dubai.

Our belief in innovation has earned us many milestones, beginning with the iconic Almulla Plaza, the first mixed-use property built in Dubai in 1978, to the launch this year of the first-ever Artificial Intelligence (AI) healthcare research center in the region in collaboration with Cerner, the global healthcare technology leader.

For 78 years, we have been led by our commitment to the strategic goals and aims of the UAE and we will continue to pioneer paths in business, enterprise, community welfare and knowledge skills for the country.

Name: ALPHA10X
Description: ALPHA10X is the AI leader in private markets investing. We enable investors and acquirers to move faster, underwrite with greater conviction, and allocate capital with precision—institutionalizing investment workflows to operationalize decisions that drive confident capital deployment. Founded in 2018, ALPHA10X is headquartered in Dubai with R&D in the South of France. Our team combines deep expertise in AI, quantum knowledge systems, and private-market investing—connecting people, capital, and ideas to reveal the underlying logic of markets. We help investors, acquirers, and strategic advisors turn complexity into clarity and knowledge into alpha. We are builders, operators, and investors who believe performance is driven by insight and strengthened by foresight. Our mission is to equip private-markets capital with intelligence, precision, and conviction.

Name: GLP Capital Partners
Description: GLP Capital Partners Limited, and certain of its affiliates, excluding its operations in Greater China, is now a part of Ares Management Corporation (NYSE: ARES). For more about Ares, visit www.aresmgmt.com.

Name: 17Capital
Description: 17Capital is a private credit manager, specializing in NAV finance for the private equity industry. It provides non-dilutive capital to high-quality private equity management companies, funds, and institutional investors as part of their toolkit for value creation and portfolio management. Founded in 2008, 17Capital has raised over $20 billion, and completed over 100 investments and 50 exits since inception.

Name: Hassad Food
Description: Established in 2008, Hassad Food is a fully owned subsidiary of Qatar Investment Authority (QIA). Considered as the country’s investment arm in food and agribusiness sectors, Hassad has several strategic commercial investments, both internationally and locally that supports Qatar’s food security efforts.

Name: Startup Braga
Description:
In partnership with Microsoft, Startup Braga is a leading innovation hub, designed to assist the inception and development of high potential entrepreneurial projects for international markets.
We provide business pre-acceleration, acceleration, and incubation programs, as well as facilitated access to investment sources, for startups with global ambitions.

Name: Canaccord Genuity Wealth Management Canada
Description:
At CG Wealth Management, we take a purposefully different approach to wealth management.

We saw an opportunity to build a highly personalized wealth management firm that meets the unique needs of high-net-worth Canadians better than anyone in the country. 

Our global footprint, boutique culture and industry-leading resources and specialists allow us to deliver customized client solutions that aim to provide better outcomes and an unmatched client experience.

It is a privilege to advise some of Canada’s most influential individuals and families. To meet these clients’ unique needs, our industry's leading advisors leverage CG’s vast resources, including wealth management and planning capabilities, investment specialists, technology, and global research.

In Canada, Canaccord Genuity Wealth Management is a division of Canaccord Genuity Corporation, Member of the Canadian Investor Protection Fund and the Investment Industry Regulatory Organization of Canada. Insurance and estate planning services are offered through Canaccord Genuity Wealth & Estate Planning Services Ltd.

Name: MIO Partners, Inc.
Description:
MIO (and related entities) is an indirect, wholly-owned subsidiary of McKinsey & Company and was formed in the early 1980s to provide asset management services for McKinsey’s retirement plan. Over time, we have expanded to support after-tax investments by McKinsey’s current and former partners, primarily by making available funds already offered in the retirement plan. Our aim was to provide partners with convenient, time-saving investment options, including access to alternative investments.

Today, we are a company of approximately 250 people managing retirement and after-tax investments for roughly 30,000 current and former McKinsey employees. A key element of our operating model is that we operate at cost, generating no profit for either MIO or McKinsey. Our incentives are aligned with those of our investors due to significant management participation in the funds.

Name: Enrichers Investment Group
Description:
Enrichers Investment Group, founded in 2011 by 𝗦𝘆𝗲𝗱 𝗔𝗯𝗱𝘂𝗹𝗹𝗮𝗵 𝗕𝘂𝗸𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗶, is a leading investment company in Pakistan, committed to empowering individuals and organizations to achieve their financial goals through innovative and effective investment strategies. With a strong foundation in regulatory compliance, 𝗘𝗻𝗿𝗶𝗰𝗵𝗲𝗿𝘀 𝗣𝗿𝗶𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝗟𝗶𝗺𝗶𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗶𝘀 𝗮 𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗲𝗻𝘀𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝗿𝗼𝗸𝗲𝗿 𝗼𝗳 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗸𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗻 𝗠𝗲𝗿𝗰𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗹𝗲 𝗘𝘅𝗰𝗵𝗮𝗻𝗴𝗲 (𝗣𝗠𝗘𝗫), and 𝗘𝗻𝗿𝗶𝗰𝗵𝗲𝗿𝘀 𝗦𝗲𝗰𝘂𝗿𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗲𝘀 𝗣𝗿𝗶𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝗟𝗶𝗺𝗶𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗶𝘀 𝗮 𝗧𝗥𝗘𝗖 𝗛𝗼𝗹𝗱𝗲𝗿 𝗼𝗳 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗸𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗻 𝗦𝘁𝗼𝗰𝗸 𝗘𝘅𝗰𝗵𝗮𝗻𝗴𝗲 (𝗣𝗦𝗫), both regulated by the Securities and Exchange Commission of Pakistan (SECP).

Our diverse portfolio offers investment opportunities across multiple sectors, including global financial markets, the Pakistan Stock Exchange, physical trade, business brokerage, and agriculture.  𝗔𝘁 𝗘𝗻𝗿𝗶𝗰𝗵𝗲𝗿𝘀, 𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗺𝗶𝘁𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝘁𝗼 𝗲𝘅𝗰𝗲𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗶𝘀 𝗱𝗿𝗶𝘃𝗲𝗻 𝗯𝘆 𝗮 𝘁𝗲𝗮𝗺 𝗼𝗳 𝘀𝗲𝗮𝘀𝗼𝗻𝗲𝗱 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗳𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗹𝘀 𝘄𝗵𝗼 𝗽𝗿𝗶𝗼𝗿𝗶𝘁𝗶𝘇𝗲 𝗿𝗶𝘀𝗸 𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗴𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗹𝗲𝗴𝗮𝗹 𝗱𝘂𝗲 𝗱𝗶𝗹𝗶𝗴𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲. By crafting customized investment plans for each client, we ensure they are equipped to make informed financial decisions and achieve sustainable, long-term success.

Name: Tricapitals Inversiones
Description: Empresa dedicada a prestar asesoría en inversiones inmobiliarias. Brindamos las mejores oportunidades de inversión ofreciendo un servicio personalizado.
Location: Las Condes, Región Metropolitana de Santiago

Name: Alrajhi Holding Group
Description: Al Rajhi Holding Group is a well established and diversified business group located in KSA where most companies exist in addition to UAE. Major activities of the group comprise of Project development; operations management; investments and acquisitions. Five Business sectors: Building Solutions; Contracting & Infrastructure; Financial Services; Industrial; Real Estate Development

Name: BFAM Partners (Hong Kong) Limited
Description:
BFAM Partners is a Hong Kong and New York based hedge fund manager with a track record in extracting value from credit, volatility, rates, equities and convertible bond markets.

Although proudly home-grown, we have attracted preeminent global investors who share our vision that only best-in-class people and processes can drive globally competitive absolute returns.

We are looking for exceptionally talented people, from new grads to seasoned professionals, across both investment and non-investment roles. If you can thrive in a high performance environment that empowers its people to deliver results, not excuses, we want you to get in touch with us.

For current openings, please visit our career website on https://www.bfam-partners.com/en/careers

Name: ER Group
Description:
ER. Ignite tomorrow.

ER is a leading Mauritian group listed on the official stock exchange. Formed in 2025 through the strategic merger of ENL and Rogers, ER builds on the trust, credibility, and recognition earned over 200 years of combined history, marked by a strong contribution to Mauritius’ economic and social development.

With over 7,400 employees and operations in 13 territories, ER is proudly Mauritian and focused on contributing meaningfully to the country’s progress, while expanding in mastered industries and sharing its expertise beyond its shores.

Leveraging a strong portfolio of respected, market-leading brands, ER operates across seven strategic segments: Agribusiness, Real Estate, Hospitality & Travel, Logistics, Finance, Commerce & Manufacturing, and Technology & Energy.

Guided by its purpose, 'Ignite Today, for a better Tomorrow', ER creates meaningful value by leading responsibly, combining strengths, expanding horizons, and contributing to shaping the future of Mauritius.

Name: Evli
Description: Evli on pohjoismainen varainhoitaja, joka auttaa yhteisöjä, yrityksiä ja yksityishenkilöitä kohti vauraampaa huomista. Tarjoamme palkittua ja tuloksellista varainhoitoa sekä laajan valikoiman erilaisia sijoitusratkaisuja 40 vuoden kokemuksella. Evlissä työskentelee 300 ammattilaista ja hallinnoimme 19,0 miljardin euron asiakasvarallisuutta (netto 3/2025). Evlin B-sarjan osakkeet on listattu Helsingin pörssiin.

Name: Caravela Capital
Description:
We support entrepreneurs who challenge the status quo to build extraordinary companies.

Our goal is not only to provide the capital a startup needs, but also the knowledge and tools to help the company scale. We count on a network of founders from Brazil’s leading startups who act as mentors, sharing experiences and guidance to accelerate and simplify the growth of our portfolio companies.

Name: Investo Investment LLC
Description:
As one of Dubai's leading investment companies, Investo is passionate about molding future investors and contributing to the city's thriving economy. Our investment profile is derived from Crescent International Group (CIG), Dubai's top investment and property development firm, which has a long-standing record of business excellence and client relations.

At Investo, we believe in providing highly profitable investment platforms to our clients while building a community that adds value to Dubai's economy. We diversify our investment schemes to ensure sustainable investment portfolios that deliver long-term value creation to our stakeholders.

Our portfolio includes a wide range of local and international assets, such as commercial real estate, commodities, delivery vans, and trading. We are also investing in our first subsidiary, Investo Smart Delivery Services, to lease out king long vans for commercial purposes.

At Investo, we are committed to providing exceptional financial and real estate services that prioritize customer-centricity, ethical ideals, sustainability, and corporate social responsibility. Our expert financial advisors provide comprehensive research and precise investment procedures to help both budding and accomplished investors build their portfolios and secure high-return investment plans.

We empower our clients with sound risk management and diversified investments to ensure better client satisfaction. With an all-around client-driven experience, we customize our extensive variety of investment choices to satisfy the different needs of high-net-worth and institutional clients. Our team combines the latest in-house market research with innovative investment strategies and solutions to suit each client's unique needs

Name: Odey Asset Management
Description:
Odey Asset Management is a London based investment firm managing assets for institutional investors, private banks and individual investors across Global, European and UK strategies.

The firm was established by Crispin Odey in 1991 to focus on active fund management with an equal emphasis on preserving capital and generating superior returns.

Odey has a deep investment team with career research analysts and a diversified client base committed to these principles, and performance continues to be the primary focus. The partners are among the largest investors in our strategies which aligns our interests with investors.

The Firm is authorised and regulated by the UK Financial Conduct Authority and registered as an investment adviser with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.

Name: Green Coast Enterprises LLC
Description:
Active since the late 60s, Green Coast Enterprises was formally established by Abdulghaffar Hussain in 1977 as a holding company to consolidate his investments and assets.

Over the years, Green Coast has grown and evolved into an established organization with diverse interests in market-leading businesses. Our portfolio covers various industries such as manufacturing and trading through established international partnerships, renewable energy and sustainability, real estate and investment management.

Being a family-owned business, Green Coast Enterprises takes a long-term view on its investments. The majority of the Group's assets have been under our umbrella for more than 30 years.. As an active owner, we work closely with the respective management teams to help them set strategies, formulate business plans and successfully grow their business. Our hands-on approach to investing requires us to allocate our time and capital in a highly selective manner.

Name: Capitalmind
Description:
We’re a SEBI registered Portfolio Management Service (PMS) and Cat III Alternate Investment Fund (AIF) managing over ₹2,000 Crores across our equity and debt investment strategies.

Name: AlSahl Group Holding
Description:
With a 65-year legacy of successful investments across agribusiness, industrial, commercial, and other key structural sectors in Libya, North Africa, and beyond ,Al Sahl Group Holding  Group continues to deliver unmatched products and services to both consumers and businesses. Our core activities—investment, production, importation, and distribution—are driven by a commitment to enhancing the quality of life for Libyans and consumers in the regional markets we serve.

Guided by our vision and leveraging our expertise, world-class infrastructure, and extensive network of international partners, we remain steadfast in our mission to elevate the standards of products and services across our industries.

Founded in 1959 by Hajj Al Mahdi Qaddad ( May he rest in peace)  as a family farming enterprise in the Al Jalida area south of Al Zahra, on the outskirts of Tripoli, Al Sahl Group Holding  started as a pioneer in agriculture, specializing in the cultivation of cereals (wheat and barley), olives, and olive oil. These sectors were crucial during Libya’s post-World War II renaissance and reconstruction. By the mid-1960s and 1970s, the Group diversified into real estate and building materials, establishing Libya’s first feed mill, bakery, melamine plastic factory, and a water bottling plant under the Al Waha brand in the 1990s.

Between 2002 and 2004, under the visionary leadership of the current Board of Directors, Al Sahl Group Holding  underwent significant restructuring, marking a new phase of expansion and investment in major projects and new sectors. This period saw the Group become a cornerstone in the localization of Libyan industries, extending its influence east and west.

Today, Al Sahl Group Holding  operates across six main business sectors:

Industrial Sector
Agricultural Sector
Healthcare Sector
Trade and Distribution Sector
Real Estate Investment and Construction Sector
Services, Energy & Technology sector
Services & IT Sector

Name: Occam Brasil Gestão de Recursos
Description:
A Occam Brasil Gestão de Recursos concentra o foco de seus gestores nos clientes, administrando fundos multimercado, de ações e de crédito privado e contando com uma equipe de profissionais com diferentes capacidades cognitivas e grande experiência no mercado financeiro.

A Occam Brasil nasce de um spin off da Brasil Plural Gestão de Recursos, buscando capturar ganhos de eficiência, foco e maior competitividade com a criação de uma gestora independente do Grupo Brasil Plural, que se manterá como sócio estratégico relevante.

A gestora parte da avaliação do cenário econômico, análise fundamentalista e rigoroso monitoramento de risco e, com estrita aderência a cada mandato, elabora sua carteira de investimento. A gestora busca atuar em todos os segmentos do mercado, visando obter os maiores retornos ajustados ao risco para seus clientes. O alinhamento de interesses da Occam é fortalecido com a aplicação da maior parte do patrimônio de seus gestores e analistas nos fundos da própria gestora.

O nome da gestora se remete ao princípio de Occam, criado pelo filósofo William de Ockham. Este princípio estabelece que, ao deparar com uma questão, devemos nos concentrar apenas no essencial, excluindo o que seja irrelevante. Este princípio, adotado por diversos cientistas e filósofos como, por exemplo, “Não devemos admitir mais causas para as coisas naturais do que aquelas que forem verdadeiras e suficientes para explicar as suas aparências” de Isaac Newton, ou “Tudo deve ser feito tão simples quanto possível, embora não o mais simples” de Einstein, se adequa à nossa filosofia de investimento e explica a escolha de seu nome para nossa gestora.

Name: Explorer
Description:
Explorer Investments IS Portugal’s Leading Independent Alternatives Fund Manager.

Founded in 2003, Explorer is Portugal's premier independent manager of alternative assets, renowned for its exceptional quality, deep expertise, and excellent track record. With €1.8 billion in assets under management, Explorer operates across three core business areas: Private Equity (Buyout and Growth Capital), Tourism, and Real Estate.

Our team of over 50 professionals combines diverse skills and experience in investment banking, consulting, legal advisory, and industry. This unique blend of expertise, alongside our deep knowledge of the Portuguese business landscape, gives Explorer a distinct competitive edge in managing alternative assets. Additionally, our long-standing relationships with financial intermediaries, banks, public entities, and legal professionals reinforce our position as a trusted industry leader.

Explorer’s strong investment track record demonstrates our ability to identify high-potential opportunities and create sustainable value for investors, businesses, and communities. By adhering to international best practices, we focus on developing the businesses within our portfolio and ensuring a positive impact on both the environment and society.

At Explorer, our mission is to generate strong returns for our investors and make a positive impact on our communities. We drive the evolution of alternative asset management while contributing to Portugal’s economic growth and long-term sustainability.

Name: F2i SGR
Description:
F2i SGR, which stands for Fondi Italiani per le Infrastrutture (Italian Infrastructure Fund), was established in 2007 and is Italy’s largest independent infrastructure fund manager. The companies within F2i’s network form the country’s leading infrastructure platform, diversified across six strategic sectors vital to the economy: transport and logistics, energy for the transition, circular economy, distribution networks, telecommunications networks and services, and social and healthcare infrastructure.
Led since 2014 by CEO Renato Ravanelli, F2i, through its portfolio companies, aims to create value for both investors and the nation by channelling financial resources from domestic and international investors into tangible economic projects. Our teams consist of professionals with extensive industry experience (energy, transport, telecommunications) as well as experts from the financial and private equity sectors.

Name: Border To Coast Pensions Partnership
Description:
As a customer-owned and customer-focused organisation, integrity is one of our values, as is our collaborative and sustainable approach.

Border to Coast is the largest LGPS (Local Government Pension Scheme) pool in the UK. It is owned by 11 Local Government Pension Schemes (‘Partner Funds’). The Partner Funds represent 2,900 employers and over a million members. The Partner Funds are Bedfordshire, Cumbria, Durham, East Riding, Lincolnshire, North Yorkshire, South Yorkshire, Surrey, Teesside, Tyne and Wear and Warwickshire.

The Partner Funds have c.£65.3bn in investments, of which Border to Coast is responsible for managing or overseeing 85% of assets totalling £55.4bn (as of 31 March 2025). 

Our purpose is to make a difference for the LGPS. We seek to do this by providing cost-effective and innovative investment opportunities delivering returns over the long-term for Partner Funds, their employers and over 1.1 million LGPS members.

Border to Coast offers investment opportunities across equities, fixed income, private markets, and global and UK real estate. Responsible Investment is central to our work and is embedded in how we invest across our range of assets.

Since launch, Border to Coast has been awarded many industry accolades and in 2024 became a Sunday Times Best Place to Work.

Name: OngoleBulls

Our collaborative ecosystem fosters innovation and collaboration among talented individuals, enabling them to contribute meaningfully to our growing portfolio of businesses. Join us in shaping the future!

Name: SEAF
Description:
Small Enterprise Assistance Funds (SEAF) is a global impact private equity manager focused on providing growth capital and operational support to small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) in emerging markets underserved by traditional sources of capital. 

Utilizing an ESG+ investment approach, SEAF selectively makes structured debt and equity investments in locally-owned enterprises with high growth potential to actively build resilience within SMEs themselves and more largely within their communities, focusing on climate, food security, and inclusion. Our more than 32 years of experience have shown that impact investing and maximizing performance complement each other— we can do good and realize strong financial returns. 
. 
SEAF is a global organization, headquartered in Washington D.C., with 15 offices in Central and Eastern Europe, Latin America, the Caribbean, Asia, the Middle East and North Africa, and Sub-Saharan Africa. Over the past three decades, SEAF has managed more than 40 Funds and across 33 countries. SEAF’s on-the-ground presence in our countries of focus, coupled with our proactive and responsive business model, enables us to source opportunities and work closely with local entrepreneurs, providing the capital, hands-on operational support, knowledge, and networks they need to accelerate their businesses’ growth and profitability and achieve meaningful and measurable impact in their communities. SEAF also supports ten Centers for Entrepreneurship and Development (CEED) around the world to provide training, mentoring, and global access to professional networks and entrepreneur-run businesses.

Name: Aditya Birla Ventures
Description:
Founded in late 2021 by Aryaman Vikram Birla and backed by Aditya Birla Group, Aditya Birla Ventures (‘ABV’) invests in new age leading businesses of tomorrow, led by outstanding founding teams.

Aditya Birla Ventures is sector agnostic, however, has special focus on Fin-Tech,  Health-tech, Consumer-tech, Enterprise Applications (SaaS), AI and Consumer Products (brands).

As a Venture Capital firm, ABV invests from Pre-Series A stage to Series B rounds. Apart from financial  investments, it aspires to open ABG’s global eco-system, wealth of experience and industry relationships for the growth of its portfolio companies. 

ABV's portfolio include: Dukaan, Giva, FinBox, Eka.Care, MoooFarm, Digantara, Mokobara, Pixxel, Uptime AI, Stable Money, FirstClub

Name: Nickel Digital Asset Management
Description:
At Nickel Digital Asset Management we are offering institutional investors secure, efficient and transparent access to growth opportunities in the digital asset market. This unique market delivers uncorrelated returns, hence improving the diversification of institutional portfolios. 

Nickel was founded by fixed income arbitrage and investment management veterans who brought multiyear experience from major Wall Street banks, including Bankers Trust, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan, and Deutsche Bank, as well as a number of multi-billion hedge funds. This experience is complemented by academic background in mathematics, econometrics and engineering with degrees from Wharton, LSE, and the University of Oxford.

The Firm manages assets for institutional investors using market-neutral arbitrage strategies, exploiting volatility swings, market inefficiencies and price dislocations. We are targeting consistent absolute returns within a strictly-defined risk framework. 

We believe that through portfolio diversification, this new asset class is able to significantly improve the efficient frontier of underlying portfolios. 

NICKEL IS A MEMBER OF NATIONAL FUTURES ASSOCIATION (“NFA”) AND IS SUBJECT TO NFA'S REGULATORY OVERSIGHT AND EXAMINATIONS. NICKEL HAS ENGAGED OR MAY ENGAGE IN UNDERLYING OR SPOT VIRTUAL CURRENCY TRANSACTIONS IN A COMMODITY POOL. ALTHOUGH NFA HAS JURISDICTION OVER NICKEL AND ITS COMMODITY POOLS, YOU SHOULD BE AWARE THAT NFA DOES NOT HAVE REGULATORY OVERSIGHT AUTHORITY FOR UNDERLYING OR SPOT MARKET VIRTUAL CURRENCY PRODUCTS OR TRANSACTIONS OR VIRTUAL CURRENCY EXCHANGES, CUSTODIANS OR MARKETS. YOU SHOULD ALSO BE AWARE THAT GIVEN CERTAIN MATERIAL CHARACTERISTICS OF THESE PRODUCTS, INCLUDING LACK OF A CENTRALIZED PRICING SOURCE AND THE OPAQUE NATURE OF THE VIRTUAL CURRENCY MARKET, THERE CURRENTLY IS NO SOUND OR ACCEPTABLE PRACTICE FOR NFA TO ADEQUATELY VERIFY THE OWNERSHIP AND CONTROL OF A VIRTUAL CURRENCY OR THE VALUATION ATTRIBUTED TO A VIRTUAL CURRENCY BY NICKEL.

Name: Property Share
Description:
Property Share is a revolutionary tech-driven platform with a unique single asset investment approach. 

Our platform gives you direct access to institutional quality real estate in cities and micro-markets of your choosing. Property Share is registered with and regulated by the Securities Exchange Board of India (SEBI) as investment manager to India’s 1st Small & Medium REIT (SM REIT), a new asset class within the existing larger REIT framework. 

What you get:

1. Direct Access to high yielding office assets, similar to HNIs and institutional investors

2. Liquidity through units listed on NSE and BSE compared to illiquid fund structures

3. Tech that allows you to view assets virtually, track investments and optimise returns

4. Regulated benefits of transparency, fairness and investor grievance mechanisms

Beach Point also has strategic initiatives in private equity and real estate. The firm invests on behalf of institutional investors and currently has over 175 employees globally with offices in Los Angeles, New York, Dublin and London. Beach Point was named to Pension & Investments’ list of Best Places to Work in Money Management in 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023 and 2024 and was recognized as an Inclusive Workplace by Best Companies Group and COLOR Magazine in 2022, 2023 and 2024.

Name: DPAM
Description:
Active. Sustainable. Research.

As part of the Indosuez Wealth Management Group, DPAM provides active, sustainable asset management services, driven by in-house research. 

DPAM’s conviction-based investment decision processes integrate fundamental financial and ESG analysis. DPAM advances to thrive, aiming for long-term outperformance and growth that benefits investors and society.

Luxcara is an independent asset manager offering institutional investors equity and debt investment opportunities in clean infrastructure. Luxcara acquires, structures, finances and operates clean infrastructure portfolios.
The owner-managed company was founded in 2009 by two women and has since valued its team diversity. Based in Hamburg, a highly qualified team of specialists manages a portfolio of clean infrastructure projects, such as solar plants, on- and offshore wind farms, ev charging stations, hydrogen power plants and many more, in Europe with a total capacity of around 6.5 gigawatts and an investment volume of about 7.5 billion euros.

Name: Industrial Development Corporation
Description:
The Industrial Development Corporation of Zambia is an investment company wholly owned by the Zambian government, incorporated in early 2014.

IDC’s mandate is to play a catalytic role in deepening and supporting Zambia’s industrialisation capacity to promote job creation and domestic wealth formation across key economic sectors. The IDC plays its role through evaluation, pricing and lowering the investment risk profile by serving as co-investor alongside private sector investors.

The IDC facilitates provision and raising of long term finance for projects. Simultaneously, IDC serves as an investment holding company for State-Owned Enterprises (SOEs) and new investments that ultimately generate earnings for the proposed Zambia Sovereign Wealth Fund.

The IDC is an active shareholder and investor focused on a broad spectrum of sectors including agriculture, forestry, manufacturing, financial services, mining, energy, telecommunications, logistics, medical, education, tourism, real estate and media.

Name: Manulife Investment Management, Timberland and Agriculture
Description:
Manulife Investment Management manages a diversified global portfolio of timberland and agriculture with forests covering 5.5 million acres across the United States, Australia, Brazil, Canada, Chile, and New Zealand, and farms covering nearly 400,000 acres of prime farmland across the United States, Australia, Canada, and Chile as of March 31, 2023.  

With nearly 40 years of experience building and sustainably managing global forests and farms while contributing to the environment and local communities, we’ve become the world’s largest natural capital investment manager. Our commitment is to the stewardship of our land: we operate in a way that improves our environment and nourishes communities.
	
As of November 15, 2021, Hancock Natural Resource Group adopted the Manulife Investment Management brand. Manulife Investment Management’s comprehensive private markets strategies include private equity and credit, real estate, infrastructure, timberland, and agriculture. For regular updates on our private markets business, follow us at @Manulife Investment Management.

Name: Fator Gestão de Recursos
Description:
A Fator Gestão de Recursos, empresa do Conglomerado Fator, é uma das principais gestoras independentes do mercado brasileiro, com mais de 20 anos de experiência na administração e gestão de fundos de investimento, reconhecida pela solidez e performance consistente.

Atuamos com rigor técnico e governança, oferecendo soluções de investimento que unem disciplina, análise fundamentalista e visão de longo prazo, sempre com foco em preservação de capital e geração consistente de valor.

Nosso portfólio abrange fundos de Renda Fixa, Renda Variável, Multimercado, Crédito Privado, Imobiliário, Fundo de Fundos, Debêntures, Previdência e estruturados, além de mandatos exclusivos para investidores institucionais e de alta renda.

Com uma equipe de especialistas experientes e comprometidos, unimos análise profunda, inovação e proximidade com o cliente para apoiar decisões assertivas e gerar valor de forma contínua.

Nossa gestão combina performance, transparência e responsabilidade, sempre guiada pelos nossos pilares de solidez, consistência, governança e proximidade — reforçando o compromisso com resultados sustentáveis e foco no cliente.
