Name: İhlas Holding
Description:
Temelleri 1970’te Türkiye Gazetesi’nin yayın hayatına başlamasıyla atılan İhlas Holding, 55 yıllık köklü geçmişinden aldığı güçle faaliyet gösterdiği her sektörde toplumun geleceğine katkı sunmayı amaçlamaktadır.

30 şirket ve 2.959 çalışanıyla; habercilikten gayrimenkule, sağlıktan eğitime ve enerji yatırımlarına uzanan geniş bir alanda sürdürülebilir kalkınma vizyonunu hayata geçirmektedir.

1990’da başlattığı İhlas Yuva Evleri projesiyle inşaata adım atan grup, aynı yıl kurulan İhlas Ev Aletleri ile elektronik ve ev aletleri üretimine girmiş, 1991’de faaliyete geçen Türkiye Hastanesi ile sağlık alanında yerini almıştır.

1990’larda Türkiye Gazetesi’nin yurt dışında dağıtımı ve Almanya’da basılması, İhlas’ın medya sektöründeki liderliğini pekiştirmiştir.

1993’te tüm şirketlerini İhlas Holding çatısı altında toplayarak büyüme hedefini güçlendirmiş; 1994’te İhlas Haber Ajansı, TGRT FM ve TGRT TV’yi kurmuş; 1996’da İhlas Kolejini açmıştır.

2003’te İhlas Yayın Holding ile medya faaliyetlerini tek çatı altında toplayan grup, 2004’te TGRT Haber TV’yi kurarak haber odaklı yayıncılığa yönelmiştir.

2019’da İhlas Gayrimenkul Proje Geliştirme A.Ş. bünyesinde birleştirilen inşaat projeleriyle bugüne dek 23.542 konut ve 1.002 iş yeri tamamlanmış, 974 konut ve 85 iş yeri inşaatı sürmektedir.

Gıda ve yemek üretimiyle üretim alanındaki varlığını güçlendiren İhlas Holding, yürüttüğü uluslararası  enerji ve sürdürülebilirlik faaliyetleri ile enerji alanında da iddialı olduğunu ortaya koymaktadır. Bu çerçevede, stratejik iştirakimiz Orta Asya Investment Holding, Kırgızistan’da yürüttüğü projelerle Orta Asya’nın temiz enerji dönüşümünde ve bölgesel kalkınmasında kritik bir rol üstlenmektedir. Bu vizyon, Türkiye ile Kırgızistan arasındaki iş birliğini güçlendirirken, bölgenin Avrupa, Çin ve Orta Doğu arasında bir yeşil enerji köprüsü haline gelmesine de katkıda bulunmaktadır.

Name: Gulaylar Group
Description:
‘’GÜLAYLAR GROUP’’  Hakkında 

Türkiye’nin 500 Büyük Sanayi Kuruluşu listesinde 108’inci sırada yer alan Gülaylar Group’un bünyesinde bulunan farklı sektörlerdeki 36 Şirkette 1.600 Kişi çalışmaktadır. Gülaylar Group, Türkiye ve Dünya çapındaki yapılanması ile Türkiye’nin en köklü kurumları arasında yer almaktadır.

Arkasında 100 yıla yaklaşan tecrübe ve sermaye birikimi ile sağlam temeller üzerinde kurulmuş kurumsal bir geçmişe sahip olan Gülaylar Group; ana sektörü kuyumculuk olarak tanınsa da, son 40 seneyi aşkın süredir; Turizm, Lojistik, AVM, Ofis vb.  Gayrimenkul Geliştirme ve İnşaat sektörlerinde ki uluslararası çaptaki yatırımları ile öne çıkmakta.

Grubun Yatırımları arasında;

•	City’s Nişantaşı AVM, 
•	Meydan İstanbul AVM, 
•	Kozyatağı City’s İstanbul AVM (eski Kozyatağı Carrefour), 
•	New York, IGT Shopping Mall, 
•	Uluslararası Lojistik Merkezi, Gebze (Avrupanın en önemli lojistik 
        centerlarından)
•	Elegance Hotels International, Marmaris (500 Yatak, 5 Yıldız) 
•	Just Work Ofis Kampüs – yatay’da 10.000 m2, 1.500 kişilik yeni 
        jenerasyon paylaşımlı ofis (Co-Working), 
•	Nuruosmaniye Ofis Binası,

vb. Uluslararası yatırımlar yer almakta. 

Gülaylar Group, ana sektörü olan kuyumculuk ve mücevherat sektöründe de; tasarımdan toptan satışa, ithalattan, ihracata, Online Satışa tam entegre bir yapıda faaliyet göstermektedir.
Gülaylar Kuyumculuk Grubu” dünyada hızla gerçekleşen büyük teknoloji değişimine paralel şekilde; artık yarının dünyasını sunan bir teknoloji şirketi haline dönüşmüştür.  Hedefleri ve köklü değerleriyle “GÜLAYLAR”, Online Satış siteleri ile hem yurtiçinde, hem de yurtdışında geleceğin dünyasına açılmaktadır. Dijitalleşerek tüm satışlarını teknoloji odaklı şekilde “Online Satış” platformları üzerinden yapılandırmaya geçen “GÜLAYLAR”, müşterilerinin göstermiş olduğu büyük güvenle Türkiye’nin en güvenilir, saygın mücevher Online Satış sitesi “www.gulaylar.com” ve “tektas.com” ile koleksiyonlarını müşterilerine sunmaktadır.

Name: Opale Capital
Description:
Opale Capital est la plateforme de sélection en architecture ouverte et d’investissement créée par Tikehau Capital. Elle permet aux conseillers financiers de proposer à leurs clients particuliers des opportunités en non coté jusque-là réservées aux investisseurs institutionnels, à partir de 100K€.
 
Nous proposons une sélection mondiale de fonds sur des stratégies de Dette Privée, Crédit Tactique, Secondaire, Co-investissement et Growth Buyout, avec à la fois des références mondiales et à la fois des gérants « sous les radars ».
 
Tikehau Capital (notre maison mère) investit ses fonds propres dans chacun des fonds sélectionnés pour assurer l'alignement d'intérêt avec les investisseurs particuliers.

Pour donner quelques exemples, nous proposons ou avons proposé des solutions d'investissement avec des fonds de Goldman Sachs, Sagard, AlpInvest, HarbourVest, Lexington Partners, Tikehau Capital, Morgan Stanley, Keensight Capital, Webster Equity Partners, Oaktree, Marlin Equity Partners, GHO Capital, Ares, Blackstone, Bridgepoint...

OPALE CAPITAL SAS - Société de Gestion au capital de 4 659 164 euros - Siège social : 32, rue de Monceau, 75008 Paris - Agrément AMF GP-20240010 | RCS Paris 921 277 208

Name: Investo
Description:
As one of Dubai's leading investment companies, Investo is passionate about molding future investors and contributing to the city's thriving economy. Our investment profile is derived from Crescent International Group (CIG), Dubai's top investment and property development firm, which has a long-standing record of business excellence and client relations.

At Investo, we believe in providing highly profitable investment platforms to our clients while building a community that adds value to Dubai's economy. We diversify our investment schemes to ensure sustainable investment portfolios that deliver long-term value creation to our stakeholders.

Our portfolio includes a wide range of local and international assets, such as commercial real estate, commodities, delivery vans, and trading. We are also investing in our first subsidiary, Investo Smart Delivery Services, to lease out king long vans for commercial purposes.

At Investo, we are committed to providing exceptional financial and real estate services that prioritize customer-centricity, ethical ideals, sustainability, and corporate social responsibility. Our expert financial advisors provide comprehensive research and precise investment procedures to help both budding and accomplished investors build their portfolios and secure high-return investment plans.

We empower our clients with sound risk management and diversified investments to ensure better client satisfaction. With an all-around client-driven experience, we customize our extensive variety of investment choices to satisfy the different needs of high-net-worth and institutional clients. Our team combines the latest in-house market research with innovative investment strategies and solutions to suit each client's unique needs

Name: LG Corp.
Description: LG Corp. is a holding company that controls other companies by means of holding their stocks. As a holding company, LG Corp., formerly known as LG Chem Investment Ltd., merged with LG Electronics Investment Ltd. and the real estate and investment divisionof LG MRO and changed its name from LG Chem Investment Ltd. to LG Corp. in March 2003.

Name: AlphaX RE Capital
Description:
AlphaX RE Capital is a women-founded builder-developer, real estate investment and asset management company based in Silicon Valley, dedicated to creating innovative and sustainable communities throughout California. With nearly 70% of women in the company, we are proud to champion diversity and representation in the industry.

We operate with a vertically integrated, streamlined process. From acquisition and financing to design, construction, asset management, and disposition, we manage every stage in-house. This approach ensures efficiency and quality in our real estate development and private lending, optimizing professional investment opportunities and securing stable returns for our investors.

Currently, we have more than $420 million assets under management and more than 820+ projects in operation, including master developments, planned communities, scattered single-family residences, and ADUs across Northern and Southern California.  

Our vision is to address the California housing crisis by bridging the gap for Missing Middle Housing and developing affordable, sustainable housing solutions. 

At AlphaX, we put community first—enhancing social welfare and empowering women and minorities. Through non-profit initiatives like the AlphaX Foundation and the Small Builders Association (SBA), we create opportunities for younger generations who are passionate about real estate and innovation.

Our mission goes beyond building homes—it’s about fostering a sense of belonging, promoting equity, and empowering the next wave of leaders in the real estate industry. 

Our Achievements As of June 2025:  
• 820+ Total Units of Properties  
• $420M+ Assets Under Management
• $700M+ Total Value of Properties 
• 540+ Total Units of Future Construction (2025-2028)
• $870M+ Total After-Built Value of Future Construction (2025–2028)  

AlphaX is headquartered in Cupertino, CA, with extended offices in Southern California and Arizona.

Name: The Kingdom Health المملكة للرعاية الصحية والتعليم الطبي
Description:
المملكة للرعاية الصحية والتعليم الطبي هي شركة مملوكة بالكامل للصندوق السعودي الأردني للاستثمار. 

تأسست الشركة في العام 2022 بغرض تنفيذ مشروع الرعاية الصحية والتعليم الطبي، الذي يهدف إلى المساهمة في رفع مستوى خدمات الرعاية الصحية والتعليم الطبي في الأردن والمنطقة، وأيضاً إلى تعزيز مكانة الأردن في هذا المجال إقليمياً وعالمياً.

The Kingdom Health is a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Saudi Jordanian Investment Fund (SJIF). 

It was established in 2022 to implement the Healthcare Project, which seeks to contribute to enhancing healthcare services and medical education in Jordan and the region, in addition to strengthening Jordan’s position in these sectors on regional and global levels.

Name: Community Investment Management
Description: Community Investment Management (CIM) is a private credit investment manager dedicated to advancing fintech solutions to address credit gaps across North America and emerging markets. We provide secured, strategic debt capital to enable fintech companies to scale their credit products effectively and responsibly.

Name: Praemia REIM
Description:
Praemia REIM is one of Europe’s leading real estate investment and asset managers, with €35bn of assets under management. 

Combining a global outlook with deep local expertise, we deliver investment solutions for institutional and private investors across the office, healthcare, residential, hospitality and retail sectors. 

We structure and manage a broad range of investment strategies designed to deliver sustainable long-term income. ESG principles are embedded across our business and integrated into every stage of our investment process.

Key Figures*

	•	€35bn of assets under management
	•	€18bn invested in healthcare real estate
	•	Assets spanning 12 European countries 
	•	8 offices in Europe and 2 offices in Asia
	•	450+ professionals

*All figures as of 30 June 2025

Name: Inter Asset
Description:
Inovação e solidez fazem parte do nosso DNA.

Desde 2003, oferecemos soluções inteligentes para a gestão de seus investimentos e somos especialistas em renda fixa e crédito privado.

Name: Primavera Capital Group
Description: Primavera Capital Group is an Asia Pacific-based investment firm. It manages capital for leading institutions, corporations, and prominent family offices around the world. By developing long-term partnerships, we help portfolio companies realize their full potential, deliver superior returns for investors and drive positive social change. Primavera seeks to capture the most attractive investment opportunities from the dynamic Asia-Pacific region, particularly China’s historic transition from a “Middle Income Society” to a fully developed “Advanced Economy.” Our investments target consumer and retail, technology, climate action, healthcare, advanced manufacturing, business services, and financial services sectors.

Name: Hirtle, Callaghan & Co.
Description: Hirtle Callaghan was founded in 1988 as America's First Outsourced Chief Investment OfficerTM serving non-profits and philanthropic families. Our mission is to strengthen the institutions and families who positively impact our world. Serving as a dedicated independent investment office has been our sole focus for over 35 years. Our business is centered around making it personal.  With each client in mind, we create customized investment programs that are diversified across global opportunities, including public and private markets. We hold ourselves accountable as if we are employees in our clients’ own internal investment office, knowing that their investment results will help create opportunities, solve difficult societal problems, educate generations of students and make our world a better place.

Name: Janus Continental Group (JCG)
Description: Janus Continental Group (JCG) is a dynamic consortium of business ventures spanning the Energy, Real Estate and Hospitality sectors, working at the intersection of innovation and collaboration to apply the best sustainable business practices possible and bring meaningful, reliable services to communities internationally. Our ventures include Dalbit Petroleum, GL Africa Energy, BSL Infrastructure, Fairmont Mount Kenya Safari Club, The Hub Karen and Mount Kenya Wildlife Conservancy.

Name: Alatiyah Investment
Description:
Alatiyah Investment Group: Where Innovation Meets Impact

Alatiyah Investment Group is a dynamic Saudi Arabian conglomerate shaping a better future. We are passionate about driving growth and positive change across two core sectors:
Medical Sector: We invest in innovative solutions and facilities that improve people's lives.

Agri-Food: We champion sustainable practices to ensure a secure and healthy food supply chain.

Beyond these core areas, our diversified portfolio encompasses various thriving businesses, allowing us to maximize our impact.
At Alatiyah, we combine cutting-edge innovation with deep industry expertise to achieve excellence. We are driven by a commitment to sustainability and a brighter future for all.
Join us and be part of a company that's transforming industries and touching lives.

Name: Bakrie & Brothers
Description: Strategic Investment Company that Invest in Indonesia growth sectors such as telecom, mining, plantation, property, oil and gas.

Name: L&G – Asset Management, America
Description:
L&G's asset management division is a major global investor across public and private markets, with $1.4 trillion.* Our clients include individual savers, pension scheme members and global institutions, who invest alongside L&G’s own balance sheet.

We provide investment solutions from index-tracking and active funds to liquidity and liability-based risk management strategies. 

Our investment philosophy and processes are focused on creating value over the long term. We believe that incorporating financially material sustainability criteria, when relevant to our clients, can create value and drive positive change. This reflects L&G’s purpose: ‘Investing for the long term. Our futures depend on it.’ 

*Source: L&G internal data as at June 30, 2024. The AUM disclosed aggregates the assets managed by L&G's asset management divisions in the UK, US and Hong Kong (2018-2019 only), and Singapore from July 2023. Excludes joint ventures and assets managed by associates.

Legal & General Investment Management America, Inc. (d/b/a L&G – Asset Management, America) (“LGIMA”, “LGIM America”) is a registered investment adviser with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (“SEC”). LGIMA provides investment advisory services to U.S. clients. L&G’s asset management division more broadly—and the non-LGIMA affiliates that comprise it—are not registered as investment advisers with the SEC and do not independently provide investment advice to U.S. clients. Registration with the SEC does not imply any level of skill or training.

Name: PGIM Quantitative Solutions
Description:
As the quantitative and multi-asset specialist of PGIM, we combine the agility of an independently run boutique with the
stability and scale of a leading global institutional asset manager. For over 48 years, we have designed proprietary methods that seek to solve beyond alpha by combining the latest technology with scalable, rigorous risk controls to nimbly build and manage diversified and customized solutions that help solve clients’ evolving challenges.

 2024 PGIM Quantitative Solutions. All Rights Reserved.

Name: AlOtaishan Holding
Description:
The Al-Otaishan company started in 1982 as Abdulrahman Al-Otaishan Transport establishment with one truck. Over time, it evolved into a specialized Saudi company offering logistics, industrial, and trading services. The company changed its name to Abdul Rahama Al-Otaishan and Sons Group in 2016. The group, founded by Sheikh Abdulrahman bin Saleh Al-Otaishan, includes sectors and companies in industry, commerce, transportation, logistics services, construction, and maintenance services.

In 2022, Al-Otaishan Holding Company was launched as part of the group's development plan. The company aims to become a national model in the construction, maintenance, logistics services, and industrial sectors and contribute to the development of industry and commerce in Saudi Arabia. They currently own a fleet of over 1000 heavy transport trucks, have a network of 15 branches, and employ over 3500 employees.

Name: STM
Description:
STM is involved in the development of 
large-scale, multi-industry projects across 
various sectors, including residential, 
commercial, educational, technological, 
sports, and recreational infrastructures. With 
a commitment to innovation and excellence, 
STM sets the benchmark for high-quality 
urban development and sustainable city 
projects that shape the future of Egypt.

Name: Alychlo
Description: Alychlo NV is the family investment company of entrepreneur Marc Coucke. We invest to make companies better, to make life better and to give back to society.

Name: Mchezo Limited
Description:
Mchezo is a Rwanda-based company. Mchezo is focused on investing in the future of sport and technology in Africa. 

We aim to boost the development of gaming by ensuring transparency and compliance in the thriving sports industry which continues to provide many opportunities for the people at large. Our team, led by Ntoudi Mouyelo, achieves this by investing in sports, expanding our services and venturing into new markets. 

Our newly established investment hub in Kigali, will accelerate our service delivery across Africa, as well as position us to explore new investment opportunities into sports and financial inclusion.

Name: MAG Group Holding
Description:
MAG Group Holding is a multinational conglomerate based in Dubai, UAE. The group was established in 1978 by Founder and Chairman Moafaq Al Gaddah, and is now one of the largest corporations in the region, maintaining a highly prominent position of leadership among its peers in the real estate, contracting and engineering, industrial and commercial trading, freight services, and hospitality sectors. The group is headquartered in the UAE and has offices in China, Iraq, Turkey, and the USA, encompassing more than 50 companies and employing over 2,000 people around the world.

MAG Group believes that success is reserved for those who dare to change and embrace progress. Underpinned by this vision, the group’s mission is to achieve economic growth across all of the sectors it operates in, while always preserving its moral values and placing the priority on benefiting its customers and communities. 

Since its humble beginnings as a one-man spare automotive parts company, MAG Group Holding has evolved to become one of the most highly respected and awarded conglomerates in the Middle East.

Name: Leste Group
Description:
Leste Group is an independent alternative investment manager dedicated to delivering consistent, risk-adjusted returns. The firm offers a diverse array of strategies across real estate equity and credit, private equity, and special situations. Its innovative solutions address critical financing complexities provide unique investment opportunities to institutional clients, registered investment advisers, family offices, and wealth managers in the United States, Latin America, and globally.

The team leverages institutional-grade processes, robust risk management, capital markets expertise, entrepreneurial spirit, and exclusive networks to originate unique opportunities, provide working capital, and serve as genuine partners throughout the investment lifecycle. As the firm continues to grow, Leste Group remains bold and nimble in both philosophy and culture, creating significant impact in our communities and markets, often rivaling much larger managers.

Content Disclaimer: All investments involve risk. The strategies discussed here are core private investment strategies of Leste, shared for informational purposes only and should not be perceived as an offer to buy or sell any security. Please refer to SEC filings for further information on Leste and its funds.

Name: RGREEN INVEST
Description:
RGREEN INVEST is an independent, mission-driven and B Corp Certified investment management company founded in Paris in 2013. The company has a proven track record of investing in and financing infrastructure projects that power our energy transition, climate change mitigation and adaptation. With 40+ experienced professionals whose expertise spans fund management, investment banking and renewable energy, RGREEN INVEST has one of the most comprehensive teams of specialists in Europe. The company pays careful attention to sustainability and incorporates robust ESG principles in its investment criteria. 

As an investment company, we consider it our responsibility to lead by example and drive this necessary change to create a future we can be proud to leave as a legacy.

Name: Canaccord Wealth
Description: Build and protect what matters most, with a dedicated team behind you. Canaccord Wealth is one of the top 10 UK wealth managers (by assets under management), serving you with nationwide offices and international investment teams. We bring clarity and confidence to your future.

Name: CFA Society Australia
Description:
CFA Society Australia promotes ethical and professional standards within the investment industry, encourages professional development through the international CFA Program and facilitates the open exchange of information and opinions.  CFA Society Australia is further focused on putting investors first and making a positive difference to the investment community to build up trust within the profession.

What does CFA bring to the Australian Investment Community?
Internationalism, communication, education, thought leadership, research, professionalism and ethics.

This is the CFA difference!

Name: Goanna Capital Management
Description:
Goanna Capital is a global investment firm focused on private markets.

Specifically, the firm manages capital across two distinct strategies, and has a differentiated co-investment program:

1. Private Technology Direct Investments (Series B to Pre-IPO): We are proud to have built a track record investing in the most generationally important private technology companies globally.

2. Private Equity Secondary Solutions: Our Secondary Solutions strategy provides liquidity to LPs and leading GPs across PE & Growth Equity. The strategy focuses on pools of assets (typically fully invested funds in harvesting period) to create diversification for our investors, while skipping the J curve. Our secondary investing focuses on world class PE / Growth stage assets acquired at attractive discounts.

Co-Investment Platform: Goanna has a strong focus on co-investments, representing approximately half of our investor commitments. We value partnering with our LPs to provide access to our highest conviction ideas through low fee co-investments, alongside our funds.

Name: Vinland Capital
Description:
Our edge is to create alpha by investing in global to local themes.

Vinland’s objective is to apply macro and equity strategies to generate high risk adjusted returns for investors seeking opportunities across different asset classes globally, with a deep focus in Latin America.

Name: Victory Capital
Description:
Victory Capital (NASDAQ: VCTR) is a diversified global asset management firm. We serve institutional, intermediary, and individual clients through our Investment Franchises and Solutions Platform, which manage specialized investment strategies across traditional and alternative asset classes. Our differentiated approach combines the power of investment autonomy with the support of a robust, fully integrated operational and distribution platform. Clients have access to focused, top-tier investment talent equipped with comprehensive resources designed to deliver competitive long-term performance.

Victory Capital is headquartered in San Antonio, Texas. To learn more, visit www.vcm.com.

Important disclosures: vcm.com/social-media-guidelines-and-disclosures 

Mutual funds distributed, and brokerage services provided, by Victory Capital Services, Inc. (VCS). Advisory Services offered by Victory Capital Management Inc., an affiliate of VCS.

Name: STOA Infra & Energy
Description: STOA is an impact investment fund, financing and supporting the development of sustainable and resilient infrastructure for future generations in Africa, Latin America and Asia. Its mission contributes to the achievement of the United Nations’ Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs).

Name: Wadi Jeddah | وادي جدة
Description: Wadi Jeddah Company was established pursuant to the Royal Decree no, (M/20) date 15/04/1431 AH as a public company owned by King Abdulaziz University and based on the Royal Decree an area of the university land is assigned for it in order to use it in achieving the purposes of the company. The company aims to contribute effectively in developing knowledge economy by investing in manufacturing and transferring technology, as well as nationalizing and developing it and to invest patents, intellectual rights and industrial models, and to invest in support economic activities and knowledge industries.

Name: Gemcorp ICS
Description:
We're the partner of choice for businesses and governments, delivering integrated and sustainable solutions that drive progress in emerging markets. We believe the world is what we make it—there is no ambition too big and no challenge too tough. With ingenuity, agility, and resourcefulness, we bring people together to make good things grow.

With a client-centric approach, we combine local expertise with a global perspective to deliver bespoke solutions across key sectors, including infrastructure, energy, water, commodities, and sourcing. We see not just what is, but what could be—breaking new ground, challenging the ordinary, and delivering innovative solutions that create lasting impact.

As an investor, operator, and supplier, we shape the infrastructure that energises transformation, ignites opportunities, and enriches communities.

Honouring the past and building the future, we believe in the power of the present—together, we make today count.

Name: Norsad Capital
Description:
Norsad is an impact investor and private credit provider that offers flexible debt financing solutions to profitable growth-stage companies in Africa that deliver desirable social impact. Norsad's investment coverage in sub-Saharan Africa and the principal operational area is the Southern Africa region. Norsad’s purpose is to build a better Africa by financing growth-oriented companies in Africa, enabling such companies to continue to have a substantial impact through the services and employment they provide. Norsad aspires to positively impact the lives of 100 million Africans by 2030.

We provide direct debt financing of USD5-10 million to mid-market companies for growth and development. We have over 33 years of track record of investing in Africa. Norsad has invested over USD 700 million in more than 170 companies in various sectors in the region. (www.norsadcapital.com).

Name: WaterEquity
Description:
WaterEquity is an asset manager dedicated to mobilizing private investment for the water and sanitation sector. We invest in financial institutions, enterprises, and infrastructure in emerging and frontier markets delivering safe water and sanitation solutions to low-income communities.

Founded by entrepreneurs Gary White and Matt Damon of Water.org, the success of WaterEquity is built on decades of collective experience investing in water and sanitation in emerging markets.

Name: Hidden Harbor Capital Partners
Description:
Hidden Harbor Capital Partners is a private equity firm which helps create business success stories by building teams focused on execution.  

We believe that great companies are built on a strong group of people as their foundation, and that businesses succeed when they are intensely focused on executing a small set of well-defined objectives.  Hidden Harbor has assets under management of more than $2 billion.

What we look for:
• Lower middle market companies up to $500 million in revenue (or any size for add-on opportunities to existing portfolio companies)
• EBITDA up to $30 million – willing to look at unprofitable businesses
• Strong strategic positions – market leadership
• Companies headquartered in North America
• Corporate carve-outs
• Family and entrepreneur owned businesses

Invests broadly across Industrials and Business Services including:
• Automotive
• Chemicals
• Energy/Power
• Industrial Services
• Infrastructure
• Environmental Services
• Facility Services
• Professional Services
• Residential Services
• Utilities Products & Services

Name: Housers
Description:
Housers is the first crowdfunding platform to make the democratisation of investment in real estate assets possible.

Our business model connects property developers seeking to finance their projects with investors looking to secure an excellent financial future. We began our operations in Spain in 2015, and from the outset, we have maintained an international outlook. In 2017, we expanded internationally to Italy and Portugal, establishing ourselves as the leading pan-European real estate investment platform.

Since 2021, all our projects have provided investors with the security and peace of mind of a first-degree mortgage guarantee registered in the property registry, always with an LTV (loan to value) ratio below 70%.

Name: Wisdom House
Description:
Wisdom House stands as a leading hospitality and F&B consultancy firm, elevating the concept of luxury through an innovative blend of lifestyle enhancement and unparalleled service.

Our approach to redefining luxury involves carefully selecting unique premium projects and infusing them with our distinctive touch to create unparalleled experiences.

Situated strategically in Dubai, we extend our reach globally, facilitating investments across Europe, the Middle East, and Southeast Asia.

Name: Gramercy Funds Management LLC
Description: Gramercy is a global emerging markets alternatives investment manager with offices in Greenwich, West Palm Beach, London, Buenos Aires, Miami, and Mexico City, and dedicated lending platforms in Mexico, Turkey, Peru, Pan-Africa, Brazil, and Colombia.  The firm, founded in 1998, seeks to provide investors with a better approach to emerging markets, delivering attractive risk-adjusted returns supported by a transparent and robust institutional platform. Gramercy offers alternative and long-only strategies across emerging markets asset classes including multi-asset, private credit, public credit, and special situations. Gramercy is a Registered Investment Adviser with the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and a Signatory of the Principles for Responsible Investment (PRI). Gramercy Ltd, an affiliate, is registered with the UK Financial Conduct Authority (FCA).

Name: Villgro Africa
Description: Villgro Africa is an incubator and impact investor supporting emerging healthcare businesses in Africa. We offer emerging companies a personalised incubation experience to help effectively scale ideas and navigate the African startup ecosystem.

Name: Kastrati
Description:
Kastrati Group - a trusted name in Albanian business since 1991!

We're a leading Albanian private investment group, proudly operating in over 6 diverse industries in Albania and the Balkan region. With a dedicated team of over 4000 employees, we're known for our expertise in wholesale and retail petroleum trading, insurance services, real estate, urban tourism, automotive solutions, retail, advertising, and more. Our commitment to excellence, innovation, and community engagement sets us apart as a trusted business partner.

Stay connected to discover more about our projects, innovations, and contributions to the communities where we operate. Thank you for joining us on this journey of excellence and growth. #KastratiGroup

Name: RIV-Capital
Description:
RIV-Capital Group is born based on a new concept of Asset Management Company to take maximum advantage of the enormous investment opportunities are now in the world. 
We search for the best profitable investments to strive to deliver top-rated returns enhancing fast-growing capital increasing strategies. Each investor is also shareholder of the company, being in the best position to monitor investment process.
All our activities are executed with highest quality standard as well as with the deepest scrutiny to be perfectly compliant with current regulatory framework in financial markets.

Name: Mulpha International
Description: Mulpha is one of Australia’s most experienced real estate and hospitality investors with highly specialised operational management and development capability. The group also has an extensive portfolio of real estate, property development, hospitality, retirement, private equity and debt assets and invests in some of the fastest-growing and most vibrant economies in Australia, New Zealand, Malaysia and the UK.

Name: Boston Partners
Description:
For more than 30 years, we've combined attractive valuations, strong fundamentals, and positive business momentum in every portfolio we manage. Our consistent approach, led by an experienced and long-tenured team, has created a proven track record of performance across economic cycles, market capitalizations, and geographies. 

Today, we offer investment solutions across a variety of strategies, including U.S. value investing, global, international, and emerging market strategies, long/short portfolios, and targeted small and micro-cap products. Our strategies are available in a number of investment vehicles, , from institutional separate accounts to mutual funds, SMAs, ETFs, Collective Investment Trusts, and UCITS funds for non-U.S. investors. In 2023, we launched Boston Partners Private Wealth, a division offering high-net-worth investors a full suite of wealth management services, including portfolio management, financial and estate planning, and tax-management.  

Boston Partners Global Investors, Inc. (“Boston Partners”) is an investment adviser composed of two divisions, Boston Partners and Weiss, Peck & Greer Partners (“WPG”), and is an indirect, wholly owned subsidiary of ORIX Corporation of Japan (“ORIX”).

Discover our unique approach to investing.

Name: Global Fund for Coral Reefs
Description:
As an implementation vehicle for the Global Biodiversity Framework (GBF) and Sustainable Development Goal 14 (SDG 14), Life Below Water, the Global Fund for Coral Reefs (GFCR) is enhancing the resilience of coastal reef ecosystems, communities, and economies by unlocking new public and private resources that accelerate sustainable businesses and financial solutions. By deploying catalytic grants and investments, the GFCR's resilience-focused portfolio comprises market-based solutions spanning more than 20 developing states, including wastewater treatment and recycling, coral reef insurance, sustainable aquaculture and agriculture, ecotourism, and initiatives enabling sustainable finance for marine protected areas (MPAs).
 
With capitalisation underway, by 2030, GFCR aims to support over 400 reef-positive businesses and sustainable financial mechanisms; the resilience of over 20 million community members and 3 million hectares of coral reefs (representing 25% of the Coral Reef Breakthrough target and 12.5% of remaining coral reefs on Earth); and sustainable financing flows for 7.5 million hectares of MPAs. GFCR’s investments will aim to leverage $2-3 billion USD in public and private finance for the benefit of marine ecosystems and coastal communities.

The GFCR Coalition is a public-private partnership driven by more than 60 member states, UN agencies, financial institutions, philanthropies, impact investors, and conservation organisations.

Name: WeInvest - Digital Wealth Platform

Name: startups.watch
Description:
Turkish startup ecosystem intelligence platform. Subscribers can discover all startups in Turkey, VC deals, weekly vertical reports and quarterly ecosystem reports. 

WHAT IS STARTUPS.WATCH?
It's a research platform that empowers you to fully understand trends, transactions and what’s next via tracking startup ecosystem.

WHAT TOPICS DOES IT COVER?
It has more than 110 tags. Artificial Intelligence, Fintech, Insurtech, Autotech, Adtech, Edutech and Foodtech are just some of them. You can list private tech companies and corporate ventures with these tags, see how they're doing, whether they’ve received investment, whether they've been acquired, whether they're shut down, and more.

WHAT SETS STARTUPS.WATCH APART FROM OTHER RESEARCH PLATFORMS?
It's the most accurate platform for Turkey since we verify all transaction data with the chamber of commerce data. Besides, our focus and continuous exchange of information with our ecosystem stakeholders make us perfect.

HOW DOES STARTUPS.WATCH COLLECT DATA?
It constantly receives data about startups from investors, technoparks, acceleration programs and incubation centers. We also examine data from official institutions and constantly enter information. Entrepreneurs themselves also add startups from scratch. Investment data, on the other hand, usually comes to us from entrepreneurs and investors, and if it is not yet listed in the chamber of commerce website, we temporarily enter the information we receive, and then we update the information retrospectively when the official figures are listed in the chamber of commerce website.

WHO SUBSCRIBES TO STARTUPS.WATCH?
Our global subscriber base ranges from venture capital firms to big corporations and entrepreneurs disrupting the status quo. Our subscribers span a broad range of various industries: Internet, Technology, Media, Telecom, Retail, Consulting, Advertising & Marketing, Startups, Venture Capital, Financial Institutions, Corporates.

Name: Dodge & Cox
Description:
Investment management is Dodge & Cox’s only business. We are focused on providing U.S., global, international, and emerging markets equity; fixed income; and balanced account management. 

Strategies:
Equity — The philosophy guiding the management of our equity portfolios is built on traditional principles: we maintain a long-term focus, conduct our own research, and employ a rigorous price discipline. Our approach is research-intensive; decisions are based on individual company analysis by our team of investment professionals.

Fixed Income — Dodge & Cox’s philosophy is to construct and manage a high average quality portfolio of securities that are selected through bottom-up, fundamental analysis. We believe that by combining fundamental research with a long-term investment horizon it is possible to uncover and act upon inefficiencies in the valuation of market sectors and individual securities.

Balanced — Our objective in managing balanced accounts is to provide regular income, conservation of principal, and an opportunity for long-term growth of principal and income. Our strategy is to invest in a diversified portfolio of stocks and fixed income securities. 

Offerings:
Dodge & Cox Funds — Dodge & Cox offers U.S. based investors a simple, low-cost way to own a portfolio of stocks and/or fixed income securities. 

Private Client Accounts — The private client group serves high net worth individual investors, family offices, and non-profit organizations across the United States through separately managed accounts. 

Institutional Separate Accounts — A client's investment objectives, asset allocation, and portfolio holdings are reviewed with an experienced portfolio manager and client service associate. 

To view our U.S. Terms and Conditions of Use, visit:  dodgeandcox.com/individual-investor/us/en/terms-and-conditions-of-use.html

Name: Raymond James UK
Description:
Raymond James is a wealth management firm focused on providing trusted advice and tailored, personalised investment services.

We believe if we do what’s right for clients, we’ll help them achieve success while also realising our own. 

We are committed to helping individuals achieve their unique goals, while also developing and supporting successful professionals, and helping our communities prosper.

Raymond James currently supports over 100 independent practices – a mix of private client investment managers, wealth managers and investment-oriented financial planners located throughout the UK. 

Our US parent company, Raymond James Financial, was established in 1962. It has $1.73tn assets under administration and supports approx. 8,900 wealth managers.

Follow us for the latest news and opportunities in wealth management, or visit our website for more information.

Raymond James Investment Services is a member of the London Stock Exchange and is authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority. All information is correct as at 30 September 2025.

Name: Old Mutual Alternative Investments
Description:
Old Mutual Alternative Investments is Africa’s pre-eminent private markets asset manager. We have over *ZAR 147.1 B (USD 8.3 B) in assets under management in Infrastructure, Private Equity, Impact Investing, Hybrid Capital and Diversified Credit. 

Established in South Africa in 2000, OMAI is one of the first alternative investment managers, inheriting a rich history in the investing space as a member of the Old Mutual Group, with more than 175 years of investing experience in Africa. We aim to deliver consistent, competitive returns to investors, and create a positive, long-term impact in the communities and environment we live and invest in.

Our investments build the houses, schools and thriving businesses that Africa needs, as well as provide essential infrastructure such as sustainable power generation, roads, railways, airports and telecommunications.

*Attributed to Old Mutual Alternative Investments as of 30 June 2025.

Name: Polymer Capital
Description: Polymer Capital Management is a market-neutral, multi-manager investment platform based in and focused on Asia. Polymer combines established institutional support and deep knowledge of local financial markets with a dedication to discovering and developing the region's best investment talent. Polymer was established in conjunction with PAG, one of the world's largest Asia-focused alternative asset managers, in 2019.

Name: Navi
Description:
Navi is a Brazilian investment group with over a decade of track record. We manage US$1bn in funds for major banks, family offices, pension funds and sovereign wealth funds. 

Investing is about understanding businesses in depth and standing alongside entrepreneurs to support the development of projects and companies.

Name: Capricorn Asset Management (Pty) Ltd
Description:
Since 2000 Capricorn Asset Management has been a leading Namibian asset management firm with the majority market share in the Unit Trust industry in Namibia. We pride ourselves in meeting the investment needs of individual investors, financial advisors, businesses, pension funds and government institutions.

With a range of solutions, we manage investments covering all major asset classes in markets around the world. Our deep understanding of the markets and securities we invest in, along with the dedication of our employees, helps us deliver consistent investment returns that enable our clients to achieve investment success.

We provide a superior level of corporate governance, aligned to international best practices. Our reputation is everything and our track record of over a decade stands testament to this. We spend a great amount of effort to make sure that all portfolios are accurately administrated and accounted for and comply with mandates, regulations and exposure limits.

We are a locally dedicated and accessible team giving unrivalled service that makes it easier for you to invest and obtain support. We not only serve you directly but also through our wide network of Bank Windhoek branches, advisors and online services.

 Capricorn Asset Management forms part of the Capricorn Group, a regional financial services group with interests in banking, insurance and asset management with business interest throughout the Southern African region. The group aspires to change people’s lives, making sure that everyone who lives in our country reaches their full potential. Whether it’s through the solutions we offer, the business we invest with or through the community projects we are involved in.

#INVESTSENSIBLY

Name: Trea Asset Management
Description:
@trea_AM

Structuring Solutions for Our Institutional Partners
- Independent asset management firm with long-only and alternative investment capabilities
- Over 4.6 billion EUR in Assets Under Management and advisory
- Boutique approach,  specialized in tailor-made solutions for Institutional customers
- Backed by Lovell & Minnick, a prestigious US private equity firm focused on financial institutions
- Founded in 2006 after Fibanc’s spin-off (front-office team)
- A +70-person team including 30 investment professionals
- Regulated by CNMV (Spain FCA) and authorised to manage funds in Spain, Luxembourg and Ireland

Creando Soluciones para Nuestros Socios Institucionales
- Entidad independiente especialista en gestión de activos tradicionales y alternativos
- Más de 4.600 millones de EUR de activos bajo gestión y asesoramiento
- Enfoque boutique, especialistas en soluciones a medida para clientes institucionales
- En 2017 Lovell&Minnick, una prestigiosa compañía de private equity norteamericana, entra en el capital de Trea Asset Management como muestra de las buenas perspectivas
- Fundada en 2006 (spin-off equipo front-office Fibanc)
- Equipo de más de 70 personas, incluyendo 30 profesionales de la inversión
- Regulada por la CNMV, y autorizada para gestionar fondos en España, Luxemburgo e Irlanda

Description:
Raymond James is a wealth management firm focused on providing trusted advice and tailored, personalised investment services.

We believe if we do what’s right for clients, we’ll help them achieve success while also realising our own. 

We are committed to helping individuals achieve their unique goals, while also developing and supporting successful professionals, and helping our communities prosper.

Raymond James currently supports over 100 independent practices – a mix of private client investment managers, wealth managers and investment-oriented financial planners located throughout the UK.

Name: Arrow Global Portugal
Description: 𝘍𝘰𝘶𝘯𝘥𝘦𝘥 𝘪𝘯 2005, 𝘈𝘳𝘳𝘰𝘸 𝘎𝘭𝘰𝘣𝘢𝘭 𝘎𝘳𝘰𝘶𝘱 𝘪𝘴 𝘢 𝘷𝘦𝘳𝘵𝘪𝘤𝘢𝘭𝘭𝘺 𝘪𝘯𝘵𝘦𝘨𝘳𝘢𝘵𝘦𝘥 𝘢𝘭𝘵𝘦𝘳𝘯𝘢𝘵𝘪𝘷𝘦 𝘪𝘯𝘷𝘦𝘴𝘵𝘮𝘦𝘯𝘵 𝘧𝘶𝘯𝘥 𝘮𝘢𝘯𝘢𝘨𝘦𝘳 𝘧𝘰𝘤𝘶𝘴𝘦𝘥 𝘰𝘯 𝘊𝘳𝘦𝘥𝘪𝘵 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘙𝘦𝘢𝘭 𝘌𝘴𝘵𝘢𝘵𝘦, 𝘤𝘶𝘳𝘳𝘦𝘯𝘵𝘭𝘺 𝘰𝘱𝘦𝘳𝘢𝘵𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘪𝘯 seven 𝘌𝘶𝘳𝘰𝘱𝘦𝘢𝘯 𝘤𝘰𝘶𝘯𝘵𝘳𝘪𝘦𝘴. 𝘐𝘵 𝘩𝘢𝘴 𝘢𝘳𝘰𝘶𝘯𝘥 €112 𝘣𝘪𝘭𝘭𝘪𝘰𝘯 𝘶𝘯𝘥𝘦𝘳 𝘮𝘢𝘯𝘢𝘨𝘦𝘮𝘦𝘯𝘵 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘮𝘰𝘳𝘦 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘯 4,400 𝘦𝘮𝘱𝘭𝘰𝘺𝘦𝘦𝘴. 𝘐𝘯 𝘗𝘰𝘳𝘵𝘶𝘨𝘢𝘭, 𝘵𝘩𝘳𝘰𝘶𝘨𝘩 𝘈𝘳𝘳𝘰𝘸 𝘎𝘭𝘰𝘣𝘢𝘭 𝘗𝘰𝘳𝘵𝘶𝘨𝘢𝘭, 𝘪𝘵 𝘩𝘢𝘴 𝘥𝘪𝘳𝘦𝘤𝘵 𝘰𝘳 𝘪𝘯𝘥𝘪𝘳𝘦𝘤𝘵 𝘴𝘩𝘢𝘳𝘦𝘴, 100% 𝘪𝘯 𝘕𝘰𝘳𝘧𝘪𝘯 𝘚𝘎𝘖𝘐𝘊 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘕𝘰𝘳𝘧𝘪𝘯 𝘚𝘦𝘳𝘷𝘪ç𝘰𝘴, 𝘪𝘯 𝘞𝘩𝘪𝘵𝘦𝘴𝘵𝘢𝘳, 𝘢𝘵 𝘙𝘦𝘴𝘵𝘢𝘳𝘵 𝘊𝘢𝘱𝘪𝘵𝘢𝘭, 𝘢𝘵 𝘋𝘦𝘵𝘢𝘪𝘭𝘴 - 𝘏𝘰𝘴𝘱𝘪𝘵𝘢𝘭𝘪𝘵𝘺, 𝘚𝘱𝘰𝘳𝘵𝘴 & 𝘓𝘦𝘪𝘴𝘶𝘳𝘦, 𝘢𝘵 𝘏𝘦𝘧𝘦𝘴𝘵𝘰 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘢𝘵 𝘕𝘦𝘹𝘰𝘳.

Name: LMR Partners
Description:
LMR Partners is a global alternative investment manager that was founded in November 2009.  The firm manages approximately $12 billion in assets and has offices in London, Hong Kong, New York, Zurich, Dubai, Glasgow and Dublin.

The firm invests globally in multiple asset classes and strategies to offer a diverse collection of high Sharpe ratio solutions to our clients.  

We target the best and brightest in the alternative asset management space and strive to create an environment which attracts and retains top talent.

Name: Fundo Soberano de Angola-FSDEA
Description: The Angola Sovereign Fund, abbreviated as FSDEA, is a collective public institution with legal personality and administrative, financial and patrimonial autonomy, created under Presidential Decree No. 48/11, of 9 March. The FSDEA is an institution specialized in strategic investments, whether in financial markets or in alternative assets, which is responsible for setting up a sustainable mechanism that ensures the maximization of long-term returns, the preservation of capital and support for Angola's sustainable socio-economic growth, through investments in strategic sectors, in Angola or abroad, with a view to maximizing capital and the generational transfer of wealth.

Name: Responsible Investment Association
Description: The Responsible Investment Association (RIA) is Canada's leader on responsible investment (RI). RI refers to the integration of environmental, social, and governance (ESG) criteria into investment selection and management. We are a national, membership-based organization composed of financial institutions, mutual fund companies, investment firms, financial advisors, and various organizations and individuals who practice and support responsible investing. The RIA and its members strongly believe that RI is a valuable investment tool to enhance returns, reduce risk, and catalyze positive social change.

Name: Grupo PBH
Description:
O Grupo PBH é um grupo de investimento privado que integra um portfólio diversificado de marcas em diferentes áreas e setores de atividade.

Com várias unidades hoteleiras cinco estrelas, como os Wine & Books Hotels e os VidaMar Hotels & Resorts, as unidades do grupo distinguem-se pela localização privilegiada, qualidade, elegância e relação próxima com a natureza e zona envolvente, ao mesmo tempo que proporcionam um conjunto alargado de serviços, com spas, ginásios, golfe, passeios na natureza, acesso direto às praias, experiências personalizadas e opções de lazer.

O Grupo está também presente no setor da restauração, com vários espaços de norte a sul do país, de que é exemplo o restaurante Tasca da Memória, em Lisboa, sob orientação de chef executivo distinguido com estrela Michelin.

Para candidaturas e informações relativas a emprego e recrutamento, contacta-nos através do email rh@pbh.pt, mencionando a área de interesse e localização preferencial, uma vez que o Grupo tem várias unidades em diferentes zonas do país num total de mais de 1050 quartos e mais de uma dezena de espaços de restauração.

Name: Alcentra
Description:
Founded in 2002, Alcentra is one of the largest European-headquartered alternative credit managers. Across all its investment strategies the firm employs a disciplined, value-orientated approach to evaluating individual investments and constructing portfolios.

In 2022, Alcentra was acquired by Franklin Templeton and integrated with Benefit Street Partners (“BSP”). Together, the BSP-Alcentra platform is one of the largest alternative credit managers globally, with a multi-strategy approach targeting attractive opportunities in the global credit markets. The combined platform manages over $75 billion in assets under management (AUM) and has expertise in Senior Secured Loans, Private Credit, Structured Credit, Special Situations, High Yield Bonds, Multi-Strategy Credit, and Commercial Real Estate.

Our highly experienced global team work across asset classes, business sectors and geographies, bringing significant expertise and a deep understanding of corporate debt to the firm’s strategies. BSP-Alcentra is a wholly owned subsidiary of Franklin Resources, Inc. (Franklin Templeton) which is one of the world’s largest independent investment managers with over $1.5 trillion in total assets under management.

Name: Alfaris Group
Description:
Alfaris Group was established over 25 years ago in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Today, it is a leading company that holds an investment portfolio in key growth sectors including automotive rentals and sales, the manufacturing of paper and plastic products, real estate development, operations, maintenance and security. By actively seeking out long term investments, it plays a vital role in promoting and achieving economic growth in the local economy. 

Its portfolio of companies includes: 
-	Alfaris Rent A Car
-	Alfaris Auto
-	Alfaris Paper Mill
-	Alfaris Tissue Converting
-	Alfaris Plastic Products
-	Alfaris Real Estate Development
-	Alfaris for Maintenance & Operation
-	Alfaris Security Escorts

Alfaris Group has approximately 2,000 employees and is headquartered in Khamis Mushait, Asir.

Name: Anthilia SGR
Description:
Anthilia Capital Partners SGR SpA is an Italian investment management house focused on private and institutional asset management.

Anthilia  Capital Partners was launched in 2007 by a group of individual partners willing to create an indipendent financial boutique, free from conflicts of interest, that distinguishes itself for transparency and simplicity.
Each partner has more than twenty years of experience in major Italian and international financial groups. 

Anthilia  Capital Partners decided to specialize its offer on absolute return portfolios focused on capital preservation and appreciation. Anthilia manages opened-end funds with different management styles and risk profiles and closed-end funds focused on private debt.

In 2017 Anthilia becomes Innovative Sme, thanks to Podessys, a fintech software to create, analyse and simulate financial portfolios.

“Know to invest” is the company claim and management philosophy. Each portfolio manager has conceived his own investment fund based on personal background experience, focusing on a specific investment style.
Clients’ needs become Anthilia Capital Partners’ tasks: each portfolio holding can be liquidated in a few days.

Anthilia’s managers alligned their interest with clients interest, investing their personal wealth and savings in their funds. 

Anthilia Capital Partners offers maximum transparency to its investors. In addition to daily publication of funds’ NAVs, portfolios factsheets are released on weekly basis. Funds managers are always available to meet clients, to share market views and to explain investment choices.

Name: Trive Capital
Description:
WHO WE ARE
Trive Capital is a Dallas, TX based private equity firm with more than $8 billion of regulatory assets under management. Trive focuses on investing equity and debt in what it sees as strategically viable middle-market companies with the potential for transformational upside through operational improvement. We seek to maximize returns through a hands-on partnership that calls for identifying and implementing value creation ideas.
 
TRIVE BACKGROUND
We partner with talented management teams to identify transformational opportunities and deploy best business practices. Since 1998, Trive's team members have successfully sourced, executed and managed more than 250 transactions across a range of industries, representing over $10 billion in aggregate revenue.  

COHESIVE AND MULTIFACETED TEAM
The firm's leadership team has worked extensively together during the past ten years at both Trive and predecessor firms. Trive has assembled a team with multifaceted skills in principal investing, investment banking, strategic consulting, restructuring, general management and corporate finance. It is this diverse collection of knowledge and experience in both finance and operations that positions the firm to serve as a valuable strategic resource for the management teams and companies we support.

WHY PARTNER WITH TRIVE CAPITAL?
The cornerstone of Trive's philosophy is to develop collaborative partnerships with management teams to drive value and tackle challenges. The firm takes a long term perspective to investing, as we understand great businesses are not built overnight and value is created over multiple economic cycles. We recognize every situation is unique and look to find the optimal strategy to enhance and transform businesses. Our rigorous approach and flexibility allow us to move quickly and take advantage of developing opportunities.

Name: ArrowMark Partners
Description:
ArrowMark Partners is an employee-owned asset management firm founded in 2007. Today, ArrowMark manages $18.5billion* in assets on behalf of a broad array of institutional clients and professional asset allocators across alternative credit and capacity-constrained equity strategies, as well as through the management of broadly syndicated and middle-market CLO Funds. Our unique approach, based on the team’s collective experience navigating market cycles, provides extensive insights across the capital structure and a skilled understanding of how to manage complex risk/reward tradeoffs through fundamental research.

*As of 6/30/2025. CRE AUM includes commercial mortgage loans that ArrowMark or its affiliate has originated and/or currently manages on behalf of insurance companies and other institutional investors.

Name: ATI Investments Group
Description:
Established in 2006 by Essam Al Tamimi, ATI Investments Group is a UAE-based investment holding company with a diverse portfolio of multidisciplinary businesses operating across the Middle East.

With over 4,000 team members, ATI Investments Group focusses on both strategically investing in our Group companies whilst further developing them to achieve their full potential. Our operational branches encompass seven key sectors:

- Facilities Management: Catering, Housekeeping, Maintenance, Support Services
- Corporate Business Solutions
- Property Management
- Healthcare & Homecare
- Early Years Education
- Hospitality
- Food & Beverage

In addition to our investment activities, we actively support our subsidiaries by providing the necessary resources, guidance, and networks to enable them to scale and thrive in their respective business markets.

The driving force behind ATI Investments Group’s mission is its unwavering commitment to fostering progress. We strive to empower communities, encourage the growth of sustainable businesses, deliver exceptional customer experiences, and create long-term value for future generations.

Name: Aruwa Capital Management
Description:
Aruwa Capital Management is a Lagos based, female founded and led, growth equity impact fund. As one of the few woman owned funds in Africa, Aruwa has identified a significant untapped investment opportunity, investing in rapidly growing and profitable companies that either provide essential goods and services to women or employ women through their workforce or value chain.

Aruwa Capital Management was founded on the conviction that the gender imbalance amongst capital allocators on the continent, provides a unique opportunity to invest in untapped segments of the economy whilst closing gender economic gaps across society and generating enhanced returns.

With few private equity funds owned or led by a woman in Africa, Aruwa Capital Management aims to change the narrative for women as capital allocators, entrepreneurs, consumers and stakeholders in Africa and globally.

The team based in Lagos is led by the Founder, Adesuwa Okunbo Rhodes and combines international best practice skill sets from global institutions with deep local networks, operational know how and on the ground presence, to unlock untapped investment opportunities. The team is made up of investment professionals with investing experience and operators that understand how to run and improve businesses.

Name: Fronds Investments
Description:
Fronds is a Dubai-based private investment company specializing in private equity, real estate, and strategic partnerships.
We are committed to delivering outstanding service by working closely with our principals, affiliates, and clients.
Visit www.Fronds.com for more information.

Name: Apex Partners
Description:
A Apex Partners é uma plataforma de serviços e produtos financeiros completa e adaptada ao ecossistema regional do Brasil, que busca ser o principal banco de investimentos regional do país até 2030.

Com mais de uma década de atuação, estamos presentes no Espírito Santo, Paraná e Santa Catarina, oferecendo um portfólio completo de soluções financeiras, com verticais de gestão de recursos, Investment banking, advisory e research.

Name: Hillsdale Investment Management Inc.
Description:
Hillsdale Investment Management Inc. (Hillsdale) is an independent, employee-driven, and client-aligned investment boutique managing assets on behalf of a select group of sophisticated institutional and private wealth investors.  We engage in disciplined active investment management, specializing in equities, alternatives, ESG, and customized mandates.  We are committed to producing the highest quality equity investment strategies.  As a firm, we value curiosity, humility, resilience, and strive to maintain an open, collegial and dynamic work environment.  Hillsdale is recognized for both investment and service excellence – a reflection of our relentless pursuit of research and development and the dedication of our employees who invest alongside our clients.

Hillsdale has been recognized as a Great Place to Work for our industry and across Canada.

Name: PDT Partners
Description:
PDT, which stands for Process Driven Trading, was founded by Peter Muller in 1993 as a proprietary trading group within Morgan Stanley. In 2013, after establishing a 19-year track record finding inefficiencies in financial markets, the group spun out of Morgan Stanley to become an independent investment management firm, PDT Partners. 

Today we are a leader in the field of quantitative finance, known for our rigorous scientific, systematic, and model-driven approach to investing, with multiple billions  in assets under management. 

Peter Muller, Founder and CEO, and a small group of managing partners lead around 200  scientists, engineers, and professionals in New York and London.

Name: Sicredi Asset Management
Description: A Sicredi Asset Managenent, responsável pela gestão de mais de R$ 157 bilhões, é uma das maiores gestoras de recursos do país. Classificada com rating “Forte” pela Fitch Rating, detentora de fundos com alta performance no mercado e com uma equipe altamente qualificada, demonstra robustez e qualidade nos processos de investimentos, o que nos permite oferecer produtos e serviços financeiros dos mais simples aos mais complexos de forma segura e rentável.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Bow River Capital
Description:
About Bow River Capital

Bow River Capital is a private alternative asset management company based in Denver, Colorado, focused on investing in the lower middle market in three asset classes, including private equity, real estate, and software growth equity. In addition to its three private fund platforms, the firm launched the Bow River Capital Evergreen Fund in January 2021, which provides institutional-quality private market access to a broader set of investors. Collectively, the Bow River Capital team has deployed capital into diverse industries, asset classes and across the capital structure. For more information on Bow River Capital, please visit www.bowrivercapital.com and www.bowriverevergreen.com

The Bow River Evergreen Fund is distributed by Foreside Distributors.  Foreside Distributors is not affiliated with Bow River Capital

Name: Constellation Asset Management
Description: Constellation is one of the most established equity managers in Brazil, with one of the few portfolio management teams in the country with over 25 years of experience in managing Brazilian public equities. Led by our founder and CIO, Florian Bartunek, the company was founded in 1998 to manage Long Only and Long Biased strategies, following a fundamentally driven investment approach. Constellation is structured as a partnership, with its main shareholders being the executives who work at the firm. In addition to its executives, the company has minority shareholders, including Jorge Paulo Lemann - one of Brazil’s most successful businessmen - and Lone Pine Capital, a highly regarded equity fund based in the United States.

Name: Canoe Financial
Description:
Canoe Financial is one of Canada’s fastest-growing independent mutual fund companies managing over $20.5 billion in assets across a diversified range of award-winning investment solutions.

Founded in 2008, Canoe Financial is an employee-owned investment management firm focused on building financial wealth for Canadians. Canoe Financial has a significant presence across Canada, including offices in Calgary, Toronto and Montreal.

To learn more about Canoe Financial and our investment products, visit canoefinancial.com

Name: Swiss Life Asset Managers Deutschland
Description: We are the German arm of Swiss Life Asset Managers, a well-known, ambitious and reliable European asset manager. Together with BEOS AG in Germany and our real estate units in Switzerland, France, Luxembourg and the UK, we are a leading real estate manager. We have over 160 years of successful experience in risk management. Our core competencies include offering and actively managing a broad range of fixed income, real estate, equities, infrastructure and multi-asset investment solutions. Our ambition is to ensure stable long-term investment results. This builds the basis for our clients to undertake solid long-term planning with self-determination and confidence.

Name: Vista Capital
Description:
Established in 2014, Vista Capital is exclusively dedicated to managing investment funds.

In our mission of capital preservation, consistent returns and strict adherence to our investment mandate, four pillars support us:

Analytical Excellence:
Investment process backed by an experienced team with complementary backgrounds.

People Management:
Meritocratic culture as a driver of hiring and retaining the strongest professionals. 

Alignment of Interests:
All members of the investment team are partners and invest a significant portion of their net worth in our funds. 

Processes:
Investment decisions, operational controls and risk management are equally relevant.

Name: VNDIRECT Securities Corporation
Description:
Từ định vị là công ty giao dịch trực tuyến đầu tiên ở Việt Nam, VNDIRECT đã từng bước xây dựng được nền tảng hoạt động của một định chế tài chính được khách hàng tin chọn, nơi cung cấp dịch vụ và sản phẩm đầu tư tài chính uy tín với đội ngũ con người làm nghề có đạo đức và tinh thần dấn thân phụng sự, cùng nền tảng công nghệ tích hợp đa kênh tài sản, phù hợp với trải nghiệm cho mọi đối tượng khách hàng.  

Chúng tôi, những con người VNDIRECT có phẩm chất IPAM (Insights – Passion – Action – Mindfulness) đã xây dựng được sức mạnh của một tập thể những con người làm nghề chuyên nghiệp, có khả năng hiểu biết sâu sắc về tầm nhìn, sứ mệnh và hệ giá trị của công ty (INSIGHTS – TÔN TRỌNG SỰ THẬT), có năng lực tạo ra sức mạnh sáng tạo từ sự đam mê nghề nghiệp (PASSION – KHÁT VỌNG HỌC HỎI), năng lực hành động cùng một tập thể tri thức với kinh nghiệm đa dạng (ACTION – THÁI ĐỘ HÀNH ĐỘNG), và khả năng an trú vững vàng trong mọi điều kiện của thị trường (MINDFULNESS – TOÀN TÂM PHỤNG SỰ). 

Đồng hành cùng VNDIRECT, bạn sẽ được tham gia đào tạo, định hướng để tìm ra con đường phát triển sự nghiệp của bản thân, luôn phát huy tinh thần dấn thân học hỏi, đón nhận thử thách để hoàn thiện chính mình, và được tạo điều kiện làm việc trong môi trường tốt nhất, với văn hóa cộng sự - đồng hành - thấu hiểu. 
Cùng VNDIRECT hiện thực hóa tương lại bền vững của bạn, tại đây: https://vndirectcareers.com/vi

Name: Saruhan Holding
Description:
Saruhan Holding'in temeli, 1947 yılında Hakkı Saruhan’ın Rize’de açtığı mağaza ile atıldı. 1970 yılında Saruhan Ailesi’nin ikinci neslinin yeni bir vizyon geliştirerek İstanbul’da farklı alanlardaki girişimleri sayesinde daha kapsamlı bir yapı halini aldı.

Alçak ve yüksek gerilimli elektrik malzemeleri satışıyla başlayan ticaret;
• Elektrikli Ev Aletleri
• Endüstriyel Temizlik Makineleri
• Her türlü toz ve sıvı deterjanların ithalatıyla devam etti.

1985 yılına gelindiğinde, Saruhan Holding, Alman Fakir Hausgeräte ve Nilco markalarının Türkiye ve yakın coğrafyasının genel distribütörü oldu. Bu birliktelik bir süre sonra kurulacak ilk fabrikanın da zeminini oluşturdu.
1996 yılında Saruhan Holding, Çorlu’da kendine ait makine fabrikasını kurarak, Alman mühendislerle birlikte üretilen sanayi tipi temizlik makinelerini dünyaya ihraç etmeye başladı.
Şirket, 1999’da Çorlu’da yeni bir yatırım daha yaparak Saruhan Kimya Tesisleri’ni faaliyete geçirdi. Bu tesislerde hem yurt içinde satılmak hem de yurt dışına ihracat yapmak amacıyla yılda 25.000 ton deterjan ana hammaddesi Labsa, 55.000 ton toz deterjan, 60.000 ton sıvı deterjan üretimi gerçekleştirildi. Ürettiklerini satmak adına yurt içi ve yurt dışı distribütörlük ağlarını kurmasıyla birlikte dağıtım anlamında da güçlü bir isim halini aldı.
2007 yılına gelindiğinde, Almanya’da Saruhan Deutschland Holding kuruldu. Almanya merkezli faaliyetler geliştirmek adına kurulan firma ile Fakir Holding arasında kısa sürede stratejik ortaklık anlaşması yapıldı. Ardından hisse alımıyla tam ortaklık yapısına ulaşan Saruhan Holding, elektrikli ev aletlerinde 80 yıllık Alman teknolojisinin birikimine sahip Fakir ve Nilco’nun tüm “know-how”ıyla üretim yapan, dünya pazarlarına dağıtımını birlikte sürdüren sağlam bir beraberliğin de temelini attı.

Şİrketlerimiz ve ürünlerimiz hakkında detaylı bilgiye websayfalarımızdan ulaşabilirsiniz.

http://www.fakir.com.tr/
http://nilco.com.tr/
http://www.kaave.com.tr/
http://www.saruhankimya.com.tr/

Name: Horizon Capital
Description:
Horizon Capital is a leading private equity firm in Emerging Europe backed by over 40 institutional investors, managing funds with assets under management of over $1.6 billion and a tenure of 29 years in the region. Horizon Capital is an active value-added investor, backing visionary entrepreneurs who lead transformational businesses in Ukraine and the region. 
Our strategy focuses on fast-growing, export-oriented companies that leverage Ukraine’s cost-competitive platform to generate global revenues primarily in IT, e-commerce and other innovative industries, and select domestic champions.

Name: MORRISON
Description:
Morrison is a leading global infrastructure manager, investing across the risk spectrum in both private and listed markets. Founded in New Zealand in 1988, we have been at the forefront of infrastructure investment for over three decades. 
Morrison is a long-term thematic investor. By securing unique insights about the market through our long-standing private and listed experiences, we aim to identify investment opportunities that will benefit from long-term trends linked to the evolving needs of societies and economies. 
Our purpose is to invest wisely in ideas that matter.

Name: Bacacı Yatırım Holding
Description:
Bacacı Yatırım Holding olarak, hayatın her alanında sonsuz ihtimaller ve fırsatlar olduğuna inanıyoruz. Kurulduğumuz ilk günden bu yana, geleceği şekillendiren dinamik, çevik ve her zaman güncel bir vizyonla hayatı ve toplumu şekillendirmeye odaklanıyoruz. Attığımız her yeni adımda girdiğimiz sektörü, insanımızı ve ülkemizi daha ileriye taşımayı hedefliyoruz. Bu yolda sonsuz enerjimiz ve mücadeleci ruhumuzdan destek alıyoruz. Çünkü bu ülkenin ve insanının değerini çok iyi biliyoruz. Gerçek potansiyeli açığa çıkartmanın anlamı; hayata ve geleceğe değer üretmektir. Çünkü bu ülkeye ve bu ülkenin insanına her şey değer.

Bacacı Yatırım Holding geleceğe değer üretir…

Our team of advisors is comprised of multilingual professionals who are able to cater to our clients’ needs in English, Russian, Uzbek, French, Arabic, Indonesian, Swahili, and Portuguese

Name: Brandes Investment Partners
Description:
Brandes: Your Value-Investing Specialists

Brandes Investment Partners, L.P. (Brandes) is a leading investment advisory firm, managing equity and fixed-income assets for institutional and private clients worldwide, including employee benefit plans, foundations, endowments, corporations and Taft-Hartley Plans.

Since the firm’s inception in 1974, Brandes has consistently applied the value-investing approach pioneered by Benjamin Graham to security selection. The firm believes a consistent application of its value philosophy is a key driver in helping clients pursue favorable long-term results.

Headquartered in San Diego, Brandes and its related entities have offices in Milwaukee, Toronto, Dublin and Singapore.

For disclosure, visit www.brandes.com/socialmedia.

Description:
Founded in 2010 and with offices in Paris, Monaco, London, Geneva and Singapore, H2O AM is an independent asset management company, mainly specialising in Global Macro strategies.

Based on an investment process developed over more than thirty years and on solid quantitative engineering, the teams implement a discretionary investment process based on a Top-Down and Value approach. 

Through relative value strategies in bonds, currencies and equities, H2O AM offers its clients the benefits of diversified alpha with assumed and controlled risk over a defined time horizon.

Name: Fisher Investments Norden - Sverige
Description:
Fisher Investments Norden är det handelsnamn som används i Sverige av Fisher Investments Luxembourg, Sàrl. Fisher Investments Norden erbjuder diskretionära investeringsförvaltningstjänster som är anpassade till dina långsiktiga mål, och delegerar beslutsfattandet om portföljstrategin till dess moderbolag i USA, Fisher Investments. 

Fisher Investments är en oberoende, helt avgiftsbaserad investeringsrådgivare som betjänar kunder via tre huvudsakliga affärsenheter: US Private Client, Institutional och Private Client International. Tillsammans betjänar dessa enheter en mångsidig global kundskara som omfattar bolag, pensionsfonder för offentlig sektor och arbetsgivargrupper, stiftelser och gåvofonder, myndigheter och förmögna familjer. 
 
Fisher Investments grundades 1979 av Ken Fisher, som var vd i 37 år och för närvarande är exekutiv ordförande och en av investeringsdirektörerna på firman. Ken Fisher skrev krönikan ”Portfolio Strategy” i tidskriften Forbes från 1984 till 2016, vilket gör honom till den krönikör som har skrivit oavbrutet för tidskriften under längst tid i hela dess historia. Nu skriver han månatliga krönikor på de lokala språken för stora publikationer världen över, och täcker fler länder och fler språk, med en högre total räckvidd än någon annan icke-syndikerad krönikör av något slag någonsin. Ken har skrivit elva böcker – inklusive fyra som legat på New York Times bästsäljarlista – och har regelbundet medverkat på CNBC, Fox Business, Fox News, CNN International, Yahoo Finance, Bloomberg TV, och många andra finansnyhetskanaler.


Upplysningar: www.fisherinvestments.com/sv-se/juridisk-information

Integritetspolicy: www.fisherinvestments.com/sv-se/integritets
