Our clients include professionals from global investment firms, banks, insurance companies, mutual funds, hedge funds, pension and endowment funds, and registered investment advisors.

At Ned Davis Research, we believe that successful investing is grounded in having the right perspectives.  Generating alpha requires identifying potential upside as well as possible pitfalls.  To do this, you need a clear view of the whole investment picture.

Actionable ideas meet balanced, strategic insights through our 360 degree research methodology.  Our approach offers a more complete investment picture by combining both fundamental and technical research.  Fundamentals tell us how markets should be acting while technical reveal how markets are acting.  Truly insightful and timely ideas demand a balance between the two disciplines.

Name: NZ Super Fund
Description:
The NZ Super Fund invests money, on behalf of the New Zealand Government, to help pay for the increased cost of universal pension entitlements in the future. By doing this the Fund adds to Crown wealth, improves the ability of future Governments to pay for universal pensions, and ultimately reduces the tax burden on future New Zealanders.
 
As a long-term, growth-oriented investor, the Fund has more than NZ$70 billion in assets.
 
The Fund is managed by an Autonomous Crown Entity, the Guardians of New Zealand Superannuation.

Name: SURJ Sports Investment
Description:
At SURJ Sports Investment, we believe in the transformative power of sports. As a PIF company, we make strategic, long-term investments to drive the growth of the global sports industry, enhance fan experiences, nurture MENA talent, and foster innovation. Our mission is to create opportunities that align with Saudi Vision 2030, strengthening the Saudi sports ecosystem, increasing sports participation, and delivering both socio-economic impact and financial returns. Join us as we reshape the future of sports.

تتميز شركة سرج للاستثمار الرياضي، إحدى شركات الصندوق، باعتمادها على استثمارات استراتيجية طويلة الأجل تهدف إلى دفع عجلة النمو في القطاع الرياضي العالمي، وتطوير تجربة المشجعين، وتنمية المواهب في منطقة الشرق الأوسط وشمال إفريقيا، وتمكين الابتكار. كما تركز رسالتنا على توفير فرص تتوافق مع رؤية السعودية 2030، وذلك بما يسهم في تطوير المنظومة الرياضية، وتعزيز المشاركة في الأنشطة الرياضية، وتحقيق أثر ملموس اجتماعيًا واقتصاديًا. ندعوكم للانضمام إلى رحلتنا في إرساء آفاق جديدة لقطاع الرياضة.

Name: PFR Ventures
Description:
PFR Ventures to spółka zarządzająca funduszami funduszy, które wspólnie z inwestorami prywatnymi, aniołami biznesu i korporacjami inwestuje w fundusze Venture Capital oraz Private Equity. 

Celem PFR Ventures jest zasilenie tym kapitałem polskich, innowacyjnych przedsiębiorstw na różnych etapach rozwoju. Obecnie, PFR Ventures posiada ponad 50 funduszy w swoim portfelu, które dokonały ponad 250 inwestycji. Nasze fundusze zainwestowały m.in. w takie spółki jak Audioteka, Booksy, Frisco.pl, iTaxi czy Synerise. 

Działamy jako profesjonalny inwestor instytucjonalny, a naszą organizację cechuje rynkowe podejście. Jesteśmy członkiem takich organizacji jak Invest Europe, ILPA czy Polskie Stowarzyszenie Inwestorów Kapitałowych.

PFR Ventures dokonuje inwestycji przy wykorzystaniu środków unijnych (programy POIG, POIR i FENG) oraz Polskiego Funduszu Rozwoju, Więcej szczegółów na stronie internetowej  w zakładce "Źródła Finansowania".

Name: Renaissance Technologies LLC
Description: Renaissance Technologies is an investment management firm that employs mathematical and statistical methods in the design and execution of its investment programs.

Name: USAA Real Estate
Description: USAA Real Estate is now Affinius Capital.

Name: Ophir Asset Management
Description:
Ophir is a $billion plus small and mid cap global and Australian equities fund manager. Investors include wealth advisers, pension funds, family offices and private individuals.

The flagship Ophir Opportunities Fund has generated 24.5% p.a net after fees over the past 13 years from inception in August 2012 to October 2025.

The founders and senior portfolio managers Andrew Mitchell and Steven Ng have the vast majority of their savings invested in the Ophir funds.

Every month we publish the Ophir Monthly Letter to Investors which details our views on the market and stocks we are buying and selling. To receive the newsletter direct to your inbox please visit our website (provided below):

If you would like to get in touch and ask any question please email brendan.carrig@ophiram.com and he will be more than happy to help out.

Name: Ingka Investments
Description:
Hej! We are Ingka Investments – one of the three core businesses of Ingka Group, the largest owner and operator of IKEA Retail. We invest in assets, manage companies, and operate strategic businesses to preserve and create value for Ingka Group and IKEA – now, and for generations to come.

Our objectives are to ensure the financial resilience of Ingka Group, support the transformation of IKEA Retail, contribute to sustainability, and strengthen the IKEA brand through responsible and impactful investments.We take a long-term approach, strategically investing with impact across our portfolios: forestland, renewable energy, financial markets, business acquisitions and venture, real estate and circular.

With six investment portfolios and several support functions, our roles vary from investment managers to sales and operations managers, and from business navigators to forest rangers. We’re connected through a passion for entrepreneurship and driving a more sustainable future.

Ingka Investments in numbers:
• 6 investment portfolios
• 20+ minority investments, including 4 circular companies, and 5 acquisitions
• 320,000+ hectares of responsibly managed forestland in 7 countries 
• 21% of forest area included in conservation area network
• 5 real estate investments in core mixed-use properties in prime locations and distribution and logistics centers
• Invested or committed to invest over EUR 4 billion in renewable energy production assets, like wind and solar.
• 47 wind farms and 13 solar farms in operation across 16 countries

Name: AB CarVal
Description:
AB CarVal is an established global alternative investment fund manager. Founded in 1987, AB CarVal has navigated through ever-changing market cycles, opportunistically investing $152 billion in 5,810 transactions across 82 countries. AB CarVal has an experienced team of approximately 205 employees in five offices in four countries. Today, AB CarVal has approximately $20 billion in assets under management.

For more than three decades, AB CarVal has earned a reputation for integrity, discipline and rapid execution by drawing on its experienced team and working with local asset managers across the globe.

AB CarVal seeks opportunities in distressed credit markets and distressed assets. The firm pursues situations where it can readily identify value creation in a predictable time frame and where it believes its core competencies and competitive advantages can translate into sustainable and attractive risk-adjusted returns.

Name: Mineria e Inversiones
Description: Inversiones

Name: Banesprev Fundo Banespa de Seguridade Social
Description:
O BANESPREV - Fundo Banespa de Seguridade Social é uma Entidade Fechada de Previdência Complementar, com autonomia administrativa e financeira, sem fins lucrativos, constituída em 17 de fevereiro de 1987, de acordo com a autorização do Ministério da Previdência e Assistência Social, através da Portaria nº 3.921, de 28 de janeiro de 1987, com a finalidade de complementar a aposentadoria e conceder outros benefícios de natureza previdenciária. O Banco Santander (Brasil) S.A. é o patrocinador instituidor além de outros patrocinadores.
 
A entidade administra e executa doze planos de benefícios, todos devidamente aprovados pela PREVIC – Superintendência Nacional de Previdência Complementar, prestando serviços para quase 30 mil participantes, ocupando o 6º lugar no ranking da Associação Brasileira das Entidades Fechadas de Previdência Complementar (ABRAPP), que engloba 245 fundações brasileiras, com um patrimônio ativo superior a R$ 24 Bilhões.
 
Missão: 
 
Administrar e executar com excelência planos de benefícios, adotando as melhores práticas de mercado, com transparência e aderência à legislação aplicável, gerando tranquilidade aos seus patrocinadores e participantes, colaborando com o desenvolvimento social, econômico e sustentável da sociedade.

Name: Sarasin & Partners LLP
Description:
At Sarasin & Partners we believe that investment has the power to protect and grow wealth in a way that benefits society.

We take a long-term, thematic approach to investing, identifying powerful trends that will shape the investment landscape for years to come. Because we believe responsible companies will tend to create longer lasting economic value, we embed stewardship into our investment process. And once we invest in a company, we actively engage with it, driving change on behalf of our clients. Above all, we take a long-term view; in our investments, in our relationships with the companies we invest in, and in our relationships with our clients. 

That is how we are securing tomorrow. 

We want you to join us. Follow us for insights on thematic investing, updates on our stewardship work, learning opportunities and job vacancies. 

Important disclaimer: Please note that the prices of shares and the income from them can fall as well as rise and you may not get back the amount originally invested.  This can be as a result of market movements and also of variations in the exchange rates between currencies.  Past performance is not a guide to future returns and may not be repeated.  Authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority.

Name: Fundación Rafael Dondé IAP
Description:
La Fundación Rafael Dondé te da la bienvenida! Somos una institución de asistencia privada (I.A.P.) sin fines de lucro, creada en 1919 por el Lic. Rafael Dondé Preciat. Su misión: apoyar a la educación en las zonas más vulnerables de México.  
  
Durante más de 100 años, en Fundación Dondé continuamos con el objetivo de apoyar la educación a través de los Módulos Educativos, programas de donaciones, desarrollo rural y comunitario, etc. 
  
Todo esto, gracias al área de préstamos prendarios: Empeños Fundación Dondé, el servicio que por más de 30 años ha ofrecido soluciones financieras en más de 400 sucursales en la República Mexicana.

Name: CITIC Capital
Description:
CITIC Capital Holdings Limited ("CITIC Capital") is an alternative investment management and advisory company. The firm manages USD15 billion of capital through its multi-asset class platform covering private equity, real estate, structured investment & finance, asset management, and special situations. CITIC Capital has over 290 portfolio companies since its inception that span 10 sectors and employ over 500,000 people around the world.

CITIC Capital is headquartered in Hong Kong, with offices in Shanghai, Beijing, Shenzhen, Tokyo, New York, with a team of around 280 staff.

Name: Henderson Park
Description: Henderson Park is a leading international private equity real estate fund manager. Since its formation in 2016, the firm has invested over $14 billion in building a portfolio of flagship real estate assets, with a presence in major cities and capitals in the United States, UK, France, Germany, Greece, Ireland, Italy, Poland, Portugal, and Spain. Henderson Park seeks high quality assets in prime locations where it can identify the potential for unlocking or creating value through asset management and sustainability improvements, or by taking on and working in complex situations. The company’s current portfolio is diversified across various sectors such as multifamily, hospitality, student housing, logistics, office and retail, including several real estate development projects. Henderson Park strives to work and build long-term strategic relationships with the best local partners.

Name: Investor Casa de Bolsa
Description: Nuestra compañía está enfocada en la generación e intermediación de opciones de inversión y servicios financieros de alto nivel, convirtiéndonos en un verdadero valor agregado para los clientes y sus negocios.

Name: D1 Capital Partners L.P.
Description:
D1 Capital Partners L.P. is a global investment firm that deploys capital in both public and private markets. 
 
D1 was founded in July 2018 by Daniel Sundheim. The firm invests on behalf of investors globally, including endowments and foundations, family offices, sovereign wealth funds, outsourced CIOs, hospitals and pensions. D1 has a fundamental and research-intensive investment strategy with a focus on medium to long-term returns. Its research centers on the consumer, business services, financial services, healthcare, industrials, real estate and technology, media and telecom sectors. Geographically, investments are generally in North America, Western Europe, Japan, and China. Most of the firm’s capital is deployed in publicly traded equities as well as equity derivatives, convertibles and other fixed income instruments. The private equity strategy is opportunistic and primarily later-stage, non-control stakes in companies raising capital for expansion.

Name: Strategic Value Partners
Description: SVP is a global alternative investment firm that focuses on special situations, private equity, opportunistic credit and financing opportunities. The firm uses a combination of sourcing, financial and operational expertise to unlock value in its portfolio companies. Today SVP manages approximately $22 billion in assets under management, and since inception, has invested more than $53 billion of capital, including more than $18 billion in Europe. The firm, established by Victor Khosla in 2001, has approximately 200 employees, including more than 100 investment professionals, across its main offices in Greenwich (CT) and London, and a presence in Tokyo.

Name: Ruffer
Description:
Ruffer looks after investments for private clients, financial planners, institutions, pension plans and charities, in the UK and internationally.

Our aim is to deliver positive returns, whatever happens in financial markets.

For more information on what we do and how we do it, please visit ruffer.co.uk, or ruffer.fr

Read our latest Ruffer Review 
ruffer.co.uk/rufferreview

Ruffer LLP is authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority in the UK and is registered as an investment adviser with the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). Registration with the SEC does not imply a certain level of skill or training.  Ruffer LLP 2025. 

For US Institutional Investors – Securities offered through Ruffer LLC, Member FINRA. Ruffer LLC is doing business as Ruffer North America LLC in New York.

Ruffer S.A. is authorised by the ACPR and regulated by the ACPR and AMF. Ruffer S.A. 2025. 

More information: ruffer.co.uk/disclaimer

Name: Emkan Holding
Description: Emkan Holding manages investments and subsidiaries in oil, gas, energy, and other sectors, focusing on business development.

Name: Sulaiman Alrajhi Holding
Description:
Sulaiman Alrajhi Holding is a distinguished investments manager and the investment arm of Waqf Sulaiman Alrajhi, one of the largest endowments in the Islamic world.
Established in 2011, Sulaiman Alrajhi Holding was founded with the purpose of professionally managing the Waqf’s assets and has since emerged as a prominent player in Saudi Arabia's dynamic investment landscape. Our roots trace back to the visionary Shaikh Sulaiman Bin Abdulaziz Alrajhi, a highly respected Saudi businessman and investor renowned for his philanthropic endeavours and unwavering support for national development initiatives.

Name: D’Ieteren Group
Description:
In existence since 1805, and across family generations, D’Ieteren Group seeks growth and value creation by pursuing a strategy on the long term for its businesses and actively encouraging and supporting them to develop their position in their industry and geographies. The Group currently owns the following activities:

- Belron (50.01%) has a clear purpose: “making a difference by solving people’s problems with real care”. It is the worldwide leader in vehicle glass repair and replacement and operates in 37 countries, through wholly owned businesses and franchises, with market leading brands – including Carglass, Safelite and Autoglass. In addition, Belron manages vehicle glass and other insurance claims on behalf of insurance customers. 

- D'Ieteren Automotive (100% owned) distributes Volkswagen, Audi, SEAT, Škoda, Bentley, Lamborghini, Bugatti, Cupra and Porsche vehicles in Belgium. It has a market share of more than 23% and 1.2 million vehicles on the road. Its business model is evolving towards improving the lives of citizens with fluid, accessible and sustainable mobility. 

-  PHE (c.91%) is a leader in the independent distribution of spare parts for vehicles in Western Europe, present in France, Belgium, The Netherlands, Luxemburg, Italy and Spain. 

- TVH (40% owned), is a leading global independent distributor for aftermarket parts for material handling, construction & industrial, and agricultural equipment. It operates in 26 countries worldwide. It has a unique operating model and has a clear purpose of keeping customers going and growing.

- Moleskine (100% owned) is a premium and aspirational lifestyle brand which develops and sells iconic branded notebooks and writing, travel and reading accessories through a global multichannel platform. 

- D’Ieteren Immo (100% owned) groups together the Belgian real estate interests of D’Ieteren Group.

Name: Quara Holding
Description:
Quara holding was formed as a strategic ecosystem of diverse real estate, finance and, technology firms with local, regional and international presence. It incorporates multiple exchange-listed businesses, as well as the largest publicly traded real estate company in KSA. 

This intelligent operational structure and collaborative interplay between entities has helped build the foundation of Quara. With its track record of progress, stability and influence, Quara has cemented itself a pioneer in the region. Steadfast commitment to innovation and impact, along with extensive global experience and visionary strategies set Quara apart to create a better future for generations to come.

Name: Prisma Capital (Brasil)
Description:
A Prisma Capital é uma gestora independente de investimentos alternativos fundada sob o modelo de partnership em 2017. Oferecemos soluções criativas para situações complexas que exigem capital de longo-prazo, com flexibilidade para investir em diferentes setores e classes de ativos.

--------

Prisma Capital is an independent, alternative investment company in Brazil founded as a partnership in 2017. We provide creative solutions to complex situations that require long-term capital. We are opportunity driven, multi-strategy fundamental investors with flexibility to invest across sectors, asset classes and position in the capital stack in our pursuit of optimizing risk-adjusted returns.

Name: Orbis Investments
Description:
We are a global firm with offices in 8 countries around the world, around 400 employees globally and almost $40 billion in assets under management. What defines our Orbis family is not those numbers, but how we do things day-by-day, how we add value for our clients, and the values that we live and work by.

Our investment philosophy is fundamental, long-term and contrarian. As contrarian investors, we aim to take a different perspective and this filters into everything we do. To invest differently, you need to think differently. And this means having teams of people with different backgrounds, experiences and ways of thinking.

Name: Mulkia Investment ملكية للاستثمار
Description:
Mulkia Investment is a Saudi (Listed) Company, headquartered in Riyadh, and it conduct its business pursuant to the laws and regulations issued by Capital Market Authority (CMA) in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Mulkia manages funds in Real Estate, Alternative Investments, and other sectors, with more than 6 billion SAR in assets under management.  

Mulkia obtained Capital Market Authority license No (13170-37) dated 2/1/1435 H corresponding to 5/11/2013 G to carry out securities business including: Managing Investment Funds, Managing Clients’ Portfolios, Custody, Dealing as Principal, Underwriting, Arranging and Advising Services.

Mulkia provides diversified and integrated financial and investment services tailored to suit the goals of individuals and institutions of different types and sizes. Mulkia operates in the field of asset management, arraigning & corporate finance, financial advisory and research. Investments and financial services provided by Mulkia are compliant to Islamic law (Shariah Principles) as well as being subject to the supervision and compliance review of an independent Shariah Committee.

Vision 
Taking a leading position in managing assets, wealth and investment banking in the Middle East. 

Mission 
Creating innovative investment opportunities, managing them professionally and providing investment banking services according to the best international standards and practices in conformity with investment environment which we are dealing with and in a way that guarantees a high level of quality, performance, risk management and adding value to our customers and investors.   

Values
In Mulkia, we derive our values from principles and teachings of Islamic Shari'a and the best professional practices in business environment and this includes: 
- Innovation
- Commitment 
- Professional Care 
- Reliability and Competence 
- Quality in All of our Businesses 
- Rules of Behavior and Ethics

Name: Maxim Investment Group
Description:
Founded in 1980 by Mr. Wagdy Karrar, Maxim Investment Group has established itself as a leading investment entity in Egypt and the Middle East. Renowned for its innovative approach and dedication to excellence, the group operates across diverse sectors including real estate, hospitality, commercial centers, medical, industrial, aviation, education, services, retail, and trading. This broad spectrum of involvement reflects Maxim’s commitment to addressing the evolving needs of the region, enhancing its reputation as a pioneer in both investment and sustainable growth.

Maxim Investment Group envisions itself as a leader in the investment market, striving to deliver world-class integrated projects through strategic partnerships with government entities and the private sector. By fostering impactful public private partnerships, the group aims to contribute significantly to Egypt’s economic development. Maxim is dedicated to creating a dynamic portfolio of innovative projects that not only affirm its leadership position but also advance the sustainable progress of the nation.

The mission of Maxim Investment Group is to cultivate a strategically diversified and sustainable investment portfolio that supports nation building while being mindful of environmental, economic, and social responsibilities. Under the leadership of Dr. Mohamed Karrar, the Group Chairman and CEO, Maxim has become one of Egypt’s most diversified privately held investment firms. Dr. Karrar’s vision focuses on high standards of quality, integrity, and value in all operations, overseeing the acquisition, financing, and management of an extensive portfolio.  

With over 25 years of experience, Dr. Karrar has earned a reputation for effectively navigating investments across various industries. He has successfully structured investments worth over EGP 100 billion into more than 50 projects, demonstrating his ability to identify and develop lucrative opportunities.

Name: maze impact
Description:
Maze is an impact investing company founded by the Calouste Gulbenkian Foundation created in 2013. Maze offers financial and non-financial tools to everyone committed to delivering positive social and environmental outcomes.

We will always post when hiring. In the meantime, if you would like to work for an impact-driven organisation, check our job board, join our talent pool and subscribe to our monthly newsletter.

Job board: careers.msm.vc/
Newsletter: maze-impact.com/newsletter

Name: Mekdam Holding Group QPSC
Description:
Mekdam Holding Group QPSC is a 100% made in Qatar group, based in Doha. 

It has developed into a leader in various sectors including: technology, security, technical services, telecom and oil and gas services. 

Mekdam Holding Group holds internationally recognized quality management system certifications such as: ISO 9001:2015, Environmental Management Systems ISO14001 and Occupational Health and Safety Management Systems OHSAS 18001. It also holds the APEx (Audio-visual Provider of Excellence) designation, further underscoring its commitment to international standards.

Mekdam Holding Group is committed to helping Qatar’s economy grow to one of the fastest in the world.

Name: 3S Capital
Description:
3S Capital is a private investment and operating group built around three core verticals: Construction, Real Estate and Manufacturing.
We believe in more than just returns. We invest in people and ideas, and every decision is shaped by integrity, discipline, and long-term value creation.

Name: Weinberg Capital Partners
Description:
Founded in 2005, Weinberg Capital Partners is an independent investment company historically active in buy-out capital, which expanded its field of intervention to real estate assets in 2008, and has been investing since 2015 in the capital of listed French SMEs/mid-caps as a minority shareholder with an active, friendly and long-term approach. In 2020, Weinberg Capital Partners added its capacity to invest in SMEs/mid-caps with a minority strategy focused on sustainable development issues, which offers extra-financial support known as impact, to better prepare companies for environmental and societal challenges. In 2023, Weinberg Capital Partners created a new fund, Eiréné, dedicated to the development of SMEs/mid-caps in the security and defense sector. In 2024, the company continued its growth in private equity with the launch of a co-investment fund, WCP Co-Invest.
With €1,8 billion of assets under management, Weinberg Capital Partners is a significant player in the mid-market equity segment in France.

Weinberg Capital Partners is a signatory of the PRI, a member of the International Climate Initiative and an active responsible investor.

Name: DiversyFund, Inc.
Description:
Our mission at DiversyFund is simple-- we help everyday investors build wealth like the 1%. 

Through our online platform, we are democratizing alternative asset investing by breaking down traditional barriers to entry, such as eliminating broker fees and high minimum investments.  We open up access to multi-million dollar commercial real estate investments to everyone and provide them with the opportunity to diversify their portfolio beyond stocks and bonds.

Unlike other platforms that function as a broker, matching investors with third-party projects, DiversyFund offers real estate investments where we are the developer and sponsor, professionally managing every investment on our platform. So with DiversyFund, you get an investment partner with skin in the game so that you can say goodbye to brokers and middleman fees.

The results speak for themselves - over 30,000 people have signed up, investing over $100 million with DiversyFund.

Name: Global Family Office Investment Summit
Description:
2016-2026: Celebrating a Decade of Hosting Family Office Summits!

We are proud to announce the 29th Edition of the GFOIS in Dubai on February 4/5 our flagship event in the city where our group is headquartered and where this incredible journey first began. 

This edition is especially meaningful as we celebrate a decade of bringing the global family office community together for high level connections purpose driven conversations and partnerships that shape industries and build lasting legacies. We look forward to welcoming our worldwide community back to Dubai for this landmark gathering.

Last month we successfully completed
our 28th Edition Summit in Miami at the Trump International Beach Resort.

November 19 & 20

The Miami Summit was especially exciting, as we have already received news of over $800 million worth of investment allocations and announcements. 

www.GFOIS.com

Our events are more than a gathering of global wealth; it is a convergence of visionary minds committed to highlighting exceptional investment opportunities and pioneering ideas, with topics including AI, Web3, blockchain, digital assets, fintech, healthcare, real estate, VC, private equity, co-investing opportunities and much more. 

Together, we aim to build a sustainable future for generations to come, fostering growth and innovation in an ever-evolving world.

Our events are by invitation only. 

To request an invite, please email info@gfois.com

Name: Global Investment House
Description:
Global Investment House K.S.C.C (Global) is a regional asset management & investment banking firm headquartered in Kuwait with offices in major capital markets in the MENA region.

We play an important role in promoting investment opportunities to investors through expert financial engineering. We provide a comprehensive range of investment products & services including funds, portfolio management and advisory, among others.

Our specialized team of Wealth Managers, whose sole purpose is to personally cater to the clients’ requirements on a one-on-one basis, provides clients with financial solutions that best suit their investment needs.

Global's achievements are recognized by industry leaders on corporate, product and management levels and most importantly by our clients.

Name: Multiplica
Description:
Desde 2014, o Multiplica vem se transformando em um ecossistema completo de soluções financeiras. Nosso propósito é claro: dividir para multiplicar — criando caminhos inteligentes e personalizados para que empresas e investidores prosperem no mercado brasileiro.

Hoje, somos referência em crédito, fundos de investimento, wealth, multicomex, reestruturação financeira e seguros, com mais de 90 fundos (sendo 50 FIDCs) e R$ 17 bilhões em ativos sob gestão.

Nosso crescimento reflete a confiança dos clientes e parceiros. Já somos mais de 300 profissionais, distribuídos entre a sede em São Paulo e filiais em Goiânia, Londrina, Porto Alegre, Ribeirão Preto, Jundiaí, Uberlândia, Curitiba, Florianópolis, Cuiabá e apoio operacional em Xangai (CH). Todos movidos pelo mesmo compromisso: entregar valor, confiança e resultados consistentes.

O reconhecimento também nos acompanha: recebemos a certificação Great Place to Work (2024/25 e 2025/26) e o selo de qualidade ISO 9001:2015, reforçando nossa busca contínua por excelência e inovação.

Seguimos firmes na missão de multiplicar oportunidades, expandir fronteiras e construir soluções financeiras que realmente fazem a diferença.

Name: Nextalia
Description:
Nextalia is a unique investment platform in the Italian market, promoted by Francesco Canzonieri together with leading Italian institutional investors (Intesa Sanpaolo, Unipol Assicurazioni, Aurelia, Finprog, Fondazione Enpam, H14, Istituto Altoatesino di Sviluppo, Massimo Moratti Sapa, Confindustria, Bonifiche Ferraresi and Micheli Associati) and featuring a team of highly qualified professionals. 

Nextalia is the reference platform for private market investments in Italy, leveraging our in-house professional capabilities and our strong network of relationships with entrepreneurs, companies and institutions, providing preferred access to proprietary investment opportunities. The firm currently manages c. €2 billion across Private Equity, Private Credit and Venture Capital. 

Nextalia has developed a proprietary approach – ESGNext – to actively promote ESG factors throughout the investment and portfolio management process, making it a distinctive player in the Italian market.

Name: The Vistria Group
Description: The Vistria Group is building a new kind of private investment firm that seeks to deliver both financial returns and societal impact. It invests in essential industries like healthcare, knowledge and learning, and financial services that deliver value for investors as well as communities, employees, and consumers. The Vistria Group works as a true partner with its portfolio companies, drawing on its deep sector knowledge, operational expertise, unique network, diverse team, and impact orientation to achieve transformational growth.

Name: Real Estate Investors Network (REI NETWORK)
Genoa Capital
Description: A Genoa Capital nasce do amadurecimento profissional de uma equipe de gestores que atuaram juntos na gestão de um dos mais premiados fundos multimercado da indústria nacional.

Name: DWM
Description: Developing World Markets (DWM) is at the forefront of a global effort to create investible solutions to meet the social and economic needs of the developing world. We structure transactions that provide microfinance institutions and other socially motivated organizations with access to international capital markets. We aim to achieve sustainable development through market-level financial returns for our investors and social returns in the developing world. For more information visit, www.dwmarkets.com.

Name: Artesian (Alternative Investments)
Description:
Artesian, is a global alternative investment management firm specializing in debt, venture capital and impact investment strategies:

- $1.4 Billion AUM
- Offices in Australia, China, Singapore, US and UK
- Public & private debt (green & sustainable bond focus)
- Asia Pacific VC - investing in remarkable startups, building transformational technology, unlocking solutions to the world's critical challenges - climate, agrifood, health transformation, critical technology
- Venture Capital as a Service (VCaaS) platform - delivering the financial & strategic returns of the innovation ecosystem via bespoke mandates for government organizationss, corporations, industry groups, universities & research institutes & family offices)
- Transformational impact investments (climate, gender equality) with compelling risk/return metrics

Twitter: @artesianvc @artesiancb @impactartesian

Name: Metro Global Ventures LLC
Description: Metro Global Ventures is an operationally-focused middle market private investment firm. Metro Global invests in management buyouts, corporate divestitures, acquisition of family businesses and industry consolidations. Our partners have years of experience working with founder owned/operated small and mid-sized businesses. We take a personal and strategic approach to helping entrepreneurs build the leading organizations of tomorrow by combining capital and expertise. As entrepreneurs ourselves, our mission is to provide private equity to talented entrepreneurial executives to enable them to build great industry leading companies.

Name: Tara Capital Partners
Description:
Tara Capital Partners is an established diversified financial services firm that provides innovative solutions to the global Asset Management community. We serve the highly specialized and sophisticated needs of institutional clients. Our deep understanding of client requirements results in a comprehensive range of tailored solutions for Institutional Managers.

Our corporate philosophy is to implement organizational strategies that are used by the most successful firms in both investment management and other industries.  We foster long-term relationships built on trust, transparency and thought leadership.

Name: Oasis500
Description:
Oasis500 is the leading seed investment company and business accelerator in MENA in the Tech space. We enable great entrepreneurs to transform their viable ideas into scalable businesses. That includes finding those entrepreneurs, investing in their startups, bridging their know-how gap, and eventually helping them get follow-on funding. In the process, we have become one of the most influential players in advancing the entrepreneurship and innovation ecosystem in Jordan and MENA in general.

How It Works
It all starts with reaching out to those people with the entrepreneurial drive, compelling them to embrace it and submit their startup ideas to Oasis500. Successful applicants secure funding from Oasis500 and join the business acceleration program for access to the tremendous cumulative know-how of Oasis500 staff, and our wonderful network of mentors. Not to mention the vibrant community that will help them come to term with their maturing entrepreneurial identity. They will also be introduced to our investors network as part of our focused efforts to help them get follow-on funding when needed.

Name: Harel Mallac Group
Description:
With its origins dating back to 1830, Harel Mallac is one of the oldest trading companies in Mauritius and has pioneered major sectors of the economy such as retail, technology and fertilisers. Today, it remains deeply committed to continue supporting the development its home country, in three key sectors : Manufacturing and Trading, Business Services and Asset Management.
With activities expanding on the African continent, namely in Burundi, Madagascar, Rwanda, Tanzania and Zambia, the Harel Mallac Group employs some1,000 people and represents top-quality local and international brands. 
As an engaged corporate citizen, the Group strives to make a sustainable difference for its stakeholders by providing value-added products and services to businesses and individuals, while monitoring its impact on the natural environment and surrounding communities. 
Harel Mallac and three of its subsidiaries are listed on the Official Market of the Stock Exchange of Mauritius.

Name: IDLC Asset Management Limited
Description:
IDLC Asset Management Limited (IDLC AML) is one of the premier AMCs (Asset Management Company) of Bangladesh. Founded in 2015 as a wholly-owned subsidiary of IDLC Finance Ltd. which is one of the most trusted financial brands of Bangladesh, IDLC AML has been serving as an investment partner to both individual and institutional clientele in Bangladesh. We are committed to popularise professional investment management services through mutual funds, separately managed institutional accounts and alternative funds in this one of the fastest growing frontier markets of the world. To serve the wide range of financial needs of our clients, we have launched a number of debt and equity mutual funds in order to generate long term wealth via innovative, yet simple investment solutions.

We are fervent believer of top down, long term research-backed asset management. What really drives us is not only the number of people we employ or the number of customers we serve, but the number of lives we touch.

Name: Yapı Kredi Portföy
Description:
Çeşitli varlık sınıfındaki geniş ürün yelpazesi ile Yapı Kredi Portföy Yönetimi, sektöründe Türkiye’nin lider şirketlerinden biridir. Yatırım yönetimi, iş performansı ve müşteri ilişkilerindeki itibarlı geçmişi ile Yapı Kredi Portföy Yönetimi, müşterilerinin vazgeçilmez iş ortağı olmayı ve müşterileriyle ortak olarak paylaşacağı uzun vadeli değerleri oluşturmayı kendine ilke edinmiştir.
Yapı Kredi Portföy Yönetimi’nde portföyler farklı piyasalarda uzmanlaşmış profesyoneller ve uzmanlar tarafından takım çalışması ile yönetilmektedir. Kurum içi araştırma ve analizleriyle, küresel çapta geniş bilgi kaynaklarını kullanarak kıstasları ve risk yönetimi kavramını göz önünde bulundurarak müşterilerine ilgili düzenlemeler ve hedefler dahilinde en iyi hizmeti sunmayı amaçlamaktadır.

Neden Yapı Kredi Portföy Yönetimi?
•	Yatırım yönetimi alanındaki gücü
•	Etkin iç kontrol sistemleri
•	Güçlü teknolojik altyapısı
•	Yatırım ürünleri ve hizmetlerinde sürekli ve önde gelen performansı
•	Uzun ve başarılı bir geçmişe sahip müşteri hizmetleri
•	İleri düzeyde ürün yönetimi bilgi ve tecrübesi
•	Geniş ürün yelpazesi

Name: SÀWAI
Description:
Sàwai is an integrated wealth and lifestyle platform built to serve HNIs, UHNIs, and family offices through curated assets, structured investment solutions, and premium concierge services. At Sàwai, we operate on a simple principle: exceptional clients deserve a unified ecosystem where capital, opportunity, and lifestyle converge seamlessly.

To deliver this, we operate through three specialised verticals, each designed to complement the others:

• Sàwai Marketplace
Our acquisition platform that provides verified access to luxury real estate, fine art, collectibles, and alternative assets. Through a curated and trusted ecosystem, clients discover high-quality opportunities that reflect both investment merit and aesthetic value.

• Sàwai Capital
Our investment and asset-management arm offering secured private credit, structured real estate, venture debt, and private equity strategies. Every solution is backed by rigorous diligence, disciplined risk frameworks, and transparent reporting—ensuring predictable, risk-adjusted outcomes for sophisticated investors.

• Sàwai Black
Our UHNI concierge and lifestyle division delivering bespoke global travel, priority access, private aviation, and personalised lifestyle management. This vertical ensures that clients receive the same level of discretion, precision, and excellence in their personal experiences as they do in their investments.

Together, these verticals form a cohesive platform where wealth, assets, and lifestyle are managed holistically—with the professionalism, governance, and refinement expected by the world’s most discerning families.

Name: Dubai Limited Investment LLC
Description:
Dubai Limited Investment LLC (DLI) is one of the fastest growing conglomerates in the UAE. 

It is committed to providing innovative solutions in Healthcare, Information Technology, Food & Beverages, Manpower supplies, Travel & Tourism, Facilities Management, and Laundry services sectors. 

DLI's Group companies are :

Al Tadawi Medical Centre
https://altadawimedical.com

Apar Travel & Tourism
https://www.apartours.ae

Almaha Catering
https://www.gourmetcatering.ae

High Power Services
https://www.highpowerservices.ae

Lavender City Laundry
https://www.lavendercitylaundry.ae

Name: Fondo de Inversión Ambiental Sostenible FIAS
Description: We are the financial mechanism for environmental management in Ecuador.

Name: Polo Capital
Description:
Polo Capital is an independent asset management group based in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil. The company was established in 2002 and started operating its first investment products in 2003.

Polo Capital manages over R$ 4.5 billion of clients’ capital across various liquid and illiquid strategies. The liquid mandates comprise event-driven L/S and Long Bias, while the illiquid products pursue credit, real estate and special situations (precatórios, NPLs and others).

The firm employs a partnership model and values ethics, hard work, quality, creativity, innovation and alignment of interests. Polo Capital has 45 motivated professionals who share such values and who subscribe to a compensation scheme that aims to reward performance and business contribution.

(March 2024)

Name: Zubi Labs
Description:
Somos un 𝗜𝗠𝗣𝗔𝗖𝗧 𝗩𝗘𝗡𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘 𝗕𝗨𝗜𝗟𝗗𝗘𝗥.

Unimos talento e inversión para dar solución a retos sociales y ambientales, a través de empresas que creamos junto a equipos gestores comprometidos. Trabajamos juntos para construir un futuro mejor.

En Zubi Labs creamos y financiamos empresas que buscan generar un impacto positivo. Utilizamos la empresa como instrumento para crear valor social, ambiental y económico. 

Desde nuestra experiencia, identificamos los retos, buscamos el mejor talento y formamos equipos comprometidos que trabajan unidos por una misión: resolver retos para crear un futuro mejor.

Name: Social Investment Managers & Advisors (SIMA Funds)
Description:
SIMA Funds is a pioneering impact investment firm and social asset manager dedicated to transforming lives at the Bottom of the Pyramid (BoP). With $2.3B+ in cumulative impact investments by our principals and $240M+ deployed so far, we provide demand-driven capital and tailored advisory solutions to scale sustainable, profitable enterprises.

Our triple-bottom-line approach delivers strong financial returns while creating meaningful social and environmental impact. SIMA was selected as a Finalist for the Reuters Events Social Impact Award in 2024, selected from 700+ global submissions, and a third-time selected ImpactAssets 50, recognizing top impact fund managers.

Driving Impact Across Key Sectors:
1.  Financial Inclusion – Expanding access to vital financial services
2.  Affordable Housing – Developing sustainable living solutions
3.  Education – Enhancing learning opportunities for underserved communities
4.  Off-Grid Solar – Promoting clean energy access in remote areas

With a global presence and deep local expertise, SIMA Funds is at the forefront of impact investing, fostering entrepreneurship, and driving sustainable development across emerging markets.

Join us in shaping a more inclusive and sustainable future.

Name: Finnish Business Angels Network (FiBAN)
Description:
FiBAN is a Finnish non-profit association of private investors and one of the largest and most active business angel networks in Europe with 600+ investor members in 12 countries. A matchmaker of growth-ready early-stage startups and private investors.

Our three main activities are:
 Matchmaking startups and private investors
 Sharing and developing angel investing best practices via certified investor training.
 Representing private investors' interest in societal matters and through producing data from the early-stage investment landscape.

FiBAN's Data: www.fiban.org/data
For Startups: www.fiban.org/apply
For Members: www.fiban.org/join

In all FiBAN events and contexts, we expect our members and partners to follow our Code of Conduct.  Please find it here:
https://fiban.org/code-of-conduct/

FiBAN Notification Channel for reporting inappropriate behavior:
https://fiban.ilmoituskanava.fi/ and on the footer of our website.

Name: MAG Group Holding
Description:
MAG Group Holding is a multinational conglomerate based in Dubai, UAE. The group was established in 1978 by Founder and Chairman Moafaq Al Gaddah, and is now one of the largest corporations in the region, maintaining a highly prominent position of leadership among its peers in the real estate, contracting and engineering, industrial and commercial trading, freight services, and hospitality sectors. The group is headquartered in the UAE and has offices in China, Iraq, Turkey, and the USA, encompassing more than 50 companies and employing over 2,000 people around the world.

MAG Group believes that success is reserved for those who dare to change and embrace progress. Underpinned by this vision, the group’s mission is to achieve economic growth across all of the sectors it operates in, while always preserving its moral values and placing the priority on benefiting its customers and communities. 

Since its humble beginnings as a one-man spare automotive parts company, MAG Group Holding has evolved to become one of the most highly respected and awarded conglomerates in the Middle East.

Name: Fajr Capital
Description:
Fajr Capital is a private equity firm which invests in the Middle East and Southeast Asia.

We are backed by a diverse group of world-class institutional investors, including: Brunei Investment Agency, HSBC, Khazanah Nasional Berhad, Mubadala and Mohammed Alsubeaei & Sons Investment Company (MASIC), among others.

Since our inception, Fajr Capital has invested in high-growth platform businesses across a range of demographic-driven sectors, such as financial services, education, healthcare, infrastructure, renewable energy, and manufacturing, among others.

Name: Oxy Capital
Description:
Oxy Capital is a leading alternative asset management firm, with offices in Portugal and Italy. Oxy has invested over EUR 1bn in traditional private equity, distressed debt, real estate and listed securities.
 
We are committed to supporting the growth of the businesses we invest in while providing superior returns to our investors.
To learn more, please visit www.oxycapital.com.

Name: Assetmonk
Description:
Assetmonk is a new-age Alternative Investments platform with a keen focus on high potential structured quality products from Real Estate. 

Transparent structure, Digital security, secure transaction procedure makes Assetmonk a reliable market place. Investor-friendly products catering to a broad spectrum of investors are customized exclusively to meet the investment objectives. Our expert evaluated investment opportunities undergo stringent Due diligence making the investment more safe and secure.

Name: APEX Investment P.S.C
Description: APEX Investment P.S.C is a diversified investment holding company, with investment across sectors including Commercial Catering, Facilities Management, Contracting and Auxiliary business, Investments, Tech and Big Data, among others.

Name: MASIC
Description:
MASIC is a family-owned diversified investment company headquartered in Riyadh and established to exclusively manage the assets of the family of the late Mohammed I. Alsubeaei. MASIC manages multi-billion worth of assets inside as well as outside the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia across a broad range of asset classes with a primary focus on public equity, private equity, and real estate.

Vision
To be the premier Saudi investment firm dedicated to an investment philosophy based on excellence, integrity, and our values.

Mission
To deploy the highest institutional investment standards, delivered by a focused and highly qualified team of experts who share a common set of values, driven by a passion to achieve long term partnerships with our stakeholders.

Name: Leblon Equities
Description: Leblon Equities is an asset management firm 100% focused on Brazilian Equities (public and private), founded in 2008 by executives with long experience in the Brazilian equities market. Leblon Equities adopts a long-term value oriented investment philosophy, based on a deep bottom-up fundamental research, offering a broad range of absolute return equity strategies: long only, hedge and illiquid (with onshore and offshore vehicles). The business objectives, ownership, reward structure, and culture are all directed at reinforcing a full alignment of interests among partners, employees and clients. The corporate culture is meritocratic, with the target of having most of personnel as partners. The firm aims to attract talented and motivated people, in a creative and ethical environment. We believe that the combination of the best people with the best governance creates sustainable long-term businesses. Our primary goal as value investors is capital preservation. We do it by having a bottom-up approach, an absolute performance orientation and using the margin of safety concept as the main risk management tool.

Name: Avenue Capital Group
Description:
Avenue Capital Group, founded in 1995 by Marc Lasry and Sonia Gardner, is primarily focused on making opportunistic credit and other special situations investments across the United States, Europe and Asia.  With over 185 employees worldwide, Avenue maintains dedicated accounting, operations, legal, risk management, compliance, business development and information technology teams.  The Firm is headquartered in New York and has offices in Dublin, London, Luxembourg, Hong Kong, Mumbai, Singapore, Sydney, Abu Dhabi and Silicon Valley.  It has $13 billion in assets under management as of December 31, 2023.  

Avenue’s team of over 60 investment professionals has deployed approximately $100 billion in investments across a variety of industries, regions and cycles with an eye towards value creation and capital conservation.  Through rigorous due diligence and a robust network of relationships, the Firm proactively identifies public and private opportunities in fragmented, capital-constrained markets where excess premium can be extracted.  
Avenue approaches workplace diversity in its broadest sense, recognizing that strong performance is best achieved through the hiring of professionals with diverse backgrounds and experiences.  In addition, the Firm has adopted and implemented comprehensive ESG principles for its personnel to consider when fulfilling their responsibilities and is a proud signatory to the United Nations Principles for Responsible Investment.
Information posted is for informational purposes only and is not an offer to sell or solicit investments. Such information should not be seen as legal, tax, or investment advice. Views expressed are based on conditions at publication and are subject to change. Information from third parties is believed reliable, but has not been verified by Avenue. Target returns are hypothetical and come with risks, including loss of capital. Past performance does not guarantee future results. www.avenuecapital.com/Disclosures

Name: BBR Partners
Description:
BBR Partners is a boutique wealth management firm.

Highly customized investment strategies, meticulously bespoke advice, and simplified complexity for a select group of wealthy families.

View Important Disclosure Information: https://www.bbrpartners.com/view-important-disclosure-information/

Name: eB Capital
Description:
eB Capital is a Brazilian alternative investment firm operating through a multi-asset class platform with five distinct business verticals: eB Private Equity, eB Climate, eB Real Estate, eB Agro Credit, and eB Capital Solutions.

The firm's DNA combines investment expertise with operational excellence — a critical competitive advantage for creating value and generating high returns.



A eB Capital é uma empresa brasileira de investimentos alternativos Multi Asset Class e que atua por meio de uma plataforma com cinco verticais distintas de negócio: eB Private Equity, eB Clima, eB Real Estate, eB Crédito Agro e eB Capital Solutions. 

O DNA da empresa combina expertise em investimentos com excelência operacional, uma vantagem competitiva crucial para criar valor e gerar altos retornos.

Name: Principal Malaysia
Description:
As a global leader in asset management, we are focused on harnessing the potential of every opportunity to secure an advantage for our investors in over 80 markets.

Our offering covers all asset classes, and access to both public and private capabilities. Investors can utilize our actionable global and local market insights to help guide their investment portfolios. Our direct access to the markets in which we invest, combined with proximity to the clients we serve, provide valuable advantages. We currently manage $579.5 billion in assets under management (AUM)^.

^As of 6/30/2025. Principal Asset Management is the global investment management business for Principal Financial Group  and includes the asset management operations of the following: Principal Global Investors, LLC; Principal Real Estate Investors, LLC; Principal Real Estate Europe Limited and its affiliates; Spectrum Asset Management, Inc.; Post Advisory Group, LLC; Principal Asset Management Ltda; Principal Global Investors (Europe) Limited; Principal Global Investors (Ireland) Limited, Principal Global Investors (Singapore) Limited.; Principal Global Investors (Australia) Ltd.; Principal Global Investors (Japan) Ltd.; Principal Asset Management Company (Asia) Ltd., Principal Asset Management Berhad, Principal Islamic Asset Management SDN BHD, Principal Fondos de Inversion, S.A. DE C.V., Principal Mexico Servicios, S.A. DE C.V., Principal Adminstradora General de Fondos S.A., and includes assets where we provide model portfolios.  

Principal Asset Management Berhad 199401018399 (304078-K). Securities Commission Malaysia doesn’t review advertisements produced by Principal MY.

Name: Schroders Greencoat LLP
Description:
Schroders Greencoat is a specialist investment manager dedicated to renewable infrastructure, with over £8.5 billion under management. We aim to provide strong risk-adjusted returns for our investors, while also delivering positive environmental outcomes.
Founded in 2009, Schroders Greencoat has built a reputation for unwavering delivery of our investment propositions, as well as for innovation – our offerings have become the model for an entire industry sector. Our investments span the globe, with local expertise in the Europe, the UK and the US, and are managed across a range of publicly listed vehicles*, private market pooled funds, co-investment vehicles and Separate Managed Accounts. 
Renewable infrastructure is a multi-trillion dollar global sector that will grow by more than $100 billion a year over the next decade. Utilities, energy companies and infrastructure developers will build out the majority of this transition, but the scale of capital involved will require significant private financing. There exists a very large and growing pool of capital which is keen to own and operate these assets, but lacks the inhouse technical skills and sector expertise to manage the investments independently. Our purpose is to bridge this gap, by acting as a solution provider for investors, and providing the partnership, financial, technical and operational expertise to deliver secure incomes for our clients.
Acquired by Schroders plc in 2022, Schroders Greencoat is the fourth pillar of the group's private markets investment business, Schroders Capital.  Schroders Capital through Schroders Greencoat has the ambition to become a global leader in infrastructure and the alternative investment industry more broadly.
 
* Schroders Greencoat is the investment manager for two listed vehicles, Greencoat UK Wind PLC and Greencoat Renewables PLC.

Name: Coolabah Capital Investments
Description:
Coolabah Capital Investments (CCI) is a leading active credit alpha manager that is responsible for managing numerous institutional mandates, the Smarter Money Investments’ product suite, the Coolabah Active Composite Bond Fund (Hedge Fund) (CXA:FIXD) and the BetaShares Active Australian Hybrid ETF (ASX: HBRD). CCI manages over A$16 billion in funds under management.

CCI’s edge is in “alpha” generation in liquid, high-grade credit in contrast to traditional fixed-income strategies that drive returns through adding more interest rate duration risk, credit default risk, and/or illiquidity risk (or “beta”). This alpha is a function of the world-class analytical insights rendered by CCI’s human capital, which includes over 53 executives with a long-term track-record of delivering prescient macro and quant insights. In 2019, CCI’s portfolio managers were selected as one of FE fundinfo’s Top 11 “Alpha Managers” based on their risk-adjusted performance across all asset-classes.

Name: OPAIA GROUP
Description:
At OPAIA Group, our unwavering commitment is to propel Africa towards a sustainable future, one step at a time, driven by determination. Since our inception on August 22, 2002, fostering social and human well-being has been a cornerstone value.

With over 22 years of industry leadership, we specialize in developing and executing infrastructure projects for both public and private institutions. Our dedicated team of 500+ employees, backed by extensive technical expertise and robust national and international financial support, ensures the success of our endeavors and the creation of over 1000 indirect jobs.

We recognize our duty to the communities and sectors we serve, as well as our shared responsibility for the health and sustainability of our planet. Moreover, we prioritize the interests of our shareholders and employees, striving to build resilient, profitable, and sustainable enterprises.

At OPAIA Group, we believe in the transformative power of our collective efforts to drive Africa's sustainable growth and development. Together, we are shaping a brighter future for generations to come.

Name: Halabja Group
Description: Halabja Group, a premier Iraqi private firm, is committed to national development through varied sector involvement and innovative work methods. Its priority is fulfilling stakeholder expectations while addressing social and environmental responsibilities, aiding local community advancement. Halabja aims to foster job and investment opportunities, thus solidifying the region's infrastructure and bolstering its role in national reconstruction. Guided by a commitment to people and the environment, the group employs strategies to attain its goals, shaping a prosperous future for Iraq.

Name: Capricorn Investment Group
Description: One of the largest mission-aligned firms in the world, Capricorn Investment Group was born from a belief that sustainable investment practices can enhance risk-adjusted returns. Underlying this investment approach is a deep desire to demonstrate the huge investment potential that resides in breakthrough commercial solutions to the world’s most pressing problems. With offices in New York City and Palo Alto, the firm has grown to manage approximately $12 billion in multi-asset class portfolios for families, foundations and institutional investors.

Name: Aristotle
Description:
Aristotle is a majority employee-owned investment management organization backed by an experienced leadership team that has worked together for over twenty-five years. With offices in Los Angeles, Newport Beach, Boston and Sarasota, our investment teams specialize in U.S., international and global equity portfolios in addition to a variety of fixed income strategies, including structured products. Four of the Aristotle Affiliates are PRI Signatories.

Our mission is to help our clients reach their long-term financial goals with active portfolio management using our research-driven investment framework.

Aristotle attracts and retains talented investment professionals through a culture focused on research, investment management and client success.  Aristotle’s corporate leadership team oversees a centralized support infrastructure to ensure that its distinct teams of investment professionals are able to focus on what they do best—adding value to client portfolios.  The company’s support infrastructure includes shared services such as compliance, trading, operations, client communication, marketing and distribution.    

The term “Aristotle” as a stand-alone refers to Aristotle Capital Management and its affiliates. Aristotle represents a group of affiliated investment advisers that provides equity and fixed income management solutions across a unified platform. Aristotle Capital Management, LLC, Aristotle Capital Boston, LLC, Aristotle Atlantic Partners, LLC, Aristotle Investment Services, LLC and Aristotle Pacific Capital, LLC are independent investment advisers registered under the Investment Advisers Act of 1940, as amended. Registration does not imply a certain level of skill or training. More information about each adviser, including their investment strategies, fees and objectives, can be found in their respective Form ADV Part 2, which is available upon request.

Name: State Oil Fund of the Republic of Azerbaijan (SOFAZ)
Description:
The State Oil Fund of the Republic of Azerbaijan (SOFAZ) is a legal entity and an extra-budgetary institution. 
SOFAZ is a mechanism whereby energy-related earnings are accumulated and efficiently managed. 
The cornerstone of the philosophy behind the Fund is to ensure 
intergenerational equality with regard to benefit from the country's oil wealth, whilst improving the economic well being of the population today and safeguarding the economic security of future generations.

The mission the State Oil Fund of the Republic of Azerbaijan (SOFAZ) is to transform depletable hydrocarbon reserves into financial assets generating perpetual income for current and future generations.

Information and press releases, and both quarterly and annual statements, in Azerbaijani and English, about the SOFAZ's revenues and expenditures, investment activities are regularly published in the local press and posted on SOFAZ's web-site ( www.oilfund.az ) to reflect developments in varying areas of SOFAZ's activities, and also to promote transparency in the utilization of revenues from oil.

Azərbaycan Respublikası Dövlət Neft Fondu (ARDNF) neft və qaz ehtiyatlarına dair sazişlərin həyata keçirilməsi ilə bağlı Azərbaycan Respublikasının əldə etdiyi gəlirlərin toplanmasını, səmərəli idarə edilməsini, gələcək nəsillər üçün saxlanmasını təmin edən xüsusi qurumdur.

Azərbaycan Respublikası Dövlət Neft Fondunun (ARDNF) missiyası tükənən təbii sərvətlərdən əldə olunan gəlirlərin toplanması və Azərbaycan xalqının bugünkü və gələcək nəsillərinin daimi gəlir mənbəyinə çevrilməsidir.

ARDNF təbii ehtiyatların idarə olunmasından əldə edilən gəlirlər və onların xərclənməsi istiqamətlərinin ictimaiyyətə çatdırılmasında şəffaflığın təmin olunması üçün gəlir və xərcləri, investisiya fəaliyyəti haqqında rüblük, ARDNF-nin fəaliyyəti barədə illik hesabatları mətbuatda və ARDNF-nin rəsmi internet səhifəsində (www.oilfund.az), sosial şəbəkələrdəki səhifələrində(Facebook, Twitter) mütəmadi olaraq dərc edir.

Name: VWH Capital Management, LP
Description:
VWH Capital Management, LP (“VWH”) is an SEC-registered investment advisor and private equity firm with multi-billion dollars in assets under management. The firm is the winner of the 2023 Private Equity Wire US Emerging Manager Award for Best Performance: Debt. VWH is a major player in the U.S. distressed residential mortgage space and seeks to generate long-term returns in securitized products, distressed credit, and whole loans.

Founded in 2014, VWH leverages its team of seasoned professionals to deploy opportunistic strategies within distressed debt and securitized products.  The firm prides itself on in-house experience ranging from sourcing, bidding, due diligence, and asset management.  As of 2023, VWH has multiple funds under management and has issued 9 securitizations broadly distributed to institutional investors.

Name: Ara Partners
Description: Ara Partners is a global private equity and infrastructure investment firm focused on industrial decarbonization. Founded in 2017, Ara Partners seeks to build and scale companies with significant decarbonization impact across the industrial and manufacturing, chemicals and materials, energy efficiency and green fuels, and food and agriculture sectors. The company operates from offices in Houston, Boston, Washington, D.C., and Dublin. Ara Partners closed its third private equity fund in December 2023 with over $2.8 billion in capital commitments. As of March 31, 2025, Ara Partners had approximately $6.0 billion of assets under management.

Name: Perdaman
Description: Perdaman is a multinational group based in Western Australia with a long-standing track record of involvement in diverse markets. From investments in fertiliser production to help our farmers produce crops, to the ownership and management of shopping centres that create wonderful experiences and community hubs; from the production and distribution of pharmaceuticals to provide better healthcare, to migration services and advanced energy solutions, we are an innovative company that actively seeks out new opportunities.

Name: TAEL Partners
Description:
TAEL Partners (TAEL) was established in 2007 with the vision to be the preferred private equity partner to ASEAN family controlled businesses. 

Our three founding Principals, Michael Sng, Ati Sugiharti and Loong Mei Yin, have worked together for more than 15 years in leading financial institutions in Asia and have over 70 years of collective experience. 

TAEL operates across 6 regional offices in ASEAN, namely Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, Thailand, Vietnam and the Philippines, offering unparalleled access to opportunities in the region. These deep local roots have enabled TAEL Partners to gain early access to investment opportunities within its thematic investment strategy of catering to the ASEAN strong economic and GDP growth, as well as riding on it burgeoning ASEAN middle-class.To leverage on these evident opportunities, TAEL has started and will continue to build regional platforms in the following sectors: food/agriculture, healthcare, education, consumer, and urban sustainability.

As a trusted advisor to business owners and management, we participate actively in key decisions, create new growth opportunities, have a long track record of repeat investments with business owners, and we  have grown together with thriving entrepreneurs in the region.

TAEL stands for The Asian Entrepreneur Legacy, reflecting the firm’s vision to partner with entrepreneurs and business owners to create their legacies. At the same time, we seek to form a legacy of our own in becoming ASEAN’s leading Private Equity firm with talented, experienced teams in all the major ASEAN countries.

Contact Us 
Information  : enquiry@taelpartners.com
Career             : recruitments@taelpartners.com

Name: Fairtree
Description:
Fairtree is a leading global asset manager that manages alternative and long-only investment portfolios across all global asset classes for local and offshore clients. Headquartered in South Africa, Fairtree manages R186bn* in award-winning, diverse global portfolios.

Fairtree prides itself on its acclaimed specialist teams with meticulous top-down and bottom-up analysis, ensuring a diversified and holistic approach. As a trusted investment partner, Fairtree continually strives for investment excellence and to deliver consistent and competitive returns while pursuing its purpose of enriching the lives of all our stakeholders.

*As at the end of July 2025.

Name: GCI
Description:
GCI Wealth is a boutique financial planning and investment group dedicated to ensuring that your future, secured whilst at the same time addressing the potential lifestyle interrupters that may affect your hard-earned capital. 

All that we do revolves around our clients. We offer tailor-made, integrated financial planning solutions for individuals, businesses and affluent investors with integrity, service excellence, and performance that our loyal clients have grown to expect. 

FSP No.: 47528, 35901, 24763, 821

Name: Bin Murshed Group
Description:
Bin Murshed Group, led by Sanad Al Meqbali, is one of the fastest growing enterprises in the UAE. 
Bin Murshid Group companies include Delivery Zone, Emirates Zone Companies Representation, Black Limo, Emirates Zone PRO, Migration Zone.
The group upcoming or soon to be launched projects are in e-Commerce and app development.

Name: Arcapita
Description: Arcapita is a premier alternative asset manager with a total transaction value in excess of $30 billion across more than 100 investments. The firm’s principled approach provides a strong, ethical compass that fosters trust, excellence and partnership with stakeholders. With over 25 years of management expertise, aligning Arcapita's interests with that of our clients, we conduct business in a fair and transparent manner. Arcapita has offices in Bahrain, the US, UK, Saudi Arabia, UAE, and Singapore giving us a unique vantage point to understand tomorrow’s evolving investment landscape.

Name: ISMMART Group of Industries (Pvt) Ltd
Description: ISMMART Group of Industries (Pvt) Ltd is an emerging trading house. It is a group of 6 companies registered under SECP ( Security and Exchange Commission of Pakistan) to ensure quality and customer satisfaction, working across the globe. The organization has been associated in the field of imports/exports, estates & builders, hospitality, and transportation.

Name: Proantioquia
Description:
Nuestro papel como Fundación es estimular al sector privado para que participe en espacios de formulación, discusión e instrumentación de políticas públicas. Esto, acompañado de acciones que están orientadas a diseñar y ejecutar iniciativas enfocadas en el mejoramiento de la calidad de vida de la población.

Proantioquia nació en 1975 como respuesta a una necesidad: velar por el progreso de la región y promover iniciativas de desarrollo para el departamento y el país. Nuestra Fundación inició cuando un grupo de empresarios antioqueños, destacados en sus campos, se unieron con el propósito de construcción de una región más competitiva en lo económico, fortalecer su infraestructura y generar impactos sociales con equidad.

Desde nuestros inicios, en Proantioquia hemos creído que el desarrollo de nuestra región se logra con alianzas interinstitucionales y la promoción de proyectos para el desarrollo económico, rural, social y cultural, el aumento de la calidad y la pertinencia de la educación, y el fortalecimiento de la institucionalidad. Nuestro impulso y participación en estas iniciativas se ha dado con el propósito de consolidarnos como una sociedad integrada, que trabaje por una paz sostenible y generadora de oportunidades para todos sus habitantes.

Propósitos y retos
Una frase que ayuda a comprender la manera como nos pensamos es: "Por Antioquia y desde Antioquia por Colombia". Nuestro propósito es convocar, articular y movilizar acciones que generen desarrollo y para ello hemos encontrado en nuestro camino a grandes aliados con los que compartimos el mismo horizonte.

Name: Solovis
Description: Solovis is leading fintech innovation for institutional investors with a powerful cloud platform for multi-asset class portfolio management, reporting and analytics – uniquely designed for the asset owner community. Endowments, foundations, pensions, OCIOs and family offices leverage Solovis to transform how they collect and aggregate investment data, analyze portfolio performance, model and predict future outcomes and share meaningful portfolio insights with key stakeholders. The Solovis platform enables detailed analysis and dynamic data modeling across multiple portfolios and pools of capital for actionable, transparent insights that empower both operations and investment teams.

Name: Kadima Asset Management
Description:
Kadima is an independent asset management company which combines the wide experience in financial markets to academic excellence, focusing on the development of quantitative strategies for its funds. The firm was founded in 2007, being the oldest quantitative hedge fund manager in Brazil.


For more information, please contact us: contato@kadimaasset.com.br

Name: Icehouse Ventures
Description:
Our mission is to be transformative investors in transformative Kiwi companies. 

We have invested >$500m into >350 companies, including Halter, Crimson, Education, Sharesies, Partly, Hnry, Dawn Aerospace, Tracksuit, Mint Innovation, Tradify, OpenStar, Shuttlerock, Ethique, Basis, Fuel50, Spalk, Substack, Nuro, and PowerbyProxi.

Name: PlusWealth Capital Management LLP
Description:
Innovation Driven Trading Firm

Plus Wealth is a proprietary quantitative high frequency trading firm established in 2008 and has grown from a small group of 5 individuals to a firm of over 60 professionals working as equity researchers, quantitative analysts, traders and technologists. 

We proudly distinguish ourselves through our cutting-edge trading technology, our innovative trading model and a collaborative work culture. We are a privately funded quantitative trading firm booming and transcending in the most complex products in the financial markets.

Our constant run to use best practices to deploy capital through quantitative analysis is the reflection to evolve of what we are today & what we aim to achieve.It is a small reflection of our belief of renewed commitment of improvement, success and excellence through constant innovation.

Our tagline – “THINK.TECH.TRADE” depicts a clear understanding of our vision & mission of emerging trade through integrating the algorithm of capital through Technology as a spine.

At Plus Wealth, our main emphasis is on having a clearer understanding of markets to gain from them. Through the use of techniques such as filtering, classification, time series analysis, pattern recognition, stochastic models and statistical inference, we analyse terabytes of data to find out the pricing glitches in the financial markets.

Name: Charles Stanley
Description:
Charles Stanley, part of Raymond James Wealth Management, is one of the UK’s leading Wealth Management firms, providing bespoke investment portfolios and tailored financial advice at every stage of your financial journey. Our focus on clients has endured since the foundation of Charles Stanley in 1792. Working with individuals, charities, institutions, and professional advisers, we have created financial security for many tens of thousands of people. With a network of over 20 offices across the UK, we place great importance on providing our clients with the highest standard of service.

About Raymond James Wealth Management 
Raymond James Wealth Management comprises Raymond James and Charles Stanley. Assets under management and administration (AUMA) of the combined UK wealth management group stand at £46.8bn (as at 30 June 2025). Our US parent company, Raymond James Financial, was established in 1962 and is a is a leading diversified financial services company. It has $1.64tn (as at 30 June 2025) assets under administration and supports approx. 8,800 wealth managers.

Name: Energy Infrastructure Partners
Description: A leading investor in the global energy transition, Energy Infrastructure Partners manages assets for institutional investors. With more than a decade of experience and three fund generations, we offer investors long-term returns and the chance to make tangible contributions to the energy transition through private equity investments.

Name: NextEnergy Capital
Description:
NextEnergy Capital was founded in 2007 to become the leading specialist investment and asset manager in the solar sector.

Our mission is to generate a more sustainable future by leading the transition to clean energy.

We manage multiple private and public investment platforms and are the leading global operating asset manager of solar power projects.

For more info please visit www.nextenergycapital.com

Name: ECP (Energy Capital Partners)
Description:
ECP (Energy Capital Partners) is an investor in critical infrastructure focused on electrification, decarbonization, reliability and sustainability. Founded in 2005, ECP’s investment team has an early mover advantage in the sector as we have been successfully investing through multiple energy transitions over the last 30 years, including ECP’s senior partners whom have been investing in critical electrification and decarbonization real asset infrastructure since the mid 1990s and are experienced owners of ESG-related businesses. With 100 employees and over 825+ years of cumulative energy experience, ECP is built on cutting edge strategies and opportunities linked to decarbonization and clean energy.
Follow us on SoundCloud: https://soundcloud.com/energy-capital-partners

Name: Worldwide Holdings Berhad
Description:
Worldwide Holdings Berhad is widely recognised as the leader and pioneer in environmental management service and one of the key players in the property development sector in the Klang Valley. We are also a local pioneer in the medical device industry.

A wholly-owned subsidiary of Perbadanan Kemajuan Negeri Selangor (PKNS), Worldwide Holdings focuses on four main business: property development, environment management, medical device manufacturing and energy. Our investment portfolio focuses heavily on utilities/ energy and real estate industries, both locally and abroad.

Name: SUSI Partners
