Name: Foresight Group
Description:
Founded in 1984, Foresight is a leading investment manager in real assets and capital for growth, operating across Europe, Australia, and the United States.
With decades of experience, Foresight offers investors access to compelling opportunities at the forefront of change.  Foresight actively builds and grows investment solutions to support the energy transition, decarbonise industry, enhance nature recovery and realise the economic potential of ambitious companies.

Name: SIAD Holding
Description: We are a family-run company based in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia,  investing in Services and Development especially in the fields of Religious and Domestic Tourism, Hospitality and Hotels, catering, F&B, Travel and Transportation, as well as Consultations.

Name: Kristal.AI
Description:
Kristal.AI is an award-winning digital private wealth platform, licensed and operational in Singapore, Hong Kong, India, and UAE

We unlock sophisticated investment opportunities for the underserved mass affluent investors and provide a genetic advisory algorithm that helps first-time investors pick the most suitable portfolios (branded as Kristals) according to their financial goals and risk profiles.

Our diverse team comprises 100+ people, backed by a strong and supportive management team with past work experience in JP Morgan, Citibank, BNP Paribas, Yahoo, Cognizant, and IBM Security. We are also backed by a leading VC in India – Chiratae Ventures (formerly IDG Ventures).

For more information, visit https://kristal.ai/.

Name: BBVA Asset Management en España
Description:
BBVA Asset Management, es la Unidad de BBVA, que a través de sus entidades gestoras de IIC y fondos de pensiones,  se alza como un referente global en el mundo de la gestión de activos. Opera a través de múltiples centros de gestión, con una extensa y reconocida gama de productos y presencia en todo el mundo. 

El proceso de inversión descansa en equipos exclusivos relacionados entre sí y guiados por un comité estratégico de distribución de activos. En el caso de Latinoamérica, cada país dispone de gestores de fondos especializados liderados por el equipo regional de la zona, lo que permite construir una estrategia regional con valor añadido y conocimiento del mercado local. De este modo, visión y estrategia globales se combinan con acción y adaptación a los mercados locales. 

El compromiso de BBVA Asset Management con la innovación constante y excelencia en la gestión de activos han sido reconocidos con numerosos galardones dentro de la industria. La calidad en el producto ofrecido y los altos niveles de servicio a sus clientes, junto con el particular afán de superación en nuestro día a día, son la mayor garantía para defender la posición de liderazgo de BBVA Asset Management.

Name: GSA - Global Student Accommodation
Description:
Global Student Accommodation (GSA) is a leader in real estate asset management within the student housing sector. Our vision is to transform student housing through investment that makes a mark in the world.

GSA has an unrivalled international presence, active across nine countries with assets in 70 of the world’s leading educational cities. It manages $6 billion of AUM and has flagship offices in New York and London. 

The strength of the business lies in its market expertise, investment capability and exceptional relationships, as well as a collaborative and integrated approach with our global operating partner Yugo.

GSA is part of The Dot Group, founded by Nicholas Porter, a pioneer in global student living with more than 30 years of experience. The Dot Group is a transformational force of market-leading businesses across the global student living economy shaping a better future for students and creating sustainable value for generations to come.

Visit our website for more information www.gsagroup.com

Name: Nedgroup Investments
Description:
Nedgroup Investments is an award-winning global investment business with a growing presence in Africa and Europe. Nedgroup Investments offers a wide range of investment solutions for retail and institutional investors.

Nedgroup Investments is a division of Nedbank Group Ltd, leveraging the investment and financial expertise of one of South Africa’s largest financial services groups.

The Nedgroup Investments Best of Breed philosophy sees us partner with select fund managers who we believe are able to provide consistent long-term outperformance for our clients. These fund managers are experts in their field of specialisation and we tend to partner with them for long periods of time giving them sufficient opportunity to deliver on their mandate objectives. 

We obsess about long-term performance and our top priority is to deliver a superior investment experience for our clients.

Nedgroup Collective Investments (RF) Proprietary Limited is an authorised Collective Investment Scheme Manager in terms of the Collective Investment Schemes Control Act 45 of 2002. Any information herein is not intended, nor does it constitute financial or other advice. Past performance is not necessarily a guide to future performance. T & Cs apply.

Name: Fondo Italiano d'Investimento SGR
Description:
Fondo Italiano d'Investimento SGR è la realtà pensata per supportare la crescita e l'internazionalizzazione delle piccole e medie imprese italiane, con particolare attenzione alla tecnologia, all’innovazione e alla sostenibilità.
 
Costituita nel 2010 su iniziativa del Ministero dell’Economia e delle Finanze, di alcune banche sponsor e associazioni di categoria, è oggi partecipata da CDP Equity, Intesa Sanpaolo, UniCredit, ABI, Fondazione Enpam, Fondazione Enpaia, Banco BPM e BPER Banca.

Fondo Italiano ha come principale obiettivo la gestione di fondi mobiliari chiusi finalizzati a far confluire capitali pazienti verso il sistema delle imprese italiane d'eccellenza, coniugando finalità di ritorno sul capitale investito, in linea con i benchmark internazionali, con quelle di sviluppo del sistema produttivo italiano.

Ad oggi, la SGR gestisce dieci fondi di investimento mobiliari chiusi riservati ad investitori qualificati, per un totale di asset under management target pari ad oltre 3,5 miliardi di euro e opera sia attraverso investimenti diretti, sia investimenti indiretti (fondo di fondi). Fondo Italiano considera la sostenibilità un valore fondamentale ed è impegnata ad integrare i criteri ambientali, sociali e di governance (ESG) nelle proprie attività d'investimento.

Name: Triodos Investment Management
Description:
Triodos Investment Management is a globally recognised leader in impact investing – offering investable solutions to address today’s most critical sustainability challenges. 

We serve as a catalyst in sectors that are key in the transition to a world that is fairer, more sustainable and humane.

With over 25 years of experience in investing for impact, our investment teams have established global expertise across Energy & Climate, Financial Inclusion, Sustainable Food & Agriculture, and Impact Equities & Bonds.

Triodos Investment Management is wholly-owned subsidiary of Triodos Bank NV, one of the world’s leading sustainable banks.  

Today’s global challenges need impact investing. Learn more at https://www.triodos-im.com/

Name: Kamco Invest
Description:
Kamco Investment Company K.S.C.P ("Kamco Invest") is a regional non-banking financial powerhouse headquartered in Kuwait with offices in key regional financial markets, offering a comprehensive range of investment products and services covering asset management, investment banking and brokerage.

Established in 1998 and listed on the Boursa Kuwait in 2003, Kamco Invest currently operates as an independently managed subsidiary of KIPCO Group.

Kamco Invest provides a variety of bespoke asset management solutions covering equities and fixed income, private equity, real estate, third party solutions and management of special situations. Our team combines our latest in-house market research with innovative investment strategies and solutions to suite each client’s unique needs. Our investment banking specialists have assisted some of the regions top-rated institutions in successfully concluding M&As, Debt Capital Market and Equity Capital Market mandates. Stemming from the understanding that our clients want to grow their wealth with the freedom to choose the financial markets that suite their needs, our brokerage arm provides quick and reliable access to Boursa Kuwait and several regional and international markets.

Disclaimer: This social media account is the official and consolidated communication platform of Kamco Investment Company (Kamco Invest) and all its subsidiaries, including those operating in the State of Kuwait, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, and the Dubai International Financial Centre (DIFC).

http://www.kamcoinvest.com/node/40700

Name: Dragon Capital
Description:
Dragon Capital Group is a leading Vietnam-focused asset manager with over $6 billion AUM and has been at the forefront of the country's financial development for over 30 years. As the largest independent fund manager in Vietnam, we pride ourselves on being 65% employee-owned and serving a diverse client base that includes high net worth individuals, family offices, pension funds, and sovereign wealth funds. Our role in shaping Vietnam's financial landscape includes pioneering contributions to its capital markets and corporate governance standards.

Our portfolio features two flagship funds: the Vietnam Enterprise Investments Limited (VEIL), a closed-end fund with over $2 billion AUM and listed on the London Stock Exchange, and the Vietnam Equity (UCITS) Fund (VEF), the first actively managed UCITS Fund in Vietnam, with over $270 million AUM.

Our investment strategy is centred on long-term, quality investments, emphasising strong corporate governance and sustainable growth. Leveraging Vietnam's largest research team and our proprietary platform, IRIS, we aim for superior risk-adjusted returns.

Committed to responsible investment, Dragon Capital has been carbon neutral since 2005, adheres to global ESG standards, and is a signatory to the UN Principles for Responsible Investment.

Name: Crescent Enterprises
Description:
Crescent Enterprises is a leading multinational company growing diversified global businesses that are sustainable, scalable, and profitable. Headquartered in the United Arab Emirates, with business operations in 19 countries, it operates under four enterprise platforms: 
- CE-Operates, with subsidiaries and affiliates in the infrastructure sector
- CE-Invests, a balanced portfolio of alternative asset class investments, including private equity, real estate and other structured investments
- CE-Ventures, a corporate venture capital platform that makes strategic investments in early- to late stage high-growth companies and select venture funds globally
- CE-Creates, an internal business incubator, building start-ups that are socially-conscious and financially feasible

Crescent Enterprises employees over 1,600 people and operates with a philosophy that embraces corporate governance, inclusive growth, and responsible business practices.


A subsidiary of the Crescent Group, one of the most progressive family business groups that have been actively contributing to the economic landscape of the Middle East and North Africa (MENA) region for over 50 years. Crescent Group’s other subsidiary, Crescent Petroleum, is the first and the largest indigenous, privately owned upstream oil and gas company in the Middle East.

Name: Binghatti Talent Acquisition
Description: BinGhatti Holding is an international investment holding company headquartered in Dubai International Financial Centre (DIFC). The company focuses on high-growth potential projects in the real estate, hospitality, industrial, construction and FMCG sectors. Empowered by mercantile experience since 1875, the brand seeks to redefine the commercial norms of the region by delivering reasonably priced high-quality products according to defined standards and schedules.

Name: Etica Funds
Description:
Etica Funds is an asset management company, the only italian organization which offers just socially responsible investment funds. 
Etica Funds was founded on the belief that analysing the environmental, social and governance aspects of securities issuers as well as the financial aspects might offer added value also in terms of performance. Etica Funds offers a responsible approach to the financial markets, screening the securities in its portfolio against ethical criteria. It also exercises its subscribers’ shareholder rights in the companies in which it invests, talking to them and urging them along the path towards more responsible behaviour. By embracing social and environmental criteria, codified in a transparent methodology, the company is able to manage risk more effectively, and reap sizable investment opportunities. 
Etica Funds is a full member of several international and national networks for excellence in ethical finance. We take great pride being the first Italian asset management company to have made a concrete commitment to climate change by joining the Montréal Carbon Pledge on carbon accounting and the reduction of the carbon footprint of our equity investments 
Etica Funds has been offering responsible investment funds and ESG consulting through its team of highly qualified specialists. A mix of skills which makes our model unique in today's market. 
We rigorously analyze data and information to find the most virtuous companies and countries in which to invest to create value for our customers. 
Our capabilities are backed up by numerous prizes and awards and by continuous growth. 
This blend of financial and extra-financial skills has allowed us to achieve our broader objective: to represent the values of responsible finance in the world of investment.

Name: 3G Capital
Description: 3G Capital is a multi-billion dollar, global investment firm focused on long-term value creation, with a particular emphasis on maximizing the potential of brands and businesses. The firm and its partners have a strong history of generating value through operational excellence, board involvement, deep sector expertise and an extensive global network.

Name: Claris Limited
Description:
Claris Ltd. (Claris) is a holding company established with a long-term objective of diversifying to multiple businesses, driven by the spirit of innovation & desire to make sustainable impact. Powered by our experience in building large scale global healthcare businesses from scratch, efficiently & quickly, Claris has pivoted itself for new growth & opportunity through investments & management interest in the fields of Clean Energy, Venture Capital & Incubators.
Our genesis dates to 1999 with Claris Lifesciences, a healthcare company with focus on infusions and specialty injectables. At its peak, the infusions business, had more than 50% market share in the IV fluids segment. In the Injectables space, Claris was one of the largest pure-play sterile generic injectable companies in India, with approvals from the most stringent regulatory bodies in the world like US FDA, MHRA (UK) and TGA (Australia), among others.
In a span of two decades, the company created nearly billion-dollar valuation, established world-class integrated business model, introduced over 130 products, built presence in over 100 countries, had a team of over 4,000, and was listed on the Bombay Stock Exchange. Claris exited healthcare in 2017, after sale of injectables business to Baxter and infusions business to Otsuka and Mitsui.
At the helm since 2008, Vice Chairman and MD Arjun Handa brought accelerated growth that saw Claris leverage cutting-edge manufacturing capabilities. As a former national-level football player the lessons Arjun learnt on the pitch, from team spirit to perseverance, have reflected in his ability to strategize, inspire and lead.
Our commitment to a people-centric culture has helped Claris win ‘India’s Best Companies To Work For’ award, 8 years in a row. 
Parallel to striving for excellence, Claris serves as a socially responsible organization by supporting and encouraging various social causes in the area of sports and fitness, business and entrepreneurship, art and culture.

Name: Kuwait Investment Authority
Description: KIA, Kuwait's sovereign wealth fund's mission is to achieve long term investment returns on the financial reserves of the State of Kuwait, providing an alternative to oil reserves and enabling Kuwait’s future generations to face the uncertainties of the future with greater confidence, while meeting the principal objective of KIA’s establishment.

Name: BB Previdência
Description:
Somos uma empresa de previdência complementar fechada com mais de 30 anos no mercado.

Atualmente, administramos 43 planos de benefícios, para mais de 280 mil participantes, que somam um patrimônio com cerca de R$10 bilhões.

Trabalhamos todos os dias com o propósito de sermos relevante para a realização dos sonhos das pessoas. Somos constantemente monitorados pelos Conselhos, Auditorias, Governo e pelo próprio corpo funcional, que se sente responsável pela condução dos negócios. Contamos com a administração do Banco do Brasil e temos orgulho do que fazemos pelos nossos participantes.

Estamos também no Instagram: @bbprevidencia

Name: Grupo Roda
Description:
El Grupo Roda fue fundado hace más de 60 años en la ciudad de Santa Cruz de la Sierra, Bolivia por Cristóbal Roda Daza y Gladys Vaca El Hage. Nos caracterizamos por ser un conglomerado de empresas líderes y por contar con un alto nivel de diversificación geográfica y sectorial. Nuestro portafolio de compañías está enfocado en cinco sectores estratégicos: Cerámico, Forestal, Agroindustrial, Inmobiliario y Comercial. 

El Grupo Roda es reconocido por ser un consorcio innovador y resiliente que apuesta cada vez más por el desarrollo de Bolivia. Nos encontramos en constante crecimiento y estamos convencidos que el talento humano es el eslabón más importante de nuestra estrategia de expansión, al igual que la visión que tienen nuestros inversionistas. Los invitamos a que sigan nuestra página de LinkedIn para estar al tanto de nuevas iniciativas, emprendimientos y puestos de trabajos disponibles a nivel nacional e internacional.

Bienvenidos!
Location: Santa Cruz de la Sierra, Santa Cruz

Name: Dubai Holding Asset Management
Description: Dubai Holding Asset Management owns and operates an extensive portfolio of 20 landmark retail destinations and 15 residential communities. The Group plays a focal role in shaping Dubai's position as a global leader in business, tourism and leisure, contributing to its position as one of the world's most coveted and sought-after liveable destinations.

Name: UBL Fund Managers
Description:
UBL Fund Managers is a wholly owned subsidiary of United Bank Limited, making it the first Asset Management Company to be launched by a bank in Pakistan. UBL Fund Managers has been operating since the year 2001 and ranks amongst one of the leading asset management companies in Pakistan. UBL Fund Managers has been awarded a Management Quality Rating of AM1 (Highest Management Quality) by VIS Credit Rating Company Limited and was Pakistan’s first company to be compliant with ‘Global Investment Performance Standards’ (GIPS).

Name: Al-Faisaliah Group (JSC)
Description:
Al Faisaliah Group (AFG) is a privately-held holding company headquartered in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, and operating across the wider Middle East. Founded in 1971, the Group holds leading positions in multiple industries including Dairy, Electronics, Healthcare and Food Service. 

The Group is recognized across the region for its strongly-held values, professional management and decades-long strategic partnerships with leading local and global firms including Sony, Danone and Philips.
AFG seeks top talent both locally and internationally. 

We are considered an employer of choice and offer attractive career growth opportunities by virtue of our scale and diversification.

Name: SEDCO Holding
Description: SEDCO Holding is a leading investor driving prosperity for generations to come.

Name: Castleton Commodities International
Description:
Castleton Commodities International is at the cutting edge of energy trading and infrastructure asset investing backed by the best minds in the industry and powered by deep fundamental research and advanced analytics. We recognize the importance of providing sustainable and reliable energy.

To explore available opportunities, please visit the CCI website at www.cci.com.

Name: MK Group
Description:
With 4000 employees and business operations spread in Serbia, Slovenia, Croatia and Montenegro, MK Group is one of the most successful holding companies in the Adriatic region. 
Thanks to optimal corporate governance and stable growth, MK Group has become a regional leader in agriculture and food industry, tourism and real estate, and renewable energy sources. Today, MK Group is recognized as a trustworthy and reliable partner who brings innovations and new trends in these key business areas.
In addition to developing sustainable business, corporate social responsibility is one of our company’s core values. With the vision to connect the Adriatic region through business and philanthropy, for forty years MK Group has been creating value and supporting the development of 123 local communities in which it operates. Accordingly, MK Group and its member companies have organized more than 500 socially responsible activities in the last five years, primarily oriented towards the education and health of young people and children.

Name: Invest Africa Ltd
Description: Invest Africa is a leading pan-African platform that promotes trade and investment across the continent. Our network comprises multinational corporations, private equity firms, institutional investors, development finance institutions, professional service organisations, government bodies and entrepreneurs. As the trusted entry point into Africa, we support and connect business and investment through our membership, dynamic events programme and consult service.

Name: AltamarCAM Partners
Description:
AltamarCAM is a leading investment manager in private markets whose main objective is to provide institutional investors, including insurance companies, pension funds and financial institutions, as well as high net worth private clients, with access to investments in unlisted markets: private equity, venture capital, life sciences, real assets (real estate and infrastructure) and private debt / credit, through a selection international managers and in different strategies (primaries, secondaries and co-investments). 

In addition, AltamarCAM provides independent investment banking services (advice on mergers and acquisitions, IPOs and financing) and merchant banking through its subsidiary Altamar Advisory Partners, as well as direct access to funds from a selection of international managers through its subsidiary Altamar Global Investments AV. 

With offices in Madrid, Barcelona, Santiago de Chile, New York, London, Cologne and Munich, it has a team of more than 250 professionals. AltamarCAM has ca. 17,9 billion euros in assets committed by investors.

Name: The Riverside Company
Description:
The Riverside Company is a global investment firm focused on being one of the leading private capital options for business owners and employees at the smaller end of the middle market by seeking to fuel transformative growth and create lasting value.

Please see Riverside’s Social Media Terms of Use at: https://www.riversidecompany.com/social-media-terms-of-use/

Name: ANC Holdings LLC
Description:
The ANC group started operating in 1976.With its founding company ANC Contracting, the group has played a significant role in creating the modern Dubai. The following years have seen the evolution of a conglomerate that has become a leading force in the construction industry and other sectors of the economy of the UAE. 

ANC Holdings is also closely associated with renowned corporations such as Arcelor Mittal, Zabeel Investments, Dubai Investments PJSC, Oman & Emirates Investment Holding Company, Flag Holdings LLC and Mohammed Jalal & Sons WLL on various ventures.

The group has a diversified business portfolio, focusing on:

•	Construction
•	Trading
•	Foods
•	Process
•	Education
•	Hospitality

The vision now is to serve society in many emerging sectors through professionalism, responsive customer service and commitment to world-class products through pioneering innovations.

Name: Filinvest Development Corporation
Description:
Filinvest Development Corp. (FDC) is one of the leading, most stable and diversified conglomerates in the Philippines. Through its diverse businesses, FDC has established a strong reputation as a dependable partner in economic development. FDC currently has strategic holdings in key industries such as real estate development and leasing, banking and financial services, hotel and resort management, power generation and sugar.

FDC aims to grow this legacy of success by continuing to strengthen its position in the industries where it competes and embarking on new endeavors that will bolster its role in nation building.

Name: OurCrowd
Description:
OurCrowd is a global venture and alternatives investment platform that empowers institutions and individuals to invest and engage in emerging companies, funds and other private market alternative assets.  The most active venture investor in Israel, OurCrowd vets and selects companies, invests its capital, and provides its global network with unparalleled access to co-invest and contribute connections, talent and deal flow. OurCrowd builds value for its portfolio companies throughout their lifecycles, providing mentorship, recruiting industry advisors, navigating follow-on rounds and creating growth opportunities through its network of multinational partnerships. 
OurCrowd portfolio companies have achieved more than 50 exits. It has received more than $1.9B in committed funds for its 300+ portfolio companies and venture funds.
Visit us at: www.ourcrowd.com

Name: AVCA - The African Private Capital Association
Description:
AVCA: Promoting private investment in Africa

AVCA – The African Private Capital Association is the nexus of private capital in Africa, championing and enabling private capital investment in Africa.

As the pan-African industry body, AVCA plays a significant role as an effective change agent for the industry and acts as the trusted independent source of information, insight, and intelligence inspiring investor confidence; making the case for both commercial returns and impact of private capital in Africa.

AVCA represents a community of capital allocators, investors, fund managers, advisors, entrepreneurs and professional services committed to our shared vision of a prosperous Africa that is sustainable, inclusive, and innovative.

Name: Ibiuna Investimentos
Description: Fundada em maio de 2010, a Ibiuna Investimentos é uma empresa de gestão de recursos, atualmente com mais de R$ 19 bilhões em ativos sob gestão.

Name: INVEST SAUDI
Description:
Saudi Arabia is the best place in the world to grow your business. 

We offer investors the best of both worlds – a G20 economy with a start-up mentality, and a government that has passed hundreds of pro-business reforms and is determined to work with you to make your investment a success. 

We’re a dynamic hub for global businesses - the largest economy in the Middle East, sitting at the heart of three continents and powered by a young, switched-on digitally-savvy workforce. 

We’re bringing to life giga-projects on a scale not possible anywhere else in the world – only in Saudi Arabia can your business be part of bringing entirely new cities like NEOM to life. 

And when you invest in Saudi Arabia, we’re so much more than just another investment destination – we’re your business partners, building and growing your business together, now and in the future. 

That’s why future-forward businesses from around the world are investing in Saudi Arabia every day. Is your business here yet?

Name: Interloop Holdings Private Limited
Description:
Interloop Holdings (Pvt.) Ltd. is an investment holdings company with diverse portfolio of subsidiaries. The principal business of the company is to invest, acquire, sell and hold stocks, shares, securities and any other form of investment of its subsidiaries.

SUBSIDIARIES & AFFILIATES:

INTERLOOP DAIRIES: One of the largest corporate dairy farms in Pakistan, with annual production capacity of 50 million liters of premium milk, spans 160 acres and houses over 10,000 livestock, is equipped with world class milking systems, state-of-the-art animal housing, and advanced technologies.

PRINTKRAFT: Pakistan’s only LEED GOLD-certified printing & packaging facility is equipped with European technology and meeting top global standards. The facility caters to diverse industries including FMCGs, Pharmaceuticals, Textiles, Food & Beverages and more.

MOMENTUM LOGISTICS: Specializes in outsourcing and managing complex supply chains, providing warehousing facility, logistics planning, control, and execution. Operating nationally with 250+ trucks and globally across 45+ countries. It also serves as the sole distributor of Samsung spare parts in Pakistan.

IRC DAIRY PRODUCTS: A joint venture of Interloop Holdings with Rella - the cheese experts, and Crystal - the logistics professionals, IRC pioneers in export-quality dairy products, including mozzarella cheese, butter, desi ghee, and whey powder. It serves key markets nationwide and expanding its exports globally.

OCTANS DIGITAL: Specializes in IT services, such as software development, AI solutions, cloud services and cyber security - empowering businesses to optimize their operations, accelerate growth, and solve complex challenges.

SHIFA NATIONAL HOSPITAL: A 422-bed tertiary care hospital in collaboration with Shifa International Hospital, is set to commence its operations in Faisalabad in December 2025. Designed with world-class diagnostic, medical, surgical, and rehabilitative technology for inpatient and outpatient care.

Name: Carbon Equity
Description: Carbon Equity is the world’s first impact investing platform that gives investors small ticket access to leading climate private equity funds. From the global pool of 800+ funds we’ve identified, we select top funds based on climate impact and financial performance. Carbon Equity caters to anyone interested in the intersection of climate and tech, and seeks to move the needle with their money. Carbon Equity is a European venture-backed platform founded by highly experienced investors and tech entrepreneurs.

Name: Holouly
Description: Holouly was established in 2019 February 9, located in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. Founded by Mishal Almubaydh. We provide pre-opening services, after-opening services, franchise, and operation management.

Name: Alpha Alternatives
Description: Alpha Alternatives is a multi-asset class asset management firm that creates sophisticated investment solutions for proprietary and client capital. We provide investors access to differentiated investment opportunities which are usually restricted to the prop investment desks. We walk the extra mile towards product innovation, alpha creation and risk management. We are singularly focused on creating alpha in everything that we do, and this is reflected in our product structures, our partner relationships and our economics.

Name: Mason Blake
Description:
At Mason Blake, we are specialised recruiters for the Investment Management sector, covering distribution, investment, product and operational functions. Our focus has allowed us to become experts in the sector and build an unrivaled network of clients and candidates.

We're ideally placed to identify the best opportunities for our candidates, and top-quality recruiters for our investment management clients. Have a look at our site to see our latest job opportunities, and to find out how we can help you.

You can speak to one of our consultants today on 020 7033 4499 or email info@masonblake.com

Name: Davidson Kempner Capital Management
Description:
Davidson Kempner Capital Management is a global investment firm with approximately $37 billion in assets under management across multiple funds and strategies. 

Backed by over 40 years of investment experience, we invest across the capital structure in both public and private markets. We apply our multi-dimensional, research-driven investment process to evaluate and execute a diverse range of transactions across asset classes, geographies and market cycles.

No transaction is too complex for us.

Name: CVC Credit
Description:
Established in 2005, CVC Credit is the dedicated credit arm of CVC. The business invests in companies across the sub-investment grade corporate credit markets in Europe and North America, with a strong focus on downside protection through active risk management. It provides investors with a broad range of opportunities to meet their investment criteria through dedicated vehicles and investment solutions for both Performing Credit and Private Credit. These strategies benefit from the broad experience of the local investment teams, as well as the unique access to the accumulated knowledge within the broader CVC platform.

CVC Credit manages €34 billion in dedicated vehicles for Performing Credit and Private Credit strategies with consistent performance across credit cycles.

Name: Marshall Wace
Description:
Marshall Wace is a leading provider of alternative investment solutions.

Operating as a single team across the globe, we are dedicated to creating long-term relationships with our clients built on trust and integrity. We define our culture as one of continuous innovation and a quest for improvement. We instinctively strive to do things differently, with fresh thinking that we believe enables us to create proprietary value and maximise the benefits to our clients.

Name: M&G Investments Southern Africa
Description:
Global reach
Since our inception in London 94 years ago, we’ve consistently proven our ability to grow people’s wealth. Today we have operations in 28 countries, service 5 million retail clients and manage more than R8.1 trillion in assets. M&G Investments Southern Africa (M&G SA) is part of M&G plc, a large global investment manager. All our clients benefit from the expertise of over 6,000 professionals based across the world’s top financial centres. 

Local results
As one of South Africa’s top 10 asset managers, we manage more than R332 billion in assets under management (as of March 2025). Our range of world-class investment solutions helps meet our clients’ diverse risk and return requirements. 

Institutional and retail solutions
Our institutional clients have access to specialised segregated portfolios to meet their unique requirements. For our retail investors, we offer a focused range of unit trusts to suit all risk profiles and return objectives, as well as tax-free investments and retirement solutions for individuals.
Through our client-centric approach, we tailor solutions to meet a multitude of local and global investment needs. Besides our equity and fixed income offerings, we also offer specialised investments, such as global corporate bonds and listed infrastructure.

Investing in diversity and inclusivity 
We’re proud to have a certified Level 1 B-BBEE rating. But diversity and inclusion are not just our moral obligation; they are strategic imperatives that are proven to enhance problem-solving and innovation. For this reason, these priorities are driven top-down, from our Chief Executive, our Board and our Executive Committee, to all our management and staff. This results in consistently strong fund performance and high standards of client service.

Experience the power of consistency
Discover how our unique combination of global resources and understanding of local markets can consistently grow your portfolio.  Get in touch today.

Name: CFA Society Brazil
Description:
A CFA Society Brazil é a associação que reúne os detentores de certificação CFA em todo o território nacional. Com mais de 1.500 membros efetivos e atuantes no mercado, estamos representados em 11 estados e no Distrito Federal. 
Fazemos parte de uma rede de mais de 160 CFA Societies localizadas em 74 países de todos os continentes. Nossa missão é contribuir para o desenvolvimento da profissão de finanças no Brasil, difundindo os mais altos padrões de ética, conhecimento e excelência profissional, bem como divulgando a certificação CFA no Brasil.

Name: Eaton Vance
Description:
Eaton Vance provides advanced investing to forward-thinking investors, applying discipline and long-term perspective to the management of client portfolios. From offices in North America, Europe, Asia and Australia, Eaton Vance’s distinct investment brands offer a broad complement of investment strategies and wealth management solutions. Exemplary service, timely innovation and attractive returns over market cycles have been hallmarks of Eaton Vance since 1924.

Eaton Vance is part of Morgan Stanley Investment Management, the asset management division of Morgan Stanley. Advisory services are offered by Eaton Vance Management and Calvert Research and Management, both part of Morgan Stanley Investment Management, the asset management division of Morgan Stanley. Description: Alfozan is a respected and successful conglomerate headquartered in Saudi Arabia with operations throughout the GCC and Middle East. Led by a talented team of professionals, the Alfozan Holding has evolved and diversified over the years ، to become one of the fastest-growing regional success stories today.

Name: Emirates National Investment
Description:
Emirates National Investment (ENI) is an Investment Company with a diversified portfolio that includes real estate, construction and agriculture across the Middle East and Africa region. 

Founded in 1982 by the late H.E. Dr. Mohammed Khalfan Bin Kherbash, ENI’s establishment coincided with the extraordinary drive for economic development, diversification and innovation that has swept through the UAE and GCC region.

Name: Kapitalo Investimentos
Description:
A Kapitalo Investimentos é uma gestora independente de recursos, especializada em fundos multimercado e de ações, com mais de 15 anos de atuação. É reconhecida por entregar retornos consistentes e de maneira diversificada por meio de um modelo de gestão pioneiro no mercado financeiro brasileiro.

Fundada em 2009, a Kapitalo adotou um modelo descentralizado, multigestor e multiestratégia. Seus fundos multimercado flagship, Kappa e Zeta, foram estruturados a partir de times de gestão independentes, formados por profissionais experientes que, junto com suas equipes, têm autonomia e robustez para criar e gerir suas próprias estratégias de investimento.

Com o amadurecimento de seu modelo de gestão, a Kapitalo lançou novos fundos com estruturas mais tradicionais, como o Kapitalo K10, um multimercado global, e o Kapitalo Tarkus, um fundo de ações long-only.

Atualmente, conta com 11 times de gestão independentes, cada um com um mandato de investimento específico. A combinação estratégica desses times de gestão é o que dá origem aos seus fundos.

O modelo da Kapitalo estimula transparência, competição com colaboração, decisão compartilhada e diversificação. Para o investidor, a gestora é a garantia de consistência e diversificação, atendendo às demandas de um portfólio completo.

Saiba mais em kapitalo.com.br.

Name: Âncora Consórcios
Description:
A Âncora Consórcios foi criada em 1989. Sua sede administrativa está localizada na cidade de Franca, interior de São Paulo, mas sua atuação é nacional, devido à proporção alcançada pelas parcerias comerciais em todo país e a ampla atuação nos diversos segmentos.
Hoje nos consolidamos como uma das melhores administradoras do mercado, principalmente através do atendimento diferenciado que oferecemos para desenvolver soluções aos nossos clientes, colaboradores e parceiros.

Name: PUENTE
Description: We are a global firm with strong presence in Latin America, and leaders in the Southern Cone. We offer a wide range of services to an international client base, including corporations, institutional investors, governments and individuals. Our mission is to add value to our clients’ businesses by offering outstanding personalized services, based on our expertise and knowledge of both local and international markets.
Location: Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires, Buenos Aires

Name: Kosmos
Description: Kosmos, a company founded and chaired by the professional football player Gerard Piqué, and backed by Hiroshi Mikitani -Chairman and CEO of Rakuten (TYO: 4755)-, is currently building a global portfolio of sports, media and entertainment ventures, leveraging strategic synergies across forms of content, platforms, technologies and geographies.

Name: İnci Holding
Description:
1952 yılında Cevdet İnci tarafından kurulan ve grubun ilk şirketi İncitaş ile temeli atılan İnci Holding 1982 yılında holding yapısını aldı. Bugün toplam 10 şirketi ve 3.200 çalışanı ile jant, akü üretimi ve satışı alanlarında uzmanlığını geliştirerek Türkiye'nin önemli sanayi grupları arasında yer almaktadır. Otomotiv yan sanayindeki uzmanlığının yanı sıra satış ve pazarlama, otel ekipmanları ve lojistik alanlarında da faaliyet göstermektedir. Ülkemizin çağdaş eğitim düzeyine ulaşmasına destek olmak amacıyla 1985 yılında ise Cevdet İnci Eğitim Vakfı kurulmuştur.

Inci Holding, which was founded in 1952 by Cevdet İnci, took the form of holding in 1982. Today, it is among the important industrial groups of Turkey by having improved its expertize on wheel and battery manufacturing and sales  with a total of 10 companies and 3.000 employees. Along its expertize on automotive side industry, it also operates at fields of sales and marketing, hotel equipment and logistics. Cevdet İnci Educational Foundation was also founded in 1985 in order to support reaching of our country to contemporary educational level.

Name: Modus Group
Description:
Modus Group story began in 1993 in Lithuania. During more than 30 years, the company has grown to a successful international business currently operating in 12 European markets. We mainly focus on four areas: renewable energy (Green Genius), mobility services (CityBee, MyBee, and Mobility Fleet Solutions), the auto business (with 16 well-known brands, including Porsche, Bentley, Fiat, Jeep, Maserati, etc.) and management of investment funds through the subsidiary Modus Asset Management. 
While growing business and looking for new opportunities, Modus Group follows its strategic guidelines: investing into the future, trusting green and working smart.

Name: Aegon Asset Management
Description:
Aegon Asset Management 

We are active global investors and organize our capabilities around four global investment platforms where we have deep asset-class expertise: Fixed Income, Real Assets, Equities, and Multi-Asset & Solutions. 

We serve a global client-base of pension plans, public funds, insurance companies, banks, wealth managers, family offices and foundations.

Name: Aavishkaar Capital
Description:
Aavishkaar started in the year 2001 with a vision to invest in entrepreneurs building sustainable enterprises that can catalyze development impact for excluded communities and remote geographies across the globe. Aavishkaar's initial focus was India and now is  taking its learnings to countries in South and South East Asia.

Over the years, Aavishkaar through its various initiatives in micro equity and micro finance space has pioneered the approach of building a financial ecosystem that would nurture entrepreneurs by providing risk capital for scalable rural focused enterprises. Our mission is to evolve an approach to investing that nurture entrepreneurs in building enterprises that can generate commercial returns while serving humanity sustainably.

Name: Aboitiz InfraCapital
Description:
Aboitiz InfraCapital, Inc., the infrastructure arm of the Aboitiz Group, aims to transform the lives of Filipinos through better and integrated infrastructure facilities and services. In partnership with the Philippine government, the company pursues various water, airport, digital infrastructure, and urban mobility projects that advance business and communities. It also develops fully integrated economic centers to bring about progress in the countryside.
 
Its current business units include the Aboitiz Integrated Economic Centers in Batangas and Cebu, Apo Agua Infrastructura, Inc. in Davao, Lima Water Corporation in Batangas, and Unity Digital Infrastructure. The company also has a minority stake in Balibago Waterworks System, Inc., a privately-owned waterworks utility system based in Pampanga.

Name: The Olayan Group
Description:
The Olayan Group is a global enterprise with its origins in Saudi Arabia. Today, our international business is headed by KHHL Legacy Establishment, an Alternative Investment Fund (AIF).  We have a multigenerational family outlook and value enduring partnerships, actively investing across listed equities, private equity, debt, and real estate. 

KHHL Legacy Establishment is based in Vaduz. The Group also has offices in New York, London, Luxembourg, Athens, and Singapore. Olayan Financing Company, the parent company for the business and investments in the broader Middle East, is based in Riyadh.

Name: Al Sraiya Holding Group
Description:
A diversified family-owned business conglomerate,  Al Sraiya Holding Group (ASHG) has established itself as a Qatar-based leading investment management business group  for over four decades. With the goal of contributing to Qatar's infrastructural development, ASHG has offered comprehensive and diverse services to all fields with which it has been associated.
 
Since its inception in 1975, ASHG has committed itself to excellence in all of its operations; thus, placing a strong emphasis on ethics, quality, innovation, efficiency, and reliability to exceed all our stakeholders’ expectations – including ours. Leading by example, Al Sraiya Holding Group now owns and operates a diverse portfolio of investments across four main divisions; Construction, Industrial, Hospitality, and Trading & Services. Every step along the way, ASHG has acquired the expertise to make it a one-stop-destination for all modern day business requirements.
 
We are immensely proud of our partnerships with multinational companies in the diverse areas under our managed portfolio. As a trustworthy group of companies with motivated and ambitious management, as supported by a solid base of dedicated talent, we continue to grow in our mission to support Qatar's growth and development in line with the visionary policies of the Qatar’s leadership.

Name: Lyxor Asset Management
Description:
Lyxor Asset Management Group ("the Lyxor group"), wholly-owned by leading European asset manager Amundi and composed notably of two subsidiaries (1) (2), is a specialist asset manager, expert in all investment styles, active, passive or alternative. From ETFs to multi-management, with EUR 174,3 billion* under management and advisory, Lyxor group creates innovative investment solutions to meet the long-term challenges of managing savings. Thanks to its experts and its engineering tradition and research, Lyxor group combines search for performance and risk management. 

(1) Lyxor Asset Management S.A.S. is approved by the «Autorité des Marchés Financiers» (French regulator) under the agreement # GP98019.
(2) Lyxor International Asset Management S.A.S. is approved by the «Autorité des Marchés Financiers» (French regulator) under the agreement # GP04024.

*Figures as of November 30th 2021 on the  perimeter of activities acquired by Amundi Asset Management.

Name: Bahrain Mumtalakat Holding Company ("Mumtalakat")
Description:
Mumtalakat is the sovereign wealth fund of Bahrain. Borne out of the economic diversification plan spearheaded by the Crown Prince, Mumtalakat was established in 2006 as a holding company to manage 29 commercial assets on behalf of the Government. In the years since, our assets have grown to over 60 local and international companies across 12 sectors.

We invest in, and for, Bahrain, playing an important role in the national economy through our strategic assets while seeking commercially viable investment opportunities in growth sectors domestically and internationally.

Name: Royal Group of Companies
Description:
The Royal Group is the premier investment and development company in Cambodia. The company is focused on bringing quality investment to the country and providing investors with the platform to run successful and profitable operations.

Cambodia's booming economy, one of Asia's fastest growing, enjoys a stable political situation, together with the most welcoming and liberal business, investment and trade environment in ASEAN.

The Royal Group has been at the heart of this economic development for more than two decades, attracting international investors and building market leaders in a cross-section of industries.

The company is recognized as the country's most dynamic and diversified business conglomerate. Established as a strategic investment holding company, it maintains interests in a wide range of industries including telecommunication, energy, media, banking, insurance, resorts, education, property, trading and agriculture.

The Royal Group is the strategic investment gateway to a revitalized Cambodia. Having a history of successful, market-leading partnerships with investors in a diverse range of industries, The Royal Group offers overwhelming investment potential in one of the first truly free-market economies in the Mekong Region of Asia.

Name: REAG Investimentos
Description: A Arandu é uma empresa de gestão de patrimônio e asset management.

Name: Bukhatir Group
Description: The Bukhatir Group is one of the largest and most diversified business houses in the United Arab Emirates. Its main interests straddle Construction, Education, Information Technology, Real Estate, Shopping & Retail, Sports & Leisure and Services. The geographical domain of the Bukhatir Group spans over half the world from North America to North Africa, West and South Asia. The group has an employee base of over 7,000 and its current aggregate annual turnover stands at AED 3 billion approximately.

Name: Generation Investment Management
Description:
Overview

Generation was established in 2004 as an independent, private, investment management partnership with offices in London and San Francisco. The Generation team represents a diverse mix of people from around the world representing more than 20 countries and speaking over 25 languages. Our investment team was founded by bringing together seasoned investment analysts with leaders from the sustainability research field. Generation's investment approach is based on our conviction that sustainability risks and opportunities directly affect long-term business profitability. We believe the interests of shareholders, over time, will be best served by companies that maximise their financial return by strategically managing their economic, social and environmental performance. Generation has built a global research platform in order to integrate sustainability research into fundamental financial analysis. We are closely aligned with our clients, and our performance is measured over the long term.

Name: Azora
Description:
Azora is a leading independent global real estate and infrastructure investment manager, with €14.6 billion AUM and over 600 professionals. Since 2003, Azora has identified megatrends and pioneered investments across residential, hospitality, senior living, data centers, and renewable energy, managing the full investment cycle with a low-risk, sustainable approach and robust operational capabilities.

Azora operates across Europe and the U.S., offering customized investment solutions through funds, joint ventures, and listed vehicles. Its vertically integrated platform ensures seamless management of acquisition, development, and asset repositioning, delivering tailored strategies to meet investor needs while driving long-term value creation.

With over 20 years of experience, Azora has established itself as a trusted partner for global institutional investors, achieving an average net IRR of 19% and 2.1x MOIC across its portfolio with an active approach to ESG integration.

Name: Geração de Valor
Description: Promover o empreendedorismo através da construção de uma mentalidade vitoriosa, o "pensar fora da caixinha", a fim de contrariar as estastísticas e o fluxo natural seguido pela sociedade, permitindo que qualquer pessoa esteja apta a construir um futuro melhor e fortalecidos, possam também contribuir com outras pessoas.

Name: XP Asset Management
Description:
Nascemos em 2006, com a criação do clube de ações XP Investor, e ao longo dos anos consolidamos nossos processos, controles e governança. Gradualmente trouxemos e formamos profissionais de excelência que hoje são responsáveis por investimentos que vão desde estratégias líquidas como Renda Variável, Renda Fixa, Multimercados e Crédito Estruturado, até estratégias ilíquidas como Special Situations, Imobiliário, Agro, Infraestrutura, Private Equity e Venture Capital.

Nossos times de investimentos, financiam recursos para todos os setores da economia real (desde startups até empresas listadas em bolsa de valores), podendo fazer isto por meio de instrumentos de dívida ou participação acionária. Isso posiciona a XP Asset como gestora única, oferecendo soluções completas tanto para investidores pessoa física, quanto para investidores institucionais.

Name: MFS Investment Management

In 1924, MFS launched the US’ first open-end mutual fund. Description:
The Family Office is an independent wealth management firm offering tailored portfolio solutions in diversified alternatives such as private equity, private debt, real estate, and more.

Whether you aim to preserve your legacy, plan for retirement, or diversify your investments, our world-class financial advisors will design a bespoke portfolio with transparency and convenience.
