Description: The Sygnia Group is a specialist financial services group focused on the provision of multi-management, index-tracking and administration solutions.

Name: RBC Dominion Securities
Description:
At RBC Dominion Securities, our vision is simple: to always earn the right to be our clients’ first choice for wealth management services. We know that to achieve this vision, we must invest in our business and ensure our advisors have access to best-in-class tools and resources.

For more than a century, we have helped individuals, families, businesses, charitable foundations, and other organizations build on and preserve their wealth through sound financial planning, trusted investment advice and unparalleled wealth management solutions. We are committed to providing advisors with the tools and support needed to scale their business. It’s why today, RBC Dominion Securities is one of Canada’s leading full-service investment and wealth management firms. 

RBC Dominion valeurs mobilières a une vision simple : toujours mériter le privilège d’être le premier choix de ses clients pour la gestion de leur patrimoine. Pour ce faire, nous savons qu’il faut investir dans nos activités et veiller à ce que nos conseillers aient accès à des outils et à des ressources de pointe.

Depuis plus de cent ans, nous aidons les particuliers, les familles, les entreprises, les fondations de bienfaisance et d’autres organisations à constituer un patrimoine et à le préserver grâce à une planification financière judicieuse, à des conseils de placement fiables et à des solutions de gestion de patrimoine sans pareilles. Nous nous faisons un devoir de fournir aux conseillers les outils et le soutien dont ils ont besoin pour augmenter leur volume d’affaires. C’est pourquoi RBC Dominion valeurs mobilières fait aujourd’hui partie des plus grandes sociétés de gestion de patrimoine et de placements à service complet du Canada. 

https://www.rbcds.com/en/about-us/

For information about our legal terms of use, please visit www.rbc.com/legal/#social_media.

Name: Sharjah Asset Management
Description:
Sharjah Asset Management (SAM), the investment arm of the Government of Sharjah, is dedicated to driving sustainable economic growth and shaping the Emirate’s long-term prosperity. Entrusted with managing government-led investments, SAM plays a strategic role in diversifying Sharjah’s economy and maximizing value for stakeholders.

With a focus on stability, innovation, and impact-driven investment strategies, SAM manages high-performing portfolios across four key sectors: banking, oil and gas, transportation, and industry. Through strategic partnerships and intergovernmental collaborations within the UAE, across the wider Middle East, and globally, SAM strengthens Sharjah’s regional and international economic presence.

As a forward-looking investment entity, SAM is committed to fostering opportunities that align with the Emirate’s vision for sustainable development, economic diversification, and long-term growth.

Name: Alturki Holding
Description:
Alturki Holding is a premier investor and partner of choice for building sustainable businesses in Saudi Arabia and the MENA region. Since our establishment in 1975, we have been a key facilitator in the development of modern Saudi Arabia, having been involved in almost every major infrastructure development across the Kingdom.

With over four decades of experience, we have built and accelerated the growth of our portfolio of leading businesses across an array of sectors. These sectors includes Construction and Building Materials, Infrastructure, Transportation, Information and Communications Technologies, Oil-Field Tools and Services, Real Estate and more. We will continue to grow our core strategic businesses, however, we will invest in new trending industries such as Healthcare IT, and Education Technology. We will also consider companies that aim to positively transform business models and society through new digital technologies and harnessing the potential of the fourth industrial revolution.

Name: responsAbility Investments AG
Description:
responsAbility Investments AG is a globally leading Swiss impact asset manager specializing in private market investments across three investment themes. These themes directly contribute to the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs): Financial Inclusion, to finance the growth of Micro & SMEs; Climate Finance, to contribute to a net zero pathway; and Sustainable Food, to sustainably feed an ever-growing population. responsAbility also offers tailor-made and fund investment solutions to institutional investors. All responsAbility investment solutions target specific measurable impact alongside market returns.

Since its inception in 2003, responsAbility has deployed over USD 17.6 billion in impact investments. With over 280 employees collaborating across 6 offices, as of 31 December 2025 the company manages USD 5.8 billion in assets across approximately 330 portfolio companies in around 70 countries. Since 2022, responsAbility has been part of M&G plc, the international savings and investments business, and contributes to enhancing M&G’s capabilities in impact investing.

Name: Primary Venture Partners
Description:
Primary is the world's largest early stage VC firm, with a billion in assets under management and 50 full time employees. 

Primary’s Impact team outnumbers investors 2:1, and is filled with seasoned executives working alongside founders to supercharge growth and secure quality hires, early customers, and downstream investors. This team embeds with companies for 2,500 hours of high-intensity fractional leadership work, conducts 3,000 candidate interviews, maintains a pool of 5,000+ active job seekers, and hosts 250 events large and small for the NYC tech community each year.

Cofounders Brad Svrluga and Ben Sun have won recognition from Forbes' Midas List and Insider's Seed 100.

Name: VanEck
Description:
Disclosure: https://www.vaneck.com/us/en/social-media-disclaimer/

VanEck has a history of looking beyond the financial markets to identify trends that are likely to create impactful investment opportunities. We were one of the first U.S. asset managers to offer investors access to international markets. This set the tone for the firm’s drive to identify asset classes and trends—including gold investing in 1968, emerging markets in 1993, and Exchange Traded Funds in 2006—that subsequently shaped the investment management industry.

Today, VanEck offers active and passive strategies with compelling exposures supported by well-designed investment processes. The firm’s capabilities range from core investment opportunities to more specialized exposures to enhance portfolio diversification. Our actively managed strategies are fueled by in-depth, bottom-up research and security selection from portfolio managers with direct experience in the sectors and regions in which they invest. Investability, liquidity, diversity, and transparency are key to the experienced decision-making around market and index selection underlying VanEck’s passive strategies.

Since our founding in 1955, putting our clients’ interests first, in all market environments, has been at the heart of the firm’s mission.

Name: WhiteOak Capital
Description:
WHO ARE WE?

WhiteOak Capital Group comprises companies engaged in investment management and advisory services. Underpinned by strong investment values, we aim to deliver tangible results for all stakeholders over the long-term.

OUR VISION

We at WhiteOak Capital, follow a strong performance-first culture, with a vision of being a performance-centric organisation with a strong and trustworthy investment culture.

INVESTMENT CULTURE AT WHITEOAK CAPITAL

With a seasoned team of global investment professionals, a time-tested investment philosophy and a disciplined research process, we aim to build balanced portfolios that give you long-term benefits.

WhiteOak Capital Group Companies (in India) includes :
White Oak Capital Management LLP (PMS & AIF) – www.whiteoakindia.com
WhiteOak Capital Asset Management Limited (Mutual Fund) – mf.whiteoakamc.com

Name: Abu Dhabi Investment Council (ADIC)
Description:
Abu Dhabi Investment Council (ADIC) is a leading sovereign wealth fund established in 2007, wholly owned by Mubadala Investment Company.

ADIC adopts an endowment investment model and consistently delivers outstanding returns by being the partner of choice to the world’s leading investors. It does so across asset classes and geographies, while actively seeding emerging strategies for our partners.

Name: Ghobash Group
Description: With its corporate strategy focused on growth, sustainability and value creation, Ghobash Group extends a unique approach to nurturing and developing the most rewarding opportunities both intuitively and systematically. The Group seeks progressive partners and principals whose innovative products and services can deliver to the growing needs and aspirations of the public and private sectors. Today with a diverse team of 3,000+ professionals, extensive regional experience, strong financial backing, and unrivalled operational capabilities, Ghobash Group ventures confidently into the future, dedicated as always to pushing the boundaries for innovation and customer satisfaction.

Name: Rogers Group
Description:
ENL and Rogers entered a new chapter united under a single identity, ER.

Drawing letters and inspiration from ENL and Rogers, ER represents a thoughtful blend of our histories, values, and ambitions. 

ENL has been synonymous with entrepreneurial spirit, adaptability, and transformative growth across various sectors. Its legacy is one of bold moves and creating opportunities for generations. Rogers, with its rich heritage, has been a pioneer in logistics, hospitality, and property development, setting benchmarks for innovation and sustainability. Together, these strengths form the foundation of the ER Group, a powerhouse that combines complementary expertise to unlock greater potential.

#ERgroup #Ignitetomorrow #RogersGroup #ENLGroup

Name: Sharjah Investment and Development Authority (Shurooq)
Description:
The Sharjah Investment and Development Authority (Shurooq) is the driving force behind the transformation of Sharjah. Guided by local tradition and inspired by innovation, Shurooq is committed to enhancing Sharjah’s appeal as an investment, tourism and business destination. 

An independent government entity, Shurooq facilitates partnerships and connects investors, corporations and entrepreneurs with the right opportunities. The authority identifies, evaluates and pursues tourism, investment and heritage-related infrastructure projects, participating in construction and development to ensure successful outcomes. 

Core to Shurooq's mission is to help provide facilities and incentives to overcome obstacles facing investors in the Emirate of Sharjah. The authority drives an extensive annual trade and investment promotion campaign, helping to take Sharjah's investment proposition to businesses and governments worldwide.

In recognition of its overall accomplishments, Shurooq was named The Banking Awards 2013 - and 2014 FDI Agency of the Year in the MENA region, in the European's Global Banking and Finance Awards.

Name: LGT Capital Partners
Description: LGT Capital Partners is a leading global specialist in alternative investing with over USD 110 billion in assets under management and more than 700 institutional clients in 50 countries. An international team of over 900 professionals is responsible for managing a wide range of investment programs focusing on private markets, multi-alternatives and diversifying strategies as well as sustainable and impact strategies. Headquartered in Pfaeffikon (SZ), Switzerland, the firm has offices in San Francisco, New York, Dublin, London, Paris, The Hague, Luxembourg, Frankfurt am Main, Vaduz, Dubai, Beijing, Hong Kong, Tokyo, Singapore and Sydney.

Name: BCI
Description:
British Columbia Investment Management Corporation (BCI) offers an exceptional opportunity to work at a world-class organization. With $295 billion of gross assets under management, BCI provides investment management services to British Columbia public sector and institutional clients. As an active in-house asset manager investing globally across public and private asset classes and strategies, BCI depends on talent with specialized expertise to fulfill client needs, helping them build meaningful futures.

BCI’s teams come to work each day knowing their performance has purpose, and that our achievements are built on collective expertise, in an environment where we can bring innovative ideas to the table to perform at the highest level for our clients.

Our employees share BCI's core values of clients first, performance-focused, world-class, accountability, transparency, and integrity. Being recognized as one of Canada's Top 100 Employers, Canada's Top Family-Friendly Employers, Canada's Top Employers for Young People, and BC's Top Employers exemplifies our ongoing commitment to be a progressive workplace of choice; one that attracts, retains, and promotes talent so that we can continue to work towards meeting our clients' financial goals.

Name: Nomura Asset Management
Description: The Nomura Asset Management Group is a leading global investment manager. Headquartered in Tokyo, Nomura has additional investment offices throughout the world including Singapore, Kuala Lumpur, Hong Kong, Shanghai, Taipei, Frankfurt, London and New York. With a global workforce of over 1,300 employees it has been operating in Europe for the past 30 years. Today Nomura Asset Management provides its clients with a wide range of innovative investment strategies including global, regional and single country equities, high yield bonds, alternative investments and global fixed income strategies.

Name: Brasol
Description:
Brasol is a leading developer, investor, and operator of energy transition infrastructure in Brazil. With hundreds of active projects across every state of the country, our portfolio spans solar power, substations, transmission lines, EV charging, and battery storage systems.

Backed by the global expertise of shareholders Siemens and BlackRock, we deliver integrated solutions that combine infrastructure expertise with financial innovation—an approach that sets Brasol apart in the energy transition landscape.

We create long-term value for:
1. Our Clients – who gain turnkey infrastructure that reduces cost, mitigates risk, and enhances sustainability—with no upfront investment or operational burden.
2. Capital Markets – who access superior risk-adjusted returns via structured investments backed by disciplined underwriting and integrated asset management.
3. Communities – who benefit from local hiring, procurement, and environmental stewardship as part of our long-term presence.
4. Our Company – whose shareholders, team, and advisors are empowered to drive Brazil’s energy transition at scale.

With decades of experience and a commitment to global best practices, Brasol is more than a developer—we’re a platform for energy transformation, where engineering, operations, and finance converge.

Brasol: Intelligent Solutions for the Future of Energy.

Name: Pantheon
Description:
Pantheon has been at the forefront of private markets investing for more than 40 years, earning a reputation for providing innovative solutions covering the full lifecycle of investments, from primary fund commitments to co-investments, secondary purchases and direct customized solutions, across private equity, real assets and private credit.

We have partnered with more than 1,000 clients, including institutional investors of all sizes as well as a growing number of private wealth advisers and investors, with approximately $62bn in discretionary assets under management and a combined $94.6bn in assets managed or advised (as of June 30, 2023) through a wide range of pooled funds and bespoke, customized accounts.

Using creative approaches informed by our specialized experience and delivered by a global team of professionals based in offices across Europe, the Americas and Asia, we invest with purpose and lead with expertise to build secure financial futures.

Name: Nevastar Finance
Description:
Nevastar Finance is an independent financial group providing comprehensive investment solutions to institutions, corporations and high net worth individuals. 

We leverage the extensive experience of our team and excellent relationships with leading financials institutions for our clients’ benefit, while remaining completely independent.

With offices in London, Geneva and Luxembourg, Nevastar Finance provides the following independent and personalised services:

Wealth Management
Asset Management
Family Office
Private Markets

Name: KBBO Group
Description:
Established in 2008, KBBO Group is a diversified holding company headquartered in the UAE with operations across the Middle East, Europe, and the United States.

Our portfolio of investments and operating companies spans key industry sectors shaping the future and includes education, food and retail, healthcare, IT, real estate and financial services.

More recently, our focus has been on sectors of innovation – such as education and technology – that will define sustainable economic development for tomorrow. Our investment strategy also aligns us with the direction set out by the Abu Dhabi Vision 2030 and the UAE Plan 2021.

Name: Systematica Investments
Description:
Systematica Investments, launched in January 2015 after a decade of experience within BlueCrest Capital Management, is an innovative technology-driven firm focused on a quantitative and systematic approach to investing. The firm was founded by Leda Braga and manages assets across a number of futures, equity and OTC based strategies.

The philosophy of the firm is one of innovation, excellence in research and a commitment to fostering a strong alignment with investors. Systematica Investments has a global presence with offices in Jersey, Geneva, London, New York, Singapore and Shanghai.

Name: Parnassus Investments
Description:
Since 1984, Parnassus Investments has invested differently. Our investment team curates portfolios of high-quality companies that are financially strong and take care of the human and natural resources that support the business. We believe it’s a better way to invest to create enduring value for our investors and the world around us.

Parnassus Funds Distributor

Parnassus Social Media Guidelines & Disclosures: 
www.parnassus.com/social-media/guidelines

Name: Obran Cooperative
Description:
Obran is a cooperative conglomerate corporation. We acquire and hold profitable small to medium size businesses and real estate on behalf of our worker-owners.

We believe that everyone should own their most precious asset: their time. Through our portfolio of small businesses and real estate holdings, Obran Cooperative empowers our workers with ownership and education. Our unique holding cooperative structure allows us to invest in long term wealth and opportunities for our members.

Name: Melanion Capital
Description:
Melanion Capital is a research-driven investment management firm, with a focus on alternative and quantitative investments, with an asset management license from the Autorité des Marchés Financiers (AMF), that is committed to unlocking the future of finance and investment and allowing everyone to have a stake in it. Since 2013, Melanion Capital has been paving the way for innovative investment possibilities across Europe.

In 2020, Melanion Capital issued the world's first Bitcoin Equities UCITS ETF, bridging the gap between digital and traditional finance to make investments in the Bitcoin ecosystem accessible to all. Our original methodology allows investors to gain exposure to the Bitcoin Thematic without any direct investment in Bitcoin, providing individual investors with the opportunity to tap into the Bitcoin ecosystem within the regulated framework of UCITS ETFs.

We are happy to guide and welcome you aboard! Our funds and investment services can help you pave the way to grow beyond your financial comfort zone and reach financial freedom. Join us!

Name: Colchester Global Investors Limited
Description: Colchester Global Investors is an independent, global government bond manager and was founded in 1999 by Ian Sims, Chairman and Chief Investment Officer. Colchester manages approximately US$27bn for international clients across a variety of investment products: Global Bond, Global Inflation-Linked Bond, Green Bond, Local Currency Emerging Market Debt, Frontier Markets and Global Unconstrained Alpha. Colchester has a singular investment process which is applied in the same way to all the different products managed. We value bond markets according to their real yields (i.e. the rate of return they offer after inflation) and currencies according to their real exchange rate valuations. Both bond and currency valuations are adjusted for the balance sheet strength of the underlying country and ESG factors. Colchester is majority-owned by its employees, allowing constancy of purpose and an alignment of interests between employees and clients. The firm is headquartered in London and has regional offices in New York, Singapore, Dublin, Madrid, Munich, Dubai and Sydney.

Name: Tshwane Economic Development Agency
Description:
The Tshwane Economic Development Agency Ltd (TEDA) was established as a municipal entity of the City of Tshwane Metropolitan Municipality (CoT) on 2 November 2006.  TEDA operates as a State Owned Company registered in terms of the Companies Act.

TEDA was established with the primary objective to cultivate an environment within which the City of Tshwane (CoT) can grow its human capital and the economy through the facilitation, implementation and management of developments with a specific focus on economic development and Investment.

Name: Wernham Wealth Management Inc.
Description:
income and personal asset managers

We increase your wealth while we reduce your risk.  We provide income for life.  

Contact us for our process "From Puzzle To Blueprint" to obtain your personal Retirement Blueprint.

We offer a wide range of pension, tax and insurance solutions.

Name: Anduin Transactions
Description:
Anduin is empowering lasting investor relationships in the private markets.

Whether you’re engaging investors with our secure data rooms, providing a streamlined, modern approach to onboarding with our fund subscription platform, offering reusable LP profiles, or managing investor data through our centralized platform, connecting LPs and GPs efficiently is our obsession.

Our ecosystem has raised over $104 billion in capital globally by helping 40,700+ investors onboard at 790+ funds. Learn more at anduintransact.com.

Name: Vertis Infrastructure Trust (Previously Highways Infrastructure Trust)
Description:
Vertis Infrastructure Trust, formerly known as Highways Infrastructure Trust (HIT), is an Infrastructure Investment Trust (InvIT) dedicated to India’s transportation sector. Established in August 2022 with a privately listed AUM of ₹54 billion, the company has grown to manage ₹250 billion in assets, spanning ~8,100 lane kilometers of highways across 10 Indian states. Backed by KKR Fund and OTPP, Vertis holds a AAA/Stable rating from both CRISIL and India Ratings and Research.

Rooted in trust, transparency, and rigorous governance, we are committed to delivering enduring value through disciplined execution and forward-looking infrastructure stewardship. Our evolution from Highways Infrastructure Trust to Vertis Infrastructure Trust reflects our mindset: always moving forward, always with intent.

As we pursue the next, we continue to foster a culture that values collaboration, innovation, and learning. Whether it’s managing infrastructure or enabling rewarding careers, here is where ideas turn into action, and ambition into impact.

Name: McCourt Global
Description:
What We Do 

McCourt Global is a private family company focused on building for tomorrow through its work across real estate and infrastructure, sports, and technology and media. Led by Executive Chairman Frank McCourt, a civic entrepreneur and fifth-generation builder, McCourt Global is committed to extending the McCourt family’s 132-year legacy of merging community and social impact with financial results—an approach that began when the original McCourt Company was launched in Boston in 1893.

Who We Are

At McCourt Global, we are builders—of communities, infrastructure, technology, and ideas.

Our teams represent a diversity of backgrounds, industries, and geographies united by a common purpose: to extend the company’s 130-year legacy of positive social impact and develop solutions for a better tomorrow.

We value entrepreneurship to push new boundaries; adaptability to grow and evolve; boldness to think outside the box; humility to learn from both triumph and failure; a focus on results to drive success in the face of challenges; and generosity to support our people, partners and communities.

These values inspire our commitment to the high road and the long view. They challenge us to think creatively and work collaboratively. And they guide us in our efforts to build a better business, a better world, and a better future.

Where We Are

McCourt Global has operations, projects, and team members located across the United States and Europe; and corporate offices located in New York City, Los Angeles, and Paris.

Name: Stewart Investors
Description: First Sentier Group, the global asset management organisation,hasannounced a strategic transition of Stewart Investors' investmentmanagementresponsibilities to its affiliate investment team, FSSA Investment Managers , effective Friday, 14 November close of business EST.

Name: Warwick Investment Group
Description:
Founded in 2010, Warwick Investment Group is a SEC-registered investment advisor, managing funds that invest globally in natural resources and real estate. Warwick has an established track record in strategic consolidation in these sectors, having completed more than 4,000 transactions since inception. The firm has ~130 team members and advisors across offices in Oklahoma City, Dallas, New York and London, investing across private equity funds, special purpose vehicles and open-ended structures. The firm also manages capital for pension funds in 8 of the 50 states.

The firm aims to generate attractive investment returns across market cycles. Warwick’s in-house data science team works hand-in-hand with Warwick’s sector investment teams over the life cycle of an investment, leveraging innovative technologies to identify market opportunities and optimize investment portfolios. Warwick’s data science team specializes in statistics, econometrics, network analytics and machine learning.

Warwick’s real estate platforms specialize in identifying investment opportunities in markets with favorable tailwinds and attractive, risk-adjusted returns. Through consolidation strategies and development, the firm generates alpha through stable and growing yields, inflation protection and value-add returns. Warwick’s energy and natural resources platforms specialize in geology, engineering and investment within each space.

Name: FiveT Hydrogen AG
Description: FiveT Hydrogen set out to become the 360° financial partner to the clean hydrogen industry.

Name: Bondstone
Description:
Founded in 2016, Bondstone is an investment and management firm regulated by the Portuguese supervision authority (CMVM) dedicated to deploying international capital into the European real estate market. Since inception, the firm has successfully curated an investment portfolio with a gross development value above one billion euros.

Our tenured 25-people multidisciplinary team has experience working collaboratively across asset classes, sectors, investment styles, and geographies, and constantly seeks to create positive economic impact and long-term value for our investors. 

For more information about our people and investment platform, visit us at www.bondstone.com.

Name: AJ Financial
Description:
We are a client-focused wealth management firm that believes in building long term wealth for our clients through trust-based relationships.

Our team has multi-decade experience in delivering high quality wealth management and financial planning services to our high-net-worth clients and their families.

Clients are at the core of our processes and we have created value for them by leveraging on our research and wide industry network to craft optimal wealth management and advisory solutions to help our clients create wealth and achieve their financial goals.

Our Clients’ trust is what drives us to maintain our conscience and discipline even during the most ambitious of markets and that’s how we create value. This is how we have built equity amongst clients who are located across geographies.

Name: MidOcean Partners
Description: We build value. For over 20 years and throughout multiple market cycles, our team has established a proven track record of consistently creating value through innovative capital solutions across the private equity and credit markets.

Name: Abacus Capital
Description:
Abacus Capital is an Asset Management and Advisory Services group headquartered in Singapore with operations in Indonesia and affiliates in Southeast Asia. Founded in 1995, Abacus Capital serves a select group of family-owned business groups and financial institutions.

Our core competencies are in private equity and special situations investing, which we couple with a wealth of experience in corporate finance and the capital markets. Abacus Capital is strategically positioned to provide unique investment opportunities, in-house transaction execution, and customised asset management services.

Abacus Capital has developed a unique Family Office service for the ownership and management of family-owned companies through its private fund platform in a fully regulated and compliant environment.

Name: Sorin Investments
Description:
Sorin Investments is an early-stage venture capital fund focused on Series A and B investments. The fund has a few core sectors - Fintech, Health tech, D2C, Ecommerce, B2B tech, SaaS, Climate tech. 

The fund endeavors to partner with fearless founders trying to solve real world problems. The investment team consists of professionals who have had a ringside seat to the journeys of some of India’s most prominent technology companies. The team intends to channel their experience and resources in helping founders build successful and enduring companies. 

We help companies on their growth journey – be it strategy brainstorming, hiring, investor connects, corporate governance, everything. Just consider us an extension of your team.

Name: Bahrain National Holding B.S.C. (BNH)
Description: Bahrain National Holding is the Kingdom of Bahrain’s leading investment holding company, committed to delivering consistent returns and creating lasting and sustainable shareholder value.

Name: PGGM Investments
Description:
Volg ons via @PGGM
Follow us on @PGGM

Name: ALMQR Development Company
Description: ALMQR Development Company is founded by a royal decree to represent the Municipality of Medina and considered as the investment arm of the Municipality, we are preparing and implementing development and urban development programs in slums and other areas that require development.

Name: Ofi Invest
Description:
Ofi Invest, a new dimension for the future. 

Ofi Invest is now France’s fifth-largest asset management group, with 195 billion euros in assets under management as of the end of December 2021.
Formed by the merger of Aviva Investors France, Aviva Investors Real Estate France, Aéma REIM, and OFI Group, Ofi Invest is the sole asset management division within Aéma Groupe (which includes MACIF, Abeille Assurances, Aésio Mutuelle).

Ofi Invest has more than 600 employees committed to serving institutional, professional and individual investors – whether clients, insured parties, or members of partner distribution networks – in France and elsewhere.
The group covers all asset management businesses in both listed and non-listed assets, along with real-estate management, organised in a multi-capability model with strong brands.

Our expertise is in understanding and anticipating investors’ needs in a world in full flux by offering high-performance, useful and responsible solutions that serve an economy that we want to be more virtuous.

Name: Integrow Asset Management
Description:
Integrow is a Real Estate focused Asset Management Company; bridging the vision of sustainable democratization of Real Estate with confidence, energy and integrity. 

Integrow is focused on transformation through knowledge, industry insights, governance, tech-enabled processes and value-enhancement of multiple stakeholders.

Name: Britannica Capital
Description:
Britannica Capital Management LLC is a financial services company located in Manhattan, New York, the United States.

Britannica Capital is privately held financial services provider and manages alternative investment strategies for qualified institutional and private clients. Britannica Capital's investment philosophy focuses on global, fundamental and catalyst-driven, long / short multi-asset class investment opportunities. Analysts employ intensive top-down research to arrive at proprietary insights regarding target currencies, countries, commodities, products, sectors, and companies.

We are committed to attaining the best possible returns for our clients, using every possible resource to achieve this objective. Britannica strongly believes that a highly enthusiastic organization which is supported by employees who follow their responsibilities with great vigor, determination and persistence, will over time achieve great success in accomplishing its goals and objectives. We strive to be an industry leader in returns for our clients and in offering best possible corporate climate for our employees.

For behind-the-scenes insights on open positions and life at our firm, follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/britannica.capital/

Name: Korys
Description:
Korys is the entrepreneurial investment company of the Colruyt family and creates sustainable added value across 3 investment themes: Conscious Consumer, Healthy Living, and Energy Transition.  

We create a thriving ecosystem around these themes, in which the companies involved complement and reinforce each other, consistently increasing the joint impact. 

We invest in people and companies who share our passion to contribute positively and who have a genuine desire to build solutions to the challenges of our human and planetary well-being.

Thanks to our long-term perspective, values, and involvement, we form solid relationships and authentic partnerships. Together, we embark on a long-term journey with a shared vision towards a sustainable future.

Our portfolio includes over 20 direct investments - including Colruyt Group and Virya Energy - alongside private equity funds and listed instruments.

Name: Gursoy Group
Description:
Gürsoy Group; It operates in the construction, mining, service, entertainment, tourism, industry, food, technology and energy sectors. 

By transferring its nearly 30 years of experience to the unique projects it has undertaken, it carries out the restoration of world-famous historical monuments with residential, shopping and business centers, amusement park constructions, infrastructure and environmental arrangements.

In addition to Construction Sector, within Gürsoy Group, Mining Sector; Blackgreen, BG Maden, Erkay Maden, Service Sector; Vialand Mall, Vialand Palace, Venezia Outlet, Venezia Bazaar Market, Entertainment Sector; Vialand Theme Park, Vialand Park, Jungle Istanbul, Vialand Open Air Stage, Tourism Sector; Çamlıca Tourism, Industrial sector; Gürmak Railway, Food Sector; Şehrekmek, Technology Sector; Exepix, Energy Sector; Gürsoy Energy continues to work as Gürsoy Foundation in the field of Social Responsibility.

Gürsoy Group puts "human" at the center of all its activities and produces professional solutions to improve the quality of life of the society. With nearly a thousand employees who have adopted the goal of unconditional customer satisfaction, the use of technology and innovation, Gürsoy Group works to be beneficial to the society with the goals of increasing the living comfort of urban people and transferring the cultural and historical heritage to future generations under the best conditions.

Name: Dunas Capital
Description:
DUNAS CAPITAL es un grupo ﬁnanciero de origen español y de carácter independiente de referencia para el mercado ibérico en el sector de la gestión de activos, tanto mobiliarios como inmobiliarios, a través de una gama de producto de gran calidad y alto valor añadido.

Centramos nuestra actividad en la gestión de fondos y patrimonios de instituciones y terceros. Se trata de una gestión de activos y carteras globales, cuyos objetivos de rentabilidad se establecen con una preocupación especial por la preservación del patrimonio, mediante una constante evaluación de la relación rentabilidad-riesgo, dentro de los más estrictos estándares de control y gestión de los riesgos ﬁnancieros, y gracias a un profundo conocimiento regulatorio que nos permite acompañar a los clientes. Estamos bajo la supervisión de la CNMV y la DGSFP.

Name: Forluz
Description: A Forluz é o maior fundo de pensão de Minas Gerais e o 10º entre os associados à Abrapp – Associação Brasileira das Entidades Fechadas de Previdência Complementar. Seus ativos financeiros, em dezembro/2009, somaram R$ 8,1 bilhões e se destinam ao pagamento de benefícios previdenciários e assistenciais aos participantes. Fundada em 27 de dezembro de 1971, a Fundação Forluminas de Seguridade Social – Forluz é um importante instrumento da política de recursos humanos da Companhia Energética de Minas Gerais – Cemig e suas subsidiárias: Cemig Distribuição, Cemig Geração/Transmissão, Gasmig e Sá Carvalho. É uma entidade sem fins lucrativos, mantida por contribuições das Empresas e dos seus empregados.

Name: Samana Group of Companies
Description:
Samana Group of Companies comprise of an association of a number of companies. Each company is a full-fledged professional and business entity, with the proper business model, state of the art facilities, independent and full strength of individual staff, decentralized workflow, dedicated budget to run operations with independent professional and financial targets. Samana Group of Companies offers diversified services to its clients. Samana Group’s strength is in its highly professional and transparent approach. Our companies render Business Management, Immigration Services, and Real Estate Investment and Development services with outstanding professional approach, profound dedication, and hard work.

Samana Group of companies is a Professional business faction based in UAE. Under Samana's umbrella, we deal with different SBUs including Immigration services, Investment, and Real estate services.

Name: Abu Dhabi Power Corporation
Description: Abu Dhabi Power Corporation (ADPower) is a public joint stock company overseeing the financial and operational growth of Abu Dhabi’s water and electricity sector. ADPower’s subsidiaries are Emirates Water and Electricity Company (EWEC), Abu Dhabi Transmission and Despatch Company (TRANSCO), Abu Dhabi Distribution Company (ADDC), Al Ain Distribution Company (AADC), Al Mirfa Power Company (AMPC), Abu Dhabi Energy Services Company (ADES) and the ADX-listed Abu Dhabi National Energy Company (TAQA). ADPower is responsible for the transformation of Abu Dhabi’s water and electricity sector into a reliable, efficient, sustainable and value-generating system that is fit for the future.

Name: Kenya Investment Authority (InvestKenya)
Description:
The Kenya Investment Authority is a government agency mandated to promote and facilitate investment in Kenya by both domestic and international investors. Our functions include;

> Promoting available investment opportunities in investment in Kenya.
> Assisting investors to obtain necessary licenses, permits and incentives or exemptions under various Acts and other regulations;
> Reviewing the Investment environment and make recommendations to Government and other facilitators with respect to both policy and regulatory changes that would promote and facilitate investment. 

At KenInvest we aspire to conduct all our affairs in accordance with the principles of good corporate governance.

Our core values are:

    Professionalism, accountability, transparency and integrity,
    Innovation and creativity,
    Teamwork and commitment,
    Investor focus,
    Patriotism,
    Mutual respect, fairness and equity,
    High consideration for staff, and
    Linkages and Partnerships.

These are ideals and enduring principles that underpin our performance and culture

Name: Birch Hill Equity Partners
Description:
Birch Hill is a Canadian mid-market private equity firm with a long history of driving growth in our portfolio companies and delivering returns to our investors. Based in Toronto, we currently have over $5 billion in capital under management. Since 1994, we have made over 70 investments, with 54 fully-realized. Today, our 17 partner companies collectively represent one of Canada’s largest corporate entities with over $8 billion in total revenue and more than 32,000 employees.

Long Track Record of Success
Since our first fund launched in 1994, Birch Hill has been committed to driving growth in our investments and portfolio companies. Our track record of growth and returns is evidence that our long-term focus works, with 54 fully-realized investments since the Firm’s inception.

Driving Growth, in Canada and Globally
We partner with growth-oriented companies in Canada and the United States to build leading global businesses across a diverse set of industries. We are focused on the mid-market, working with companies valued between $30 million and $600 million.

Delivering Strong, Consistent Returns
Since 1994, Birch Hill has achieved a 17% cumulative average rate of EBITDA growth on actively employed capital.

Earning the Trust of Our Investors
At the beginning of 2020, Birch Hill closed its sixth private equity fund, Birch Hill Equity Partners VI, LP. This fund was capped at $1.75 billion, exceeding its original target of $1.3 billion following strong interest from both existing and new investors.

Name: GHO Capital Partners LLP
Description:
Global Healthcare Opportunities, or GHO Capital, was founded in 2014 as a specialist healthcare investment adviser based in London. The firm was built from a shared experience and long-standing history of creating and backing businesses, accelerating growth, delivering value and championing success in the sector through prior roles with healthcare industry leader Quintiles, 3i Group, J.P. Morgan and TPG.

We actively evaluate companies with a European presence and global potential within the four healthcare sub-sectors of Outsourced services, PharmaBio, MedTech and Patient services. Our sourcing strategy is based upon a combination of expert healthcare sub-sector knowledge and a global network of industry relationships.

Our experienced leadership team brings a unique fusion of private equity, investment banking and industry competencies.  The team is designed to provide insight and expertise in supporting company growth and maximising potential. We work alongside management teams who benefit from our proprietary insight and unfettered access to our unique global platform of experience, resource and expert networks.

For more information please visit www.ghocapital.com.

Name: Platform Capital Investment Partners
Description:
Platform Capital is an Investment and Advisory firm committed to partnering with entrepreneurs who are passionate about sustainable, inclusive, long-term growth and transformation across the African continent. 

What makes us different is our obsession with changing the African narrative.


Our People
We are a team of passionate and experienced professionals from diverse backgrounds collectively harnessing our expertise to enhance the companies we invest in and advise.

Everyone at Platform Capital has just one job – to make our investee businesses and partners successful – success as defined by our partners and the promoters of the investee businesses.


What We Do
We provide long-term capital to our investee companies, and work with them to achieving their goals.

We believe long-term capital offers stability to the business, and allows the entrepreneur to focus on delivering the vision. 

Exit is not our focus, we seek long-term value creation and delivery to all stakeholders.

We nurture and partner with businesses; and commit our money alongside like-minded investors who are specialists in specific industries and can provide value. We provide general management expertise.

Name: KFH Capital
Description:
KFH Capital was incorporated in 1999 under the name of “Almuthana Investment Company” as a 100% subsidiary of Kuwait Finance House and later in 2014 the company’s name changed to the current name 'KFH Capital Investment Company', to conduct financial advisory and asset management services with deeply rooted Shariah’ values.

KFH Capital has made a mark as one of the largest and most reliable investment companies in Kuwait, growing regionally & globally as a thought leader on Islamic financial solutions. Our clients enjoy access to exceptional local and global opportunities given our reach, history and market clout.

With a suite of best-in-class products and services, KFH Capital leads the way in serving an affluent client base, as well as corporates of all sizes across all sectors, including banking, aviation, education, construction, oil, gas and shipping, in addition to government entities.

By continuously demonstrating a flair for unlocking possibilities with intelligent solutions that cope with market developments, KFH Capital has established a longstanding success across North America, Western Europe and Australasia.

Name: Aljasser Holding
Description:
Aljasser Holding Group emerged from the success of Arabian Oud – founded in 1982 in Riyadh – to become the global leader in oriental and luxury perfumes. Today, it has grown into a diversified economic entity with a prominent presence in over 37 countries across multiple sectors, including luxury fragrances, facilities management, contracting, training and development, personal care, and more.

انطلقت مجموعة الجاسر القابضة من نجاح العربية للعود – التي تأسست عام 1982  في مدينة الرياض – لتصبح الشركة الرائدة عالميًا في العطور الشرقية والفاخرة– لتصبح اليوم كيانًا اقتصاديًا متنوعًا بتواجد عالمي في أكثر من 37 دولة، يقود شركات رائدة في قطاعات تشمل: العطور الفاخرة، إدارة المرافق، المقاولات، التدريب والتطوير، العناية الشخصية، وغيرها.

Name: Longevity Investors
Description:
Longevity Investors organizes exclusive events for investors.

The events focus on wealthy private investors, family offices and funds.

Name: AtmosClear Investments
Description: AtmosClear Investments is a green infrastructure and clean-tech private equity group

Name: Royal Sky Group
Description:
Royal Sky Group was founded and is owned by Mr. Ammar Omar , a successful Entrepreneur also well-known as an internationally recognized Business Coach.

The Group is primarily based in the UAE, where the first company was created, and has now branches in other countries in the Gulf and beyond.

Royal Sky Group is active in a wide variety of fields, among which Construction, F&B, Business Consulting & Trainings, Marketing and Advertising, IT & Digitalization.

Name: Kgori Capital
Description:
Kgori Capital was established in 2012. The firm has grown from humble beginnings into a leading investment management firm in Botswana.

Kgori Capital is passionate about driving change in Botswana and in the lives of her people through purposeful and impactful investment solutions.

We are committed to building legacies and secure futures for Botswana, and to do so with PRIDE (Passion, Reliability, Integrity, Dynamism and Excellence).

Kgori Capital is wholly owned and controlled by management and staff and operates as an independent firm.

Name: Swissblock Technologies AG
Description:
We at Swissblock, are a Private Wealth Manager which is on a mission—to lead the way in crypto and cross-asset investing. With a keen understanding that timing is paramount, we employ a systematic approach that combines robust algorithmic trading with exhaustive cross-asset market analysis. 
Our mission is to decode the complexities of the market, offering actionable insights for informed decision-making.
In the midst of market chaos, we stand firm. Our comprehensive framework, refined over years of optimization, enables us to identify unique opportunities and deliver real-time, precise solutions. 

Join us in our mission to revolutionize investing in the digital era.

Full Disclaimer: https://swissblock.net/terms#regulatory

Name: Gatewood Capital Partners
Description:
Gatewood Capital Partners is a premier private equity firm dedicated to making strategic seed and anchor investments in high-quality new and existing emerging managers. The firm targets small- to medium-sized (<$2 billion AUM) fund managers in private equity, including buyout, private credit, growth equity, real estate, distressed and special situations as well as other alternative asset classes, typically pursuing opportunities in North America and Western Europe. Gatewood also considers acquiring interests in more established alternative investment managers with strong growth potential. The firm’s Partners have been structuring, executing, and monitoring seed and anchor investments in private fund managers in the U.S. and globally since 2007.

Gatewood seeks to act as a long-term, value-added strategic partner to emerging managers, accelerating their fund raises as a first close institutional investor, and providing ongoing strategic and operational guidance as they scale.

Name: MHAO (Mohamed Hareb Al Otaiba) Group
Description: Mohamed Hareb Al Otaiba, established in 1946, is one of the oldest trading organizations in the United Arab Emirates.  Initially set up in Abu Dhabi as a general trading and offshore services establishment, the company expanded its operations steadily over the years, securing the exclusive agency rights to a multitude of internationally branded products including, among others, high-quality foodservice equipment, domestic appliances, bowling lanes, leisure and sports equipment, and office equipment. Today the MHAO Group encompasses some of the business world’s most recognizable brands – including Xerox, Avis, Homewide GCC (Distributor of Bosch Home Appliances), and many others.

Name: GRUPO VALÍA - Asesores Patrimoniales, Empresariales y Financieros
Description:
GRUPO VALIA es un grupo formado por varias compañias especializadas en el asesoramiento personal y empresarial.

Su equipo de asesores de confianza, con el que podrá contar siempre y que trabajará a favor de todos sus intereses. Le brindamos la experiencia de un equipo de profesionales de primer nivel.

¿Necesita mejorar en algún área o actividad de su empresa? ¿Necesita apoyo para conseguir algún objetivo primordial?

 

El GRUPO VALIA le aportará las mejores soluciones.

Name: WEH Ventures
Description:
WEH Ventures is a seed-stage fund looking to back founders solving 'India-first' problems.

Our Ideology: 
a.Selective - Each investment matters to us; so we pick and choose thoughtfully b.  Commitment - Our cheque is not just a one-time commitment but to support the company through thick and thin
c.  People First - The person matters more than the pedigree; passion, insight & execution are what truly matter.

Name: Boubyan Petrochemical Company
Description: Boubyan Petrochemical Company (BPC) was established in 1995 as the first privately held company to enter the government-controlled petrochemical arena in Kuwait. BPC entered into a JV with Petrochemical Industries Company (PIC) and Union Carbide (subsequently acquired by Dow Chemical) and formed Equate Petrochemical Company - the largest petrochemical complex in Kuwait. BPC has since evolved into an industrial holding company with investments focused in petrochemicals and the industrial/manufacturing sectors and has recently also ventured into the education and healthcare sectors.

Name: August Equity
Description: August Equity is an independent private equity firm investing £10 to £50 million in UK and Ireland based companies. It invests in buy-outs of high growth service-orientated companies in the UK mid-market.

Name: Altshuler Shaham
Description:
בית ההשקעות אלטשולר שחם, נוסד בשנת 1990 ע"י גילעד אלטשולר וקלמן שחם, הוא מהגדולים והמובילים בשוק ההון בישראל בתחום ניהול ההשקעות והחיסכון ארוך הטווח. הקבוצה מונה כ-1,200 עובדים ומנהלת נכסים בהיקף של מיליארדי שקלים עבור עמיתים ולקוחות  פרטיים, עסקיים ומוסדיים.

בית ההשקעות מאגד בתוכו קבוצת חברות המתמחות במגוון תחומים פיננסיים ומציעה ללקוחותיה סל פתרונות השקעה רחב ומקצועי, הכולל: ניהול תיקי השקעות, קרנות נאמנות, קרנות פנסיה קרנות השתלמות, , קופות גמל וגמל להשקעה, הכוונה לפרישה, קרנות גידור, נדל"ן בחו"ל, קניה ומכירה של מטבעות דיגיטליים, פתרונות מטבע גלובאליים; המרה ו/אופיקדון של מט"ח וכן גידור מט"ח, כרטיס נטען של מט"ח דיגיטלי, אשראי לעסקים ומסחר עצמאי

Name: Al Rajhi International for Investment (RAII)
Description:
Welcome to Al Rajhi International for Investment Co. 

RAII is a member of Suleiman Abdulaziz Al Rajhi Holding Company (Al Rajhi Group) which is one of the largest business conglomerates in Saudi Arabia. The mandate of RAII is “To globalize Al-Rajhi Group’s agricultural business on a long-term sustainable basis.

RAII believes in the importance of globalization of the activities of the Sheikh Suleiman Al Rajhi group of companies in the agricultural sector to facilitate investment in sustainable agricultural activities, and to achieve food security for the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia as well as for the host countries of our investments. It also seeks to invest in and benefit from the countries that have the essential agricultural resources and potential yet might lack the means to exploit their wealth and resources.

International opportunities throughout the agricultural value chain are continuously evaluated for investment. The projects may be greenfield, for acquisition or new ventures, large-scale irrigation schemes for field crops dominate the investment portfolio but diversification in other sectors forms essential components such as trading, infrastructure development, agricultural projects management, renewable energy, irrigation systems as well as the social development projects in the communities surrounding the projects and creating a beneficial relationship with the said communities.

Our investment projects are designed to create new businesses in the host countries which usually translate to job creation and markets. Investment has been made in Sudan, Egypt, Ukraine, and other countries. RAII, as the parent company, drives and manages all investments.

Name: RTW Investments, LP
Description: RTW is a life sciences investment and innovation firm. Headquartered in New York with offices in London and Shanghai, we invest across the full lifecycle of companies including company creation, early stage venture capital, alternative financing, and public company investments.

Name: Silvercrest Asset Management
Description:
Silvercrest Asset Management Group is an independent registered investment advisor which provides asset management and family office services to families and select institutional investors. Silvercrest combines the client-focused service which was the hallmark of private banks and investment counsel firms in an earlier age with state of the art theories of portfolio construction, risk management and diversification.

Silvercrest's professionals have dedicated their careers to wealth management and our Managing Directors, who average more than 25 years of wealth management experience, have advised their clients through the boom of bull markets and the gloom of bear markets. We are not swayed by market manias. We are only interested in seeing our clients' assets invested in a manner consistent with their tolerance for risk.

Silvercrest is free from the numerous conflicts of interest inherent to larger organizations. Our size, our employee ownership and our collegial culture-coupled with the spirit, camaraderie and character of our organization-stand in sharp contrast to much of Wall Street and the financial services industry. We enjoy working with one another and we enjoy working with our clients. The quality, integrity and independence of our advice, coupled with our unwavering commitment to client service, sets us apart in a crowded field.

Name: Grupo El Ángel El Salvador
Description: “Somos una pieza clave en la generación de inversión,  empleo y desarrollo en el país. Contamos con un modelo que genera valor, y sostenibilidad a todos sus actores. Innovamos  y nos preparamos para diversificar eficientemente cuidando el medio ambiente y sus recursos naturales. Contribuimos al progreso y bienestar económico y social a través de la generación de empleo de calidad, y un enfoque comunitario en educación, salud y deporte”

Name: Brandywine Global Investment Management
Description:
We believe in the power of value investing. Acting with conviction and discipline, we look beyond short-term, conventional thinking to rigorously pursue long-term value for our clients. Where others see risk, we see potential. 

Since 1986, our global experience has provided clients with investment insights and a range of differentiated fixed income, equity, and alternative solutions. As a specialist investment manager of Franklin Templeton, Brandywine Global offers the advantages of an investment boutique backed by the resources and infrastructure of one of the world's leading asset managers. With headquarters in Philadelphia and offices in London and Singapore we are committed to bringing value to all relationships.

For important LinkedIn disclosures, visit: http://goo.gl/rGbshQ

Name: Man GLG
Description:
Man Group is a global alternative investment management firm focused on pursuing outperformance for sophisticated clients via our Systematic, Discretionary and Solutions offerings. Powered by talent and advanced technology, our single and multi-manager investment strategies are underpinned by deep research and span public and private markets, across all major asset classes, with a significant focus on alternatives. Man Group takes a partnership approach to working with clients, establishing deep connections and creating tailored solutions to meet their investment goals and those of the millions of retirees and savers they represent.

Headquartered in London, we manage $178.2 billion* and operate across multiple offices globally. Man Group plc is listed on the London Stock Exchange under the ticker EMG.LN and is a constituent of the FTSE 250 Index. * As at 30 June 2024

Further information can be found at www.man.com

Name: AGC Power Holdings Corp
Description:
AGC Power Holdings Corp. (AGC PHC) is an investment management company with a vision of supporting aspiring Filipino entrepreneurs in building successful businesses.

AGC PHC also functions as the parent company of some of the high-performing multimedia companies in the country, including One MEGA Group Inc., the prestige publisher of top fashion and lifestyle media brands MEGA, VMAN Southeast Asia, Lifestyle Asia, BluPrint, The Business Manual, Modern Parenting, The GAME; MEGA Global Licensing Inc., the publisher of well-known international media titles Vogue Philippines and Allure Philippines; Modern Media Group Inc., the company that holds licenses of global multimedia franchises Billboard Philippines, NYLON Manila, Robb Report Philippines, Rolling Stone Philippines; Events100, a subsidiary specializing in event marketing and management; DigistarPH, a specialized influencer marketing and global public relations agency; KLiQ, a content powerhouse delivering disruptive ideas in the digital sphere; and SUNI, the only e-commerce platform that offers 100% Filipino products.

We celebrate fruitful collaborations with high-profile local and multinational partners in our portfolio and a robust list of network and industry connections.

Vision
The golden standard for Filipino media excellence.

Mission
To create pioneering, entertaining, and socially responsible products and services that positively impact every Filipino.

Name: WIC CAPITAL
Description:
Launched in March 2019 by the Women’s Investment Club (WIC) Sénégal, WIC Capital is the first investment fund that exclusively targets women-led companies in Senegal and Côte d’Ivoire. The Fund brings together both local and international institutional and individual investors, who pool their resources to invest in women-owned Micro Small and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) in Senegal and Côte d’Ivoire. 

The Fund invests through a mix of equity and quasi-equity in companies from all sectors, founded by women, at least 50% owned or run by women, or with a managerial team that is mostly female.

Our mission is to unleash the full potential of women-led businesses in Senegal and Côte d’Ivoire through adapted funding and tailored technical assistance and business support, providing a platform for collaboration between local private and public sector actors to shape the gender-lens investing landscape in the region.

Name: Elite Capital Asset Management S.A.
Merricks Capital
Description:
Merricks Capital is a hard asset investment specialist, established in 2007. We have over 17 years of experience and have managed over $8bn in global investment opportunities and traded in excess of $AUD250 billion of securities and commodities.
 
Our mission, in partnership with our investors, is to continue to deliver outstanding returns by providing innovative capital solutions across agriculture, commercial real estate and specialised infrastructure.
 
Please visit our website, merrickscapital.com, to read more.

Name: Alzayani Investments
Description:
Established in 1977, Alzayani Investments is a dynamic company with a proven track record. It derives its strength from its local solid foundation, and its worldwide network of contacts. 

Involved in diversified industries such as automotive, health care, manufacturing, real estates and service, the company is expanding on constant basis. 

Its strategy is dedicated to expand and excel, with a global vision. It employs state of the art technologies to ensure an international competitive edge and stands ready for all future challenges.

Name: Titanium Asset
Description:
A Titanium Asset é uma gestora de recursos criada em 2021 que já nasceu com R$ 10 milhões sob custódia e uma equipe de profissionais com forte know-how na gestão e análise de ativos do mercado financeiro tradicional e de criptoativos. 

Focamos em selecionar as melhores oportunidades, fundamentadas nos mais elevados padrões éticos e de gerenciamento de riscos, atuando no momento em que encontramos a relação risco/retorno ideal, baseada em nossos modelos e estratégias proprietárias, os quais são rigorosamente seguidos e acompanhados. 

Filosofia de investimento

Nossa filosofia de investimento é baseada em proporcionar aos cotistas exposição ao mercado inovador de criptoativos, de maneira consistente e segura, mas sem abrir mão da alta performance.

Oferecemos um fundo de gestão ativa e buscamos utilizar a volatilidade a nosso favor para criar valor de longo prazo para os clientes, independentemente do ciclo que o mercado se encontra. 

Um mercado em ascensão

O mercado de criptoativos está em plena expansão, com cada vez mais players institucionais descobrindo o potencial de disrupção iniciado em 2009 pelo Bitcoin. A capitalização de mercado de todos os criptoativos atualmente é de US$ 2 trilhões, sendo que o Bitcoin representa 54% desse total.

Em um mundo cada vez mais digital e disruptivo, onde novas tecnologias surgem trazendo mudanças em uma velocidade cada vez maior, as oportunidades de investimento podem ser únicas. Para aproveitá-las no entanto, são necessárias as ferramentas corretas, que auxiliam no processo de extrair valor ao mesmo tempo que o capital principal é protegido. 

A Titanium foi desenhada para quem busca desfrutar da ocasião única que estamos vivendo, de investir em um dos setores mais promissores dos últimos anos e busca maneiras regulamentadas para isso.

Name: GBL (Groupe Bruxelles Lambert)
Description:
Groupe Bruxelles Lambert (“GBL”) is an established investment holding company, with seventy years of stock exchange listing and a net asset value of €14.0bn at the end of September 2025. As a leading and active investor in Europe, GBL focuses on long-term value creation with the support of a stable family shareholder base.  

GBL is focused on delivering meaningful growth by providing attractive returns to its shareholders through a combination of growth in its net asset value per share, a sustainable dividend and share buybacks. 

GBL is listed on Euronext Brussels (Ticker: GBLB BB; ISIN code: BE0003797140) and is included in the BEL20 index.

Name: Finizens
Description:
Finizens es el Gestor Automatizado de Inversiones Especialista en Inversión Pasiva Indexada. Finizens está regulado por la CNMV como Agencia de Valores (AV267).

Las carteras de inversión de Finizens están globalmente diversificadas a través de fondos de inversión indexados de las más prestigiosas gestoras independientes del mundo como Vanguard , Blackrock y Amundi, con costes significativamente más bajos que la media del mercado, gestionadas mediante algoritmos, con rebalanceos periódicos de las carteras, y con una rentabilidad histórica de aproximadamente un +3% por encima de la media comparable en el largo plazo (fuente: Morningstar).

●	Los mejores Fondos Indexados de Clase Institucional Plus: Incorporamos las principales y más prestigiosas gestoras del mundo como Vanguard, Blackrock y Amundi.
●	Bajas Comisiones: Hasta un 85% menores que tu banco.
●	Diversificación Global:  Acceso a más de 22.000 posiciones distintas en la misma cartera.
●	Transparencia: Información clara y disponible en todo momento.
●	Automatizado: Rebalanceo Automático de la cartera, puedes despreocuparte de la gestión diaria de tus inversiones. 
●	Sin papeleos: Date de alta de forma 100% digital y accede a tus inversiones a través de la Web/App de Finizens.
●	Máxima seguridad: Autorizado por la CNMV, auditado por EY y Garrigues y realizando el depósito de tu patrimonio en entidades de elevada solvencia como Inversis, Caser y Cecabank.
●	Tecnológico y humano: Aúna lo más avanzando en tecnología y algoritmos, y un gran equipo de soporte al cliente.

Name: Fiera Real Estate
Description:
Fiera Real Estate is a leading investment management company with offices in North America, Europe and Asia. With over 100 investment professionals, the firm manages over C$8.6B of AUM globally as at June 30, 2025. It is an entrepreneurial team working within an institutional framework, enabling clients to benefit from a unique combination of creativity and innovation supported by industry-leading expertise and investment analysis – the best of both worlds. 

The highly diverse nature of its portfolio – in terms of both geographies and types of properties – combined with a range of best-in-class strategies provides investors with exceptional opportunities to diversify their exposure and customize their investment experience within the real estate asset class.

Fiera Real Estate is wholly owned by Fiera Capital Corporation, a leading investment management firm with more than $160.5B of AUM as at June 30, 2025. Fiera Capital provides Fiera Real Estate with access to global investment market intelligence, which enhances its ability to innovate within a framework that emphasizes risk assessment and mitigation.

For more information about Fiera Real Estate, please visit www.fierarealestate.com

Name: DELSUD
Description: Somos Grupo Delsud, un grupo empresarial que apuesta al crecimiento nacional innovando y generando nuevos proyectos constantemente. Actualmente contamos con más de 10 unidades de negocios funcionando.

Name: Petiole Asset Management
Description:
Petiole Asset Management is a Swiss-based boutique asset manager with a global reach, capitalizing on two decades of expertise to offer a comprehensive private market investment journey. We excel in advisory services, due diligence, tailored portfolio construction, and performance monitoring, all underpinned by a disciplined investment philosophy and a commitment to digital innovation.

Our operations are regulated by FINMA, allowing us to conduct business in Switzerland, the USA, Hong Kong, and the Cayman Islands. Over the past 20 years, including our history as part of The Family Office Co. Bsc, we've built strong relationships with top-tier global sponsors through successful direct and co-investments.

Dedicated to institutional investors, family offices, and qualified investors, Petiole Asset Management remains committed to transparency, continuous learning, and competitive fee structures, supported by our extensive industry experience.
FINMA-licensed and regulated to conduct business in Switzerland, the USA, Hong Kong, and the Cayman Islands, we have established solid working relationships with top-tier global sponsors through successful direct and co-investments over the past 18 years (as part of The Family Office Co. Bsc).

At Petiole Asset Management, we remain committed to serving the private market needs of institutional investors, family offices, and qualified investors through constant learning, transparency, and attractive fee structures.

Name: Marguerite
Description:
Marguerite is a pan-European investor in long-life greenfield and brownfield expansion infrastructure. 

Our funds seek out capital-intensive, sustainable investment opportunities with a particular focus on four sectors: (1) Energy & Renewables, (2) Digital Transformation, (3) Waste & Water and (4) Transport. 

Marguerite manages four European infrastructure funds, the most recent being Marguerite III. Over the years, we’ve deployed in excess of €1.5 billion into projects designed to address the changing infrastructure landscape in Europe by integrating ESG principles and creating positive change for society.

Marguerite III benefits from support from the European Union under the InvestEU Fund.

From our origins in 2010 as an independent infrastructure investment manager backed by the European Investment Bank and the main European National Promotional Banks, we have evolved into a fund manager dedicated to generating value for investors while integrating robust ESG screening as part of our eligibility criteria and continuously measuring the positive impact of our investments. 

Our team is based in Luxembourg and Paris.

Name: Bellwether Associates
Description:
BellWether Associates: Your Personal CFO

At BellWether, we are not just wealth managers; we are your trusted partners in navigating the ever-changing financial landscape. We believe that your goals, needs, and risk tolerance are as unique as you are.

That’s why we don’t just offer products; we offer solutions. Through our dedicated wealth manager relationships, we craft personalized roadmaps that take you from planning to investing, managing your assets, and ensuring regulatory compliance. 

What Sets Us Apart?

Client-Centric Approach: We believe in building close, long-term relationships, understanding your aspirations and anxieties, and crafting personalized strategies.

Solution-Based Focus: Unlike financial managers driven by commissions, we focus solely on your success. We prioritize customized solutions over generic products, ensuring your investments align with your risk tolerance, investment history, and life stage.

Expert Guidance: Our team of seasoned wealth managers, backed by robust processes, brings unparalleled expertise and clear communication to every step of your journey.

 Call us at 0124-4909335

Name: Zacua Ventures
Description:
Zacua Ventures is a global early-stage venture fund tackling world's biggest challenges across Sustainability, Productivity and Urbanization and backed by the most innovative corporates in the built world.

Zacua is led by partners with more than 30 years of combined industry experience and who have been investing in construction tech for the past decade.

With regional presence in San Francisco, Madrid, New York, Mexico City and Singapore, Zacua helps entrepreneurs to build and strengthen their value proposition and scale their businesses globally, leveraging deep corporate networks.

Name: Fujairah Holding
Description:
Fujairah Holding prides itself by upholding the iconic heritage of Fujairah. Rich in its capacity, we are leading the ideas of diversification and inclusion at Fujairah. Situated at the east coast of the United Arab Emirates, the land is a harbor to your financial prospects.

Fujairah Holding is a global firm that is at the forefront, aiming to transform Fujairah’s diversity to its strength, by attracting strategic investors to collaborate across an array of enterprises.

Name: Stanhope Capital Group
Description: Founded in 2004 by Daniel Pinto, Stanhope Capital Group currently oversees in excess of USD 40 billion for private clients, endowments, charities and other institutions across the globe. A recognised leader in Wealth Management, Consulting, Alternative Assets, and Merchant Banking, Stanhope Capital Group has grown organically and through acquisitions. In 2021, the group merged with US based FWM Holdings (owner of Forbes Family Trust and Optima Asset Management). In 2023, Stanhope Capital merged with Luxembourg based Arche Associates. Stanhope Capital Group employs 160 people in 8 offices across the UK, Europe and the US.

Name: GTIS Partners
Description:
GTIS Partners is a global real estate investment firm in the Americas, headquartered in New York with offices in São Paulo, San Francisco, Los Angeles, Atlanta, Charlotte, Phoenix, Dallas, Houston and Munich. The firm was founded in 2005 and is managed by President and Founder Tom Shapiro, and Partners Thomas Feldstein, João Teixeira, Rob Vahradian, Peter Ciganik, Maristella Val Diniz, Ed McDowell and Robert McCall. 

The firm manages $4.5 billion in gross assets and is active across a wide range of real estate sectors including single family and multifamily housing, office, industrial/logistics and hospitality as well as opportunity zone investments. The firm invests at various points in the capital structure including credit, common equity and structured equity. In the US, GTIS has invested in over 215 assets across 45 unique markets including growth areas such as Miami, Phoenix, Dallas, Houston, Denver, Atlanta, Tampa and Charlotte. In Brazil, GTIS is among the largest real estate private equity firms with holdings including office, residential, logistics, and hospitality investments. Marquee assets developed by GTIS Partners in São Paulo include the Infinity office building and Palácio Tangará, a five-star resort style hotel. For more information, please visit www.gtispartners.com.

Name: Tamasuk
Description: Tamasuk develops and invests in infrastructure and digital projects with a long term horizon. Innovative and sustainable investments.

Name: DNA international group
Description:
DNA international group, somos un ecosistema empresarial de investment management con más de 25 años de actividad en Latino América y en plena expansión a Europa y Estados Unidos. 

Estamos viviendo una transformación cultural con la que cada día somos una organización más internacional, ágil, orientada al logro e innovación. 

Crecemos apostando por el talento y buscando oportunidades de inversión informadas y a largo plazo, tanto en empresas de nueva creación como en aquellas que teniendo largo recorrido mantienen su potencial innovador.

Name: AKO Capital
Description:
Founded in 2005 by Nicolai Tangen, AKO Capital is one of Europe’s leading investment partnerships, managing over $20bn across European and Global equity funds. We believe that the best way to create strong risk-adjusted return over time is to own the best assets for the long term. Through a rigorous and proprietary bottom-up investment process we aim to build a portfolio that combines excellent economic characteristics and great management. We have a long-term investor base that includes many of the world’s leading endowments, charitable foundations, institutional investors and sovereign wealth funds. 

• Long-term thinking. We believe that long-term thinking is critical to our success and also a key differentiator in the way we approach investing. When investing in great companies the best outcome is achieved by having a long investment horizon. 

• Transparency. We believe any long-term relationship must be based on full transparency. We are very open to our investors about what we do, why we do it and what the outcome is – good or bad. 

• Commitment to people. We believe that a commitment to people is paramount to success as the strength of our results in the long run will reflect the strength of our team. 

• Continuous improvement. We believe continuous improvement is necessary for our organization to continue to deliver strong results. A long-term focus should never come in the way of a short-term urgency to improve in everything we do. 

• Responsible investing. We believe that only by consistently dealing fairly with all their stakeholders can our companies safeguard the high returns we seek in our investments. As a result, we aim to incorporate environmental, social and corporate governance in our investment approach in order to safeguard the interests of our clients.

Name: Axium Infrastructure
Description:
Founded in 2009, Axium Infrastructure is an independent employee-owned fund manager dedicated to investing in the infrastructure sector. With over 110 employees, the firm benefits from the extensive infrastructure backgrounds of its team of professionals who have gained, over their career, significant experience acquiring, developing, financing, operating, and managing infrastructure assets. Axium’s investment strategy focuses on core infrastructure assets with an active approach to operations and asset management and integration of strong environmental, social and governance (‘ESG’) principles. Over the years, the firm has built a diversified portfolio of over 270 assets and today has over C$11.9 billion of assets under management.

__________________________

Description:
The Saudi Investment Promotion Authority (SIPA) is the national entity responsible for positioning Saudi Arabia as a premier global investment destination.
