Through its strategic initiatives, international offices, and partnerships with public and private stakeholders, SIPA highlights Saudi Arabia’s competitive advantages, develops and markets investment opportunities across priority sectors, and enhances the investor journey by providing data, services, and world-class platforms.

With a mission to unify investment promotion efforts, enable impactful partnerships, and foster an innovative investment ecosystem, SIPA plays a pivotal role in driving economic diversification, advancing national champions, and strengthening the Kingdom’s position as a regional and global investment hub.
 
 

الهيئة السعودية لتسويق الاستثمار (SIPA)
الهيئة السعودية لتسويق الاستثمار هي الجهة الوطنية المعنية بتعزيز مكانة المملكة العربية السعودية كوجهة استثمارية عالمية رائدة. أُنشئت بقرار من مجلس الوزراء لتقود الهوية الوطنية الموحدة “استثمر في السعودية”، وتعمل على جذب وترويج وتسهيل الاستثمارات المستدامة التي تدعم مستهدفات رؤية السعودية 2030.

من خلال مبادراتها الاستراتيجية ومكاتبها الدولية وشراكاتها مع القطاعين العام والخاص، تبرز الهيئة المزايا التنافسية للمملكة، وتطوّر وتسوق الفرص الاستثمارية في القطاعات ذات الأولوية، كما تعزز رحلة المستثمر عبر توفير البيانات والخدمات والمنصات الرقمية المتكاملة.

وباعتبارها المحرك الرئيس لتوحيد جهود تسويق الاستثمار وتمكين الشراكات المؤثرة، تسهم الهيئة بدور محوري في تنويع الاقتصاد الوطني، وتمكين الشركات الوطنية، وترسيخ مكانة المملكة كمركز إقليمي وعالمي للاستثمار.

Name: INMSA Real Estate Investment Company
Description:
Inmsa specializes in managing real estate assets. Inmsa helps individuals, companies and financial institutions to invest in real estate, maximizing profits by taking advantage of changes in cycles of global markets.

The traditional paradigm of investment in real estate is to achieve conservation of heritage . To Inmsa, the goal is to achieve conservation and capital gains (increase in value). In other words, apply a method to migrate from the historical passive investment in an active investment property. This way of investing in real estate Real Estate tripling the historical performance, provides maximum security (keeping the characteristics of traditional investment) and facilitates the investor management and investment control.

How do we do it?
• Investigate the cycles of global real estate markets to decide where it is appropriate to enter.
• Detect where in the world to invest in what city and area and what kind of property.
• Negotiate the purchase of the property significantly lower than market prices.
• Define a strategy for rent and / or sell at the right time to make our customers get the best value for money and can reinvest the money in new business for consistent results in the medium term.

Name: Pzena Investment Management
Description:
Our investment philosophy is simple: we seek to buy good businesses at low prices. 

We focus exclusively on companies that are underperforming their historically demonstrated earnings power, performing fundamental, bottom-up research on these companies in an effort to determine whether the problems that caused the earnings shortfall are temporary or permanent. 

We typically consider companies for inclusion in the portfolio when the following criteria are met: (1) the current valuation is low compared to the company’s normalized earnings power; (2) the current earnings are below historic norms; (3) problems are viewed as temporary; (4) management has a viable strategy to generate earnings recovery; and (5) there is meaningful downside protection in case the earnings recovery does not materialize. We believe a concentrated portfolio exclusively focused on companies with these characteristics should generate meaningful excess returns for long-term investors.

Name: Redomo
Description:
Quem somos?

A Redomo nasceu com o propósito de ajudar gestores nas estratégias ESG através da engenharia de gestão de energia elétrica, gerando valores, compensação de carbono e impulsionando a mobilidade elétrica. 

Com o foco na construção de um futuro mais sustentável, a Redomo faz projeção, implantação, construção e gestão de usinas fotovoltaicas para geração independente de energia, compensação de créditos e redução de até 95% da sua conta. 


Manifesto
• Economia circular: Acreditamos na geração de empregos e receita de forma sustentável.
• Comunidade de pessoas: Acreditamos que nosso objetivo só será realizado com a colaboração de pessoas engajadas com nosso propósito. 
• Geração verde: Acreditamos que podemos fazer a diferença na vida de milhares de brasileiros com a produção de energia 100% limpa.
• Consumo sustentável: Acreditamos que é possível atingir a independência energética, sem depender de taxas abusivas e sem agredir o meio ambiente.

O aumento exponencial e expressivo da demanda de energia elétrica no mundo e a crescente preocupação com os efeitos climáticos causados pelo efeito estufa, faz com que tenhamos que repensar a maneira como produzimos energia. 

É necessário oferecer alternativas sustentáveis para esse problema e, por isso, convocamos pessoas que desejam fazer parte dessa revolução.

Como eu posso participar? 
A Redomo oferece consultoria técnica para entender o perfil de consumo de cada cliente, classificando cada equipamento como carga individual e orquestrando a operação para maxima otimização da rede e economia de energia. 

Participe da revolução do setor elétrico! Faça parte da comunidade de pessoas que utilizam sua economia para investir em tecnologia. 

We do eco energy.

Name: Emin Üstün Holding
Description:
1991 yılında temelleri atılan Emin Üstün Holding, başta Eminevim olmak üzere Eminotomotiv, Eminotomotiv 2. El, Emin Sigorta, Emin Enerji, Emin Gayrimenkul Geliştirme, Emin Tarım ve Hayvancılık şirketleri ile Türkiye’ye değer katan hizmetler sunmaktadır.

Eminevim, 30 yılı aşkın süredir uygulanan faizsiz Elbirliği Sistemi ile araç ve konut pazarında her yıl on binlerce kişiyi ev ve araç sahibi yapmaktadır.

Eminotomotiv, Türkiye’nin 128 noktasındaki Eminevim şubelerinde hizmetlerini sürdürerek faizsiz araç sahibi olmak isteyenlere Elbirliği Sistemi ile hizmet vermektedir.

Eminotomotiv 2. El, Eminotomotiv’in yan kuruluşu olan Eminotomotiv 2. El, başta İstanbul olmak üzere Türkiye’nin farklı noktalarında bulunan galerileri ile hizmetlerini sürdürmektedir.

Emin Sigorta, kuruluşundan bugüne konut sigortasından kaskoya, sağlık sigortasından deprem sigortasına, seyahat sigortasından nakliye sigortasına kadar pek çok alanda güvenli sigorta hizmet sunmaktadır.

Emin Enerji, yılda 40milyon kw/h elektrik enerjisi üreterek herkes için yaşanabilir bir dünya ve sürdürülebilir enerji teknolojileri ile doğaya saygılı, çevreyi koruyan, gelecek odaklı olarak çalışmalar yürütmektedir.

Emin Gayrimenkul Geliştirme, Türkiye’nin farklı bölgelerinde toplu konutlar, oteller, lojistik binalar, fabrikalar, tesisler üreterek insanların kullanımına sunmaktadır.

Emin Tarım ve Hayvancılık, ülkemizin çeşitli bölgelerinde çeşitli tesislerde ve tarım alanlarında üretim gerçekleştirmektedir.

Name: Impax Funds (US)
Description:
Impax Funds are advised by Impax Asset Management LLC, the North American division of Impax Asset Management Group plc. Founded in 1998, Impax is a specialist asset manager, investing in the opportunities arising from the transition to a more sustainable global economy.
Impax believes that capital markets will be shaped profoundly by global sustainability challenges, including climate change, pollution and essential investments in human capital, infrastructure, and resource efficiency. Description:

Galeri Kristal markasıyla 60 bine yakın ürün çeşidini turizm sektörüyle buluşturan grup, buklet malzemeleri üretmek amacıyla Kristal Kimya’yı, endüstriyel mutfak ekipmanları üretmek amacıyla da Kristal Endüstriyel’i faaliyete geçirdi.

2005 yılında turizm ve otelcilik yatırımlarına öncelik veren Kilit ailesi, Kilit Hospitality Group çatısı altında Crystal Hotels ve Nirvana Hotels markalarıyla hizmet alanını genişletti. Belek, Kemer, Side, Alanya ve Lara yanı sıra Kapadokya’da konumlanan 14 Crystal Hotels; Beldibi, Tekirova ve Lara’da konumlanan 3 Nirvana Hotels tesisiyle yoluna devam eden grup, 20 binin üzerinde yatak kapasitesine sahip.

Sürdürülebilir gelişme anlayışını benimseyerek her türlü yenilik ve yaratıcılığa kucak açan Kilit Grup, 2017 yılında Gallery Crystal perakende zinciriyle 24 ilde 60’a yakın mağazada hizmet vermeye başladı. Ar Yıldız markasıyla Türkiye’nin en önemli mutfak çeliği üreticilerinden biri olan Kilit Grup, Maxstyle ile ev tekstili, Kilit Et ile de gıda sektörüne yöneldi.  

Kendi markası Tulû Porselen’de sanat ve tasarımı birleştiren Kilit Grup; sanat, eğlence ve gurme gastronomi kültürünü tek çatıda buluşturan Cosmos Theatre ile Antalya’nın eğlence sektörüne yeni bir nefes getirdi. Kilit Grup’un imza projelerinden bir diğeri de Türkiye’nin en büyük yolcu kapasiteli katamaranı Cosmos Moonlight. Eğlence, gastronomi ve modern deneyimin mükemmel uyumuyla misafirlerini ağırlayan katamaran, Antalya turizminin çıtasını yükseltti. 

ANTALYA | Kemer | Kundu | Belek | Side | Manavgat | KAPADOKYA

Grup şirketlerimiz ve on binden fazla çalışanımız ile gelecek için değerler üretiyoruz.

Name: Camissa Asset Management
Description:
We are a specialist investment management firm based in Cape Town. Founded in 2001, we manage funds across the risk spectrum for sophisticated institutional and private investors.

We aim to consistently deliver superior investment performance. We think deeply and independently – constantly pursuing excellence for our clients.

The long-term evidence our competitive advantage is compelling. Since our inception over 21 years ago, our equity funds have been ahead of the benchmark in all but three calendar years. Our Equity Alpha Fund shows us as the second best general equity manager in South African market since its inception in 2004.

Our ability to add value to our clients stems from:

Our investment philosophy
We make investment decision based on mispricings we observe in the market. We focus on valuing expected long-term cashflows rather than predicting the future or reacting to newsflow. In a world that is obsessively focused on the short term, we believe our long-term orientation enables us to look through the noise of self-reinforcing cycles of enthusiasm or negativity – a robust competitive advantage

Our focus on thinking
Our investment team, packed with smart people, need to optimise their efforts and focus most of their time on thinking about client portfolios. We go to extreme lengths to free up time for our investment decision makers to think: streamlining and automating our workflow functions, eliminating paper, partnering experienced resources with associates and outsourcing non-core functions.

Our large institutional scale
We manage over R50 billion in assets and have a longstanding and substantial presence in the institutional market in South Africa.  We are the choice of many sophisticated retirement funds and their institutional consultants. This scale enables us to afford the best investment, compliance and operational resources.

Camissa Asset Management (Pty) Limited is a licensed financial service provider.

Name: Caprock
Description:
Caprock is a top multi-family office Registered Investment Advisory (RIA) serving ultra-high-net-worth clients. Founded in 2005, Caprock acts as a full-service outsourced chief investment officer and chief financial officer for 400 wealthy families with a total of more than $14 billion in assets under advisement. The firm is privately held with locations in Boise, Seattle, San Jose, Newport Beach, Park City, New York, Austin, Chicago, Scottsdale, Winter Park, and Denver

Caprock's clients benefit from the firm's endowment-like investment approach. The firm has expertise and access to private markets, where it manages more than $4 billion in investments, including private equity, venture capital, real estate and private credit. Caprock also has expertise and is an industry thought leader in impact investing. The firm is an SEC-registered investment advisor and a founding B-Corporation. Caprock has received recognition as a top advisory firm in its category from Barron's, Financial Advisor Magazine, USA Today, and others. 
 
This site is intended to provide general information about Caprock and is not a solicitation or offer to sell investment advisory services except in states where we are registered or where an exemption or exclusion from such registration exists. All content is for informational purposes only and may not constitute a complete description of available investment services. Registration with the SEC does not imply a certain level of skill or training. Data as of 6/30/25.

Wealth is about so much more than money. It’s about the life you want and the people you care about. At VM Wealth Management, we practice the art and science of portfolio management, dissecting the markets and using experience to sharpen insight and deliver the best returns for you.

Name: Universa Investments L.P.
Description:
Universa Investments L.P. (“Universa”) is an investment management firm that has specialized in risk mitigation since it was established in January 2007 by Founder and Chief Investment Officer Mark Spitznagel.  Spitznagel and Universa’s Distinguished Scientific Advisor, Nassim Nicholas Taleb, together began tail hedging formally for client portfolios over twenty years ago.
 
Universa stresses that cost-effective risk mitigation helps raise portfolio compound growth rates as a direct consequence of minimizing large drawdowns, and by costing much less than alternatives in normal markets to allow clients to more effectively capture risk premium. Universa both formalized and institutionalized the idea of tail risk hedging in 2007, providing live tail risk mitigation for clients during (and since) the 2008 crisis. Cultivated by decades of cumulative development and implementation, Universa’s risk mitigation strategies focus on maximizing convexity—the degree of portfolio loss protection provided for a given capital allocation.

Refer to www.universa.net for important disclosures and other information.

Name: Agro Food Investments
Description:
AZE: Agro Food Investments MMC (AFI Group) Azərbaycanın ən böyük aqrar və qida şirkətlər qrupundan biridir.
AFİ bu sahədə fəaliyyət göstərən bir neçə şirkəti və onların istehsalat sahələrini, o cümlədən, fındıq emalı müəssisəsi, badam emalı müəssisəsi, ting və calaqaltı istehsalı müəssisəsi, uçucu yağlar emalı müəssisəsi, açıq və qapalı şəraitdə gül yetiştiriciliyi və emalı, çay emalı müəssisəsi və çay plantasiyaları, minlərlə hektar fındıq, badam, zeytun və qarışıq meyvə bağlarını idarə edir, zeytun yağı və süfrəlik zeytun istehsal edir. Bunlarla yanaşı, qrup, dəyər zəncirinin bir neçə mərhələsində təmsil olunmaqla, logistika, saxlanc xidməti, quru və soyuducu kameralar, laboratoriyalar kimi tamamlayıcı biznes sahələrinə daxil olmuş və keyfiyyət və dayanıqlılığı təmin etməyi hədəfləmişdir.
Bizim stratejik baxışımız, texnologiyaya yönümlü, təbiət dostu, dayanıqlı istehsal və xidmətlərlə, bütün tərəfdaşlarımıza dəyər yaratmaqla, müxtəlif bazarlarda etibarlı agro-qida tərəfdaşı olmaqdır

ENG: Agro Food Investments LLC (AFI Group) is one of the largest groups of agricultural and food companies in Azerbaijan.
AFI manages several companies and a number of facilities including, a hazelnut processing factory, an almond processing factory, a floral oil distillery factory, seedling and rootstock production, rose and flower growing on open-field and greenhouses, a tea processing plant and tea plantations, producing olive oil and table olive, managing and developing thousands of hectares of hazelnut, almond, olive and mixed fruit orchards.
Besides, our group has been involved in several stages of the value chain to ensure achieving quality and sustainability with their complementary operations such as logistics, warehousing, cold and dry storages, laboratories, etc.
Our vision is to be a reliable agro-food partner in diverse markets, focused on technology-driven, eco-friendly sustainable production and services by creating value for our stakeholders.

Name: Latour Capital
Description:
Latour Capital is a French Private Equity fund which leverages the entrepreneurial mindset and operational expertise of its investment professionals to work alongside management teams and develop companies while creating value for all stakeholders.

Latour Capital was founded in 2011 by Cédric Bannel, founder of Caradisiac.com, Philippe Leoni, CEO of Spir Group for 13 years and Alain Madelin, former Minister of Economy and Finance, with a view to contributing their entrepreneurial mindset, genuine operational expertise, knowledge of numerous sectors and networks of contacts to the development and growth of companies through equity investments.

Latour Capital is an independent management company, authorised by AMF (French Market Authorities) and 100% owned by its team.

Latour Capital has over €2.6bn under management.

We make investments:
• in buyout and growth capital transactions 
• as majority or minority shareholder
• on companies based in France and Europe 
• with an enterprise value in excess of €150m 

We have a generalist approach with, however, a focus on both business services and industrial businesses. 

We focus on primary transactions and, in this regard, target the spin-off of non-core subsidiaries of large groups. 

We focus on companies that have a strong growth potential, a specific competitive advantage (innovative product, commercial edge), an established or possible sustained international activity and a strong management team.

Name: KAAF Investments
Description:
We help companies realize their full potential through capital, hands-on operating support and long-term strategic guidance.

Board roles:

A leading distributor of solar utility in the Middle East and Africa, providing sustainable tailored power solutions to a range of commercial and industrial customers. Enerwhere’s solar-hybrid systems are optimized for use in off-grid locations, although they have developed fully financed solar rooftop solutions for commercial and industrial customers. Today, Enerwhere is one of the largest solar contractors under DEWA’ Shams Dubai programme, and have a large project pipeline in the UAE, Oman, Nigeria, and numerous countries in Africa.

Right Health currently has 31 clinics across the UAE, located around the most populated labour communities in Dubai, Sharjah, Ajman, Abu Dhabi and Al Ain. Specialties include GP, dental, orthopaedics, general surgery, obstetrics & gynaecology and paediatrics. Besides that, Right Health also owns and operates numerous pharmacies across the UAE. 

3)	BECO Fund II (LPAC observer role)
US$ 100m venture capital fund investing in early stage technology opportunities in the Middle East and North Africa region.

Name: Elanor Investors Group
Description:

The strategy of Elanor is to (i) acquire and unlock value in assets that provide attractive cash flows and capital growth potential, and (ii) grow investments under management through establishing new managed investment funds.

With nationwide resources, Blue Point’s geographical footprint allows it to establish relationships with local and regional entrepreneurs and advisors while providing the perspectives and resources of a global organization. Blue Point has over a two-decade history of partnering with lower middle-market businesses to build processes and capabilities to achieve growth. Blue Point’s portfolio is supported by its unique capabilities — which include an integrative team focused on innovative global supply chain, data & digital and human capital strategies — as well as its extensive experience, network of industry resources and focused M&A efforts. Name: Varenne Capital Partners
Description:
Varenne Capital Partners is a Paris-based, process-driven, global investment manager whose purpose is to deliver superior long-term returns with the minimum necessary risk-taking. We strive to achieve this goal by employing proprietary research and combining complementary investment frameworks in a single strategy: Long Equity, Short Equity, Merger Arbitrage and Tail Risk Hedging. Our ‘brokers are not welcome’ policy means that we rely exclusively on our own internal research and base our analysis on facts and figures. All of our investment frameworks stem from years of research and development and as a result comprise original methodologies, formalized processes, dedicated teams of analysts and bespoke information systems. Our research serves as the foundation for managing both UCITS and AIF investment vehicles.

Founded by its current management team, Varenne operated as an advisor to VEGA Finance – the private banking arm of the Natixis Group – between 2003 and 2006, and has since acted as a fully independent investment manager.

Varenne is registered with the AMF, registration number GP-06 000004.

Name: Waratah Capital Advisors Ltd.
Description:
Waratah Capital Advisors is a Toronto-based asset manager that specializes in alternative strategies. Waratah manages over $4 billion in assets from high-net-worth individuals, family offices, foundations, Canadian bank platforms, and pension funds. With a team of over 50 experienced professionals, Waratah combines intensive research-driven stock selection with a disciplined and robust risk management program. Founders and employees collectively represent over $225 million of the firm’s assets under management.

We manage seven strategies. While each investment is formed and positioned to meet the various needs of our investors, they all aim to compound wealth at targeted returns levels while experiencing less correlation to the traditional equity markets. We combine fundamental analysis and risk management to create absolute return investment strategies with less drama than the equity markets.

Name: Ossiam
Description:
Ossiam is a global investment management firm that develops and manages investment funds based on systematic and quantitative investment processes. 

The Ossiam team has extensive experience in fund management, quantitative research, data and technology, financial product design, trading and risk management. Ossiam believes that advanced research is fundamental to moving the quantitative investment industry forward and providing investors with systematic strategies that are understandable, transparent and repeatable. 

Ossiam’s expertise spans indexation, enhanced beta and absolute return strategies in equities and fixed income through active and passive ETFs, mutual funds, dedicated funds or bespoke solutions.

As a signatory of UNPRI since 2016, Ossiam incorporates ESG data into some of its systematic investment process and implements a proxy-voting and engagement policy reflective of firm beliefs. 

Ossiam is an affiliate of Natixis Investment Managers and manages EUR 10 bn / USD 10.4 bn as of December 2024 on behalf of institutional and professional investors. Ossiam is regulated by the Autorité des marchés financiers (AMF).

Description:

The company’s objective is superior performance while controlling risk. It achieves this through a select team of analysts, advisers and investment specialists with extensive experience in the emerging and frontier markets, complemented by up to date local knowledge delivered by a network of informed and professional contacts.

JIC Holdings is renowned for its achievements in both high performance investments and strategic interests.The company utilises detailed selection criteria to identify optimum opportunities to invest and realise value from undervalued or under-performing assets in its investment regions, thus securing appreciating potential for the long term.

RoundShield is the European credit and tactical opportunities arm of Harrison Street Asset Management, a leading global investment manager with more than $100 billion in assets under management across real estate, infrastructure, and credit strategies in North America and Europe. 

RoundShield is focused on European asset-backed credit opportunities and private capital solutions and manages over $5 billion of discretionary capital on behalf of pension funds, endowments, foundations, and other institutional investors.

RoundShield’s investment strategies prioritize opportunities with strong underlying fundamental value, driven by our diverse network of long-standing relationships across a wide range of sectors, and an in-depth understanding of western European market dynamics.

We have a team of over 60 professionals with extensive portfolio management, restructuring, and investment experience working across six offices.

Our contrarian investment strategy, combined with a singular focus on long-term investments, ensures that our clients receive Tax-efficient and superior risk-adjusted returns. Join the Right Horizons family and experience financial freedom for the rest of your life.

The Vision

To establish NAFA as a premier Asset Management Company that capitalizes on the technical and institutional strengths of its promoters to consistently offer creative and pioneering domestic and international products to meet varying needs of investors.

Mission Statement

To rank in the top quartile in performance of NAFA mutual funds and portfolios relative to the competition, and to consistently offer superior risk-adjusted returns to investors.

 Values (A, B, C, D and E of NAFA)

Offer investors “best value for money” by following these behaviors and values:

A.  Pro-Active - Introducing pioneering investment products & managing risk
B.  Brain Power- Hiring, training, rewarding & retaining professionals.
C.  Caring for Customers- Understanding investors’ needs, and risk / return profile before offering them “investment solutions”.
D.  Dynamic- Believing in decentralization, Entrepreneurship & continuous improvements.
E.   Ethics- Zero-tolerance policy for unethical behavior.

Joint Venture

National Bank of Pakistan
Alexandra Fund Management Limited

Name: Pomorska Specjalna Strefa Ekonomiczna
Description:
Pomeranian Special Economic Zone offers an excellent location combined with complete technical infrastructure and good communication, where economic activity can be conducted on preferential conditions. PSEZ staff members are experienced in cooperation with foreign investors and management of industrial areas and EU projects.

Pomorska Specjalna Strefa Ekonomiczna działa na rzecz rozwoju regionalnego poprzez tworzenie atrakcyjnych warunków do rozwoju przedsiębiorczości i napływu nowych inwestycji.  Realizuje zadania, których celem jest  stymulowania gospodarki i  poprawa klimatu inwestycyjnego Polski, zgodnie z założeniami Strategii na rzecz Odpowiedzialnego Rozwoju. 
PSSE działa na  terenie 226 gmin w województwie kujawsko-pomorskim i we wschodniej części woj. pomorskiego. Jest częścią Polskiej Strefy Inwestycji, jednym z 14 podmiotów regionalnych, które odpowiedzialne są za kompleksową obsługę inwestorów zagranicznych i krajowych. Pełni rolę regionalnego centrum obsługi inwestorów i  koordynatora udzielania pomocy publicznej. Służy przedsiębiorcom wsparciem  na każdym etapie realizacji ich projektów, w tym pomocą o charakterze konsultacyjno-doradczym. 
 
PSSE stawia na rozwój  innowacyjnej gospodarki i przedsiębiorczości ze szczególnym uwzględnieniem sektora wysokich technologii i transferu wiedzy z uczelni do przemysłu.  Cel ten realizowany jest w zarządzanym przez Strefę Gdańskim Parku Naukowo-Technologicznym i skoncentrowanym na gospodarce morskiej Bałtycki Port Nowych Technologii, które stały się ośrodkami stymulującymi rozwój innowacyjnej pomorskiej przedsiębiorczości opartej o wiedzę. PSSE prowadzi też działalność w obszarze szkolnictwa branżowego.

Name: TIBERIUS
Description:
Tiberius was established in 2005 with a mandate to manage the family’s strategic assets and invest the family’s own private capital, with a long-term aim of creating sustainable generational wealth.

What began as a single-family office has grown to look after the interests of multiple families, while also earning trust and collaborating with a very close-knit network of partners, professional investors, and high net-worth individuals in the Middle East, Europe, Asia and The America.

In the next decade leading up to 2030, we foresee tremendous global market change, including emphasized nationalization, portfolio rationalization and reshaping, digital transformation, and major strides forward in the clean energy transition. With the extensive expertise, resources and relationships our team has garnered, Tiberius is focused and primed to move quickly on the opportunities it perceives in key identified industries

Our values, strategies, and mechanisms for creating value are simply different. We put each prospect through a comprehensive assessment that considers technical, financial and ESG metrics. Reducing our environmental footprint is as important to us as yield. Stakeholder and partner benefit is as important as portfolio return. Our standard of ethics, integrity, and honor go far above and beyond the minimum requirements of the law.

We will continue to capitalize on unique investments in markets that others consider saturated. We see opportunities to optimize or extend investment value and life where others only see decline. In emerging markets that may be characterized as complicated or too risky, we leverage our network to foster deep relationships founded on shared-value creation, to generate robust returns.

While our heritage reaches far back into the past, we are spotting trends and making investment decisions that will generate value long into the future.

The company is building technology using AI and ML, data-driven models, for delivering hyper-personalized wealth advisory.

To generate investment ideas, back-test, simulate, construct, manage and rebalance portfolios, the company will build scalable, modular technology engines to assist in research.

Overtime, the company intends to manage other parts of an individual's wealth, for example - real estate, cash, liabilities, incomes, expenses, taxes, by leveraging technology.

Name: TU Investment Club e.V.
Description:
The TU Investment Club is a Munich based student initiative dedicated to the education of students with a distinct interest in financial markets.

We encourage our members to form their own independent and profound opinion on financial topics.

The TU Investment Club wants to give students the possibility to get in contact with companies from the financial sector, get an inside view of the industry and a better understanding of the financial system. For this purpose we arrange workshops with industry partners to give our members practical skills and implementable knowledge.

The Club gives companies the chance to get in touch with our member base and interact with open-minded students on a professional basis. Members of the club are encouraged to initiate projects of their own and to supervise them as the project leader.

Our activities aim to enrich the campus life of universities in Munich and thereby increase their attractiveness for both national and international students.

Name: Wesley Clover International
Description:
Wesley Clover is a private, global investment management firm and holding company.  Under the direction of founder, Chairman and serial technology entrepreneur Terry Matthews, the focus is to fund and grow successful technology companies.  More than 100 firms have been created to date.  Early data networking giant Newbridge Networks, and current global business communications leader Mitel are particular highlights.  In total, more than 140 founders have been backed by Wesley Clover, with more than $1.0B in direct investment.  The portfolio has produced 20 IPOs, slightly more than that number of exits via acquisition, and more than $3.5B in public returns.

The portfolio regularly has more than 40 investments under active management around the globe, including start-ups in the incubation stage, first-product firms in the accelerator phase, and more mature companies that trade publicly.  All are committed to next-generation Cloud and SaaS applications for fixed and mobile communications, video analytics, security, customer engagement, business enablement and more.  Deal flow includes companies within the Enterprise SaaS Accelerator, L-SPARK, which Wesley Clover formed in partnership with local government and other parties in 2014, as well as the Alacrity Global Ecosystem of technology partnership funds which have been deployed in at least ten countries.  Mature funds have active companies in local portfolios, and newer locations are formalizing the partnerships and operations required to start first cohorts.

Name: Kotak Mahindra (UK) Ltd.
Description:
The international subsidiaries of Kotak manage a wide range of India investment funds through which overseas investors can invest in India. The Kotak Group has offices in London, New York, Dubai and Mauritius with a branch in Singapore and San Francisco. Investors can access the asset management capability of the international subsidiaries through its India investment funds. Institutional investors can also have their assets managed through separately managed accounts.
Range of services

Kotak’s international subsidiaries offer asset management services to overseas investors through a range of offshore funds as well as through specific advisory and discretionary investment management mandates from institutional investors.

We specialize in providing services to overseas investors seeking to invest in India. Investors can access the asset management capabilities of the international subsidiaries through funds domiciled outside India.

The solutions offered by the subsidiaries span major asset classes including listed equity, private entity and real estate. KMUK also handles international issuances of securities of Indian companies.

The international business of the Kotak Group operates though the following three subsidiaries:

Kotak Mahindra (UK) Limited (KMUK)
A 100% subsidiary of Kotak (the parent company), KMUK is one of the first firms of Indian origin to be authorized and regulated by the Financial Services Authority in the United Kingdom. A member of the London Stock Exchange, KMUK is registered with the Securities Exchange Board of India as a Foreign Institutional Investor (FII).

KMUK had its registered office in London, with branch offices in Dubai and Singapore. Infact it is the first Indian company to be authorized to operate from its branch in the Dubai International Financial Centre, and is regulated by the Dubai Financial Services Authority. It is also regulated by the Monetary Authority of Singapore.

Name: Özgörkey Holding A. Ş.
Area One Farms
Description:
Area One Farms is the only Canadian agricultural investment group with a model based on real equity partnerships, enabling farm operators to expand without the burden of fees, rent, or interest payments.

WHAT WE DO
Area One Farms bridges the gap between agriculture and equity – helping quality Canadian farmers expand their operations in a stable, committed partnership with investors. Within each equity partnership, we also help farm partners adopt farm management principles and practices that help raise the effectiveness and efficiency of farming operations, increasing their land productivity and overall profitability.
We currently have farm partnerships in Alberta, Saskatchewan, Manitoba, and Ontario. As each farm is unique, we design partnerships as joint ventures to suit and support the financial and operational goals of each operation.

GROWING
We know that agricultures true value is found where farmers are involved in the long-term, intergenerational success of their farm. While farmers often want to expand and grow their farm for the next generation, and have the capacity to do so, access to capital often limits the possibility to make this a reality. 
At Area One Farms we bring growth and this long-term mindset together with a joint venture where farmers are owners. We believe that this ownership drives investment in the success of their business and results in a win-win for all stakeholders.
We understand farming because we are farmers ourselves. We understand the pressures, the challenges, the excitement and the long-term impact brought with farm expansion. Let us show you a unique way to expand without undue risk.
Our guiding principle in everything we do is that operators should always do better working with Area One Farms than they could on their own.

We do not charge fees, rent, or interest. 

Want to learn more? Visit www.areaonefarms.ca for more information.

Name: Alliance Global Advisors
Description:
Alliance Global Advisors is a women-owned consulting firm focused on developing strategic growth solutions for real asset investment managers. Advising Clients with over $970 billion in assets under management, Alliance partners with organizations to provide an informed, independent perspective, continued education and an innovative approach to attracting capital in a competitive market environment. Our experienced team is committed to empowering the real asset investment community to elevate best practices. Our partnerships allow senior management teams to focus on what matters most: diligently managing Investor capital, creating value and delivering exceptional returns in a performance-driven market. 

In 2024, Alliance Global Advisors launched Alliance Search Partners in response to growing industry demand. Leading this new initiative is Stacy Schiffman, an executive search professional with a distinguished career in alternative investments and talent acquisition. Backed by the expertise of Alliance Global Advisors’ leadership team, Alliance Search Partners introduces an innovative model that combines deep industry knowledge with specialized executive search capabilities. By leveraging Alliance’s strong relationships within the Limited Partner, Investment Manager and Consultant communities, Alliance Search Partners delivers tailored recruitment solutions that address the evolving needs of the real asset investment industry.

Interested in forming an Alliance? Come have a seat at the table.

Name: TT International
Description:
TT International is an alpha-driven specialist investment manager, with a long and successful history of investing for sophisticated institutional clients around the world, including leading sovereign wealth funds, public pension funds and superannuation funds. 

Since 1988, TT’s journey has seen us evolve from our macro hedge fund origins into a manager with cross-asset long-only and long/short capabilities spanning global markets. 

Throughout this time, we have remained true to our hedge fund roots, implementing the principles of high alpha generation combined with state-of-the-art risk management capabilities across our alternative and long-only products. 

Just as our product range has evolved, so has our ownership structure. In 2020, TT was acquired by leading Japanese financial services organisation, Sumitomo Mitsui Financial Group. This partnership provides a strong and stable parent, helping us to continue launching innovative products that meet the constantly changing needs of our clients, while enhancing our global distribution capabilities. Crucially, we retain the autonomy and incentive structures that allow us to attract world-class professionals across our entire business, from investment and risk management to back office, sales and client servicing.

Name: Silverline Real Estate
Description:
Silverline Real Estate is an international investment fund with proprietary projects in residential real estate development.

History of the group dates back to 2015, when investment activities in residential real estate were launched. In 2020, the company began to focus exclusively on residential real estate development, and at the turn of 2021/22, a fully regulated Accredited Investor Fund (AIF) in legal form "SICAV" was established.

Goal of the fund is to provide investors with a safe product (incl. a protection mechanism for investors) and highest return within the residential segment among Czech AIFs and to consistently place within top 3-5 Czech real estate AIFs across all segments (industrial, office, retail). Since its establishment, with a net return of 10-12% p.a. for its investors, Silverline Real Estate has been consistently delivering on this goal.

Fund is unique in its approach: on monthly basis, investment team, jointly with partner architect studios, reviews lower tens of opportunities, designs target solutions and thoroughly calculates business cases. Only exceptional opportunities are invested – all risks must be known and reasonable, while margin of the project must be exceptional. At the same time, the fund's investment team directly manages all portfolio projects and therefore has full control over budgets and timelines.

Fund founders have high commitments, namely deposits of CZK >100 million (as of 2024). Founders aim to further increase their deposits in the coming years.

The medium-term goal of Silverline is to build an investment fund in residential development running mid-sized projects in regional capital cities throughout Central and Eastern Europe (with focus on the Czech Republic) and possibly also in USA.

Silverline's long-term vision is to build a fully diversified investment group with a fund focused on residential development as well as a Private Equity fund focused on smaller and mid-sized firms across industries.

Name: Quantbot Technologies LP
Description:
Quantbot Technologies, LP is an investment adviser registered with the SEC. During the financial crisis of 2008, our founders realized the unique edge they had over the competition due to years of experience generating quantitative trading strategies and working with cutting-edge technology. Driven by a passion for quantitative finance, the firm began in 2009 in New York City, managing a global portfolio using quantitative strategies that are continually developed by our skilled teams of researchers and data analysts.
Our offices expand globally to ensure that strategies can trade 24/7, with Quantbot Technologies Ltd in London representing the European market, and Quantbot Technologies Ltd in Hong Kong and Singapore serving the Asian market. Quantbot’s commitment to maintaining a global presence also allows each team to benefit from the unique and diverse perspectives of others from around the world.

Name: Versor Investments
Description:
Versor is a pioneer in applying AI and alternative data to global equity markets. As a quantitative equities boutique, Versor focuses on systematically delivering uncorrelated alpha across single stocks, equity index futures, and corporate events.  Headquartered in New York, Versor brings over three decades of leadership in quantitative investing. The investment process—from alpha forecasting and portfolio construction to risk management and electronic trading—relies on the ingenuity and quantitative expertise of more than 50 investment professionals.

Website
www.versorinvest.com

Name: Women's Equity Lab
Description:
Women's Equity Lab’s (WEL) is a fun, collaborative and empowering way for women to actively engage in early-stage investing.  

Launched in 2017, we now make up a diverse and powerful network of 400+ women investors, with syndicates located in Victoria, Vancouver, Toronto, Manitoba, the Atlantic and Silicon Valley. 

Actively engaging women in the angel investment process translates into more women as advisors, board members, venture capitalists, angel investors and angel fund managers. 

In the WEL model, partners in the investment round meet regularly to learn how to invest in companies, discuss opportunities, vet deal flow and make investment decisions. Every participant ends up with a deeper understanding of the angel investment process, a portfolio of early-stage companies and a great network of accomplished women. Other benefits include: 
• Engaging with incredible entrepreneurs and investors 
• Building value for the community and society
• Supporting companies that resonate with you and helping them grow
• Participating in new fields, transforming industries and the latest innovations
• Potentially making significant financial gains
• Continuous learning while building value

Name: Nevco Holding
Description:
Nevco Holding, sürdürülebilir iş modeli, inovasyon odaklı büyüme stratejisi ve güçlü marka portföyüyle Türkiye’nin en hızlı büyüyen şirketlerinden biridir. 100’den fazla şirketi ve 3.000’i aşkın çalışanıyla gıda perakendeciliği ve restoran işletmeciliği alanlarında faaliyet göstermektedir.
Nevco Holding, tüketici memnuniyetini, kaliteyi ve sürdürülebilir büyümeyi iş modelinin merkezine koyarak, geniş marka portföyüyle milyonlarca insana ulaşmaktadır. Dünyanın en büyük et restoranı olarak premium et deneyimi sunan Ercan Steakhouse, dünya standartlarında kahve çekirdekleriyle benzersiz bir tat ve atmosfer sunan Nevada Coffee, kaliteli malzemelerle hazırlanan gurme burgerleriyle dikkat çeken Ercan Burger, İtalyan mutfağının özgün lezzetlerini yerel tatlarla buluşturarak gerçek pizza deneyimi yaşatan Pizzarama ve geleneksel tavuk lezzetlerini modern mutfak anlayışıyla yeniden yorumlayan Miss Crispy Chicken, holdingin güçlü markaları arasında yer almaktadır.
Nevco Holding, gıda sektöründeki liderliğini pekiştirmek, yeni pazarlara açılmak ve küresel bir marka haline gelmek için kararlılıkla büyümeye devam etmektedir. Sadece ekonomik büyümeyi değil, çevresel ve toplumsal sorumluluğu da iş modelinin temel taşları arasında konumlandırmaktadır.
Nevco Holding olarak, daha yaşanabilir bir dünya için iş süreçlerimizi sürdürülebilirlik ilkeleri çerçevesinde yönetiyoruz.
Odak Alanlarımız:
• İklim değişikliğiyle mücadele
• Gıda israfının önlenmesi
• Kaynakların verimli ve sürdürülebilir kullanımı
Nevco Holding, sadece bugünün değil, geleceğin dünyasına da yatırım yapmaktadır. Küresel pazarda güçlü bir oyuncu olma hedefi doğrultusunda, inovasyon, kalite ve sürdürülebilirlik ilkeleriyle sektöre yön vermeye devam etmektedir.

Description:

ICCREA BANCA S.p.A., Capogruppo del Gruppo BCC Iccrea,  possiede il 100% del capitale sociale.

Description:

Key strategies are Direct Lending, Working Capital, Infrastructure and Real Estate which are delivered to global investors over a broad range of platforms including AIFs and UCITS funds, separate accounts and securitisation structures.

Our philosophy is based on ethical partnership and financial alignment with clients, companies and staff.

Name: Artha Bharat Investment Managers IFSC LLP
Description:
Artha Bharat Investment Managers IFSC LLP (ABIM)  is a fund management entity based in Gift City, Gandhinagar, India, dedicated to offering unique investment solutions and diversification opportunities for its clients' portfolios. Established in 2024, ABIM seeks to differentiate itself in the marketplace through a niche approach to investment management, focusing on products that stand out in a landscape typically dominated by more conventional offerings.

The name "Artha Bharat" is derived from the Sanskrit word 'Artha', which means 'wealth', reflecting the firm's core mission of generating long-term wealth for its investors. The term 'Bharat' adds an Indian dimension to the name, highlighting the firm's roots and commitment to creating wealth within the Indian context. Founded by Sachin Sawrikar, ABIM integrates innovative strategies to create customised investment opportunities tailored to the specific needs of discerning investors, with an emphasis on both 'growth' and 'risk management'.

Positioned as an expert in identifying and offering diversified investment products, ABIM aims to complement and strengthen investor portfolios by providing access to alternative and differentiated investment options, all while maintaining a focus on long-term value creation.

ABIM manages the USD 600 million Artha Global Opportunities Fund - AGOF (AIF CAT III) that has re-domiciled from Mauritius and Artha Global Multiplier Fund, a long/short hedge fund investing in US markets.

This move to Gift City and the launch of AGOF reflect ABIM's commitment to expanding its footprint in India and leveraging the country's evolving financial ecosystem.

Name: Gulf General Investment Co PSC
Description:
The GGICO story is one that has been defined by success. Established in 1973, the organisation’s vast panoply of achievement has been underpinned by a solid foundation of inspirational leadership, strategic vision and a strong work ethic. As each new goals is surpassed, the company moves forward with ambition.

Key to GGICO’S continued growth is its belief in the power of diversity to drive the company forward. Diversity is evident at all levels of the business; in its strategy, its operations and in the composition of its human assets.

GGICO’s commitment to being a multi-faceted corporation sees the Group today as an all-encompassing network of investment companies in the Middle East. From building and maintaining an eclectic profile, investing in new and varied sectors, driving expansion through backward integration and acquiring small, high-growth potential companies; diversity has always been the key to the Group’s success. It is visible in every segment, department and division. It is a belief that is echoed in the cultural ethos of the company and is the very cornerstone of its development.

Founded in 2017, Pat Walsh and Ross Morrow successfully established the BlueBay Asset Management Irish operations in 2013.  In 2017, this was spun out to establish DunPort.  Today, DunPort has over EUR800m assets under management. For more information, visit https://www.dunportcapital.ie/

Name: Shapoorji Pallonji Investment Advisors Pvt Ltd.
Description: A unique fully-integrated real estate development and investment advisory platform, has consistently delivered value to all its stakeholders.

Name: SeaFort Capital Inc.
Description:
We provide financial and strategic support to help Canadian businesses grow. Our mission is to partner with entrepreneurs to help them grow their businesses into industry-leading Canadian companies. Founded in 2012, SeaFort is a top-performing private equity manager and is currently investing its second fund.
 
We partner with entrepreneurs to execute on clearly defined growth plans. We have expertise in supporting the development and execution of strategic plans as well as executing on organic and inorganic growth opportunities. We primarily seek to invest in the business services and industrial sectors.

Name: Vesper Infrastructure Partners
Description:
Investing in a decarbonised, connected and sustainable future.

Vesper Infrastructure Partners is an outstanding team focused on mid cap target opportunities in the European value-add infrastructure space.

Vesper is led by a team of seasoned and experienced industry and private equity professionals.

The initial focus will be OECD markets, pursuing thematic investment themes which address the key megatrends evolving in our core markets -- these are summarised below:

(1) Clean, Digital & Decentralized Energy
(2) Decarbonized Mobility & Connected Logistic
(3) Data Centric, Low Latency Digital Infrastructure
(4) Sustainable, Circular & Healthy Living

Name: Ramirez Asset Management
Description:
Ramirez Asset Management (“RAM”) specializes in fixed income and equity asset management and provides investment advisory services to institutional investors. Our well-diversified fixed income strategies are utilized by some of the largest public pension funds in the country, numerous state and local governments, and corporate treasury and pension funds, in addition to many others.

RAM believes that a customized approach to portfolio management is a true value-added benefit and an integral part of our investment process. We believe in the importance of establishing long-term client relationships while striving to deliver consistent and superior long-term investment results.

More information on our investment strategies can be found at www.ramirezam.com.

Social Media Guidelines and Legal Terms: https://www.ramirezam.com/Images/Ramirez%20Asset%20Management%20Social%20Media%20Guidelines.pdf

Name: Lorinvest
Description:
We are an investment company that manages our own and third-party assets.

Driven by the entrepreneurial DNA of the Norwegian tycoon Erling Lorentzen - who planted the first eucalyptus forest in Brazil - we've built successful companies aligned with the main business vocation in the country: the bioeconomy.

Our operations are structured around five strategic axes: transport and logistics; biological assets; financial solutions; industrial technology; and healthcare.

Our commitment to ESG, respecting the highest standards of transparency and sustainability, unites all these projects. We are here to serve, in equal measure, the individual, the environment and the economy.

With a long-term vision and teamwork, we deliver exponential returns on a sustainable scale.

Get in touch. Let's grow together.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio De Janeiro

Name: Venrex
Description:
Venrex is an early-stage venture capital firm. We were the earliest stage backers of Charlotte Tilbury, Revolut, 365Scores, Orlebar Brown, Opus Energy and Maven Clinic, and early investors in Rippling, Just Eat, Notonthehighstreet.com, Mumsnet and ME+EM. Founded in 2002, we have offices in London and New York

If you are looking for investment, we’d love to hear from you. Please send us a message telling us about you, your business, and why you believe it will succeed. Unfortunately, due to high volume of contacts, we’re unable to respond to every application but we will try our best to get back to you.

Name: Inspired Evolution
Description:
Inspired Evolution was established in 2007 as a first-mover specialised investment manager dedicated to key climate-driven principal investment themes: clean energy and sustainable energy infrastructure; energy access and energy and resource efficiency growth investments – and the value chains that support them. Headquartered in Cape Town with our staff spread across our international, regional and country offices in London, Nairobi, Abidjan and Grand Bay in Mauritius, we have boots on the ground in Southern, Western and Eastern Africa.

Our mission is focused on delivering positive, lasting impact to Africa’s extraordinary people. As one of the pioneering clean energy fund managers in Africa, we stand at the forefront of reshaping the energy landscape across the continent. Leveraging our profound understanding of local markets, extensive regional networks, and proven expertise in growth and infrastructure investments, we are spearheading this transformative journey. Our investment philosophy is shaped by the need to find innovative responses in technology, production, and business models to address the needs of a rapidly changing world and compromised environment. We are bridging the funding gap by investing in clean energy infrastructure projects and growth companies that are enabling energy access and developing resource efficient, reliable, affordable, disruptive solutions.

Name: Investment Adviser Association
Description:
The Investment Adviser Association is a not-for-profit organization that exclusively represents the interests of fiduciary investment adviser firms. The IAA membership manages in excess of $25 trillion in assets for a wide variety of institutional and individual clients, including pension plans, trusts, investment companies, private funds, endowments, foundations, and corporations.

The IAA serves as the advocate for fiduciary investment advisory firms with respect to every major issue that arises before the U.S. Congress, the SEC, the CFTC, the Department of Labor, state securities regulators, and other policy makers. We provide significant benefits to our members, including up-to-date regulatory, compliance, business practices, and educational services.

Name: Griffon Capital
Description:
Griffon Capital is a frontier market-focused group providing Asset Management (Capital Markets & Private Equity) and Investment Banking Advisory services to elite customers. The company’s primary objective is to provide local and international institutional investors with the proper mechanisms for seamless investment in frontier markets. We aim to maximize opportunities for profits through purpose-built investment products and vehicles that span across traditional and alternative assets.
Griffon’s strength is rooted in its robust international-grade operating platform, which has been setup with the express aim of serving institutional investors. Our platform consists of a high-calibre team of local experts who are equipped with a deep knowledge of local markets, and backed by an executive team that has a solid pedigree in the fields of international banking and finance, including extensive experience in the areas of Private Equity, Asset Management and Corporate Finance.

Name: Ocean Leonid Investments
Description: Ocean Leonid Investments Ltd is a proprietary commodity trading firm established in 2018 in the Dubai International Financial Center.

Name: Yale Investments
Description: We partner with the world’s best investors to enable the education, research, and innovation that Yale contributes to humanity.

Name: CIX Capital
Description:
CIX Capital brings in its name the key to understanding our focus and values, based on three main pillars:

C   Clients
 I   Investments in Real Estate
X   Expertise, Experience and Excellence

We structure, manage and enable real estate financing solutions and investments for Ultra-High-Net-Worth Individuals, Family Offices, Real Estate Companies, Asset Managers, Institutional Investors, and Investment Funds.
 
As a joint venture between Grupo ZPar and executives from the financial markets, CIX Capital’s objective is to enhance real estate investment opportunities and its ramifications within the financial and capital markets.

The company has generated long-term investment opportunities in several sectors of the real estate market, such as residential, distribution centers, commercial centers and office buildings, both in Brazil and the USA, with operations that total more than R$ 1.3 billion.

Within this scope, we operate in four main areas:

• Capital Markets
CIX Capital originates, structures and distributes efficient and innovative transactions, using financial and capitals market instruments to produce expressive results, delivered with agility and diligence.

• Offshore Investments
We believe that every global portfolio must have participation in real estate assets from mature and stabilized economies. Given its pro-business characteristics, we pay special attention to the USA real estate market, with emphasis on South Florida.
 
• Real Estate Management
CIX Capital manages real estate assets. This includes all aspects of the process: monitoring the markets where the assets are located, understanding and managing the risks associated with each type of asset, their respective stages of development and/or maturation, and following the investments’ cash flow and their returns.

• Asset Management
CIX Capital Gestão de Ativos is an independent asset management company established with a focus on real estate operations in the financial and capital markets.

Name: Jabal Ohod Holding
Description: Jabal Ohod Holding company is a pioneer in the field of energy, mining, and asset management. We offer innovative and advanced solutions, and we are distinguished by quality and professionalism in our work. Also, we strive to exceed expectations. We have highly experienced team members who are committed to achieving sustainable success in every aspect of our business. Through our strong strategy and passion for innovation, we strive to achieve success and sustainable growth in our key areas and create real value for our partners.

Name: Riveria Group
Description: Riveria Group specializes in traditional buyout and growth stage opportunities. We seek risk-adjusted returns via comprehensive due-diligence, and achieve our goals by sticking to disciplined business fundamentals. As investors with a long-term vision, we pursue the highest standards of excellence, and align our interests with those of our investment partners.

Name: Regal Assets Group Holding Ltd
Description: Regal Assets Group Holding, Ltd. is an international investment company. The holding company is registered in Dubai International Financial Centre (DIFC).

Name: Simba Investments Group
Description:
Simba Investments is a venture capital firm that backs dynamic companies led by bold entrepreneurs.

We invest across all stages, from seed to growth, fostering innovation in consumer, health, technology (VR/ XR/ monitoring), fintech & cutting-edge advancements. With c. $170 million in assets under management, we are constantly on the lookout for disruptive companies & understanding how we can unlock each other’s growth potential.

Our commitment extends beyond capital. We partner with our portfolio companies to grow their businesses and help them thrive. Our team of experienced operators provide strategic guidance, targeted insights, and hands-on support across the spectrum of company building and scaling, to accelerate successes.

Name: RQS Partners
Description: RQS Partners is a privately-held global investment management firm combining data-driven strategies with fundamental and macroeconomic research to deliver strong, consistent returns.

Name: PKO TFI
Description: PKO Towarzystwo Funduszy Inwestycyjnych (PKO TFI) istnieje od 1997 r. i należy do Grupy Kapitałowej PKO Banku Polskiego. To jedno z największych towarzystw funduszy inwestycyjnych rynku kapitałowego w Polsce. PKO TFI zarządza środkami powierzonymi przez blisko 2 miliony Klientów indywidualnych i korporacyjnych. Obecnie Towarzystwo oferuje ponad 60 różnorodnych typów funduszy i programów inwestycyjnych, dostępnych w szerokiej sieci dystrybucji w całej Polsce. PKO TFI zajmuje czołowe miejsce pod względem wartości zarządzanych aktywów na polskim rynku towarzystw funduszy inwestycyjnych. PKO TFI jest nowoczesną organizacją zorientowaną na potrzeby Klientów, która nieustannie rozwija swoją ofertę produktów inwestycyjnych dostosowanych do oczekiwań inwestorów i trendów rynkowych.

Name: The Analyst
Description:
The Analyst provides independent and differentiated equity investment ideas to institutional clients globally.

Founded in 2010, our high-conviction stockpicking, underpinned by rigorous fundamental analysis and domain expertise has allowed us to build a client base comprising some of the world's leading mutual funds and hedge funds.

Please see this page for additional information regarding investment research issued by Analyst Alpha Generation Limited: https://theanalyst.co.uk/disclaimers-n-disclosures

Name: Barwood Capital
Description:
Our purpose is to add value to our investors, our staff, the assets we manage and the communities we serve.
We achieve this by investing responsibly in UK Regional Real Estate and combining nimble capital with the talents of our exceptional people and experienced partners.  

We only invest in UK regional property where there are currently many more opportunities to create value than the London market. From our base in the Midlands, we have an unrivalled regional network of agents and partners. Investors benefit from excellent investment performance as we provide you with access to often off-market opportunities. 

Property Team

Our property team collectively has over 100 years’ experience in the property industry and an expansive network of contacts.  

Our focus is on building strong long term relationships for repeat business with a select group of like-minded, creative and aspirational development managers across the UK.

Investment Team

When you’re looking to invest in the UK’s regional real estate market, few know it better than Barwood Capital (BCL). We specialise in finding and unlocking value in regional property investment opportunities for investors. Whether you are an experienced individual investor, family office, charity or institution, you can achieve outstanding returns as you benefit from our regional expertise and network combined with our agility, intelligence and creativity. We invest alongside our investors, aligning our interests with yours as we turn today’s changing environment into opportunity.

Name: Perpetua Investment Managers (Pty) Ltd
Description: Perpetua Investment Managers (Pty) Ltd is a privately owned investment management firm based in South Africa.  The investment approach pursued by the firm is value-based and this style of investing requires the adoption of a long-term investment horizon.

Name: Angel Effect
Description:
We are a team of successful entrepreneurs, corporate leaders and people who know the impact of creating value together.

Together, we invest in high-impact, early-stage companies led by amazing teams with global mindset all over the world.

Name: Man Varagon
Description:
Man Group is a global alternative investment management firm focused on pursuing outperformance for sophisticated clients via our Systematic, Discretionary and Solutions offerings. Powered by talent and advanced technology, our single and multi-manager investment strategies are underpinned by deep research and span public and private markets, across all major asset classes, with a significant focus on alternatives. Man Group takes a partnership approach to working with clients, establishing deep connections and creating tailored solutions to meet their investment goals and those of the millions of retirees and savers they represent.

Headquartered in London, we manage $178.2 billion* and operate across multiple offices globally. Man Group plc is listed on the London Stock Exchange under the ticker EMG.LN and is a constituent of the FTSE 250 Index. * As at 30 June 2024

Further information can be found at www.man.com

Name: Al Masar Investments
Description:
Founded in 2016 and based in Abu Dhabi, Al Masar Investments is a long-term private family office tasked with conserving and growing multigenerational wealth. Our mandate spans a globally diversified portfolio across Investments, Real Estate, and Hospitality, guided by governed discipline, operational acumen, and multi-generational stewardship.
 
With vision-led strategy and proactive approach to investment, we are long-term collaborators to our stakeholders—creating value through innovation, collaboration, and mindful risk-taking. We view every asset as a building block for future legacies and continuously invest in people, infrastructure, and world connectivity to create resilient returns in an evolving global world.

At Al Masar Investments, we are shaping tomorrow—today. With every decision, we honor the past, embrace the present, and invest in a future that reflects the values and aspirations of generations to come.

Name: Assarain Group of Companies
Description:
A glance at  Assarain Group "SSW Group" 

With macro aspects such as industrial progress, economic development and customer centricity at the helm, the Assarain Group of Companies (part of the SSW Group) completes its’ 44-year old tenure this year. A legacy in the history of Omani Industrial growth in the true sense. 

Started in 1975 and headquartered in Muscat, Oman, the group has a global reputation for its strong values and for growing multi-fold. Over the years, the group has grown leaps and bounds from a trading company to one of the most renowned conglomerates in the Sultanate. 

Today, the Assarain Group houses more than twenty daughter companies across distinct industries such as Manufacturing; Construction Maintenance and Property; Retail and Consumer Services, and Commercial Wholesale. The sheer plethora of the organization’s services is a testimony to one of its key values among the many diversity. 

It is known that an organization’s workplace values set the tone for the company’s culture and that they identify what an organization, as a whole, cares about. 

Our values reverberate through our task force and ensure that a common purpose and understanding helps build great working relationships among internal and external stakeholders. More importantly, our ethics and practices ensure that we strive and achieve excellence in the dynamic and vulnerable market conditions prevailing across economies today. 

Assarain’s existing businesses across diverse sectors are individually renowned for their business practices in the Omani and international business community, opening up gateways for partnerships, franchisees, expansion and more. 

Growing from strength to strength, the group has flourished and aims to continue progressing with its vision and mission at the crux of it all.

Name: PH&N Institutional
Description:
PH&N Institutional is among Canada’s most established institutional asset managers, with a long-standing reputation for distinctive active management and a focus on providing high-quality service. From offices across the country, we serve pension plans, non-profit organizations, and other institutional investors. We offer a full spectrum of asset classes and investment strategies through pooled and segregated mandates. PH&N Institutional investment professionals are committed to providing each client with a solution tailored specifically to their individual objectives, needs, and risk tolerance.

PH&N Institutional is the institutional business division of RBC Global Asset Management Inc., an indirect, wholly-owned subsidiary of Royal Bank of Canada.

Subscribe to PH&N Investment Perspectives newsletter: 
http://institutional.phn.com/newsletter

For important disclosures:
http://www.rbc.com/legal/

Name: Pragma
Description:
We are a brazilian independent wealth management team with a specific focus on advising a carefully chosen group of families and foundations in effectively managing their portfolios across diverse asset classes. Our primary objective is to safeguard and grow the wealth of our clients who align with our values and place their trust in our expertise and investment acumen.

We can best be described as a fully outsourced investment office (OCIO). Our responsibilities include developing investment guidelines, allocating assets, and selecting the best managers for our clients.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Somos uma equipe independente brasileira de gestão de recursos focada em aconselhar um seleto grupo de famílias e fundações na gestão de seus portfólios financeiros. Nosso foco é na preservação e crescimento de seu patrimônio, alinhados a suas crenças e valores, e honrando a confiança depositada em nossa experiência e capacidade de selecionar os melhores investimentos.

Assim como um outsourced chief-investment officer (OCIO), desenvolvemos mandatos de investimentos, definimos a alocação dos ativos e selecionamos os melhores gestores para nossos clientes, co-investindo com estes gestores sempre que possível.

Name: Exa Capital
Description: Founded in 2024, Exa Capital emerged with the purpose of transforming the alternative investment landscape in Brazil. With a disciplined investment strategy, we balance risks and opportunities to maximize long-term value for our investors. Led by Pedro Mesquita, our team stands out for its vast experience in building businesses in the Brazilian capital markets and has a strong track record of involvement in major transactions across Latin America, with a focus on sectors such as sports, infrastructure, agribusiness, real estate, healthcare, retail, and others.

Name: Bridgepath Capital
Description:
We are a licenced portfolio manager (Licence no PM001/20). We are regulated by the Registrar of Financial Institutions (Reserve Bank of Malawi). 

We provide investment management and financial advisory services. 

We are on 1st Floor Development House (106), Blantyre. We can be reached on + 265 1 828 355 or info@bridgepathcapitalmw.com. Contact us today to see how we can assist on your most pressing challenges.

Name: Trans-Canada Capital
Description:
Trans-Canada Capital Inc. (TCC) is an asset management firm specializing in innovative investment strategies for investors. 

Since 2009, the team has successfully managed the pension assets of Air Canada, one of the largest corporate pension plans in the country. Over the years, we have earned an enviable reputation by generating superior returns through strategies focusing on alpha generation in a rigorous risk-controlled framework. 

With approx. C$30 billion in assets under management (inclusive of leverage), more than 100 investment professionals based in Montreal and Toronto, and a complete range of alternative solutions, TCC is well positioned to meet the needs of institutional investors seeking consistent returns.

Name: Bogart Wealth
Description:
Bogart Wealth is an independent, fee-only wealth management firm guiding corporate executives, professionals, and families on their paths to and throughout retirement.  Our approach is to fully understand your dreams - not just your “risk profile” - and then to present you with the options that best serve you, unfettered by the restrictions and agendas of a big institution.  

As a Registered Investment Advisor (RIA), Bogart Wealth is held to a fiduciary standard, which requires placing client interests ahead of our own. The firm’s boutique size further enables a focus on providing exceptional client service. 

Our services include:
•	Retirement Planning
•	Investment Management
•	Tax Planning & Tax Strategizing
•	Roth Conversion Analysis
•	Cash Flow Planning
•	Estate Planning
•	Multi-Generational Planning
•	Social Security Optimization
•	Pension Lump Sum vs. Annuity Analysis
•	Specialized NUA Analysis

Please see important disclosures from Bogart Wealth here: https://bogartwealth.com/important-disclosure-information/ 

Neither third-party rankings nor recognitions by unaffiliated rating services, publications, or media, nor any amount of prior experience or success should be construed by a client or prospective client as a guarantee that the client will experience a certain level of results. No ranking or recognition should be construed as an endorsement by any past or current client of the investment professional or Bogart Wealth. Name: Apposite Capital
Description:
Apposite Capital is an independent investment firm focused exclusively on Healthcare.

The firm operates at the small end of the private equity market, providing both capital and expertise to those businesses offering ‘disruptive’ models that aim to improve or reduce the cost of care provision and which have the potential of becoming market leaders. 

Apposite has an in-depth sector knowledge covering key aspects of the healthcare industry internationally coupled with local insights, an exceptional network and an entrepreneurial mindset which it applies to drive the growth of its portfolio companies.

Apposite was created in 2006 and is headquartered in London, UK.

Vision:
We have an ambition and vision to be the go-to healthcare PE firm in Europe.  What drives us on is a deep-seated belief in doing good for society. We want to help as many patients as possible receive the highest level of healthcare. By investing in innovative companies who share our passion we can have a meaningful impact on people’s lives.

Values & Working at Apposite:
To achieve this we have incredible drive and ambition coupled with a real compassion and empathy for each other and our external partners.  Above all we take incredible pride in our work which is carried out with the up most transparency and openness.

We are a small team who all share the same entrepreneurial spirit. 

The French language has a fantastic phrase to describe the Apposite team which is “esprit de corps”.  There is a real care for individuals and the “human touch” is never far from our minds. Because we have an open and trusting environment, we allow individuals a high degree of freedom and flexibility to carry out their work.  
Talk to anyone in the team and you will discover their passion and knowledge of healthcare runs deep.  
What we do matters, and we play an essential part in improving healthcare today and for the future.
