Name: Brompton Funds
Description: Brompton Funds is an experienced investment management firm specializing in income and growth-oriented solutions, including exchange-traded funds, split share funds, and other TSX-listed investment vehicles. For over 25 years, Brompton has been providing unique, thoughtfully designed alternative investments with a focus on low-cost, performance-driven diversification strategies.  Brompton continues to innovate with unique, proven strategies with many being “Canadian-first” investment solutions.  We prioritize our investors’ success by fostering transparency, aligning interests, and upholding high standards of corporate governance.

Name: Yorkville Asset Management
Description:
Founded in 2010, Yorkville Asset Management began operations by way of a joint venture between Hussein Amad and Hailus Financial Group Ltd. (formerly Heritage Financial Group Ltd.). The premise in establishing Yorkville was to have an unbiased commitment to our clients’ success with a strong commitment to risk management. Offering private wealth solutions to clients with accounts of $1 million or more, Yorkville now has approximately $3 billion in assets under management and administration in assets across a diversified range of securities, products, and asset classes. 

We are a focused independent investment management firm, providing clients intimate access to our portfolio management team. Our portfolio management team is accompanied by our leading customer service and sales group, committed to ensuring that our clients receive the dependable, clear, and significant counsel they need to make informed investment decisions. 

Yorkville has expanded from its Toronto head office to offices in Ottawa and London, in addition to a significant presence in Calgary and Vancouver.

Name: Silk Route Ventures
Description:
Silk Route Ventures is a forward-thinking investment company dedicated to fostering strategic partnerships and ventures across a diverse range of sectors. Since our establishment in 2014, we have evolved from our roots as an Export and Trading firm to hold an extensive portfolio in Manufacturing, Plantation, Agri-tourism, Health & Wellness and CPG & retail sectors.

Our approach to investment is guided by four core values and principles:

>Synergy: Facilitating cooperation and unlocking synergistic potential.
>Scalability: Prioritizing rapid and sustainable growth opportunities.
>Innovation: Championing unique, novel, and differentiated solutions.
>Regeneration: Going beyond sustainability by committing to give back more than we take.

At Silk Route Ventures, we are dedicated to expanding our existing ventures while actively seeking new investment opportunities and strategic partnerships in alignment with our key values. With a growth-oriented mindset, we strive to contribute to a prosperous future for our partners, clients, and the global community.

Name: BGH Capital
Description:
Founded in 2017 by Robin Bishop, Ben Gray and Simon Harle, BGH Capital is an independent firm, owned and managed by its founding partners and headquartered in Melbourne, Australia. The Founding Partners have extensive investment experience and a demonstrated ability to build leading investment businesses.

BGH Capital Fund I had a final close of approximately A$2.6 billion in May 2018 and is now fully deployed. BGH Capital Fund II achieved final close in October 2022 at A$3.6 billion. This represents the largest private equity fund focused on Australia and New Zealand.

Name: MS&AD Ventures
Description: MS&AD Ventures is an early stage venture fund looking broadly at technology companies in Fintech, InsurTech, AI, IOT, Big Data and Cybersecurity.

Name: Hyperion Asset Management Limited
Description:
Hyperion is a multi-award winning Global and Australian equities fund manager based in Australia which aims to outperform over rolling five-year periods. 

Hyperion manages quality equity portfolios for:
•	retail and wholesale investors with a long-term investment horizon of a minimum of five years;
•	financial advisory practices helping their clients’ wealth grow; and
•	institutional investors such as government investment funds, large superannuation funds, industry funds, insurance offices and family offices.

Our investment process is focused on finding the highest-quality growing listed businesses that we believe can produce investment out-performance for clients over rolling five+ year periods.

The portfolios we create are concentrated and benchmark insensitive.

In 2023, AFMA named Hyperion the Best Australian Small Companies Manager. In 2021, Morningstar and Money Management named Hyperion as Australian Fund Manager of the Year. 

Hyperion neither provided nor was  given compensation in relation to the above-mentioned awards. Disclaimers specific to each award can be viewed at: https://www.hyperion.com.au/awards-and-ratings

Name: HydrogenOne Capital LLP
Description: HydrogenOne is the first London-listed hydrogen fund investing in clean hydrogen for a positive environmental impact.  The Company was launched in 2021 with an investment objective to deliver an attractive level of capital growth by investing in a diversified portfolio of hydrogen and complementary hydrogen focused assets.  INEOS Energy is a strategic investor in HydrogenOne. The Company is listed on the London Stock Exchange's main market (ticker code: HGEN).  The Company is an Article 9 climate impact fund with an ESG policy integrated in investment decisions and asset monitoring.

Name: ACTIAM
Description: Since last year, ACTIAM, has become part of Cardano. As of June 1st, 2023, the ACTIAM brand will gradually disappear. We will join forces under a single name. With a single mission.

Name: Right Horizons Wealth
Description:
Right Horizons Wealth is a SEBI-registered and trusted name in Wealth Management and Financial Planning, founded in 2003 to help individuals and families achieve true financial freedom. With 22 years of expertise, ₹3000+ Cr AUM, and a strong presence across Bengaluru, Mumbai, Delhi, Chennai, Pune, Coimbatore, Kolkata, and Dubai, we deliver holistic financial solutions tailored to your life goals.

Our services include personal financial planning, portfolio management, family office services, and wealth advisory. We specialise in designing tax-efficient strategies and deploying risk-adjusted investment approaches that balance growth and stability. Whether you are a professional, entrepreneur, NRI, or UHNI family, our solutions are structured to simplify wealth, preserve legacy, and create sustainable growth.

Led by industry veteran Anil Rego (Founder & CEO) and a team of 70+ professionals, we combine deep market expertise with a global perspective, while staying rooted in Indian regulations and investor needs. Transparency, unbiased advice, respect, and sustainability are at the core of everything we do.

At Right Horizons, we go beyond investments, we align your financial roadmap with your aspirations, ensuring wealth becomes a tool to secure your future and your family’s legacy. Partner with us and experience clarity, confidence, and long-term financial success.

Name: VCA | Asset Management

Name: Riverbend Energy Group
Description:
Riverbend Energy Group is a leading private investment firm focused on the U.S. energy sector. We deploy capital across three core verticals – natural resources, energy transition, and power generation – executing targeted strategies that align with long-term value creation.

Since our founding in 2003, Riverbend has built a cycle-tested track record across multiple commodity and financial environments, returning nearly $3 billion to partners through seven successful portfolio monetizations. We currently manage more than $2 billion in assets across our active strategies.

Committed to investing in tomorrow's energy today, Riverbend provides its partners with an all-of-the-above solution to energy investing. Our expertise spans direct ownership of oil & gas operated, non-operated, and mineral and royalty interests, investing in businesses enabling the energy transition, and the acquisition and enhancement of thermal power generation assets. 

Backed by leading institutional and retail capital partners, Riverbend is led by a senior team with deep operational, technical, and financial expertise. Our disciplined approach and long-standing industry relationships continue to generate differentiated deal flow and compelling returns for our investors.

Os Fundos de Renda Fixa (em especial atrelados à inflação), Crédito Privado, Ações e Multiestratégia sempre estiveram presentes gerando essas soluções e vêm se desenvolvendo junto com o mercado desde então. Em 2021 adicionamos mais uma área de atuação: Imobiliário.
Ao longo desses mais de 20 anos de atuação, a Icatu Vanguarda vem agregando valor para os mais variados tipos de investidores, seja através dos fundos de investimentos tradicionais (abertos ou exclusivos) ou fundos previdenciários. Description:
SROA Capital has leveraged its investment acumen, operations know-how, unique in-house construction capabilities, and seamless state-of-the-art technology to expand its self-storage portfolio throughout the Midwest, Northeast, and Southeastern United States.

In 2013, the firm was founded by real estate entrepreneur Benjamin Macfarland in partnership with Sidney Kohl (co-founder of Kohl’s Department Stores) and James Jenkins (co-founder of Alliant). 

Since then, SROA Capital has grown to approximately 450 self-storage facilities totaling roughly 22 million rentable square feet, SROA Capital continues to grow by identifying undercapitalized and mismanaged self-storage assets in high-growth markets. By applying its institutionalized management systems of: In-house physical plant improvements, real-time lease pricing, aggressive branding, SEO and PPC advertising, automated A/R, ecommerce payment capabilities, proprietary revenue management software, and centralized customer care center for service & leasing. SROA Capital uses its fully integrated asset management systems to increase same-store growth and boost net operating income.

Name: FemHealth Ventures
Description:
FemHealth Ventures invests in groundbreaking innovators in women’s health, focusing on drugs, devices, diagnostics, and digital applications. We created the three-category framework that defines women’s health as conditions appearing only in women, mostly in women, and differently in women.
 
First published in 2019 as part of the FemHealth Framework ( 2019 FemHealth Ventures), this concept has since been widely adopted across the industry, and we are excited to see its growing impact in advancing innovation and improving outcomes for women.

Description:
Deetken Impact is a Canadian impact asset manager with US$150 million in assets across five funds. We strive to improve the quality of life of millions of people and preserve our planet by mobilizing and investing gender-smart capital in impact businesses in Latin America and the Caribbean.  

We support companies that meaningfully improve lives in under-served communities, vitalize economies, empower women, and strengthen climate resilience. Our hands-on approach allows us to provide not only the financial resources that impact businesses in the region need in the region but also also the technical assistance and ongoing accompaniment required to ensure long-term growth, sustainability and success.

It acts as a project developer and investor, developing projects for utility-scale renewable energy installations, from solar photovoltaic to biomethane and energy storage, and has over 2 GW of renewable energy installations in the authorization phase. 
It also develops energy-efficient infrastructures, such as high-tech data centers, designed to operate at the highest standards of efficiency and sustainability. Ingenium manages the entire project lifecycle comprehensively, from greenfield to ready-to-build, through technical teams and fully integrated in-house services.

Committed to a sustainable future, it also invests in venture capital, promoting innovative solutions in energy efficiency and green technologies.

#RenewableEnergy #EnergyTransition #UtilityScale #SolarPV #Biomethane #EnergyStorage #DataCenters #GreenInvestments

Liechtenstein Group is an international group of companies owned by the Foundation Prince Liechtenstein. In our core verticals – Agriculture & Food and Forestry – we support and grow companies, some of which have been owned by the Princely Family of Liechtenstein for many centuries. Through our activities, we aim to add value to the sustainable development of our core sectors. 

We promote resource-efficient production of high-quality food and active management of climate-fit and biodiverse forests. On our own land, we develop and operate renewable energy projects and, for many years, we have stewarded the Group's real estate assets in Vienna, including several historical buildings. 

Across all these operations, we harness the wealth of experience and expertise cultivated within our companies over generations. 

The Group’s portfolio includes companies in Austria and Germany, such as THE LIECO COMPANY, the Wilfersdorf Estate & Forestry Operations , Kalwang Forest, and Vienna Real Estate, which includes the Liechtenstein Garden Palace and City Palace. Additionally, among others, the Group owns RiceTec, a leading U.S. hybrid rice seed company, and Valle del Guadiana, one of Europe's biggest avocado producers in Spain.

The firm’s assets under management are invested on behalf of university endowments, sovereign wealth funds, outsourced CIO’s, and pension plans from North America, Europe, and the Middle East. Our team consists of a diverse and experienced group of investment and non-investment professionals who are based in close proximity to our key markets. Our team has built out a highly successful track record by implementing a disciplined fundamental research approach that underpins our active investment strategy in emerging and frontier markets.

FIM Partners has offices in London and Dubai. It is authorised and regulated by the FCA (UK) and DFSA (UAE) and is registered as an investment advisor with the United States Securities and Exchange Commission.

Name: UTIMCO
Description:
In order to enhance the process by which the various Funds' investments are governed and managed, the Board of Regents of The University of Texas System on March 1, 1996 contracted with The University of Texas/Texas A&M Investment Management Company ("UTIMCO") to invest funds under its fiduciary control. UTIMCO is a 501(c)(3) corporation modeled after investment management companies organized by Harvard, Princeton, Stanford, and Duke Universities to invest their respective assets. It is the first investment corporation formed by a public university system and oversees investments in the Permanent University Fund, the Permanent Health Fund, the Long Term Fund, and Intermediate Term Fund, and other assets.

UTIMCO is governed by a nine-member Board of Directors, consisting of at least three members of the UT System Board, four independent directors with substantial background and expertise in investments appointed by the UT System Board, and two members appointed by the Texas A&M System Board, one of whom must have a substantial background and expertise in investments. UTIMCO's governance structure is designed both to preserve ultimate regental control of investments for fiduciary purposes and to increase the level of expertise in the governance of investments. Day-to-day management of funds is delegated to UTIMCO's employees, who provide a full range of investment management services exclusively to the UT System Board.

Name: Mentor Me Africa
Description:
Our Purpose

Mentor Me was born out of a desire to alleviate the developmental deficit plaguing Africa, particularly in the wake of an ever increasing youth population that has limited prospects of meaningful advancement through the traditional avenues of primary, secondary, vocational and tertiary education and onto employment. The twin headwinds of plummeting school standards and irrelevant educational curricula have served to undermine the future prospects of the youth to fend for themselves in a time when entrepreneurship presents the best hope for alleviating the strain on local economies of hordes of vibrant but frustrated unemployed citizens.

Mentor Me will be the conduit for innovative and sustainable upliftment of marginalised communities through enterprise.

Our Vision

To realise sustainable social and economic impact at depth and scale.

Our Mission

The Mentor Me mission has 3 elements:

1. Identify the key factors inhibiting MSME growth from a holistic (i.e. ecosystem) perspective
2. Build stakeholder collaboration for entrepreneurship support
3. Promote innovative risk-reduction strategies for MSME finance (mainstream supply chain finance as catalyst for MSME development)

Our approach

Holistic, collaborative and laser-focused on risk-reduction.

Name: Skarbiec TFI
Description:
Skarbiec TFI SA powstało w 1997 roku, jako piąte towarzystwo funduszy inwestycyjnych w Polsce. Jesteśmy licencjonowaną instytucją finansową, zarządzamy funduszami inwestycyjnymi i portfelami przestrzegając zasad ograniczania ryzyka inwestycyjnego. Oferta Towarzystwa uwzględnia fundusze dostosowane do różnorodnych potrzeb inwestorów zarówno pod względem oczekiwanej stopy zwrotu, jak i poziomu akceptowanego ryzyka inwestycyjnego. 

Obecnie Skarbiec TFI SA zarządza 46 funduszami i subfunduszami, w których zgromadzono aktywa o wartości ponad 15 mld złotych. Skarbiec TFI jako pierwszy wprowadził na rynek kilkanaście innowacji produktowych - w tym pierwszy fundusz parasolowy, pierwszy fundusz inwestycyjny zamknięty czy pierwszy fundusz rynku pieniężnego. Misją Towarzystwa jest wniesienie znacznego wkładu w rozwój rynku funduszy inwestycyjnych w Polsce oraz zdobycie znaczącego w nim udziału. Pragniemy to osiągnąć, świadcząc usługi na wysokim poziomie, oferując innowacyjne produkty. Filozofia inwestycyjna Towarzystwa zakłada aktywne i zdyscyplinowane zarządzanie portfelami funduszy oraz aktywami Klientów w ramach usługi asset management, według ściśle określonych reguł. Innowacyjne podejście Skarbca TFI do zmieniających się trendów rynkowych pozwala Towarzystwu dotrzeć do szerokich grup Inwestorów.

Name: Mıstaçoğlu Holding
Description:
Mıstaçoğlu Şirketler Grubu, başarılarla dolu ticari hayatına 1994 yılında telekomünikasyon ürünleri ticareti ile başlamıştır. Grubun amiral gemisi konumundaki Mobiltel İletişim Hizmetleri A.Ş ile, dünyanın önde gelen mobil telefon markalarının yurt çapında dağıtımını gerçekleştirmektedir. Bugün Apple, Samsung, Xiaomi, Poco, Oppo, RealMe, Vivo, Huawei, Honor, TCL, Alcatel, Infinix, Tecno, LG, General Mobile, Reeder, Casper, Sony, Hometech, Zyxel, TPLink, ZTE, JBL, Jabra, S-Link, Soultech ve Türk Telekom gibi dünya devi marka ve üreticilerle yapmış olduğu işbirliktelikleriyle, Türkiye’nin en fazla uluslararası markayı çatısı altında bulunduran teknoloji firmalarından biri olmayı başarmıştır.

Grup bünyesinde yer alan MBX İletişim A.Ş, Samsung’un kurumsal satış kanalı distribütörü olarak kurumsal pazarda birçok önemli projeye imza atmaktadır. Blink Bilişim Hizmetleri A.Ş 2013 yılında Mobil Takip Sistemleri alanında faaliyet göstermeye başlamıştır. 2016 yılı itibariyle teknolojinin akıllı güvenlik sistemlerine yönelmesiyle, Blink bir çok uluslararası marka ile iş birliğine giderek kamu ve özel sektörde yenilikçi ve öncü güvenlik sistemlerini projelendirmeye başlamıştır. Blink de kısa sürede kurumsal alanda faaliyet gösteren, araç takip ve araç içi güvenlik sistemleri başta olmak üzere, sektörünün lider firmalarından biri haline gelmiştir.

Mıstaçoğlu Teknoloji AŞ ise Türk Telekom’un kurumsal satış iş ortaklığını üstlenmiştir. Kendi faaliyet alanında lider konumdadır. Mıstaçoğlu Bilişim AŞ İstanbul EMAAR AVM içerisinde yer alan Samsung deneyim mağazasının işletmeciliğini yürütmektedir. Mıstaçoğlu Grubu telekomünikasyon, teknoloji ve perakende faaliyetlerine, gayrımenkul geliştirme alanındaki yatırımlarını ve işletmecilik kimliğini de katarak bugün 500’ü aşkın çalışanı, 500 Milyon USD’ye yaklaşan cirosu ile faaliyet gösterdiği tüm sektörlerde lider firmalar arasına girme başarısını göstermiştir.

Name: ACACIA INVERSIÓN SGIIC, S.A.
Description:
A) Nuestra historia
Acacia nace de la necesidad de un grupo de inversores de gestionar su patrimonio ante la inexistencia de una oferta de servicios patrimoniales atractiva. En 1997, deciden crear una firma cuyo objetivo es cuidar el patrimonio de sus inversores como si fuera el suyo propio, constituyendo Acacia Inversión como Sociedad Gestora de Carteras. En 2010, evoluciona a SGIIC para poder ofrecer una gestión patrimonial integral.

B) Servicio integral: Dos caras de la misma moneda

1) Asesoramiento
Ponemos a tu disposición nuestros expertos y las últimas herramientas para acompañarte en la toma de decisiones financieras y patrimoniales, todo ello a la medida de tu situación personal, de una forma cercana, coherente y ausente de conflictos de interés.

2) Inversión
Apoyados en profesionales con amplia formación y experiencia en los mercados financieros, un histórico contrastado y una filosofía de inversión única (alocación value), te proponemos soluciones optimizadas para tu patrimonio: fondos de Acacia Inversión, carteras de fondos internacionales, estrategias….

C) Nuestra esencia: más de 25 años cuidando patrimonios

1) Co-inversión
¿No te ofrece mayor garantía y tranquilidad saber que tu dinero está junto al de los socios, profesionales y la propia entidad que te lo gestiona? Solo lo que es bueno para nosotros, es bueno para nuestros clientes.

2) Solvencia
Con la fortaleza de una compañía con más de 25 años de experiencia, y con la capacidad de unos profesionales con amplia experiencia en mercados financieros y certificaciones que avalan sus conocimientos (Acacia Certificada).

3) Cercanía
Frente al modelo tradicional, en el que existen múltiples intermediarios entre el cliente y el mercado, nosotros hemos roto eslabones innecesarios para acercar los mercados a nuestros inversores, simplificando y optimizando la gestión de su patrimonio. Somos una Banca Privada sin Banqueros Privados, tendrás a tu lado a especialistas, a Gestores de Inversiones.

Name: YIELCO Investments
Description:
YIELCO is an independent global private markets investment specialist, focused on private equity, infrastructure, and private debt. Our core objective is to generate attractive and sustainable returns for our investors. YIELCO manages commitments exceeding EUR 10 billion from a variety of institutional investors, including pension plans, insurance companies, and family offices.

YIELCO is led by experienced investment professionals who have been supporting institutional investors for over 15 years. Based on this expertise, YIELCO has built a compelling track record and developed a range of innovative investment programs, characterized by attractive conditions and strong alignment of interests with investors. Through diversified multi-manager and co-investment portfolios, as well as bespoke solutions, institutional investors gain access to YIELCO's sophisticated investment strategies, offering attractive return opportunities.

Name: Nordic Eye Venture & Growth Capital
Description:
Nordic Eye is a Venture & Growth Capital firm based in Copenhagen with representation in UK, US & Switzerland. We invest in carefully selected and mainly Nordic early-growth companies in the tech and lifestyle domain. We look for ambitious companies with high scalability and innovative business models. In addition to funding, our portfolio companies benefit from access to our talent, global network, and business relationships that can help validate their solutions and accelerate success in the market. 

Nordic Eye is a driving force behind innovation in the Nordics and California's technology and lifestyle space. Our global team aligns our interests with those of our investors and partners for lasting impact.

Name: Elystar Investment Management Private Limited
Description: Elystar Investment Management is a SEBI-registered, innovation-driven investment advisory firm offering wealth management solutions for HNIs and institutions. Please visit elystarinvest.com to get started.

Name: Inversimply
Description:
Inversimply es la empresa líder en planificación financiera en España, ofreciendo un asesoramiento 360º en todos los aspectos financieros.

Conectamos a nuestros clientes con los mejores consultores financieros y soluciones para optimizar su ahorro e inversión. Nuestro enfoque integral y especializado garantiza una planificación financiera adaptada a cada necesidad, poniendo siempre al cliente en el centro de la estrategia.

Inversimply nace en 2019 para ayudar a las personas a gestionar mejor su dinero con un modelo simple y transparente donde el cliente está en el centro.

¿Qué ofrecemos?

Ahorro-inversión:

- PPAs, PIAS, Unit Linked, Planes de Pensiones y seguros de ahorro de las principales aseguradoras.
- Portfolio de más de 12.700 fondos de inversión.
- Inversión en bolsa a través de bróker internacional.

Servicios de planificación financiera 360º:

- Instrumentos de planificación sucesoria.
- Análisis de las inversiones financieras del cliente.
- Perfiles de riesgo y horizontes temporales asignados a cada objetivo.

Hipotecas:

Asesoramiento hipotecario personalizado, tanto para nueva hipoteca o subrogación con la posibilidad de conseguir los mejores tipos de interés del mercado con las mejores condiciones.

Seguros:

Te damos toda la información que necesitas para mejorar cobertura y precio de tus pólizas de seguros vida, salud, decesos y hogar.

Renting:

Servicio de búsqueda de coches y flotas a través de Notess Renting.

Nuestra misión es que los consultores financieros logren estabilidad económica a largo plazo bajo un esquema de colaboración innovador, transparente y sin una estructura comercial multinivel.

Name: E Squared Investments
Description:

Established through the auspices of the late Allan Gray, we are dedicated to funding responsible entrepreneurs with the intention of creating meaningful employment opportunities to tackle social inequality and enable economic inclusivity. 

We partner with start-ups, incubators, accelerators and investors to nurture entrepreneurial talent and accelerate financial and social returns across all sectors through entrepreneur-friendly, patient capital and post-investment support. 

Ultimately, our vision is to accelerate meaningful opportunities by building impactful South African businesses.

Movido a pessoas.
Por elas, com elas.

Name: CGF GESTION
Description:
CGF GESTION, créée en 2001, est la première société de gestion collective agréée au Sénégal. Elle fait fructifier l’épargne des particuliers et des entreprises en mettant à leur disposition des produits financiers performants ayant reçu l’agrément de l’Autorité des Marchés Financiers de l’Union Monétaire Ouest Africaine (AMF-UMOA).

Nous sommes spécialisés dans la création et la gestion d'Organismes de Placement Collectif en Valeurs Mobilières (OPCVM), de fonds institutionnels ou privés, ainsi que dans la structuration et la gestion de plans d'épargne retraite (PER) à travers lesquels les salariés sont invités à se constituer un capital dans des conditions avantageuses avec le concours de leur employeur.

Nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec nos clients pour fournir des solutions d'investissement et d’épargne sur-mesure adaptées à leurs besoins spécifiques. 

Nos experts en gestion d'actifs financiers sont hautement qualifiés et possèdent une vaste expérience pour assurer une performance optimale de leurs investissements.

Name: PFR TFI S.A.
Description:
PFR Towarzystwo Funduszy Inwestycyjnych S.A. jest częścią Grupy Polskiego Funduszu Rozwoju. Przedmiotem działalności PFR TFI S.A. jest tworzenie funduszy inwestycyjnych i zarządzanie nimi,  reprezentowanie ich wobec osób trzecich.

Razem tworzymy praktyczne rozwiązania dla wspólnego sukcesu i bezpiecznej przyszłości. 

Więcej informacji: www.pfrtfi.pl. Zapytaj o ofertę Grupy PFR: 800 800 120

Description:

Location: Noor AlSalhiya, 5th Floor, AlQibla, Kuwait city

Name: Bibby Line Group
Description:
Bibby Line Group is a diverse, international business. Our sectors include financial services, marine and infrastructure.

Our purpose is to grow the long-term value of the Group. Guided by our shared values, we are custodians of the family business for future generations, creating a diverse Group of innovative companies that develop colleagues, delight customers and give back to communities.

One of the UK’s oldest family owned business we have over 210+ years’ experience of providing personal, responsive and ﬂexible customer solutions.

Our Group’s headquarters are in Liverpool, UK and we are responsible for directing the overall Group strategy as well as providing support to our subsidiaries.

We focus our efforts on four areas to foster the long term sustainability of the Group: Environment, Community, People and Customer.

To deliver excellent customer service, we share a Group set of values that we consider in every decision that we make: Work together, Be better, Be innovative, Trust each other, Do the right thing.

Name: Antipodes
Description:
Antipodes is a diversified investment firm (~A$21bn AUM) with investment teams based in Sydney, London and Melbourne. 

Our investment teams specialise in global and Australian listed equities, credit, infrastructure, and small and mid-cap companies. 

Our expert-driven strategies combine deep fundamental analysis, rigorous research, and a commitment to responsible investing. Each team focuses on delivering long-term value through tailored approaches, ranging from value-based equity investment to income-generating credit strategies and infrastructure asset selection. We aim to provide sustainable, risk-adjusted returns over the medium to long term.

Our performance culture is underpinned by sensible incentives, a focused offering and the outsourcing of non-investment functions to minority partner Pinnacle Investment Management Limited.

For more information or to subscribe for updates please contact invest@antipodes.com

Name: MayTech Global Investments
Description:
Global Growth Investing for Institutions and Individuals. 

MayTech is a 100% independent, employee-owned firm whose focus is on managing global growth portfolios.  We have a deep research culture, with portfolio managers investing globally on average for more than twenty years. Based in New York City, we have a diverse group of institutional and individual investor clients.

Name: CN Investment Division (CNID)
Description:
Established in 1968, the CN Investment Division (the Division), based in Montreal, manages the pension fund of Canadian National Railway (CNR.TO). 

The pension fund is one of the largest single-employer defined benefit pension funds in Canada and holds a long track record of solid performance. Approximately C$18 billion is actively managed in-house by 91 employees for the CN Pension Plan’s approximately 48,800 pensioners and pension plan members. The Division also manages the assets of the CN Pension Plan for Senior Management and the BC Rail Pension Plan. The Division’s culture is nimble, innovative, collaborative and risk-aware. Pensioners are always at the heart of what we do. 
 
CN is a public company and headquartered in Montreal. CN’s 19,500-mile railway network spans Canada and Mid-America, connecting three coasts: the Atlantic, the Pacific and the Gulf of Mexico. CN ships more than 300 million tons of cargo annually.  
 
For more than 100 years, CN has been serving Canada’s economy, from building the country to now moving over $250 billion worth of its customers’ goods annually. If you eat it, use it or drive it, chances are that CN moves it.

Name: L&B Realty Advisors, LLP

Since 1965, L&B has provided real estate investment management services to institutional investors and family offices. With $9 billion under management, L&B has a proven track record of successfully acquiring, managing, and disposing real estate on behalf of our clients.

Name: TransAsia Private Capital Limited
Description:
TransAsia Private Capital Limited (TA) was established in 2013 and is a Hong Kong and Singapore based Asia focused private debt middle market direct lending asset manager licensed by the Hong Kong SFC and the Singapore MAS.

TA manages AUM across an open-ended short-dated trade finance strategy (Fund I), an open-ended supply chain/value chain financing strategy (Fund II) and a closed-ended asset backed term loan strategy (Fund III). 

Our core capabilities are in Loan Origination, Loan Underwriting and Loan Servicing underpinned by a solid asset-liability management culture.

Name: Coliseum Capital Management, LLC
Description: Coliseum Capital Management, LLC, founded in 2005, is a private investment firm located in Rowayton, CT, that invests with a long-term orientation in undervalued companies.

Name: Phoenix Advisers

The firm is founded by professionals with decades of experience advising on complex transactions and Investment advisory & management. Having the valuable perspective of both ‘buy’ & ‘sell’ side negotiations across multiple transactions, the team at ‘Phoenix Advisers’ has served as shareholders representatives for some of the country’s largest corporates and transactions in the Real Estate and Education sectors. With a time tested philosophy of achieving ‘win-win propositions’, ‘Phoenix Advisers’ aims to generate long term value for its clients. Follow us on Twitter @fund_phoenix

The group maintains fully fledged offices in London, Dubai and Cyprus, with more than 100 professionals structuring and managing investments in the UK and Europe for the benefit of our clients.'

Name: Black Bull Investors Club
Description:
The Black Bull Investors Club es el escenario premium que reúne a los principales Single & Multifamily Offices, Familias Empresarias, Inversionistas privados e institucionales, Asesores de inversión, Administradores de activos, Firmas de Venture Capital y Private Equity, Empresas Fintech, Consultores y jugadores clave de Latinoamérica.

Nuestro exclusivo y privado club ofrece un ambiente íntimo e informal para llevar a cabo discusiones relevantes y desarrollar contactos únicos entre líderes y empresarios. Nuestro objetivo principal es el de  ayudar a nuestros miembros a generar oportunidades de negocio, de inversión y de diversificación de portafolios que resulten en la creación de riqueza y crecimiento económico.
Además de contribuir a la creación y profesionalización de family offices a nivel global.

Beneficios:
* Virtual Meetings: Fomentamos el intercambio de ideas, analizamos tendencias, hablamos de retos y oportunidades para el sector de inversiones.

* Club events: En nuestro PWMG Summits nos reunimos de manera presencial con la finalidad de discutir temas relevantes bajo un formato interactivo único y para reforzar relaciones a través de un networking íntimo e informal entre líderes del mercado.
 
* 1-1 Business Meetings: Conectamos a nuestros miembros a través de reuniones 1 a 1 con la finalidad de ayudarles a generar oportunidades de negocio.

* Project viewer: A través de nuestra plataforma digital, nuestros miembros pueden promover, exponer y compartir proyectos, reportes, artículos y noticias relevantes y compartir temas de interés.

* Black Bull News: En nuestra sección de noticias, nuestros miembros tienen acceso a información relevante, así mismo, los invitamos a publicar artículos y reportes relevantes de interés general.

* Members Directory: Ayudamos exclusivamente a nuestros miembros a reforzar su red de contactos a través de nuestra plataforma digital en la que todos tienen acceso al directorio global.
Location: Ciudad de México, Ciudad de México

Name: Claridge Inc.
Description:
Claridge is a private investment firm headquartered in Montreal, Canada. Established in 1987, the company represent the interests of the Stephen Bronfman family and is actively involved in the management of a diverse portfolio of investments in private equity, hedge funds, public equities, and real estate. We are a growth-oriented private equity investor with experience across a variety of economic sectors. Our direct private equity portfolio spans food and restaurants, media and entertainment, real estate, and technology.

Claridge est une société d’investissement privé basée à Montréal, au Canada. We have built in-house capabilities for Value-add / Special Situations Investments for Office RE India. We have partnered with leading Developers for co-creation of development platforms in Data Center, Office and other RE verticals.
The Founding Team has delivered stellar returns on its portfolio across multiple cycles while managing risks prudently.
The Firm was founded by Mitesh Agrawal in 2021 after a 16 year stint at New Vernon Capital (CIO - Real Estate).

The Fund Advisory Council (Independent & Non-Executive) comprises of industry stalwarts including Mr. Akshay Chudasama (Managing Partner - Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas & Co.) and Mr. Priyaranjan Kumar (Ex-MD at Alvarium Partners & Ex-MD at Cushman & Wakefield)
In a short span, we have successfully closed some of the most innovative and exciting deals in Indian real estate alongside marquee investors and partners. We were instrumental in closing India's first successful insolvency route acquisition of a Grade A commercial estate in prime New Delhi.
We aim to build an integrated full stack real estate investment services firm. Our bespoke approach and deep relationships allow us to forge innovative partnerships spanning the entire value chain of real estate private equity.
#Commercial Real Estate #Value-add #Distressed Investing #India Real Estate #RE Fund Manager # Data Centers #REITs #Tech Parks #India Asset Manager #India Asset Management

Welcome to ETS, the forefront of intelligent investing. Where cutting-edge artificial intelligence algorithms help you navigate the complexities of the financial markets.

Description:
Heylen Group is a Belgian industrial holding company that invests in ambitious companies and entrepreneurs. It uses a buy-build-and-hold strategy in which innovation, internationalization and operational excellence are central.

Heylen Group was founded 21 years ago by a born entrepreneur, Wim Heylen. Thanks to a clear vision and the right people, Heylen Group has grown into a holding company of 35 companies, which are active in 15 different sectors and approximately 3,000 employees. We envision a prosperous Africa, and our businesses are strategically aligned to be catalysts for transformative change.

Name: Small Business Investor Alliance
Description:
The Small Business Investor Alliance is the association of senior investment professionals focused on the lower middle market whose members represent the entire private capital ecosystem. It is an alliance for professional fellowship, business opportunities, innovation, regulatory expertise, and market data.

Established in 1958, SBIA has been playing a pivotal role in promoting the growth and vitality of the private equity industry for more than 60 years. Our members represent a broad spectrum of the lower middle market, including fund managers, funds in formation, institutional investors, and select service providers. 84% of SBIA member firms are funds or limited partners. SBIA works tirelessly on behalf of our members to advocate for appropriate regulation and smart policy that promotes domestic investment and the growth of small businesses that fuel the American economy.

Name: KMA Group of Companies
Description:
KAUNG MYANMAR AUNG (KMA GROUP) AT A GLANCE

One of Myanmar’s most renowned and respected organizations, the foundations of the group were laid almost 25 years ago.

KMA Group has a broad and diversified portfolio of interests and our associated companies operate across almost all sectors of Myanmar’s economy.

The most familiar Associated Public Companies of KMA Group are CB Bank, Golden Myanmar Airlines, Myanmar Microfinance Bank, CB Securities, CB Insurance, Myanmar Telecom Network, Parami General Hospital, and the Kaytumadi Association. These companies are some of the most well-established and visible organizations in the country, offering high-quality, pioneering services to thousands of clients and customers each day.

In addition, Corporate Entities of KMA Group also includes the KMA Hotels Group, KMA Travel and Tourism, KMA Agriculture and Forestry, KMA Real Estate Development, KMA Shipping, KMA Construction, and KMA Trading.

The KMA Group of Companies and Associated Corporate Entities have long acknowledged their responsibility towards Myanmar and its people. As one of the country’s leading companies, KMA endeavour to set an example to others through actively coordinating positive, timely, and lasting social action from the KMA Foundation and CB-KMA Foundation.

The Ethos of KMA Group

KMA’s values not only determine actions within KMA Group, but also dictate how we perceive developments outside of the group and the conclusions that we draw from them.

●        Responsibility for the environment, for social and economic stability, and for personal actions is of enormous importance to every individual related to KMA Group.

●        KMA’s business philosophy has always been based on an ethos of co-operation where healthy and value based co-existence is inherent in all we do.  By working together harmoniously to achieve our goals, our companies fulfil the essence of KMA’s motto: WIN WIN WIN - A WIN for the company, a WIN for our stakeholders and a WIN for the nation and its people.

Name: STYLE CAPITAL SGR S.p.A.
Description:
STYLE CAPITAL SGR S.p.A.  is an asset management company authorized by the Bank of Italy to provide asset management services and private equity investments. The Company is active since 2007 in the promotion and management of mutual closed-end funds, and currently manages the private equity fund DGPA CAPITAL (€ 110 m managed) and the closed-end fund STYLE CAPITAL (capital commitment of € 126 m). 
STYLE CAPITAL Fund operates in the Lifestyle segment, supporting the growth of SMEs operating in the global market, whose distinguishing features are creativity, design, product quality and inimitability, selective distribution and innovation.  Particular focus is placed on “Fashion” and "Consumer Brands“.
The purpose of the Fund is to invest principally in the equity of Italian SMEs (turnover between € 20 m and € 100 m) or foreign companies, whose core business is strongly linked to the Fashion & Luxury segment, taking majority or minority stakes, through capital increases, share purchases and LBOs.
The Management Company boasts a significant track-record in the target industry; it has supported and is supporting companies and Brands such as Golden Goose, Twin-Set, Sundek, Damiani and Forte_Forte in implementing their development strategies, both domestically and globally.

Name: Stable
Description:
Stable is an investment firm dedicated to helping ambitious Founders build investment firms. We take a strategic partnership approach to investing because we believe the Asset Owner-Founder relationship of the future differs from industry dynamics today. We aim to build a future of shared success between Asset Owners and Founders, with incentives aligned for the long-term. Alignment comes from various structuring approaches including minority stakes and scale capacity. We serve Asset Owners who realize that building the exceptional lies beyond conventional limited partnerships. We back Founders who appreciate that delivering extraordinary performance requires building a great organization.

Stable provides strategic, operational and business building support to the Founders we back alongside significant investment capital. We manage $4.3B across public, private credit, private equity and venture markets globally. Name: Warren Pro
Description:
O mercado de investimentos no Brasil está mudando. Em poucos anos, o brasileiro não contará mais com as instituições tradicionais para investir o seu dinheiro. A figura do gerente de banco será obsoleta. Até mesmo o agente autônomo tradicional estará antiquado. 

Se você trabalha com investimentos, saiba que, para acompanhar a evolução do mercado e as necessidades dos seus próprios clientes, você terá que se adaptar. O trabalho do consultor de investimentos, consolidado em países como os Estados Unidos, já é uma realidade no Brasil e criará uma grande oportunidade no mercado de trabalho. Não estamos falando do agente autônomo tradicional, e sim de um profissional 100% alinhado com o cliente, com poder para oferecer os melhores produtos, com facilidade e sem conflito.

A Warren, corretora de investimentos que está mudando a forma como o brasileiro investe, lançou o seu modelo de distribuição de investimentos via parceiros. Uma iniciativa que oferece  facilidade e transparência para profissionais que querem trabalhar no mercado financeiro de forma independente - e ser bem remunerado por isso.

Name: Grupo Broda
Description:
Grupo Broda es una de las empresas destacadas por la Asociación de Ejecutivos de la provincia de Mendoza. Con un capital humano de más de 200 personas, el grupo se desempeña en distintas unidades de negocios de  gastronomía, real state y servicios financieros entre otros rubros. 
Actualmente, Grupo Broda cuenta con 5 restaurantes en la Ciudad Mendoza:
La Marchigiana, con más de 65 años en el rubro gastronómico. Sus dos locales, ubicados en Palmares Open Mall y Patricias Mendocinas 1550 de Ciudad, deleitan a los clientes con la mejor gastronomía italiana, además de una carta variada y el maridaje de vinos de excelencia.
Nipoti, cadena de restaurantes “atípicamente” italianos, cuenta también con dos locales: uno en Mendoza Plaza Shopping y otro en Palmares. La premisa de Nipoti es ser económico y accesible, con platos italianos con un giro moderno, al cual la gente puede ir a cualquier hora del día, desde el desayuno hasta la cena.
Bosco es el restaurante de Grupo Broda ubicado en un edificio declarado patrimonio arquitectónico de Mendoza: el Golf Club Andino, en el corazón del Parque General San Martín. 
Además el grupo cuenta con Laurino, una unidad dedicada al servicio de catering de excelencia, enfocándose no solo en la comida sino en la organización integral de eventos: sociales, institucionales, deportivos y gubernamentales, entre otros.
Grupo Broda posee también una nave de producción de más de 1000 metros cuadrados donde funciona Supra, firma especializada en gastronomía institucional a través de tres divisiones: salud, grandes operaciones y empresas; diseñada para emplear a más de 300 personas.

Name: Resonance Limited
Description:
Resonance is a social impact property fund manager and a proud B Corp. We create and manage innovative social impact investment funds that deliver financial and targeted social impact.

We provide life-changing housing solutions for people experiencing crisis through our seven residential Property Funds, offering safe, affordable homes with wraparound support through partnerships with our expert housing providers.

These funds enable individuals and families to transition out of homelessness into safe, supportive housing. Five of our funds support people facing housing crisis In addition, we also manage two specialist property funds: the Women in Safe Homes fund, supporting women facing housing exclusion due to domestic abuse or leaving the criminal justice system without a home to go to; and the Resonance Supported Homes Fund, which provides long-term housing solutions for individuals with learning disabilities and autistic people.

Since 2013, our property funds have provided homes for over 4,400 people in 1,350 homes across the UK.

Founded in 2002, we now manage c£440m across 11 impact investment funds, including:

Property Funds – Scaling access to housing for vulnerable groups, particularly those with learning disabilities, women escaping domestic abuse and people experiencing homelessness.

Impact Labs – We innovate and provide tailored investment to social enterprises tackling poverty in the communities they serve. We also support community-led organisations to develop and own local assets—helping to revitalise neighbourhoods, build local resilience, and create long-term social value.
In addition to our investment funds, we have an advisory service that works with social enterprises, helping them to grow their impact and raise capital.

Name: Etkin Proje Yönetim Danışmanlık
Description:
2007 yılında İstanbul’da kurulan Etkin Proje, Ar-Ge projelerinin yönetimi ve finansmanı konularında uçtan uca kaliteli hizmet prensibi ile faaliyet gösteren bir danışmanlık şirketidir.

Kuruluş amacı, Türk firmalarının ulusal ve uluslararası Ar-Ge fonlarından, vergisel ve mali teşviklerden faydalanmaları, üniversite-sanayi işbirliğinin kurulması, firmaların teknokent gibi alanlara taşınması ve ülkemizin global rekabetçiliğine katkı sağlanabilmesidir.

Bugüne kadar Etkin Proje tarafından hazırlanan projeler ile yurtiçi hibe ve kredi desteklerine yapılan başvurularda başarı oranı %90’ın üzerinde gerçekleşmiştir. 250 Milyon Dolar’ın üzerinde toplam proje büyüklüğüne sahip olan projelerin yönetimine destek veren Etkin Proje, bugüne kadar üniversite-sanayi işbirliği ile hayat geçirilen 300’den fazla projeye de imza atmıştır.

Ar-Ge kültürü, inovasyon, proje yönetimi, proje geliştirme, hibe destekler ve krediler konularında yüksek deneyim, beceri, vizyon sahibi olan Etkin Proje’nin hedefi ulusal ve uluslararası ölçeklerde yenilikçi Ar-Ge projeleri geliştirmek, yönetmek ve bu projelerin Ar-Ge fonlarından yaralanmasını sağlamaktır.

Etkin Proje’nin danışmanlık faaliyetleri İstanbul merkez ofisi, İzmir, Bursa Uludağ Üniversitesi Teknokent (Ulutek) ve Londra şubeleri ile büyüyerek devam etmektedir.

Name: 1915ÇANAKKALE Bridge and Motorway / Çanakkale Otoyol ve Köprüsü İnşaat Yatırım ve İşletme A.Ş.
Description:
1915Çanakkale Köprüsü, 2023 metre orta açıklığı ile “dünyanın en uzun orta açıklıklı asma köprüsü” ve 334 metrelik tepe noktası yüksekliği ile “dünyanın en yüksek kuleli asma köprüsü” unvanlarına sahiptir.
Toplam uzunluğu 4608 metre olan 1915Çanakkale Köprüsü, Asya ve Avrupa kıtalarını Çanakkale Boğazı’nda ilk kez birleştirmiştir.
1915Çanakkale Köprüsü ve Malkara – Çanakkale Otoyolu, T.C. Ulaştırma ve Altyapı Bakanlığı Karayolları Genel Müdürlüğü tarafından planlanan “Kınalı-Tekirdağ-Çanakkale-Savaştepe Otoyolu Projesi” kapsamında Kamu-Özel Sektör İş Birliği modeli çerçevesinde Yap-İşlet-Devret yöntemiyle gerçekleştirilmiştir.
Proje’nin ﬁnansman temini, tasarımı, inşaatı ve işletmesi için Türkiye’den Limak  (limak.com.tr) ve Yapı Merkezi (ym.com.tr) ile Güney Kore’den DL E&C  (dlenc.co.kr) ve SK ecoplant (skecoplant.com) ﬁrmalarının ortak girişimi olan Çanakkale Otoyol ve Köprüsü İnşaat Yatırım ve İşletme A.Ş. (ÇOK A.Ş.) görevlendirilmiştir.

***

The 1915Çanakkale Bridge is the longest mid-span and highest tower suspension bridge in the world at a total bridge length of 4,608 metres, a central span of 2,023 metres and a tower height of 334 metres. The Bridge connects Gelibolu on the European side with Lapseki on the Asian side across the Çanakkale Strait.
The Turkish General Directorate of Highways (KGM) has awarded the 1915Çanakkale Bridge and Motorway Project within the framework of a public-private partnership model to a Turkish-Korean joint venture. Çanakkale Motorway and Bridge Construction Investment and Operation Inc. (ÇOK A.Ş.) is the appointed company of the Project. The equal partners of the appointed company are Limak (limak.com.tr) and Yapı Merkezi (ym.com.tr) from Türkiye, and DL E&C (dlenc.co.kr) and SK ecoplant (skecoplant.com) from South Korea.

Description:
Wright Capital é um multifamily office independente, pioneiro na gestão de patrimônio global com olhar para sustentabilidade e impacto socioambiental. 

Combinamos a preservação de patrimônio no longo prazo com um profundo senso de propósito.

Acreditamos que investir vai além de uma alocação eficiente de recursos — é uma forma de expressar valores, impulsionar transformações e construir futuros desejáveis.

Com uma abordagem personalizada e excelência técnica, oferecemos planejamento patrimonial e sucessório, estratégias de impacto, governança familiar, alocação internacional e gestão consolidada de portfólios. 

Atuamos lado a lado com famílias para transformar patrimônio em legado.

----------------------------------------------------------------

Wright Capital is an independent multifamily office, a pioneer in global wealth management with a strong focus on sustainability and social-environmental impact. 

We combine long-term wealth preservation with a deep sense of purpose.

We believe that investing goes beyond efficient asset allocation — it is a way to express values, drive transformation, and build desirable futures.

With a personalized approach and technical excellence, we offer estate and succession planning, impact strategies, family governance, international allocation, and consolidated portfolio management. We work side by side with families to turn wealth into legacy — aligning mission, values, and a long-term vision for the future.

Additionally, IP Capital offers three other investment strategies: the IP Value Hedge, a hedge fund alternative; IP Previdência, a pension product; and IP Atlas, which focuses on international companies.

Founded in 2012, NexPoint is proud to be comprised of investment advisors and sponsors, a broker-dealer, and a suite of related investment vehicles, which, along with a network of affiliates, offer expertise in real estate, asset management, and financial services. Name: Truffle Asset Management
Description:
At Truffle, we believe investing is about experience; knowing when to act, when to hold, and when to look beyond the noise.

Truffle Asset Management is an independent, owner-managed South African boutique investment firm specialising in active equity, fixed-income and multi-asset strategies. We are personally invested in our clients’ success, partnering with institutional and retail investors to help them achieve their long-term financial objectives.

Our investment philosophy is grounded in fundamental, valuation-based research. We believe markets are efficient over time, but short-term inefficiencies create opportunities for disciplined investors. That’s why our process focuses as much on managing downside risk as capturing upside potential, ensuring capital protection remains at the core of every decision.

Our experienced investment team combines deep expertise with diverse perspectives. A flat structure and collaborative culture encourage open debate, creative thinking, and accountability, ensuring that the best ideas rise to the surface and drive performance.

Responsible investing is embedded in everything we do. We integrate environmental, social and governance (ESG) factors throughout our research and portfolio construction, recognising that companies with strong values and sustainable business models are better positioned to create enduring value for all stakeholders.

For us, success is not about chasing short-term trends. It’s about compounding experience, discipline and insight to deliver consistent, long-term results for our clients.

Invest in the value of experience.

Siguler Guff’s investment products include multi-manager funds, direct investment funds and customized separate accounts targeting specific areas of compelling opportunity. The Firm’s core investment strategies include Small Buyout, Emerging Markets, Opportunistic Credit, Real Estate and Small Business Credit. Siguler Guff’s institutional investment knowledge, sector immersion approach and longstanding relationships provide access to compelling investment opportunities within each of its targeted strategies. Founded in 1991 within PaineWebber, Siguler Guff became an independent firm in 1995. The Firm has served more than 800 institutional clients, including corporate and public employee benefit plans, endowments, foundations, government agencies and financial institutions, and more than 1,000 family office and high net worth investors. Headquartered in New York, Siguler Guff maintains offices in Boston, Houston, West Palm Beach, Hong Kong, London, Mumbai, São Paulo, Seoul, Shanghai, Singapore, Sydney, and Tokyo.

Name: PPB Group Berhad
Description:
PPB Group Berhad (PPB) was incorporated in 1968, and is an investment holding and property investment company listed on the Main Market of Bursa Malaysia Securities Berhad, the Malaysian stock exchange. Today, PPB is a conglomerate with total assets and market capitalisation of RM28.93 billion and RM24.81 billion respectively as at 31 December 2022.
PPB is headquartered in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia and has operations in China, Vietnam, Indonesia, Thailand and Singapore with about 4,900 employees in the Malaysian operations.
Our businesses are principally divided into five business segments:
-	Grains & Agribusiness (FFM Group)
-	Consumer Products (FFM Group)
-	Film Exhibition and Distribution (Golden Screen Cinemas Sdn. Bhd.)
-	Property (PPB Hartabina Sdn. Bhd., PPB Property Development Sdn. Bhd.)
-	Investment & other operations

PPB has long been established. On 1st November 1968 Perlis Plantations Berhad was incorporated with the purpose of helping to establish a local sugar cane industry in the country in response to the Government’s plans. In 1972, Perlis Plantations Berhad was listed on the Stock Exchange of Malaysia and Singapore, and remains listed on the Malaysian Stock Exchange to this day. In 1976, the organisation started its diversification programme so as not to depend on a single business and today has business units in various industries such as grains and agribusiness, consumer products, film exhibition and distribution and property. In 2000, the name was changed from Perlis Plantations Berhad to PPB Group Berhad, to reflect the Group’s diversified operations.

PPB’s vision and mission continue to drive our values of quality, sustainability, social responsibility and growth – for our company, our employees, our shareholders, and likewise the communities we are operating.
Location: 12th Floor, UBN Tower,10 Jalan P Ramlee, Kuala Lumpur

Name: Gabelli
Description:

The firm’s offerings include client-directed customized separate accounts, open and closed-end mutual funds, and SMAs.

Rigorous company and sector research, combined with long-term accumulated knowledge of sectors and companies over decades, created our information advantage. Our portfolios tend to realize high active share: we seek to uncover opportunities overlooked by most investors.

Description:

Name: Gaia Impact
Description:
Gaia Impact is a French impact investment advisory firm specialized in renewable energy and emerging countries with a high focus on start-ups, SMEs, and infrastructure projects that have a strong social and environmental focal point.

With the price of renewable energies getting highly competitive and the widespread development of new innovative and affordable solutions, we believe that renewable energies have to be backed with significant investments from the private sector.

While climate change is a main issue, it can also be considered as an opportunity to develop a new clean economy while solving energy poverty and protecting our ecosystems.


___


Gaia Impact est une société de conseil en investissement orientée vers les start-ups et les PME à fort impact environnemental et social dans le secteur des énergies renouvelables.

Avec un prix des énergies renouvelables toujours plus compétitif, couplé à des innovations technologiques qui permettent de diffuser massivement l’accès aux énergies renouvelables, nous pensons qu’il est nécessaire d’appuyer le développement de la filière par des investissements en provenance du secteur privé. 

En plus de faire face au changement climatique, nous considérons la transition énergétique comme une opportunité de développer une économie nouvelle et propre tout en assurant l'amoindrissement de la pauvreté énergétique et la protection de nos écosystèmes.

Name: SMB Capital
Description: SMB Capital is a proprietary trading desk located in Midtown Manhattan. Our desk trades equities, and options. We hire new and experienced discretionary and automated traders, funded by the firm. We provide the capital, proprietary technology, training, coaching and mentoring you need to become an elite trader. SMB Traders are committed to improving everyday and not just as traders. SMB was founded in 2005 by two well-educated (Wharton, UConn Law School), experienced, and active traders. SMB is managed daily by two partners: Mike Bellafiore, author of One Good Trade: Inside the Highly Competitive World of Proprietary Trading (Wiley) and The PlayBook (Financial Times), and Steve Spencer. Name: Align Impact
Description:
The most powerful tool to bring about change is capital. Shaping a new tomorrow depends on understanding how to best use that tool to create systemic change, not just spot solutions. It takes the bold, pioneering few to mobilize their resources in service of their passions. And to lead the many forward.

We know something about pioneering. And about mobilizing resources. We created Align Impact over a decade ago because we believed impact investing shouldn’t just “check a box.” We’ve been leaders in this industry since before it was an industry.

But this is just the beginning. Align Impact enables forward thinkers to make change. Our collective prosperity relies on strategic, future-proofed choices made with capital held by people invested beyond the bottom-line. That means we’re all about performance– both for you, and in service of the global challenges you care about. Together, we will transform the world with the power of data, not just dreams.

We are an independent partner on your sustainable investing mission, providing measurable outcomes that protect the future alongside your family’s legacy. Aligning your values and investments no matter the cause. Reinvesting and reimagining how we make money work to benefit all 8 Billion of us.

Name: FSSA Investment Managers
Description:
This information is directed at investors of a professional, sophisticated, institutional or wholesale nature and not the retail market. The information has been prepared for general information purposes only and is intended to provide a summary of the subject matter covered. It does not purport to be comprehensive or to give advice. 

About Us

FSSA Investment Managers are specialists in Asia Pacific and Global Emerging Markets equity strategies. Operating as an autonomous investment team within the First Sentier Group, we are a team of dedicated investment professionals based in Hong Kong, Singapore and London.

We are bottom-up investors, using fundamental research and analysis to construct high-conviction portfolios. We conduct more than a thousand direct company meetings a year, seeking to identify high quality companies that we can invest in for the long term.

As responsible, long-term shareholders, we have integrated ESG* analysis into our investment process and engage extensively on environmental, labour and governance issues.

*Environmental, social, and governance: a strategic framework for measuring a company’s impact on the environment, relationships with the people and companies it is connected to, and management practices. Source: https://www.dictionary.com/browse/ESG

Name: InvestAZ Yatırım
Description:
Türkiye yatırım aracılığı pazarını büyütmek ve yaygınlaştırmak amacıyla, tüm yatırımcıların yeni ve farklı uygulamalarımızdan faydalanmasını sağlamaktayız.

InvestAZ Yatırım Menkul Değerler A.Ş. olarak 2013 yılından bu yana sermaye piyasasının yeni katılımcılar ile büyümesine önderlik etmekte, piyasanın genişlemesini ve böylece atıl tasarrufların ülke yararına yönlendirilmesini hedeflemekteyiz.

Eğitim alanındaki üstünlüğümüz ile yatırımcıların kendi potansiyellerini anlamalarına yardımcı olmaktayız.

Yatırımcıları portföy büyüklüklerine göre sınıflandırma yaklaşımını benimsememekteyiz. Bunun sebebi insanların yatırıma dair duydukları hevesin en büyük önceliğimiz olmasıdır.

HEDEFİMİZ


Yatırım dünyasının oyun kurallarını yeniden şekillendiriyoruz. Çünkü biz her tasarruf sahibi bireyin işin doğası gereği potansiyel birer bireysel yatırımcı olduğunu çok iyi biliyoruz. 

ÜRÜNLERİMİZ


InvestAZ müşterilerine Borsa İstanbul Pay Piyasası işlemleri, Vadeli İşlemler ve Opsiyon Piyasası işlemleri, Kaldıraçlı Alım-Satım İşlemleri bünyesinde Forex, CFDS/Fark Sözleşmeleri, Emtialar, Borsa Endeksleri ile yatırım fonları gibi bir çok farklı piyasada sunulan ürünlerin yanı sıra hisse senedi satışları, tahvil ihracı ve varlık yönetimi hizmetlerini sunmaktadır.

HİZMETLERİMİZ


InvestAZ piyasadaki en rekabetçi fiyatlar ile müşteri maliyetlerini azaltarak yatırımcılar için en iyi işlem koşullarını yaratmaktadır. InvestAZ, InvestOR Yatırımcı Platformu ile tek hesap ile  tüm yatırım araçlarını tek ekran üzerinden yönetebilme imkanını sunmaktadır. Ayrıca başka bir kurumdaki forex hesabını açık pozisyonlar dahil 5 dakika içerisinde InvestAZ’ye taşıyabilme, birden fazla forex alt hesabı açabilme ve 24 saat boyunca haftasonu ve resmi tatiller dahil bankalar ve yatırım hesabınız arasında otomatik para transferi yapılabilme imkanını gibi özellikleri ile müşterilere bir çok farklı alanda yenilikçi çözümler sunmaktadır.
