Sonae Capitals’ strategic purpose is to identify new business opportunities in segments with high growth potential, and provide them with resources to enable growth until they become self-sustainable with mechanisms for efficient capital allocation.
Most recently, it acquired Adira, a Portuguese based industrial company, an important milestone in the materialization of the corporate strategy.


http://www.shotels.pt/
http://troiaresort.pt/en/
http://www.solinca.pt/
http://adira.pt/
http://www.capwatt.com/

Name: Interise
Description:
Interise Trust (formerly Indinfravit Trust), is among India’s first Infrastructure Investment Trusts (InvIT) to be listed on a private placement basis on NSE and BSE in May 2018. 

Interise is committed to redefining global standards in the operations and maintenance of Indian highways by offering an unparalleled experience for road users. 4,50,000 Passenger Car Units traverse daily across our 17 road projects, which aggregate 7,300 lane km and are spread across 8 Indian States.

Through our unwavering focus on safety, innovation, quality and sustainability, we inspire the next level of growth for the communities we serve. From the globalisation of cities to the advancements in trade, India’s growth story continues to unfold. At the heart of this transformation lies a robust infrastructure, marking an era of continuous evolution.

Embracing this transformation, Interise stands resolute; connecting investors, businesses, communities and individuals. By transcending boundaries and reshaping the realm of possibility, we are the Bridge to Bright.

Name: ABN AMRO Investment Solutions
Description:
Pioneer in multi-management since 1998, ABN AMRO Investment Solutions specializes in the design and distribution of open architecture investment solutions. We support investment management teams in their decision-making and help distributors optimize the investment value chain.

The selection of the best asset managers is at the core of our identity; sensitive to ESG challenges, we ensure continuous monitoring of investment strategies worldwide. We offer comprehensive coverage, encompassing active and passive investing as well as long-only and alternative asset classes.

The selected strategies are available on our platforms in fund format, or through our multi-asset class and asset allocation solutions. We collaborate with global asset managers as well as boutique management firms, recognized for their expertise in equities, bonds, and alternative investments. These partners enrich our own quantitative, systematic, and multi-asset capabilities.

Some of these strategies are exclusively available in Europe on our platforms. To summarize, we offer privileged access to top-tier asset managers, asset transparency, sensitivity to ESG challenges, and competitive conditions. Additionally, we provide multi-asset solutions, expertise in asset allocation, portfolio construction, fund selection, and risk management.

With nearly 90 employees, ABN AMRO Investment Solutions is present in France, the Netherlands, and Germany.

To contact us : aais.contact@fr.abnamro.com

Name: First Trust Global Portfolios
Description:
Please read FTGP’s LinkedIn Page Use Policy: https://lnkd.in/ek6wCq9 prior to using this page. No reliance should be placed on links to third party content.

First Trust is a privately owned U.S. based financial services firm established in 1991. We aim to offer investors a better way to invest by providing transparent and innovative solutions - through knowing what we own, investing for the long term, employing discipline and rebalancing our portfolios.

These core principles are taken into consideration in all aspects of our business and are the building blocks of our reputation. It is through these principles that First Trust’s specialist investment managers apply a robust and disciplined approach to a range of methodologies. We have a strong track record in providing a variety of rules-based, thematic and actively managed strategies investing across a range of equities, fixed income and alternatives. 

In delivering our message, our regional sales teams work closely with prospects and clients to distribute First Trust’s range of single-country, regional and global solutions across the world. Today, First Trust is one of the fastest growing ETF providers globally.

Name: Piper Serica
Description:
Piper Serica is a long-only active equity asset manager that employs various equity investment strategies in India. We manage multiple funds that invest in Indian listed companies for domestic and foreign individuals and institutions. We also manage a fund that invests in Indian startups that are building business models based on deep tech. We have been investing in Indian companies for over 30 years and have a very solid understanding of how to succeed while investing in India navigating through various risks, most of them unique to India as an emerging market.

The funds that we manage cater to different risk-return profiles and objectives of our investors. We have an edge over our peers due to our deep research and disciplined approach to investing. Our research team is extensively trained in our proprietary research processes which we have developed and largely automated. To ensure skin in the game, our fund management team makes all their public and private investments through the funds managed by Piper Serica. We are a fund management company owned by our management team, with a majority stake held by women.

Name: Tamimi Energy Group
Description:
Tamimi Energy Group is a subsidiary of the Tamimi Holding.

Tamimi Energy owns a group of companies specializing in the oil and gas, power, petrochemical, water, utility, and industrial arenas along with renewable energy fields, and has been working in these sectors for more than 50 years. It also builds and maintains innovative energy solutions in a safe and compliant manner within and outside Saudi Arabia, driven by talent and expertise to fulfill customer satisfaction.

Name: International Farming
Description:
Valuing integrity, ingenuity, and grit, I.F. combines its extensive knowledge and relationships in agriculture with innovative AgTech and end-to-end solutions. We seek to solve agricultural and supply chain challenges to create a positive impact for farmers, consumers, investors, and the planet.

Whether it’s from generations of family agribusiness or childhoods spent working in the field, our ties to farming run deep. From our various beginnings, we developed skills, connections, and expertise across a range of industries that inform our work today. 

Agriculture is not just a career path for us—it’s our way of life.

Name: Mar Asset
Description:
A MAR Asset nasceu em 2019 a partir da combinação da escola de investimentos em Macro/RF do BTGPactual com a de investimentos em ações do Opportunity e 3G.
A combinação dessas escolas aumenta o espectro para identificação de boas oportunidades.

O sucesso de uma firma de investimentos depende de seu capital intelectual em uma sociedade resistente e flexível, aliada a confiança de seus investidores.

Mar
Escola que nos faz aprendizes desde a infância.
Ambiente que ensina humildade, respeito,
superação de medos, desafios e lições sobre nós mesmos. Onde somos donos apenas de nossas próprias reações.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Consultatio Plus
Description:
Consultatio Plus es una plataforma e-learning que permite a los pequeños y medianos inversores potenciar sus ahorros y actuar en el mercado de capitales con el criterio, profesionalidad y resultados con los que actúan los grandes inversores. Esta plataforma no solo ofrece la posibilidad de actuar de manera online en el mercado de capitales, sino también, capacitarse para entender mejor el mundo de las inversiones.

Consultatio Plus está conformada por un equipo de profesionales, liderado por Eduardo Costantini, con más de 30 años de experiencia en el Mercado de Capitales.
Location: Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires, Buenos Aires

Name: Baltisse
Description:
Baltisse is the investment office of the family Balcaen. In 2 generations this family grew Balta & IVC to European market leaders. This historic success came from a commitment to continuous investment, top quality & operational excellence. Still today, we remain heavily involved in industrial activities, with a (pro)active investment approach and strong board engagement. Our team of ~40 professionals has deep expertise on private equity, real estate & asset management.

In private equity, Baltisse is active through a balanced mix of direct and indirect investments. We look for companies with an established position in our fields of competence (industry, food & beverage, health care, energy & services). We look for profitable companies, with a proven business model and with growth potential (organically / M&A) to reach market leadership. We are a flexible investor, and target investments of 10-100 M€ per opportunity, in majority positions, growth capital, management buy-in/out or mezzanine financing. We want to work with management teams with common values and an appetite for long term value creation, and we incentivize success. We welcome management teams / business owners to contact us in relation to the opportunities they see, but which they are unable to execute given capital or other constraints.

The real estate division focuses on professional real estate (retail and offices), senior housing, and mixed-use properties. We aim to be more than solely an investor, we also act as developer. For our investments in real estate we look for the perfect match between location and functionality. A key factor is that the property, while already generating revenue, provides potential for redevelopment in the short or long term, thereby creating added value.

In Asset Management, Baltisse continues to build a diversified portfolio of revenue-generating and growth-driven investments in both corporate fixed income instruments and in the equity of publicly traded companies.

Name: RSJ Investments
Description:
RSJ Investments manages a large portfolio that includes investment into real estate and its development, agriculture, and engineering. It also focuses on key 21st century sectors – information technology, bio-technologies, the production of health foods, renewable energy sources and life sciences.

RSJ Investments is a part of the RSJ Group. As is our securities trading company, RSJ Securities, through which we trade in global financial derivatives markets.

Name: BRIGHT CAPITAL
Description: Bright Capital is a leading European investor and financing partner for buy-and-build, leveraged buyouts, and growth. Bright Capital invests sector agnostic with a focus on asset-light business models with a strong ESG angle in fragmented and growing markets. We enable growth and value creation.

Name: Sistel
Description:
A Fundação Sistel de Seguridade Social foi criada em 1977, e possui expressiva experiência em planos de previdência privada. É uma entidade sólida que ocupa atualmente, em patrimônio, a primeira posição no ranking dos fundos de pensão brasileiros patrocinados por empresas privadas. 

A Sistel atua no desenvolvimento de soluções previdenciais ajustadas às necessidades e ao perfil de cada empresa patrocinadora de plano e de seus empregados, constituindo-se em importante estratégia e instrumento de uma política empresarial competitiva.

Participando da Fundação Sistel de Seguridade Social, as empresas patrocinadoras e seus participantes têm a certeza e a tranqüilidade de que fazem parte de um dos maiores, mais tradicionais e sólidos fundos de pensão do país.

Name: DORVAL AM
Description:
Dorval Asset Management - an affiliate of Natixis Wealth Management - is a management company recognised in the areas of flexible wealth management strategies and stock-picking in European equities.

Dorval Asset Management process is based on macro- and microeconomic reconciliation data crossed with information arising from numerous visits to companies and meetings with their directors (more than 700 a year). Investment themes are chosen inside a central macro scenario. In addition, during stress period technical analysis is also used. 
This in-depth study of the economy, associated with robust valuation methods and owner investment processes, enables Dorval Asset Management not only to anticipate the major underlying trends but also to react swiftly to market’s turbulences.  

Dorval Asset Management has been a leading player in conviction-based management for over 20 years, structured around two areas of expertise: collective management through international wealth funds, flexible European funds and pure European equity funds; and wealth management and discretionary management for private clients.

Dorval AM offers its clients responsible and sustainable investment solutions that make sense, within open-ended funds that are all SRI-certified, classified SFDR 8 and SFDR 9 for the climate impact research strategy.

Distribution is handled by the French banking networks of Groupe BPCE and by Dorval AM for all external clients (wealth management advisors, wholesale, institutional investors and insurers in France and internationally).

Name: Superangel
Description:
Superangel is early stage investment fund and company builder. We invest our time, experience and capital to help start and grow the next wave of European technology startups, focusing on “from founder to founder” concept where early stage capital is coupled with company building.

-> 10x@superangel.io

Name: Guepardo Investimentos
Description:
Based in Sao Paulo, Brazil, Guepardo Investimentos is an absolute-return, value-oriented investment manager focusing on Brazilian equities.  Since inception in 2004, the firm has built one of the best track records in Brazil.

Guepardo’s goal is to maximize long-term returns with less volatility than the Ibovespa—the equities benchmark in Brazil. Guepardo uncovers and exploits market inefficiencies by doing intensive fundamental research and analysis, using a private equity mentality in the public markets.

Name: Palestine Investment Fund
Description:
The Palestine Investment Fund (PIF) is investing for impact in Palestine. 

PIF is the leading impact investor in renewable energy, agribusiness, infrastructure, real estate, tech, and entrepreneurship in Palestine.  With $1 billion in assets currently under management, PIF is uniquely positioned to both originate and co-invest in development projects across a variety of critical sectors.

Our vision is to assist in the realization of a sovereign and prosperous Palestinian state built around an innovative  economy and supported by a vibrant private sector. We promote inclusive economic growth and private sector development by initiating and investing in financially feasible and socially responsible strategic projects in Palestine.

PIF operates through three impact investment arms and one asset management company:

Amaar, with a focus on Real Estate and Tourism, invests in and manages Palestinian land development projects and develops Palestine's tourism and hospitality sectors

Massader, with a focus on Energy and Infrastructure, invests in the development of Palestine's natural resources and critical infrastructure in order to maximize productive capacity

Sharakat, with a focus on Agriculture, Technology, and Human Development seeks to catalyze the "new economy" in Palestine through investments in agribusiness, SMEs, tech, and more

Aswaq, which manages PIF's local and global capital market portfolios, seeks to fund and support PIF's growth-generating activities through effective and innovative asset management

Finally, through the Palestine for Development Foundation (PsDF), PIF supports initiatives designed to positively impact Palestinian society, in areas such as education and entrepreneurship.

A member of the International Forum of Sovereign Wealth Funds, we are committed to good governance and transparency.

Name: Druk Holding & Investments Limited
Description:
Druk Holding & Investments Ltd, the commercial arm and trusted steward of the Royal Government of Bhutan, was established in 2007 to hold and manage the existing and future investments of the Royal Government for the long-term benefit of the people of Bhutan. As the largest and only government-owned holding company in Bhutan, DHI holds shares of 21 different domestic companies operating in the manufacturing, energy, natural resources, financial, communication, aviation, trading and real estate sectors. 

DHI’s wider portfolio contains investments across a range of asset classes that deliver exposure to traditional sectors and the industries driving the modern economy. This includes global equities, fixed income and venture capital investments in promising startups; domestic and international real estate; renewable energy including hydropower generation; healthtech, biotech, life sciences and agritech; and digital asset mining and investment.  

DHI’s future-facing investment strategy is to help build a more connected and sustainable Bhutan by deepening local knowledge of and engagement in the technology landscape. At the same time, it fosters relevant human capital for industries of the future, creating jobs and preparing citizens to participate in the modern global economy from within Bhutan.

Name: Resource Management Service LLC
Description: Resource Management Service LLC (RMS) is a global forestry-centered investment manager with significant expertise in all phases of institutional timberland investing. Founded and managed by forestry professionals and owned by its employees, RMS is headquartered in Birmingham, Alabama, with offices across the U.S. South and Brazil.

Name: Real Asset Management Group
Description:
Real Asset Management ('RAM') is an Australian alternative asset manager, providing investment solutions in Credit, Real Estate, and Private Equity markets, for institutions and wealthy families globally.

RAM was founded in 2010 and has a pan-asia presence of 5 offices in Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Shanghai and Hong Kong. RAM provides more than 15 investment strategies and has a team of over 200 finance professionals managing in excess of A$7bn in assets.

We provide a global set of investment solutions through our group companies licensed by the Australian Securities and Investment Commission of Australia (AFSL 484263), and the Securities & Futures Commission of Hong Kong (CE BGL803).

Name: YIELCO Investments
Description:
YIELCO is an independent global private markets investment specialist, focused on private equity, infrastructure, and private debt. Our core objective is to generate attractive and sustainable returns for our investors. YIELCO manages commitments exceeding EUR 10 billion from a variety of institutional investors, including pension plans, insurance companies, and family offices.

YIELCO is led by experienced investment professionals who have been supporting institutional investors for over 15 years. Based on this expertise, YIELCO has built a compelling track record and developed a range of innovative investment programs, characterized by attractive conditions and strong alignment of interests with investors. Through diversified multi-manager and co-investment portfolios, as well as bespoke solutions, institutional investors gain access to YIELCO's sophisticated investment strategies, offering attractive return opportunities.

Name: PineStone Asset Management Inc.
Description:
Based in Montreal, PineStone Asset Management Inc. is a specialist global equity manager founded in 2021, following the separation of our Investment Team from a large independent asset manager. PineStone is 100% employee-owned and focused exclusively on helping our clients achieve their investment objectives. We manage high-conviction, low-turnover portfolios of what we believe to be the highest-quality companies worldwide. PineStone currently has approximately US$60 billion in assets under management and is led by Nadim Rizk, a seasoned portfolio manager with over 25 years of experience. 

If you're interested in joining our passionate team, please contact us below and email your cv and cover letter to: hr@pinestoneam.com

Basé à Montréal, Gestion d’actifs PineStone Inc. est un gestionnaire d’actifs spécialisé en actions mondiales fondé en 2021 à la suite de la séparation de notre équipe de placements d’un important gestionnaire d’actifs indépendant.
PineStone est détenue à 100% par ses employés et se consacre entièrement à aider nos clients à atteindre leurs objectifs d’investissement. Nous gérons des portefeuilles concentrés à forte conviction et avec un faible taux de roulement, composés selon nous des entreprises de la plus haute qualité à l’échelle mondiale. PineStone gère actuellement des actifs d'environ 60milliards de dollars américains (en date du 31 mars 2025) et est dirigée par Nadim Rizk, un gestionnaire de portefeuille chevronné ayant plus de 25 ans d’expérience.
Si vous souhaitez rejoindre une équipe engagée et passionnée, n’hésitez pas à nous contacter ci-dessous et à envoyer votre CV ainsi qu’une lettre de motivation à l’adresse suivante: hr@pinestoneam.com

Name: Sparinvest
Description:
The group is known as a specialist in value investment – both for equity and bond funds but also offers a wide range of other strategies based entirely on academic evidence of long-term success. These proven outperformance strategies include: strategic asset allocation, Danish bonds and small-cap investment.

Founded in 1968 in Denmark, and with pan-European operations in Luxembourg since 2001, Sparinvest is an international asset manager, owned by a broad range of Danish institutional shareholders who support the group’s independence and prudent investment strategy.

Our mission is to deliver outstanding long-term performance, through a systematic and objective approach to
investment which considers risk before reward. At Sparinvest we are all committed to this goal.

Name: AAAINTERGALACTIC HOCHSCHILDCAPITAL, a renowned fair INVESTOR
Description:
AAAIntergalactic HochschildCapital is a company of the Awards-winning AAA Intergalactic Investments Group (AAA INTERGALACTIC) – the first financial group dedicated to interplanetary and intergalactic infrastructure.

AAA INTERGALACTIC is neither an Investments Sales Group nor a business intermediary. The group does not sell its expertise. AAA INTERGALACTIC companies are impact INVESTORS exclusively investing in Real Assets.

 They do not invest in stocks, crypto, speculative or high-risk businesses.

 Investments are commission free

AAAINTERGALACTIC HOCHSCHILDCAPITAL has won several awards - the most recent are:

BEST INDEPENDENT FINANCIAL SERVICES PROVIDER

MOST DEDICATED FINANCIAL GROUP

LEADING PIONEERS in INFRASTRUCTURE INVESTING

Description:
"Millennium Global" comprises Millennium Global (Europe) SAS and Millennium Global Investments Limited.

Name: NIO Partners
Description:
Nordic Investment Opportunities A/S (NIO) pioneers in providing access to best-in-class private market funds for professional investors such as family offices, foundations, institutions and high-net-worth individuals.

We bring the skills required for high-quality fund selection, due diligence, investment processes, and ongoing management of private funds. Our experience is drawn from wide career backgrounds, all necessary for a comprehensive understanding of the private funds in which we invest.

NIO is registered with the Danish Financial Supervisory Authority (DFSA or Finanstilsynet) and is authorized to operate as an Alternative Investment Fund Manager (AIFM) in Denmark.

Name: Groupe Artémis
Description:
Artemis is the holding company of the Pinault family. 
Founded in 1992, Artemis carries out long term investments in companies with strong growth potential. 

Over the past 30 years, Artémis has built a substantial and balanced portfolio of assets with strong international brands, the majority of which operate across the broad spectrum of the luxury goods and services sector. 
Its consolidated assets are currently valued at some €40 billion. 

Artémis is led by a tight-knit team whose members manage all investment decisions and provide portfolio oversight.

Our Portfolio

Artémis is the controlling shareholder of Kering, one of the world leaders in Luxury.

Artémis also owns Christie’s, the worldwide leading auction house, several prestigious vineyards, including Château Latour, rated a “Premier Cru Classé” since 1855, the French luxury cruise ships company Ponant, the newsmagazine Le Point and the Stade Rennais Football Club.

Name: W CAPITAL SAFI
Description:
W Capital SAFI es una plataforma de inversiones alternativas administradas de una manera rentable, ética y con un excelente gobierno corporativo y gestión de riesgos. Los fondos gestionados se enfocan en el sector inmobiliario. Además de contar con el respaldo del Grupo Wiese, las principales instituciones del Perú, como fondos de pensiones y compañías de seguros confían en nosotros. Adicionalmente, manejamos fondos dedicados a atender a inversionistas de alto patrimonio peruanos y chilenos. 
Actualmente, W Capital maneja 6 fondos (AUM: $100 MM), destinados a inversiones inmobiliarias de Renta, Deuda y Desarrollo.

W Capital SAFI is an investment management firm, led in a profitable and ethical manner, with an outstanding corporate governance and risk management. Our portfolios are specialized in real estate. Not only do we count on Grupo Wiese’s backing, but the main Peruvian institutions such as pension funds, insurance companies and HNWI from Peru and Chile rely on us as well. 
Currently, we manage 6 investment funds with more than $100MM in AUM, where 6 are specialized in real estate debt, development and income.

Name: Next Generation Equity
Description:
Next Generation Equity is a Government-approved provider of citizenship and residency-by-investment applications tailored to the individual needs of discerning clients across the globe.

Obtaining a second citizenship is a life-changing event giving you personal and professional freedom today, whilst securing your family’s future for tomorrow. Next Generation Equity delivers proven solutions, sound advice and practical support every step of the way, as you embark on the journey to establishing a new citizenship.

Our citizenship and residency-by-investment programmes are available from a number of different countries across Europe and the Caribbean, allowing individuals and their families to obtain a second citizenship and passport after making an investment through one of several channels. Investment options include real estate purchase, donations to a government development fund or investment in one of the country’s main industries. 

Let Next Generation Equity guide you through the process and discover a world of possibilities in as little as 4 months.

Name: CEE Group
Description:
CEE Group is a Hamburg-based asset manager specialising in renewable energies. With a track record of over 90 transactions in the renewable energy sector and a portfolio of around 2.3 billion euros in assets under management in Europe, CEE is a competent and reliable partner. The main focus is on wind and solar energy. The CEE Group has 46 onshore wind farms with an installed capacity of around 660 MW and 49 photovoltaic projects with around 1,000 MWp. (as of August 2023)
As an internationally operating company, the CEE Group offers its customers sustainable investment concepts with long-term return opportunities in the growth market for renewable energies. With its independently operating companies, the company has a comprehensive range of services for projects in this segment. Investors are mainly institutional investors with a long-term interest in renewable energies.

Name: Endicott Capital
Description: Founded in 1996 as Endicott Group, Endicott Capital invests in the Information Services sector - technology-enabled, business-to-business companies that provide data, analytics and workflow software and services. Endicott brings together deep investment experience in the financial services sector with operating experience in the information services sector. Endicott partners with management teams and other shareholders to build strong companies that realize their growth potential and maximize value.

Name: Buoyant Capital
Description: Investors First

Name: Lupus alpha Asset Management AG
Description:
THE ALPHA WAY TO INVEST – LUPUS ALPHA

The first SMAX-funds also the first European Micro Cap funds -  Lupus alpha delivers successful specialised investment concepts.

We continuously develop new alpha sources for investors. This is not by chance it is systematic.

Name: Q Investment Partners
Description:
Q Investment Partners (QIP) is a Singapore-headquartered private equity real estate firm that specialises in the Global Residential Living sector. Our team of experienced investment professionals provides global private wealth and institutional investors with unique access to investment opportunities in institutional-grade assets, through innovative, scalable and sustainable strategies in yield-accreditive sectors.

To date, the QIP team and its Principals have managed over US$1.2B of real estate investments in developed markets, delivering a weighted average asset level IRR across its exits of more than 24%.

Name: Munro Partners
Description: Munro Partners is a global investment management partnership specialising in growth equities. Founded in 2016 by an award-winning team with a proven track record of delivering strong returns, we are majority owned and controlled by employees. Our proprietary investment process, combined with a global network and deep industry expertise, positions our portfolios to capitalise on the key structural changes occurring in our world today. Fully aligned with our investors’ goals, our team invests in our products alongside clients. Our partnership is Australian domiciled, with offices in Melbourne and Toronto, Canada.

Name: Coast Funds
Description: Coast Funds is dedicated to empowering First Nations in the Great Bear Rainforest and Haida Gwaii to achieve healthy and vibrant economies and communities in tandem with the conservation of their homelands for the benefit of future generations.

Name: Zetland Capital
Description:
Zetland Capital, based in London is a private equity firm investing in mid-market European special situations across a wide range of sectors with a focus on tangible assets.

Zetland Capital is a values driven firm. At our core, we believe that leading with our values makes for better investments. We aim to align our actions with our commitments.

Zetland Capital Partners LLP is authorized and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority in the UK.  

For any inquiries: info@zetlandcapital.com

Description: There is a backside to every story. We invest in people who fight assumptions and look beyond the obvious. Because that is where the real potential is.

Name: Oak Street Real Estate Capital LLC
Description: Oak Street Real Estate Capital, LLC ("Oak Street") is a private equity real estate firm based in Chicago, Illinois. Oak Street manages both commingled funds and separate accounts on behalf of institutional and high net worth investors, including public and corporate pension plans, insurance companies, family offices and trusts. Oak Street is a minority and women-owned business enterprise.

Name: Cordiant Capital
Description:
Cordiant is a global infrastructure and real assets investment manager with a sector-led approach to providing growth capital solutions to promising mid-sized companies in Europe, North America and selected global markets. The firm focuses on the next generation of infrastructure and real assets in digital infrastructure, energy transition infrastructure and agriculture and is currently managing equity and debt funds with committed capital of approximately USD 3.4 billion. Cordiant is a pioneer ESG and Impact investor with offices in Montreal, London, Luxembourg and Sao Paulo.

Name: finance&invest.brussels
Description:
Nous sommes une société anonyme d’intérêt public. Nous facilitons et complétons la chaîne de financement des entreprises créatrices de valeur en Région bruxelloise. Comment ? En apportant des solutions concrètes aux besoins financiers des entrepreneurs et entrepreneuses, sous forme de prêts, de prises de participation ou de garanties aux moments-clés de l’existence de leur entreprise : création, développement, innovation, internationalisation, transition environnementale, reprise-transmission. 
Nous nous adressons à deux publics spécifiques : d’une part, les start-up, scale-up et PME (investissement de 100.000 € à 5 millions €), et d’autre part, les TPE (petites entreprises, indépendants, commerces et starters), entreprises sociales et coopératives (investissement de 5.000 € à 150.000 €). 

Nous poursuivons un double objectif : 
1) dynamiser l’économie de la Région de Bruxelles Capitale en tenant compte des orientations de sa politique économique, notamment en poursuivant l’objectif de transition économique vers des modèles économiques exemplaires sur le plan social et environnemental. 
2) appliquer des règles de bonne gestion industrielle, financière et commerciale, ainsi qu’obtenir une rentabilité de marché qui prend en compte les risques d’investissement, d’autre part.

We zijn een naamloze vennootschap van openbaar nut. We faciliteren en vervolledigen de financieringsketen voor ondernemingen die waarde creëren in het Brussels Hoofdstedelijk Gewest. Hoe? Door concrete oplossingen aan te reiken voor de financiële behoeften van ondernemers, in de vorm van leningen, participaties of waarborgen, op beslissende momenten in hun bestaan: oprichting, uitbreiding, innovatie, internationalisering, ecologische transitie, overname-overdracht. 
We richten ons op twee specifieke doelgroepen: start-ups, scale-ups en kmo’s enerzijds (investering van 100.000 tot 5 miljoen euro) en zko’s, sociale ondernemingen en coöperaties anderzijds (investering van 5.000 tot 150.000 euro).

Name: Reuben Brothers
Description:
Reuben Brothers is a leader in private equity, real estate investment and development, and venture capital.

Our investments include data centres, racecourses, pub companies, aerodromes, technology and media. Our resources heritage is today represented through energy investments, shipping vessels, and an expanding mining portfolio.

Our real estate holdings are significant in scale and broadly diversified, encompassing office, retail, hotel, residential and infrastructure properties across the world.

Our philanthropic arm, the Reuben Foundation, was formed in 2002 and makes essential contributions to the advancement of healthcare and education worldwide. For further information on the Reuben Foundation please visit www.reubenfoundation.com

Name: Niatross Investments Limited
Description:
Niatross Investments manages long only, absolute return investment funds focused on Pan Asian equity markets, with the investment management team located in Hong Kong.

Within our core fund, we manage a concentrated portfolio of high-conviction, listed equity investments, constructed using fundamental, financial analysis. We are patient, medium-duration, bottom-up investors, and believe our skill sets are best suited to longer-term investments.

Our goal is to generate exceptional returns through the cycle, while ensuring preservation of capital. The principal investments in the fund must exhibit meaningful discounts to probability-adjusted fair value, and most importantly, minimal downside risk.  

Within Asia, we are generalists, and are benchmark, index, sector and country agnostic. We focus on finding businesses which are analysable, knowable, and where the possibility exists for high levels of conviction and independent, differentiated thought, such that a concentrated portfolio can be built.

All of our investments are value based: some may be in companies with low absolute valuation multiples, some may not be, but all trade at substantial discounts to our estimation of where fair value lies. Contrarian investments are embraced, and consensus positioning is avoided.  

We do not fear market volatility, but rather, the permanent impairment of capital. Capital is decisively and clinically recycled into better opportunities, and is moved into cash when the opportunity set is limited. We believe that the use of cash, a highly liquid portfolio and no leverage is critical for our ability to withstand times of stress.

We invest in our own manner. That manner is the construction of a portfolio of fundamentally driven, high-conviction, concentrated positions which we intend to own over the medium term.  

Our key tenets are Value, Conviction, Concentration, and Patience.

Name: Genius by InterCapital
Description:
ŠTO JE GENIUS?

Genius je algoritam koji za Vas stvara optimalan financijski plan pomoću kojeg je ulaganje u Vašu budućnost jednostavnije, brže i transparentnije.

Ne morate proći tečaj o investiranju da biste ulagali - Genius je odgovoran partner koji optimizira Vaš portfelj i pomaže Vam donijeti najbolje investicijske odluke.

Ako Vas zanima detaljnije objašnjenje funkcioniranja Genius algoritma i načina na koji upravlja Vašim portfeljem, posjetite nas na genius.inter.capital i informirajte se preko naših blogova. Otvorite Genius račun i započnite s ulaganjem.

STRUČNI TIM

InterCapital Asset Management predano radi prema svojoj viziji budućnosti u kojoj svatko može sanjati, a zatim jednostavnim i fleksibilnim načinom ulaganja bez predznanja raditi na svojim ciljevima. Nakon 14 godina iskustva upravljanja investicijskim fondovima i individualnim portfeljima velikog broja institucionalnih i individualnih investitora te 11 prestižnih nagrada odlučili smo krenuti korak dalje.

Razvili smo jedinstvenu aplikaciju – Genius – temeljenu na Nobelom nagrađenom algoritmu, koja Vam pomaže brzo i samostalno ući u svijet investiranja. Vjerujemo da za rezultat nije potrebno puno novca, već znanje i iskustvo koje želimo podijeliti s Vama kroz vrhunski proizvod – Genius.

Name: Exane Asset Management
Description:
Exane Asset Management is an independent Paris-based Asset Management boutique, founded in 2001 by experts within the Exane group, a key player in European equities.

Among the first asset managers involved in absolute return in Europe with the management of long/short equity market neutral funds since 2001, Exane Asset Management has strengthened and developed its expertise over the years and has successfully diversified its range towards directional funds. Our long-only expertise, developed more than 10 years ago, is now recognized for its unique positioning and consistent outperformance.

Looking for consistency rather than short-term success, we believe in three long-term value creation drivers to stand out in our highly competitive industry:
- Our capacity to attract and retain talented and passionate people, 
- A disciplined organisation to favour the focus of our PMs on alpha generation from their know-how, 
- A stringent risk management framework to ensure the robustness of our investment processes.

Exane Asset Management offering is focused on a small number of investment solutions designed to provide original and complementary responses to the needs of our diversified European client base.

The main purpose of the invested capital is to facilitate the international business expansion and growth of the most promising tech startups that can show traction and prove their potential to “make it big”.

Name: One to Watch
Description:
One to Watch is an investment management company based in Nepal since the last five years. We work with small and medium sized companies focusing on basic needs - food, infrastructure and health-care, companies that create impact as well as profits.
Our operations have three phases. Firstly, we source potential companies through our accelerator programs including our signature impact accelerator. In this program we accelerate ten companies each year and make them investment ready with the objective of bringing FDI into these companies. We provide mentorship from international and local mentors who support in validating their innovative business models and setting up basic governance. 
Secondly, we invest in high potential high impact companies in Nepal. Our highly qualified on ground investment management team supports our investee companies to grow, by providing guidance, performing and reporting periodic asset performance measurements. 
And thirdly, we provide post-investment support to our investee companies. One of our key support initiatives is Financial Control services. Our highly experienced financial officers help develop the financial targets of the investee companies and track their achievements.

Name: Khaled Juffali Company, KJC
Description:
Khaled Juffali Company, KJC Ltd. has an underlying focus on the creation & incubation of growth business ventures. KJC is involved in various industries that include automotive, energy and utilities, insurance, healthcare, real estate and construction, education, and philanthropy. 

KJC’s strength lies in its strategic mix of innovative projects that have a solid financial foundation coupled with an excellent network of multinational partnerships, know-how, & proven track record.

The legacy of KJC’s principal stems from a professional business heritage of one of Saudi Arabia’s premier entrepreneurs. This strong leadership has effectively developed ventures that became part and parcel of Saudi Arabia’s infrastructure and economic growth. Khaled Juffali’s ventures are global and KJC develops, spawns, and consolidates these diversified investments.

Khaled Juffali also serves as the Chairman of E.A. Juffali & Brothers Co. , which was established in 1946. He is also the Honorary Consul General of Switzerland in Jeddah KSA.

Description:
DeFiance Capital was founded by Arthur Cheong (Arthur0x) and is widely considered to be one of the top crypto investment firms in Asia with more than $300m combined AUM. Arthur is a leader in the global crypto community (>200k X followers) and one of the earliest investors in the DeFi space. 

DeFiance currently invests out of its liquid hedge fund launched in March 2023, which focuses on liquid crypto/tokens with venture-scale upside. We take a thesis driven and fundamental approach to underwriting investments and target multi-month holding periods. The fund was featured by Preqin, the leading data provider in the alternative asset management industry, as the No.1 best performing APAC-based crypto hedge fund for Q4 2023 and Q1 2024. We have outperformed benchmarks, while providing investors peace of mind with institutional grade security/custody practices.

DeFiance’s first hybrid liquid + venture fund (2020 vintage) achieved ~4x MOIC from 2020 to 2022, having made early venture investments into unicorns like dYdX (25x), Axie Infinity(250x), LayerZero (60x), and Arbitrum(52x), amongst other successful liquid investments such as Aave and Synthetix.

Name: Novaxia Investissement
Description:
Novaxia Investissement est la société de gestion du Groupe Novaxia. Elle crée des véhicules d’investissements immobiliers ayant pour but de transformer des réalités de marché en solutions d’épargne, permettant ainsi aux investisseurs particuliers de conjuguer objectif de performance financière et extra-financière. C’est ce que nous appelons "Mettre le sens à profit" ! 

Novaxia Investissement propose une gamme de fonds sur les thématiques porteuses du recyclage urbain et de la gestion immobilière durable :
- Le recyclage urbain, c’est transformer des immeubles tertiaires vacants et obsolètes en programmes adaptés aux nouveaux besoins, en alliant création de valeur financière et extra-financière.  
- La gestion immobilière durable consiste à améliorer le parc tertiaire existant à potentiel. 

Notre gamme de fonds, positionnés au plus haut niveau d'impact, 100% labélisés ISR* et article 9 SFDR, sont distribués via des partenaires CGP, banquiers privés, mutuelles et assureurs :
• 𝗡𝗼𝘃𝗮𝘅𝗶𝗮𝗥, l'UC qui fait du recyclage urbain son levier de performance financière et extra-financière
• 𝗡𝗼𝘃𝗮𝘅𝗶𝗮𝗡𝗘𝗢, Novaxia Neo, la SCPI qui voit plus loin pour conjuguer recherche de performance et résilience
• 𝗡𝗼𝘃𝗮𝘅𝗶𝗮𝗢𝗡𝗘, le fonds 150-0 B ter qui fait du recyclage urbain son levier de performance 

Tous les fonds de Novaxia Investissement présentent notamment des risques de 𝗽𝗲𝗿𝘁𝗲 𝗲𝗻 𝗰𝗮𝗽𝗶𝘁𝗮𝗹 et 𝗱’𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗶𝗾𝘂𝗶𝗱𝗶𝘁𝗲́.

Agréée par l’Autorité des Marchés Financiers en 2014, Novaxia Investissement, c’est près de 60 experts, spécialistes de la finance et de l’immobilier, animés par le désir permanent de développer une épargne immobilière à impact accessible à tous.

Société de gestion de portefeuille agréée par l’Autorité des Marchés Financiers sous le n° GP 14000022 en date du 08 juillet 2014 / Société par Actions Simplifiée au capital social de 1 7001 700 000 € / RCS Paris 802 346 551 / Siège social : 45, rue Saint-Charles - 75015 Paris

  -> Un 𝐦𝐨𝐝𝐞̀𝐥𝐞 𝐝’𝐚𝐟𝐟𝐚𝐢𝐫𝐞 𝐫𝐨𝐛𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐞, pensé pour durer plutôt que pour “scaler vite” ;

  -> Un 𝐦𝐨𝐝𝐞̀𝐥𝐞 𝐫𝐞́𝐠𝐞́𝐧𝐞́𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐟, qui transforme une chaîne de valeur au lieu de la capter ;

 -> Une 𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞 𝐩𝐨𝐬𝐭-𝐜𝐚𝐩𝐢𝐭𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐞, via 𝐥𝐞 𝐒𝐭𝐞𝐰𝐚𝐫𝐝 𝐎𝐰𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐩 — non pas contre le profit, mais comme une réalisation lucide que sa maximisation pour les seuls actionnaires n'est plus un modèle d'organisation qui maximisera notre impact.

  Nous croyons qu’en cherchant inlassablement à aligner nos modèles d’entreprise avec le respect de l’autre et du vivant, nous créerons des mouvements si puissants qu’ils deviendront inarrêtables.

Nous n’avons pas toutes les clés.
Cela prendra des années.
Et cela ne dépend pas que de nous.

Mais face aux effondrements environnementaux et sociétaux déjà perceptibles, une chose est limpide : la solution devra être systémique. 
Quitte à changer les règles établies.

 Notre ambition est de participer à construire ces nouvelles règles — avec patience, exigence et un immense respect pour celles et ceux qui embarquent avec nous.

Name: Shareholder Value Management AG
Description:
Shareholder Value Management AG is a manager-owned value investing firm based in Frankfurt, Germany

We advise several funds and mandates with a volume of about EUR 2.0 billion in total under the liability umbrella of NFS Netfonds Financial Service GmbH i.e.: Frankfurter Aktienfonds für Stiftungen; Frankfurter Stiftungsfonds; Frankfurter Value Focus Fund; PRIMA - Globale Werte. Moreover, we manage Share Value Stiftung, a non-profit foundation, and Shareholder Value Beteiligungen AG.

Investment Strategy

Our investment strategy focuses on investing in undervalued companies with business owners and structural economic moats, which we believe help reduce investment risks while maintaining capital opportunities. We service our funds with two key objectives in mind – preservation and growth of capital. Our strong long-term track record is attributed to our highly disciplined and proprietary investment process, which has continued to develop consistently since the 1980s. 
Our funds, furthermore, apply an active hedging and derivative strategy that utilizes market and sentiment indicators (behavioral finance elements) to actively manage risk and return.

Investment Philosophy

Our investment philosophy closely follows the four tried-and-trusted principles of value investing, that derive from Benjamin Graham and have been successfully implemented by renowned Value-Investor Warren Buffett: having a margin of safety (paying 60 cents on the dollar); having a business-owner (investing with entrepreneurs); investing in businesses with economic moats; and being mindful of Mr. Market (greed & fear drive the moods of the stock market, which we should take advantage of). Whether you’re an institutional – foundations, pension funds, insurance companies – or a private investor, in the long run, the goal is the same: superior mid- to long-term returns while avoiding the permanent loss of capital. That is our commitment!

Name: Yoo Capital
Description:

By combining institutional investment disciplines, design-led creativity, and creative financial solutions, Yoo Capital delivers transformational placemaking assets in edge of prime and infill zones, adding tremendous value to its assets and generating strong returns whilst mitigating risk for its investors.

Name: Vesey Street Capital Partners
Description:
Private Equity Partner of Choice for Lower Middle-Market Healthcare Services Companies

Vesey Street Capital Partners (VSCP) is a New York City-based private equity firm specializing in buyouts of lower middle-market healthcare services businesses. Established in 2014, VSCP targets founder-led businesses and corporate carve-outs with a track record of robust cash flow and minimal reimbursement risk. These companies typically have EBITDA in the range of $10-20 million and the firm utilizes conservative balance sheet leverage. VSCP seeks to create value by growing revenue and EBITDA both organically and via M&A. With a collective experience of more than 100 years in analyzing and investing in healthcare services companies, VSCP's team holds profound industry expertise and strong connections with industry leaders, enabling them to concentrate on identifying opportunities from a proprietary deal flow with focus on founder-led businesses and corporate carve-outs.

VSCP invests on behalf of a wide array of Limited Partners, including asset management firms, family offices, pension funds, and other institutional investors. The firm prides itself on having great alignment with all its key stakeholders.

Name: Macro Capital
Description:
A Macro Capital é uma gestora de recursos independente criada em 2019, estabelecida sob a forma de partnership, visando gerar valor de longo prazo. 

Possui uma equipe experiente, talentosa e complementar, sendo que os principais sócios tem mais de 20 anos de mercado financeiro, tendo atuado em instituições renomadas. 

A Macro Capital busca a geração de estratégias de investimento em mercados globais com ênfase em Brasil e em ativos líquidos, com as decisões sendo tomadas a partir de discussões contínuas da equipe de gestão. O processo de investimento visa a construção de uma carteira diversificada, com rigoroso controle de risco, com base nas análises macroeconômica, fundamentalista e quantitativa.

Name: Marsham Investment Management
Description:
Marsham IM is a UK-based Investment Manager providing fund management services across asset classes as well as tailored externally managed accounts solutions. At the core of Marsham IM’s investment philosophy is an unconstrained active investment management based on proprietary fundamental analysis and supported by innovative AI technology.

Marsham IM’s Transitional Issuers strategy is a pioneering approach to fixed income investing into the ESG driven supercycle. Transitional Issuers are forward looking companies that have not yet been recognized as ESG leaders but have the ambition and a clear strategy for sustainability transition. These are the companies that are likely to deliver most impact, but are often overlooked and thus present an attractive investment opportunity.

Name: Quintas Capital
Description:
Quintas Capital is a premier boutique investment firm based in Ireland. We specialise in providing bespoke private market investment opportunities tailored for private investors, family offices and institutional investors. Our mission is to originate, structure, and invest in opportunities on behalf of our clients, while simultaneously building an ecosystem for private capital that drives economic growth and creates a lasting societal impact.

At Quintas Capital, we are committed to delivering exceptional value and sustainable growth for our clients.

Name: Kopernik Global Investors, LLC
Description:
Kopernik Global Investors is a global equity investment management specialist focused on a fundamental, bottom-up, and value-oriented process. Our job is to appraise businesses and take advantage of market inefficiencies. We never knowingly overpay, as value is not a philosophy -  it is a prerequisite. We highly value independent thought and prefer to do our own research and analysis, where we have high conviction and more faith in our own conclusions than in the mainstream consensus. This often leads to portfolios with high active share and compellingly low correlation to benchmarks and our peers, providing meaningful diversification benefits to investors.

Kopernik is 100% employee-owned. The firm was founded in July 2013 by Dave Iben, the Managing Member and Co-Chief Investment Officer. Kopernik was built on the same investment philosophy and time-tested investment process that Dave Iben has been successfully developing over his 43-year career. As of September 30, 2025, Kopernik has 46 employees and manages approximately $9.1 billion (managed and advisory-only) across global and international equity strategies.

Name: Ellandi
Description:
Ellandi’s mission has always been to curate the best possible town centres for the benefit of local communities, partners, stakeholders and investors.
 
We are now part of an exciting new journey with NewRiver REIT Plc.
 
Our deep tenant relationships, unrivalled knowledge of regional retailing and understanding of our shoppers, allows us to apply an analysis led, strategic approach, to asset and investment management and development management.

Over the last 16 years we have established an unrivalled track record of successfully creating bright and vibrant, retail-led spaces at the heart of the communities across the UK. Name: NOMW Capital

Name: Dragon Capital Việt Nam
Description:
Công ty cổ phần Quản lý quỹ đầu tư Dragon Capital Việt Nam, thành lập năm 1994, là công ty quản lý quỹ lâu đời trên thị trường vốn Việt Nam. Dragon Capital đã đồng hành, tham vấn và đóng góp tích cực vào sự phát triển của thị trường tài chính Việt Nam bằng chuẩn mực quốc tế và năng lực đầu tư xuất sắc. 

Dragon Capital hiện đang quản lý khối tài sản trị giá 5 tỷ đô la Mỹ (tính tại ngày 30/06/2025), cung cấp các sản phẩm quỹ đầu tư đa dạng nhất thị trường, đáp ứng đầy đủ các nhu cầu và mục tiêu tài chính của nhiều nhà đầu tư khác nhau từ cá nhân đến tổ chức trong và ngoài nước. 

Năng lực của Dragon Capital nằm ở đội ngũ nhân sự hơn 150 người từ 10 quốc tịch, chủ yếu là người Việt Nam với chuyên môn đa dạng từ quản lý danh mục, phân tích kinh tế, giao dịch, pháp lý và năng lực nghiên cứu đầu tư vượt trội trên thị trường giúp công ty đảm đương được các mảng đầu tư từ chứng khoán, vốn cổ phần, trái phiếu, bất động sản và năng lượng tái tạo.

Name: DEAS Asset Management
Description:
FUND MANAGEMENT ∙ INVESTMENT MANAGEMENT ∙ ASSET MANAGEMENT ∙ Transaction & Advisory Services

DEAS Asset Management is proactively working to optimise your property portfolio; we execute based on the mandate you assign us. We can both identify the good investment opportunities, provide strong advice and implement your real estate projects through development etc.

High returns require active management
Backed by the DEAS Group, DEAS Asset Management can meet all the needs of asset management and execute professionally across the value chain in property investment. We are specialists and ensure maximum value – and we have proven results.

AIFM authorised
DEAS Asset Management A/S has been approved by the Danish Financial Supervisory Authority as manager of alternative investment funds (AIFM) as well as manager of individual properties and portfolios. As such, we can ensure that our mandates are handled with the utmost professional integrity and compliance. 

A continuous process ensures returns
Your property or portfolio is the basis of our collaboration, which adheres to a proven process:
*) Strategy: e.g. for portfolio management as well as top-down analysis of existing portfolio, or simply strategy for a single property
*) Discovery: e.g. sourcing new investments and/or providing value-add potential, for example building rights
*) Analysis: e.g. how to create the most value and return and mitigate risk
*) Execution: e.g. execution of transactions, operational optimisation, structuring and capital structure optimisation, and development of greenfield projects etc.
*) Reporting: to the highest institutional standards of all the KPIs significant to the investment and to the customer
*) Alpha review: ongoing follow-up on whether the business plan is on track and what actions are considered necessary.

Contact us and discover how your real estate investments can be optimised and what services our team of specialists advise on.

Name: VP Capital
Description:
VP Capital is the investment company of family van Puijenbroek.
Driven by impact.
Over 150 years ago, the van Puijenbroek family made its first investment in the textile industry. This marked the start of what is now known as VP Capital. Today, with a team of 13 professionals, we deploy our capital and network for sustainable progress. With the same entrepreneurial drive as before, but with a new vision for the future.  

Why? Because we recognize the necessity, feel the responsibility, and believe in the opportunities that sustainable progress offers to make a positive impact. We want to enable this progress, by contributing to much-needed solutions, both on an ecological and societal level.  

At VP Capital, we aim to realize impact in 3 ways. Through our own organisation: by using our business as a force for good; through our capital: by investing in and donating to positive impact; and through our influence as an investor: by actively engaging with our investments and our network on topics like biodiversity, climate change and inequality.

Name: Grupo ACP
Description:
El Grupo ACP es una asociación civil sin fines de lucro integrada por personas naturales. Desde su creación, su propósito es lograr impacto social a través de inversiones en empresas y/o programas autosostenibles enfocados en el apoyo a los empresarios de la microempresa y a los jóvenes de escasos recursos en el Perú. A estos últimos, a través de la educación y de la salud con el fin de que alcancen su independencia económica, desarrollen su más alto potencial productivo y mejoren su calidad de vida, contribuyendo así a lograr una sociedad más formal, moderna y con valores.

Al no tener un fin lucrativo, el 100% de las utilidades que recibe el Grupo ACP de las empresas de las cuales es accionista son reinvertidas en las mismas empresas y/o programas sociales.

Name: HAP Capital
Description:
With over a decade of consistent successes, HAP Capital extracts value and provides efficiency to the markets through our market-making and portfolio managers.

HAP Capital's market-making utilizes proprietary applications to make pricing decisions in a consistent, rational, and disciplined manner. We compete for the right to transact with other market participants on the basis of superior price and speed of execution. Acting as a liquidity and efficiency provider to the marketplace, we identify the demand for specific equity and index options and proactively demonstrate our willingness to buy or sell to satisfy that demand.

HAP Capital's individual portfolio managers speed the market price discovery process while extracting expected value in an environment constructed to enable, promote and reward proven alpha and well thought out risk-taking.

HAP Capital differentiates itself from most other firms in the space in its internally-developed quantitative approach to its trading strategy and business model.

Since its inception in 2012, CVI has completed more than 750 private debt investments, having invested almost EUR 3 billion in private debt in Poland and 10 other countries in the region almost exclusively within the European Union. CVI provides companies with a full spectrum of solutions including senior, junior, unitranche, mezzanine, and structure equity, with typical tickets ranging from EUR 2 to 25 million. CVI cooperates with various international financial institutions, most notably with EIF, EBRD, PFR. CVI is a regulated entity under the supervision of Polish Financial Supervision Authority.

Name: Aquamarine Capital
Description:
Aquamarine Fund is an investment partnership inspired by the original 1950's Buffett partnerships, run by a close replication of the original Buffett partnership rules.

The managing partner of Aquamarine Fund is Guy Spier who is an ardent disciple of Warren Buffett, and closely follows Buffett's principles on Value Investing and capital allocation. The fund was launched on September 15th, 1997 at $15 million in assets, with the overwhelming majority coming from immediate family members and friends.

Since then, the assets have steadily grown – mostly through internally generated returns. Like the original Buffett Partnerships, Aquamarine Fund has evolved to a set of operating principles which are quite different to the standard modus operandi of most mutual funds and hedge funds.

All funds are managed solely by Guy Spier. Holdings are only disclosed to the extent required by law. Limited partners and shareholders receive a set of financials once a year, audited by Deloitte Ltd.
Please refer to the legal documents for a complete narrative on the fund structure, rules and fees etc.

TCG also has varied business interest in Buyout / Private Equity, New Technology / Quant Investments, Consulting, Family Office Management, Family Governance, and Intergenerational Wealth Transfer. The professionals constituting the team have, between them, many decades of Buyout, Fixed Returns Investments, and plenitude of industry experience.

Name: Sonen Capital LLC

Sonen Capital is an independent impact investment OCIO and advisory firm that works with families, foundations, endowments and institutions to create bespoke investment solutions that aim to deliver competitive financial returns alongside meaningful and measurable social and environmental impact.
