We are employee owned by women and diverse professionals, whose common passion is to do the right thing for our clients and each other.
Xponance is the successor firm representing the integration of two legacy firms, FIS Group, Inc. and Piedmont Investment Advisors, Inc.  We offer global and non-U.S. equity investment strategies by harnessing the investment edge and focus of proven entrepreneurial or emerging managers in a tested strategic framework. As a direct investment manager, Xponance specializes in creating systematic, risk controlled active and passive equity strategies. Our active US fixed income strategies span the maturity spectrum and provide income and downside protection through differentiated off-benchmark and off the run securities. Aapryl, a technology company and subsidiary of Xponance, provides a web-based manager performance analytics and portfolio risk management platform that empowers investors.

For more information, please contact info@xponance.com.

Name: Nord Wealth
Description:
A Nord Wealth nasceu da nossa vontade de atender os clientes da mesma forma que gostaríamos de ser atendidos: profissionais certificados, atendimento próximo e interesses alinhados aos seus objetivos.

Com foco em serviços de consultoria e gestão de patrimônio, priorizamos os valores de nossos clientes, atendemos de maneira personalizada e acessamos as mais adequadas opções de investimentos de acordo com a realidade de cada indivíduo.

Exclusivamente alinhados aos seus interesses e objetivos. O modelo do futuro está na Nord Wealth.

Name: Aurega Group
Description:
Aurega Group established in 1992 is a global conglomerate specializing in a wide range of services, from corporate & tax advisory to real estate and investments.

Operational synergy is a hallmark of our approach, with each company within the  Group functioning in concert to deliver comprehensive solutions tailored to the needs of our clients worldwide. Our clientele comprises a broad spectrum of entities, encompassing private and listed companies, real estate, retail, technology spanning both multinational corporations and single-country entities. The majority of our client base is cultivated through word-of-mouth referrals, underpinned by our commitment to delivering service "As good as gold," a mantra that distinguishes us within the industry.

Facilitated by a network of over 100 partner offices spanning the Americas, Asia Europe, Africa & the Middle East, our team of seasoned Advisors, Lawyers, Accountants & Auditors empowers clients across the globe to optimize their enterprise value & navigate the complexities of operating across diverse geographical landscapes with confidence.

Our ethos transcends conventional boundaries, as evidenced by our extensive track record and adaptability across various sectors & geographic regions. Leveraging our wealth of experience & expertise, we are primed to assist our clients in building a prosperous future, underpinned by solid foundations crafted with ingenuity and innovation.

Furthermore, our growing stature and the caliber of our teams have fostered unique relationships with numerous governments & mid-size  businesses, further reinforcing our standing as a trusted partner in driving success and sustainability.

Aurega Group of Companies
____________________
•	Aurega Corporate Services L.L.C
•	Aurega Real Estate L.L.C
•	Aurega Accounting and Tax Advisory L.L.C
•	Aurega Global Limited, UK (Chauffeuring)
•	Aurega Group Limited
•	Aurega Business Management Services L.L.C
•	Aurega Holdings Ltd.
•	Aurega Investments L.L.C

Name: IMAS (Investment Management Association of Singapore)
Description:
First mooted by then Finance Minister Dr. Richard Hu, the Investment Management Association of Singapore ("IMAS") was formed with the mission to lead the development of the investment management industry by fostering high standards of professionalism among practitioners and raising awareness and interest in the industry. 

To realise the above, our objectives are:

-	To act as a forum for members to discuss industry-related matters
-	To serve as a collective voice on behalf of our members
-	To continuously improve standards of research and deepen fund management expertise in Singapore
-	To promote best practices among members in their business conduct
-	To educate the public on investing and the industry


Our diverse members comprise of both global and local entities, including fund houses, securities servicing specialists, law firms, accounting firms, consultancies and other institutions who have a stake in the investment management industry or who are part of the larger Investments value chain. 

As the intermediary between stakeholders, IMAS ultimately strives to steadily promote and expand the investment and fund management industry in Singapore.

Name: Allied Industrial Partners
Description:
Founded in 2019 by an experienced group of operating executives and investment professionals, Allied Industrial Partners LLC (“Allied”) is a lower-middle market private equity firm that thematically invests in high-growth companies within various industrial subsectors, including industrial rentals, manufacturing, distribution, environmental services and critical infrastructure. The firm is headquartered in Houston, Texas.

Allied seeks to partner with family-owned businesses and experienced management teams that can benefit from its internal operational expertise, M&A capabilities and strategic network. 

The Allied team has deep private equity investment, operational and corporate leadership experience, as well as a vast network of industry executives, operators, and intermediaries upon which Allied’s differentiated sourcing engine is built. 

For more information on Allied, please email contact@aipgp.com or visit www.alliedindustrialpartners.com

Name: Haben
Description:
Haben is a fully integrated Australian private property investor and manager, founded in 2009.

Specialising in retail, our team of over 140 investment and property management specialists are dedicated to creating value in the short and long term for investors, tenants of Haben managed shopping centres, and the communities where they’re located.

Haben currently has $3 billion in assets under management across 13 shopping centres in Australia.*

*As at September 2025

Name: Himalaya Capital
Description: Founded by Mr. Li Lu in 1997, Himalaya Capital is a multibillion dollar investment firm that primarily focuses on long-term investment opportunities in the U.S. and Asia, with a current emphasis on China. Himalaya embraces the value investment principles of Benjamin Graham, Warren Buffett and Charles Munger, aiming to achieve superior returns by being long-term owners of high quality businesses with substantial economic moats, strong growth potential, and run by capable, trustworthy management.

Name: AMERRA Capital Management, LLC
Description: AMERRA Capital Management is a private, alternative asset management firm providing strategic equity and debt capital to upstream and midstream agri-business and aquaculture operating companies in the Americas and Western Europe.

Name: RasMal | راس مال
Description:
“Equity Management and more,
Simple and Clear”


In the dynamic and volatile world of newly emerging startup companies, it takes more than a great idea to ensure high growth and higher results. With countless challenges to manage and track Cap Tables, secure funding, and maintain efficiency and organization, startup founders are left overwhelmed and unable to focus on what really matters, their company’s operational growth. This is where RasMal plays a vital part.


RasMal offers founders powerful and comprehensive solutions to automate equity management, facilitate fundraising and simplify administration and governance saving them time and cost and securing their way toward growth.

We partner with startup founders and investors to create a transparent, healthy, and sustainable entrepreneurial ecosystem both regionally and globally. Join us on our mission by signing up today!

Name: Finexis Asset Management
Description:
We believe that investing is not just about know-how; but about natural human desires that are counterproductive to investing outcomes. 

Over the decades of serving institutional investors & Ultra High Net Worth individuals, we have seen investors who were never happy with their investment return. The under-performance of the average investor to the funds they invest in are attributable to psychological traps that lead to buying and selling at the wrong time.

We are here to change the way you think about investments.

We create our strategy to have a win-win for investors and us and we address the “what ifs...” from the beginning to ensure investors' expectations are aligned with their future investment outcomes. We only work with qualified advisers who understand the investors and are willing to walk the life journey with them. This way, we have a higher chance of going through the investment journey together, even when the going gets rough.

By aligning expectations throughout the investment journey, we are able to bridge the performance gap arising from psychological traps.

Name: Bluefront Equity
Description:
We aim to create the world’s leading impact PE investor within seafood supporting companies with capital and knowledge to help grow the world’s access to sustainable seafood.

We offer our investors:

Diversified exposure to the strong megatrend of seafood in general and salmon farming in particular

Located in Norway, the leading country within the industrialization of the seafood sector exporting solutions to other species and geographies

Dedicated and experienced founding team supported by former top executives in the seafood value chain

Cultivating Nordic frontrunners for global impact

Name: Balanz Uruguay
Description:
#SomosBalanz empresa líder en el mercado de capitales. 

Hace 21 años nos propusimos ser protagonistas y referentes del mercado de capitales en Argentina. 

Hoy queremos cambiar la manera de invertir en Uruguay, dando acceso a todos los productos de inversión y ahorro del mundo.
 
Nos desafiamos constantemente para liderar la evolución del mercado y su transformación digital. Lo logramos apostando a la tecnología y a los talentos.
 
Investigamos, exploramos, aprendemos, crecemos. Nuestro motor es la búsqueda de la excelencia, desarrollando soluciones innovadoras y utilizando la tecnología que mejor se adapta.
 
Trabajamos para nuestros clientes con el objetivo de brindarles una experiencia única y personalizada en el manejo de sus inversiones.
 
Nos gusta imaginar grandes soluciones, innovar, hacerlas realidad, derribar barreras, festejar los logros y compartirlos.
 
Sé protagonista.
Porque las nuevas tecnologías y sus aplicaciones cambiaron tu forma de viajar, de conocer gente y de interactuar con el mundo, ahora vos también podés transformar activamente la forma en que la gente invierte. 
 
#SomosBalanz, sumate.

Name: Kotak Mahindra Pension Fund Ltd.
Description: Investment Management

Name: Beacon Fund
Description:
Beacon Fund provides private debt financing to the “missing middle” of SMEs – businesses that are too large for microfinance, too small for private equity, do not fit the ‘hyper-growth’ profile required by venture capital, and are underserved by banks. These businesses often have solid cash-flows and business fundamentals, but tend to be overlooked by most other investors.

We bridge this gap by offering tailored, flexible mid-term loans without requiring real estate collateral, while serving as a long-term partner to SMEs led by gender-diverse teams committed to creating positive social and environmental impact.

Name: Panacea Innovation
Description:
Our mission is to change the way the world does science for the betterment of humankind by establishing vehicles that aim to maximize deep science translation via introducing an all-inclusive R&D, commercialisation and capital packages. 

Since its genesis at the University of Oxford in 2015, Panacea Innovation has partnered with some of the world’s best sci-entrepreneurs, research bodies, universities and corporates to build more than 280 companies that offer cutting-edge solutions - curating a portfolio of more than GBP£300m in value.

Panacea Innovation’s venturing activities are delivered through two complementary arms: Panacea Stars - a technology translation, commercialisation and R&D arm - and Panacea Ventures, the investment management one.

Name: JANA Partners
Description: JANA Partners is an activist investment firm founded in 2001 by Barry Rosenstein. Our driving purpose is to leverage shareholder engagement with the goal of creating substantial value for both our investors and stakeholders.

Name: Afrirent Holdings
Description:
Afrirent Holdings embodies business resilience and innovation. Established in 2003 with just two trucks, we have grown into a formidable presence in the business world. We mark our journey with an unwavering commitment to global expansion, sustainability, and an unparalleled standard of hospitality.

At the heart of Afrirent Holdings lies our remarkable ability to foster valuable partnerships, provide unparalleled convenience, and nurture excellence. We relentlessly explore expansion and growth strategies while upholding our core values and a global standard of professionalism. 

Three Pillars of Excellence, Resilience, And Innovation.
By 2017, Afrirent Holdings diversified into three lines of business:

Afrirent Mobility: At the heart of our expansion lies Afrirent Mobility. This division spearheads our global foray, offering services including fleet management, refurbishment, logistics, rent-to-own solutions, and cutting-edge tracking technology. With an extensive fleet and a steadfast commitment to technological advancement, Afrirent Mobility leads the way.

Afrirent Enviro: Afrirent Enviro embodies the company's dedication to environmental sustainability. It consists of Afrirent Energy, Afrirent Fuel, and Afrirent Waste, which provide innovative solutions to environmental challenges.

Indalo Hotels & Leisure: Indalo Hotels and Leisure epitomises the essence of hospitality. Housing the comfortable Fountains Hotel and overseeing the adventurous Indalo Wiltshire Golf Club of Skukuza, this division extends warm and genuine welcomes to visitors from around the globe.

Creating a Resolute Legacy.
Our founders, Senzo and Thenjiwe Tsabedze, infuse Afrirent's culture with solid values. They drive our success, inspiring our team to push boundaries and achieve greatness. Our unwavering commitment to these principles assures that Afrirent creates a legacy as we navigate the global stage.

Name: One Eleven Capital
Description:
111 Capital is a quantitative hedge fund start-up based in Paris (75002) and launched in 2017 by very experienced people gathering their skills to deliver strong performance with low volatility.

The firm invests in equities and listed derivatives using quantitative techniques that lead to an optimized risk return profile. The firm targets pure alpha creation with no market exposure.

Every strategy is thoroughly backtested to verify that alpha generation is material before any live implementation.

Name: Impact Investing World Forum
Description: Impact Investing World Forum is one of the leading global impact investment communities / events, based in London UK Europe. It is focused on esg, sustainable, social investments. Website: https://impactinvestingconferences.com

Name: Revonence Technologies International
Description:
Revonence Technologies International was incorporated in 2012 with the mission to fund and invest in startups and joint ventures specialized in advanced technologies. Revonence has offices in Jersey, Irvine - California and Dubai.

Revonence directs investments in technologies where the terms "Revolution", "New" and "Intelligence" meet. We challenge the norms to deliver true disruptive products that belong to the era of the 4th Industrial Revolution.

Name: Invest in Armenia CJSC
Description: Invest in Armenia CJSC is a business consulting company with expertise in investment management, investment promotion, export facilitation, business development. The company has developed investin.am B2B Platform bridging investment offers in Armenia with more than 2500 potential investors, as well as import companies with local producers.

Name: Prada Assessoria
Description: PRADA is an investment office based in São Paulo, Brazil. We manage assets on a global scale, in multiple geographies, currencies, and asset classes for a selected group of families and individuals. PRADA is registered and regulated by the CVM and by Anbima. The company is comprised of 20 professionals with over 25 years of experience.

Name: MPC (PT Multipolar Tbk)
Description:
PT Multipolar Tbk (MPC) is an investment holding company listed on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX: MLPL). As part of the Lippo Group, MPC focuses on investing in and empowering high-growth businesses across various sectors, particularly in Consumer Retail such as PT Matahari Department Store Tbk (IDX: LPPF) and PT Matahari Putra Prima Tbk (IDX: MPPA), Technology such as PT Multipolar Technology Tbk (IDX: MLPT), and Financial Services such as PT Bank National Nobu Tbk (IDX: NOBU).

MPC's investment approach spans the entire lifecycle, from initial funding to growth and mature stages. The company strives to be a strategic ally for innovative enterprises, offering support that includes funding, operational expertise, and strategic partnerships.

MPC prides itself on its entrepreneurial spirit and unwavering commitment to excellence. Its diverse team of seasoned professionals brings a wealth of knowledge and a shared passion for driving positive change through technology and innovation. MPC fosters a collaborative and inclusive culture that nurtures growth, with knowledge-sharing and open communication at its core. This approach positions MPC as a partner of choice for businesses looking to scale and thrive in the Indonesian market, while contributing to the advancement of various industries through strategic investments and support.

Join MPC on its mission to be the cornerstone investor for growth, shaping the future of industries, and unleashing the potential of tomorrow's business leaders.

Name: GU Ventures
Description:
Welcome to GU Ventures! 

We are the holding company connected to the University of Gothenburg. We are both an incubator and investor, with the aim to develop new companies based on research results from and leading edge competency of the University of Gothenburg.

The mission is that the knowledge developed at the university will come to the benefit of the society.

To date GU Ventures has financed and initiated over 240 companies and a number of projects, that have lead to 30 exits and 11 IPOs. By active support from the owners, added value is created in the portfolio companies in order to ensure business, market and technological development, as well as in the area of intellectual property rights, managerial and organisational structures, and financing. 87% of our portfolio-companies contributes to the Sustainable Development Goals set by the UN. 

Please visit: www.guventures.com

Name: Victorian Funds Management Corporation (VFMC)
Description:
The Victorian Funds Management Corporation (VFMC) was established under the Victorian Funds Management Act 1994 (the Act). VFMC is governed by an independent Board of directors and the Chair is appointed by the Treasurer. 

We are a diverse team who are united by a single purpose: Improving the future prosperity of Victoria. 

We aspire to be an extraordinary team delivering market leading, long-term returns. This includes being: 
-	Effective – delivering against clients’ long-term risk and return objectives
-	Efficient – providing value to clients at a cost less than they can individually achieve through similar providers globally
-	Competitive – delivering exceptional client experience and attracting top talent

VFMC aims to deliver an operating surplus and dividend payment to the Victorian State Government while ensuring sustainable, cost effective operations, ongoing reinvestment and a prudent balance sheet.

Four clients make up over 90% of our funds under management (FUM).  These clients are known as our Foundation ‘Centralised Investment Model’ clients.  In addition to our Foundation CIM clients, VFMC is investment manager to 27 Victorian public authorities 

If our purpose and aspirations sound like a team you would like to be part of please contact us via our Careers inbox at careers@vfmc.vic.gov.au

Name: Water and Electricity Holding Company (Badeel)
Description:
تأسست شركة المياه والكهرباء القابضة (بديل) بالمرسوم الملكي الكريم رقم م/16 بتاريخ 20/03/1430هـ الموافق 17/03/2009م كشركة مساهمة مقفلة مملوكة لصندوق الاستثمارات العامة، وذلك للاستثمار في مشاريع إنتاج المياه والكهرباء والطاقة المتجددة التي يملكها أو يشارك في ملكيتها صندوق الاستثمارات العامة وإدارة هذه الاستثمارات.

تعمل بديل على التطوير والاستثمار والمشاركة في تملك 70٪ من مستهدفات الطاقة المتجددة، كجزء من التزام صندوق الاستثمارات العامة ضمن البرنامج الوطني للطاقة المتجددة في المملكة العربية السعودية بحلول عام 2030.

حتى 2023م، تدير شركة بديل (4) أربعة أصول قيد التشغيل تنتج 4.4 غيغاوات من الطاقة الكهربائية، و2.024 مليون متر مكعب من المياه المحلاة، كما تعمل الشركة على تطوير وتنفيذ عدد من مشاريع الطاقة المتجددة بطاقة انتاجية تبلغ أكثر من 9 غيغاوات.

The Water and Electricity Holding Company (Badeel) was established by the Royal Decree number M/16, dated 20/03/1430 AH (corresponding to 17/03/2009 AD), as a Closed Joint Stock Company owned by the Public Investment Fund (PIF) to invest and manage all water, electricity and renewable energy projects owned or co-owned by PIF. 

Badeel develops, invests and co-owns 70% of the renewable energy target capacity that PIF is mandated to develop in Saudi Arabia by 2030 as a part of the National Renewable Energy Program (NREP).

As of 2023, Badeel has four (4) assets under management in operation, generating 4.4 GW of power and producing 2.024 million m3/day of desalinated water. The company is also developing and executing several renewable energy projects with a generation capacity of more than 9 GW.

Name: Openfund
Description: The Openfund is a new seed capital venture, focusing on start-ups around software, mobile and the web. Based in Athens, Greece, the Openfund brings together an exceptional team of executives, an extensive list of advisors and a number of passionate investors to provide everything a team of entrepreneurs needs to turn ideas into products and success.

Name: OceanSound Partners
Description: OceanSound Partners is a New York-based private equity firm that pursues control investments in technology and technology-enabled services companies serving government and enterprise end markets. OceanSound employs a partnership approach, working closely with founders, entrepreneurs, and executives of middle market businesses to drive transformational growth.

Name: IP Investment Management
Description:
IP Investment Management (IPIM) is a real estate fund manager specialising in direct investments in the living sectors. We seek to generate attractive risk-adjusted returns through the origination and active management of real estate assets in sectors supported by strong demographic trends and markets with favourable fundamentals. With offices in the UK, Hong Kong, and Singapore, we target investments in the UK, Europe, and USA. 

IP Investment Management (HK) Ltd. is regulated by the Hong Kong SFC (CE No: BCY137), IP Investment Management Pte. Ltd. is regulated by the Monetary Authority of Singapore (CMS100726-1), and IP Investment Management (UK) Ltd. is an Appointed Representative of Robert Quinn Advisory LLP, which is authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority. IPIM’s investments are available only to Accredited/Professional Investors, Professional Clients, and Institutional Investors.

Name: Israel Bonds
Description: Praised for its dependability, Israel Bonds ranks among Israel’s most valued economic and strategic resources, with a proven track record spanning over seven decades. Worldwide sales have exceeded $56 billion since the first bonds were issued in 1951, with proceeds playing a key role in the nation’s rapid evolution into a groundbreaking, global leader. DCI | Member FINRA. For media inquiries: press@israelbonds.com

Name: Atominvest
Description:
We provide next generation technology systems for asset managers. 

From managing your investor relationships to monitoring your portfolio & fund administration at scale, Atominvest’s modern software can be used to streamline your firm's asset management operations and workflows. 

Our software provides functionality and workflows to the world's leading private markets / asset management firms and their service providers across the following areas:

INVESTOR MANAGEMENT: A unified investor experience and portal to streamline all investor interactions across fundraising, onboarding & subscriptions and reporting.
- Fundraising: market funds through datarooms 
- Onboarding & E-Subscriptions: simplify investor subscriptions, KYC/ AML and tax document completion
- Investor Portal / Reporting: securely share reporting documents & data with investors 
- Investor Lifecycle Management: efficient and scalable investor servicing workflows, information & change requests, contract execution and query management

PORTFOLIO MANAGEMENT: Centralize data management and tracking across funds & portfolio companies. Flexible data ingestion and automated workflows for efficient metric collection along with performance analysis & reporting capabilities.
- Portfolio monitoring: collect and track key metrics from your investments and monitor your portfolio via customised, dynamic dashboard views
- ESG / Impact portfolio tracking and workflows: send ESG questionnaires, track metrics (vs. global standards) and easily report on ESG to investors 

FUND ACCOUNTING & ADMIN: Powerful fund administration and reporting engine to track fund, asset and investor-specific data and workflows for reporting, notice creation (capital calls, distributions) and investor record management.

Our software works across all fund types including:
- Private Funds (Private Equity, Credit, Growth Equity, Venture Capital, and Real Assets)
- Traditional Open-Ended Funds & Hedge Funds

Name: BRIC Group
Description:
The BRIC Group is a globally recognized international property investment specialist and developer, boasting a comprehensive network of offices strategically located in prominent regions worldwide. With a strong presence in Brazil, Spain, Hungary, China, the United Arab Emirates (UAE), and the United States of America (USA), BRIC Group operates as a trusted entity within the real estate industry.

Our team of global experts, offers tailor-made, high-net yield investment portfolio's and independent strategies. The purpose of the company is to facilitate the increase of your personal wealth and further protect it.

Our extensive experience and global reach ensures that we have all the necessary resources, expertise and technology to provide you with the highest quality of service at all times. Our role is to work with you to identify and develop an effective financial strategy, which meet all of your immediate, medium and long term financial goals.

While we do encourage meeting clients face-to-face, an increasing amount of our business is conducted via the telephone or online. From your initial contact onwards, BRIC Group can assure you of the highest levels of service and confidentiality. We believe in being straightforward with our clients and therefore maintain quarterly reviews. We also have a dedicated client services team in place to ensure you are never more than a phone call away, from any guidance required.

BRIC group strongly works towards maintaining customer relationships for life; therefore, we will assist you all the way till you are content with your experience.

Name: DOEN Ventures
Description:
We are the investment fund of the DOEN Foundation and we have invested in sustainable and social enterprises for over 25 years. We have the ambition to make this world a greener and more socially inclusive place. Therefore, impact is central to all DOEN’s investments. We invest in early stages of a company and we take high risk. 

The impact portfolio currently totals approximately EUR 150 million and focuses on areas like renewable energy and circular business models.

Name: Fuse Capital
Description:
Fuse Capital is an investment firm focused on alternative assets with a deep technologic bias. 

Our first product, Fuse Capital Fund I, is an early-stage Venture Capital fund that invests both in equity and debt.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Sosteneo Infrastructure Partners
Description: Sosteneo Infrastructure Partners is an Asset Management Company that specialises in greenfield infrastructure investments related to the energy transition, with a focus on projects that produce clean energy or enable clean energy use.

Name: Mirae Asset Venture Investments (India)
Description:
Mirae Asset manages $1.5 B across its four funds - Mirae Asset Naver Asia Growth ($1 B), Mirae Asset Naver I, Mirae Asset GS Retail, Mirae Asset Celltrion and other MAVI funds for venture investment with presence in South Korea, India and China.

Our India portfolio includes - Ola Cabs, BigBasket, Zomato, Shadowfax, Zolo Stays, Kreditbee, Raise Financial Services, Koo App, Jai Kisan, Trell, Unacademy, Sharechat, Jupiter.

Our Global portfolio includes - Didi Chuxing (China), Grab (SE Asia), HappyFresh (Indonesia), Bukalapak (Indonesia), Glovo (Europe), RedDoorz (SE Asia), Deskera (SE Asia), Impossible Foods (US), Market Kurly (South Korea)

Name: Reverence Capital Partners
Description:
The firm was founded in 2013, by Milton Berlinski, Peter Aberg and Alex Chulack, after distinguished careers advising and investing in a broad array of financial services businesses.  The Founders collectively bring over 100 years of advisory and investing experience across a wide range of financial services sectors including asset management, banks and specialty finance, capital markets, financial technology and insurance.  In addition to this, the Founders bring long-lasting relationships with a broad universe of leading financial services companies across our sectors of focus.

We are financial services specialists and employ an integrated approach across disciplines – from Financial Services Private Equity to Structured Credit – to find the most attractive opportunities for our investors through cycles.

Name: PLAN A
Description: Plan A is a dynamic business group that invests in diverse sectors, manages administrative operations across its portfolio, and develops businesses with a forward-thinking approach. Our mission is to empower ideas, streamline operations, and drive sustainable growth across everything we do.

Name: KLAR Partners
Description:
KLAR Partners is an independent, mid-market private equity firm focused on the business services and industrial technology sectors, investing primarily in the Nordic, Benelux and DACH regions.  

We make control investments in companies providing mission-critical products and services. 

We partner with management to build sustainable, market-leading businesses through a responsible investment approach. 

We are driven by our values of Clarity, Community, Curiosity and Courage. 

We deploy our transformational investing experience to realise the full potential of our companies through growth, operational improvement and buy & build strategies.

Name: Pillarstone
Description: Pillarstone is a pan-European platform that works with European banks to create value by managing their exposure to non-core and underperforming assets on their balance sheets. The platform provides long-term capital and operational expertise to help the businesses which underpin these non-performing and non-core exposures to stabilise, grow and create value. Pillarstone is a vehicle funded by KKR and has access to the full global resources of the KKR platform.

Name: Advent Capital Management, LLC
Description:
Advent Capital Management, LLC is a registered investment advisor dedicated to providing our clients with superior investment performance. We invest primarily in convertible, high yield and equity strategies offered through long only, hedge-fund and NYSE closed-end mutual fund products. Our investment team consists of seasoned professionals performing bottom-up fundamental research. Since inception in 1995, we have grown into a multi-billion dollar diversified investment management firm with the ability to capture opportunities globally. Our growing client base includes some of the world’s largest public and corporate pension plans, foundations, endowments, insurance companies and high net worth individuals. 

Advent strives to champion diversity as an essential component for offering our clients the best and most thoughtful solutions. We cultivate inclusion because we believe people do their best work when they can be their true selves. Advent has always made proactive efforts to promote diverse pools of candidates in hiring, recruiting, retention and promotion, and is proud to directly partner with firms and organizations that directly empower Black, Hispanic, Native American and female employees and candidates. The firm welcomes talent from countries around the world with a wide variety of backgrounds and maintains a dedicated D&I Committee that meets regularly to ensure the promotion of cultural inclusivity. 

Please visit the following link for important Social Media Terms & Conditions: http://www.adventcap.com/disclosures/.

Name: Devant Asset
Description:
A Devant é uma gestora independente especializada na gestão de ativos de crédito privado, principalmente créditos estruturado com lastro imobiliário e do agronegócio.

Possui o propósito de replicar para o varejo a estratégia já utilizada pelos gestores em fundos exclusivos para investidores de grandes fortunas. O objetivo é possibilitar o acesso de todos ao crédito estruturado com lastro imobiliário por meio de fundos de investimentos.

Name: OXFORD HOLDINGS
Description: Fulfilling the aspirations of thousands of clientele- one business or individual at a time.

Name: Paradigm Capital Management, Inc.
Description:
Paradigm’s roots extend back to the early 1970s when Candace King Weir founded an institutional research boutique specializing in small-cap equities. Recognizing that small caps presented unique opportunities to capitalize on inefficiencies and valuation discrepancies, Paradigm Capital Management was established in the early 1990s.

Today, we maintain our resolute belief in the outsize return potential of small caps. We continuously refine our research approach, while reaffirming key tenets of our investment process. For instance, we have learned first-hand that constant interaction with and evaluation of a company’s management and competitive positioning can drive superior investment results.

Important disclosures:
https://www.paradigmcapital.com/legal-information/
https://www.paradigmcapital.com/paradigm-capital-products/mutual-funds/

Name: Philippe Hottinguer Gestion
Description:
Philippe Hottinguer et Cie gestion est une société de gestion agréée par l’AMF (GP 11000021) depuis juillet 2011. Fort de la tradition de la maison Hottinguer, les valeurs d’intégrité, de confidentialité et d’excellence sont au cœur de notre culture d’entreprise. Nous fondons notre développement sur trois grands principes : Indépendance, Engagement sur le long terme et Proximité.

Nous accompagnons nos clients grâce à un process précis d’analyse économique et d’allocations d’actifs ce qui nous amène à développer une gamme d’OPCVM et une offre de mandat de gestion pour compte de tiers (Fonds internes dédiés, Institutionnels, Privés).

Silver Autonomie est un FCP qui investit dans un portefeuille de sociétés cotées dont l’activité bénéficie aux seniors. L’accent est mis sur les sociétés qui permettent aux seniors de mieux vivre de manière autonome et de se maintenir à domicile le plus longtemps possible en bonne santé.

Terroirs et Avenir : la SICAV du Monde Agricole investit dans un portefeuille de sociétés cotées qui jouent un rôle clé pour accompagner les travailleurs agricoles (agriculteurs et employés agricoles) et leurs familles dans le monde de demain.

Colville Générations est un FCP qui investit dans un portefeuille de sociétés cotées durables et exceptionnelles qui contribueront à avoir un impact positif pour les générations futures.

Colville Capital Partners est la marque commerciale de Colville Capital Partners France, société de gestion autorisée et régulée par l’Autorité des marchés financiers (Numéro d’agrément n° GP19000026).

We typically focus on corporate carveouts or companies in transition but will consider an investment in any opportunity with long-term value creation potential.

Please send potential investment opportunities to mike@tenoaksgroup.com

Description: Nós somos o Grupo ABG,  holding que reúne empresas do segmento industrial e serviços, com grande presença no setor automotivo.

Description: OenoFuture is an multi-award winning international Fine Wine Merchant, providing a complete and personalised advisory service for both novices and experienced investors in Fine Wine. You have the choice of relying on our expertise to guide you all the way or, alternatively, to accept our invitation to build your own understanding and experience of Fine Wines as an investor and collector through our educational and tasting events and winery tours.

Name: Qattous Group
Description:
Established in 1989 Qattous Group, was Founded by Khalil Qattous, investing in the construction of multiple commercial buildings across the Kingdom, symbolizing its first steps towards becoming a proud Jordanian Real Estate developer. Introducing its first large-scale project in 2003, Maxim Mall, which at the time was considered the first shopping mall of its kind in the Kingdom. 
Led by an ambitious vision and expansion plan of its founder Mr. Khalil Qattous, and the groups remarkable success prompted the opening of Avenue Mall in 2010. The Group Started Diversifying their portfolio to include a retail division with its flagship store La Familia in 2012 adding Ohana and Outfit in 2013. Today the group is continuing this expansion to include its entertainment division Qattous entertainment opening its lead fully-equipped children’s play area “Avenue Park” in 2017 with plans to include Qattous restaurants in 2018.

Name: Spot Trading LLC
Description:
Founded in 1999 by Rob Merrilees, Spot Trading was one of the first entirely off-floor proprietary trading firms amongst its peers.  Spot excelled at leveraging a combination of quantitative and qualitative analysis, internally developed trading tools, and trader decision making to price the universe of listed equity options.  As technological advances transformed capital markets, proprietary trading firms came to look more and more like applied technology firms.  As a result, Spot grew from 4 employees at inception to over 150 employees - becoming proficient in the uses of high-performance computing, low latency data feeds and networks, automated trade execution, and the development of AI enhanced algorithmic trading strategies.  Spot’s innovative approach to solving the “big data” challenges inherent to the equity options markets enabled the firm to monitor the pricing of over one million individual securities in real time.

Spot regularly traded over 100,000 equity option contracts and several million shares of stock per day.

Spot was a member of several options and equity exchanges including: CBOE, NYSE/ARCA, NYSE/AMEX, ISE, Gemini, BATS, BOX PHLX, and Direct EDGE.  Spot was also a member of the Chicago Mercantile Exchange (CME)

During its time, Spot was recognized amongst its peers for a variety of awards for excellence, including:

•	NABC National Best and Brightest Companies to Work for 2011
•	NABC National Best and Brightest Companies to Work for 2012
•	NABC National Best and Brightest Companies to Work for 2013
•	NABC National Best and Brightest Companies to Work for 2014
•	NABC National Best and Brightest Companies to Work for 2015
•	Chicago Tribune’s Top 100 Workplaces in Chicago 2014
•	Chicago Tribune’s Top 100 Workplaces in Chicago 2015

Spot Trading was headquartered in Chicago and operated from 1999 until early 2018.

Name: Quantace Research
Description:
Quantace Research is a SEBI-registered Research Analyst INH000018258. We are funded by BSE's Tech Incubator and the Department of Science and Technology's DST Nidhi SSP Fund.  We are making Quant Investing more Affordable and Accessible to everyone.  

We leverage Quantitative Research, Data Science and AI to provide Research that creates a Quantitative edge in Equity & Derivatives. The research is proprietary and is developed from our experience in this field

We have partnered with Smallcase to offer India Quant Equity Baskets to Retail clients. We provide broad market, thematic and sector baskets. Our quantitative baskets are designed to withstand volatility in different market conditions.

Name: Fiera Comox Partners
Description:
Fiera Comox Partners is a global investment manager that manages private investment strategies in Private Equity, Agriculture and Private Credit. As of June 30th, 2023, Fiera Comox had $3.62 billion in AUM.

Established in 2016, Fiera Comox is jointly owned by Fiera Capital Corporation and the employees of Fiera Comox. The firm aims to deliver attractive long-term returns to its investors while preserving capital and investing responsibly.

Description: The ATR Asset Management Group (ATRAM or ATRAM Group) operates through ATR Asset Management, Inc. and the ATRAM Trust Corporation. This group manages portfolios consisting of mutual funds, trust assets, insurance portfolios, and real estate for proprietary and third-party clients.

Name: StartGreen Capital
Description:
Als een van de grootste Nederlandse fondsmanagers in impact-financiering bouwen we aan een economie die zichzelf niet uitput en waaraan iedereen naar volle potentie kan meedoen.

StartGreen gelooft dat de transitie naar een duurzame economie in gang wordt gezet door impact-ondernemers. Mensen met visie, gedrevenheid en lef. Omdat zij, net als wij, willen bouwen aan duurzame vooruitgang en weten dat dit niet kan zonder voortdurende innovatie en een gedegen business model. Daar investeren wij in. Investeringen die laten zien dat financieel en maatschappelijk rendement heel goed te combineren zijn.

Op dit moment financieren we zo’n 470 miljoen euro in projecten en ondernemingen van deze changemakers. De maatstaf is dat zij bijdragen aan minimaal één van de Sustainable Development Goals, waarbij wij ons focussen op drie thema’s: de energietransitie, diversiteit & inclusiviteit en een circulaire economie.

ACCESO A OPORTUNIDADES DE NEGOCIO

Name: LINVO AG - Life Investment Office
Description:
Think of us as your one-stop provider of financial stability and growth, a true management company. We are an investment boutique with a focus on entrepreneurs and their wealth management needs.

As a team of Swiss-based experts, we bring together decades of international investment banking and asset management experience as well as an extensive network of trusted partners across the financial world, providing you with an integrated approach through excellence in a wide range of services. From wealth planning to accessing opportunities not available in the listed market (private equity and debt, real estate), investment strategies, family office and multi-asset management, we submit our multiple perspectives to a single goal: your financial well-being.

We are value engineers to differentiate from banks and financial advisors: we direct you with an integrated advisory service for your financial and operational assets performance.

A dedicated partner offering you what we believe to be the greatest asset of life: having the time, complete control, confidence and freedom to truly enjoy your wealth.

Name: MicroVest Capital Management
Description: MicroVest Capital Management is an investment manager that specializes in allocating private debt capital to responsible Financial Services Providers (FSPs) targeting microentrepreneurs and small businesses in emerging markets. The firm structures and manages investment vehicles with thematic, high-impact mandates to address unmet capital needs while providing emerging markets exposure to investors. Since 2003, the firm has built a track record of investing in institutions whose interests are aligned with the borrowers and communities they serve. To date, MicroVest Capital Management has disbursed more than $1.7 billion to over 200 microfinance and SME finance institutions in more than 60 countries. As of February 2025, MicroVest is a wholly-owned subsidiary of Small Enterprise Assistance Funds (SEAF).

Name: HIX Capital
Description: A HIX Capital é uma gestora brasileira independente dedicada a investimentos em ações. Através de uma análise profunda das empresas e uma equipe extremamente qualificada, com experiência na economia real, a casa se propõe a gerar retorno absoluto superior aos seus clientes, investindo em empresas listadas, principalmente no Brasil, com horizonte de investimento de longo prazo

Name: Knight Frank Investment Management (KFIM)
Description:
Knight Frank Investment Management (KFIM) is the specialist property investment arm of Knight Frank, combining over 125 years of experience with the agility to deliver exceptional results for our clients.

We work with institutional investors and high-net-worth individuals across the UK and internationally, offering both discretionary and advisory services tailored to each client's specific needs and performance objectives.

Our Approach
We stand in our clients' shoes, taking full responsibility to act in their best interests. 

This means:
* Focusing on delivering strong, sustainable investment performance through active asset management
* Empowering our investment teams with the autonomy to make smart 
decisions, backed by robust governance
* Providing access to Knight Frank's vast global network whilst maintaining the freedom to select best-in-class specialists
* Combining real-time decision-making with innovative ideas to drive superior returns

What Sets Us Apart
As part of Knight Frank, the world's largest privately owned property consultancy, we offer deep expertise and extensive reach. Yet we operate independently, allowing us to be flexible and responsive to our clients' needs.

Our investment strategies span core, core plus, and value add approaches, always aligned with real economy conditions and opportunities. We focus on generating high, stable income returns enhanced by capital growth through hands-on asset management.

Building Success Together
Our clients consistently tell us that our collaborative and bespoke approach sets us apart. They value our partnership-based relationships, describing a level of service and flexibility they don't find elsewhere.

This is how we build performance together.

Name: CF Private Equity
Description: An affiliate of asset management firm Commonfund, CF Private Equity empowers pension funds, endowments, foundations, family offices, investment advisors, and other sophisticated investors to diversify their portfolios with private investments. We combine the scale of a leading global asset manager with the nimble flexibility of a focused boutique, offering access to many of the world’s leading managers in buyouts and growth equity, venture capital, and real assets and sustainability strategies. Our global portfolios are constructed with a diversified mix of primaries, secondaries, and co-investments, with a focus on smaller and growing companies backed by sector and geographic specialist general partners. We also provide direct investing opportunities through secondaries and co-investing programs that provide dedicated exposure to select private companies. Our highly experienced investors reflect Commonfund’s commitment to investment performance and its decades-long commitment to the values of trust, transparency, and ethical behavior.

Name: Uyar Holding
Description:
Established in 1978 Uyar Holding is operating in 7 different sectors with 6 companies, 5 production facilities and more than 1.300 employees.  100% Turkish capital company Uyar Holding invested in boutique and luxurious hotel chains, defense industry, decoration, technical textile, packaging, food industry and distribution channels. 

Uyar Holding gives its highest level of attention to customer and employee satisfaction and happiness in each and every market it operates. 
 
Uyar Holding provides a non-negligible and very important support for Turkey to reduce its foreign-source dependency by making national investments in defence industry. In line with this objective, Uyar Holding is the only company with accredited ballistic laboratory. The holding produces high-tech materials, protective ballistic composite products and performance enhancing clothing and gears for military, professional and civilian usage. Company provides high end technical textile products for formal and civilian users. Uyar Holding leads the defence industry in Turkey with intense research-development studies and functionality combined with aesthetics, at a state-of-the-art level in global ballistics and textile sectors. 
 
Uyar Holding which holds an integrated food production facility at global standards, operates with innovative technology investments and research-development experts. Uyar Holding provides food solutions for retail, industrial and military oriented sales with canned goods and ready-to-eat meals which preserve their freshness for long periods at room temperature conditions, without the need for a refrigerator. In addition to these Uyar Holding also exhibits its difference with sandwiches and bakery goods which are produced in the stone ovens located within company’s facilities. Besides these, Uyar Holding preserves its subtle place in the market as an important producer with convenience foods, canned goods and bakery products and also with industrial powder products. 

The Holding also plays an important role in service industry with both its boutique hotel chains and business concept hotel, and serves with passion for hospitality targeting highest customer satisfaction and quality.

Name: CDP Türkiye
Description:
Kar amacı gütmeyen Londra merkezli uluslararası bir kuruluş olan CDP, halka açık şirketlerin doğal kaynakları ve doğal sermayeyi nasıl kullanıldıklarını, faaliyetleriyle sınırlı kaynakların yeniden üretimini nasıl etkilediklerini ve bu alandaki risklerini nasıl yönettiklerini yatırımcılara raporlamalarına aracılık ediyor. CDP şirket raporlarını karşılaştırılabilir hale getiriyor ve ilgi alanındaki uluslararası raporlama standartlarını geliştirmeyi hedefliyor. Harvard Business Review tarafından dünyanın en güçlü yeşil Sivil Toplum Kuruluşu olarak tanınan CDP, 106 trilyon dolar değerindeki varlığı yöneten 740+ yatırımcı adına hareket etmekte ve dünyanın önde gelen şirketlerine çevresel politikalarını açıklamaları adına çağrıda bulunmaktadır. 2000 yılında Londra’da başlatılan CDP, dünyanın en yaygın çevre raporlama sistemine sahiptir ve dünyanın en büyük kurumsal iklim değişikliği, su, şehir sürdürülebilirliği ve orman - risk datasını elinde bulundurmaktadır. Şirketlerin, yatırımcıların ve hükümetlerin iklim değişikliği tehdidine karşı önlem almalarını sağlayacak bilgileri toplamak ve paylaşmak amacıyla başlatılan CDP aracılığı ile 23.000+ civarı kurum sera gazı emisyonları, iklim değişikliği stratejileri ve sürdürülebilir su kullanımı ile ilgili verileri kamuoyuna ve yatırımcılara gönüllü bir şekilde açıklamaktadır.

CDP Türkiye’ye yanıt veren şirketler bu platform sayesinde iklim değişikliği politikalarını uluslararası kurumsal yatırımcılarla paylaşma şansı yakalamaktadır. CDP Türkiye’nin şirketler arasında diyaloğa olanak sağlama, danışmanlık firmalarına görünebilirlikleri açısından yardımcı olma, iklim değişikliğinin etkilerinin azaltımı yönündeki politikaları destekleme, çevresel risk yönetimini kurumsal yönetim seviyesine taşıma, yanıt veren şirketleri olası faydalar hakkında eğitme ve bilgilendirme ve iyi örnekleri paylaşma gibi misyonları bulunmaktadır

Name: Sev.en Global Investments
Description:

We deploy our private capital into higher risk opportunities offering strong risk-adjusted returns. Across our portfolio we work in close cooperation with management and invest for the long-term with the objective to build successful and resilient businesses. 

As a dynamic family office investment group, we deploy our own capital for the long term with the objective to build successful, growing and resilient businesses. We aim to achieve a long term, sustainable future of our operations and to bring significant value to our stakeholders – owners, customers, our people and communities.

Our sister group Sev.en Česká energie is the largest privately owned  energy group in the Czech Republic. Sev.en operates conventional power and heating plants and lignite mines and has a proven track-record of efficient, sustainable and responsible approach in its 150 years of history.

En février 2023, Cholet Dupont Oudart rejoint le Groupe Milleis. 

Directeur général : Fabrice de Cholet

Name: Zencap Asset Management
Description:
One of the French pioneers and leaders in European Private Debt, Zencap Asset Management is the Private Debt specialist subsidiary of French asset manager OFI INVEST Group (AUM > € 190bn). 

Based in Paris, the team was established in 2009 to offer investment solutions in the Private Debt / Direct Lending space, providing its investors with a leading-edge access to real economy financing opportunities in Europe. Within this universe, Zencap AM has progressively expanded from securitized debt into several synergistic business lines in Direct Lending.

With AUM of € 3.8bn, Zencap AM gathers experts in four main segments, and capitalizes on the many synergies arising across these teams:
• Real Estate debt
• Infrastructure debt 
• Small and Medium-size enterprises debt
• Specialty finance, Securitization and Regulatory Capital transactions

Our business model relies on several pillars:
• A niche player approach, making it possible to invest in segments where competition is scarcer
• A deep and long-acquired knowledge and understanding of the Private Debt market and its players, providing a competitive edge in our sourcing and investment process
• A mix of institutional backing and entrepreneurial culture, making us very responsive in an ever-changing landscape of opportunities

The 35-people team was assembled over the last 13 years, around an initial core of former bankers and now includes a wider range of backgrounds, all dedicated to investment and business development thanks to an operational partnership with OFI INVEST AM for operational and administrative functions. 
ZENCAP AM investor base spans across Institutional Investors, Private Banks, Family Offices and HNWI. 

http://www.zencap-am.fr/

Name: Klaipėda ID
Description:
We are the Klaipėda City Investment Promotion Agency on a mission to support businesses, attract more investors and top-tier talents as well as increase awareness of Klaipėda City. 

From guiding your business journey with personalized assistance, expertise, and practical advice to kickstarting your career, we are your reliable partner. 

If you have any inquiries, feel free to contact us. Our services are free of charge.

Name: Excess Investment
Description:
We are a multi-family office based in Dubai. We  partner with other family offices to co-invest on a deal by deal basis with a long term horizon.

We build the right co-investments partnerships to create value for each deal. For instance, we can assist an international firm to develop its business in the Middle East and other high growth markets with the right local partner.

We invest :
- Globally in businesses with or without international expansion in the Middle East/High growth markets. 
- Regionally in Middle Eastern businesses.
- On a selective basis we provide advisory services (capital raising, international expansion in the Middle East and other high growth markets, M&A, etc.).

Name: Norte Asset Management
Description:
Norte Asset Management was founded in 2020 by a group of partners with solid, complementary and successful careers in the equity and fixed income markets, and that had a common goal: set up an asset management company for the long term.
We combine a fundamentalist view and a thorough microeconomic sector analysis in the medium and long term with domestic and international macroeconomic analysis. We diligently look for opportunities generated by asymmetries or market distortions, always seeking to build a balanced portfolio, with structural positions in solid companies and with protection against adverse macroeconomic events.

Name: Trilogy Funds
Description:
One of Australia’s leading fund managers of property-based investments. For over 26 years, seeking income and managing risk on behalf of investors has remained at the heart of everything we do.

We specialise in managing mortgage trusts, diversified income funds and property trusts that all share the common goal of providing income-focused solutions designed to help you achieve your financial goals. We do this by leveraging our combined talents and decades of experience in property development and fixed interest to actively manage your investment.

In addition to our investment offering, our lending team provides tailored finance solutions to the property and construction sectors, as one of Australia’s leading non-bank lenders. Trilogy operates in Australia under the Australian Financial Services License 261 425.

Name: ithought Connect
Description:
ithoughtconnect is a one-person company founded by Mr Shyam Sekhar. ithoughtconnect's is committed to investor education. The company's mission is to enhance investor awareness through social media platforms and hands-on workshops in English and regional languages like Tamil, Malayalam, and Hindi. ithoughtconnect manages brands like Muthaleetukalam, Milestones2Wealth (M2W), and ithoughtwealth. Muthaleetukalam and ithoughtwealth break down personal finance, behavioural and investment trends in the markets. Milestones2Wealth is a program that aims to take investors from wherever they are to their first crore in financial savings.

The founder, Mr Shyam Sekhar is an entrepreneur and a veteran of Indian stock markets. Shyam's entrepreneurial endeavours include WIPCO Limited, a legacy paint manufacturing company, Smart Value Equisearch Private Limited, originally founded as an independent equity research desk in the 1990s, and ithought Financial Consulting LLP, an end-to-end personal finance solution provider.  

Shyam has been committed to investor awareness throughout his career. His work has been published in various newspapers and digital media platforms including Livemint, Dinamalar, Nanayam Vikatan, The Hindu and Moneycontrol. In 2018, Shyam was featured in the bestselling investment book "Masterclass with Super Investors" authored by Vishal Mittal & Saurabh Basrar. ithoughtconnect continues Shyam's efforts to improve financial literacy and enhance wealth creation.
