Name: Casdin Capital
Description:
Casdin Capital is a New York-based research investment firm focused on the innovations in molecular medicine currently reshaping Life Sciences and healthcare. Founded in 2011, and with an eye to long-term returns and disruptive technologies, Casdin Capital is an expert working with experts, benefiting from its position at the crossroads of the science and investment communities. As trusted investor-partners in both private and public companies, we collaborate with industry leaders to fuel their visions, adding energy, insight, and experience to our over $2.4 billion under management. 

As we push into new markets and new developments, we stick to our core principles—deep analysis, intellectual honesty, hard work and partnerships with the best people. That approach translates to thousands of conversations with the developers of the drugs, diagnostics, tools and technologies that power this industry, and the data assets and service companies that support the research and product commercialization. In our first ten years, Casdin’s hands-on approach and on-the-ground experience led us to identify the key innovations that are spurring today’s remarkable industry growth. Today, we remain just as focused. Life Sciences and Casdin Capital are just getting started.

Name: Gránit Asset Management
Description:
Gránit Asset Management (formerly Diófa AM) is a dynamically growing asset management company founded in 2009. It currently manages approximately EUR 3000 million in assets for institutional and retail clients. Real estate investments are of central importance to the company, whose total portfolio comprises 310 thousand square metres of high-quality properties, including exclusive A-category office buildings business parks, rental apartments, the Shopmark shopping centre, and a nationwide strip mall network. The company manages Hungary’s 3rd largest retail real estate fund, the 'Magyar Posta Takarék Real Estate Investment Fund', whose portfolio has recently expanded to include international assets as well.

Gránit Asset Management is strongly committed to ESG principles, as demonstrated by the energy classifications and green certifications of its buildings. The company also pursues its “5B Strategy”, aimed at building a regional office portfolio across Budapest, Bucharest, Belgrade, Vienna, and Bratislava, with existing properties already in place in the first three cities.

Name: Tortoise Capital
Description: Tortoise Capital’s record of investment experience and research dates back more than 20 years. As an early investor in midstream energy, Tortoise Capital believes it is well-positioned to be at the forefront of the global energy evolution that is under way. Based in Overland Park, Kansas, Tortoise Capital Advisors, L.L.C. is an SEC-registered fund manager that invests primarily in publicly traded companies in the energy and power infrastructure sectors—from production to transportation to distribution.

Name: RVK, Inc.
Description: RVK is a national firm with headquarters in Portland, OR and regional offices in Boise, ID; Chicago, IL; and New York, NY. We provide unbiased general investing consulting services to approximately 200 institutional clients. Our clients include corporations, public retirement systems, Taft-Hartley funds, nonprofit organizations, non-pension operating funds, and high-net-worth individuals and families. The heart of RVK is our team-centered approach to client service, provided by our experienced team of consulting professionals. RVK is committed to an independent business model and to its express Code of Conduct policy.

Name: Waad Investment
Description: Waad is an investment firm with value of $200 million (SAR 750 million) backed by notable investors and family offices in GCC, targeting growth-stage startups.

Name: Silk Invest
Description:
Silk Invest was founded in 2008 as an innovative investment boutique with the main objective of opening new routes for investors. Silk Invest launched at that time a number of strategies focused on Frontier and Emerging markets. Over the years, Silk Invest has launched a range of strategies and partnerships to cover key growth areas in asset management.

Silk Invest is regulated by the UK FCA and registered with the US SEC. The firm has been a signatory to the United Nations Principles of Responsible Investing since 2009 and integrates ESG principles in most of its strategies.

Name: ROLAZ GROUP
Description:
ABOUT US:

ROLAZ Group invests its business experience, assets, resources and time in the development of new projects and / or highly innovative businesses with great growth capacity, and with an important component of business adventure.

We combine extensive management experience with the desire to participate in innovative projects associated with the combination of technological, financial and market development.

For this, we develop a wide range of high added value services that accompany the parties in the process of project development, managing each activity directly through a single executive, administrative, technical, financial, commercial and legal structure.

MISSION:
To constitute an international reference as a facilitator for the execution of projects, businesses and investments, encouraging business development, with participation in the public and private sectors. Encourage the development of businesses, strengthen existing ones and participate, totally or partially, in their capital.

VISION:
We work oriented to the creation of a business community based on Blockchain technology. It will be the first company whose participation grows constantly worldwide.

Name: El Seif Group
Description:
El Seif Group is a leading privately owned group of companies in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia with diverse business interests worldwide.

Since the Group’s establishment in 1951, El Seif has been committed to delivering the highest quality and achieved client satisfaction through high levels of professional standards and efficiency. This commitment has helped the Group’s member companies evolve into credible leaders in their respective business fields and earned the trust of the business and private banking communities.
El Seif Group commenced operations in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and the Middle East in the commerce and transport sectors with a large vehicle fleet that covered a wide network in the region. During the 1970's, through the addition of highly qualified managerial and technical capabilities, the Group diversified in the fields of engineering and construction, commercial investments, power generation, pre-cast production, operation & maintenance, hospitals management, and other business fields.

From the beginning, the emphasis of the Group has been on quality, efficiency, customer satisfaction, and long term planning. This philosophy has enabled the major companies of El Seif Group to become among the top firms in their lines of business.

Name: cy.capital
Description: A CY.Capital é a sociedade do Grupo Cyrela focada na gestão de fundos imobiliários. A CY.Capital foi criada através da associação entre a Cyrela Brazil Realty, holding do Grupo Cyrela, e um time de profissionais altamente qualificados e especializados na gestão, análise e aquisição de ativos alternativos (galpões, lajes corporativas, dívida com lastro imobiliário, entre outros). Desta forma, visa incorporar a experiência da equipe em negócios de crédito e desenvolvimento imobiliário à expertise do Grupo Cyrela na precificação de ativos, para investir nas melhores oportunidades no mercado imobiliário.

Name: Glow Capital Partners
Description: Glow Capital is a growth focussed private equity firm that invests in high growth and future focused companies in Australia and New Zealand.

Name: Riqueza Financial Consultancy
Description:
RIQUEZA  is a leading and specialized company in the provision of financial advisory services, and operates under license number (521)

On 30/04/2009 to conduct financial advisory activity on securities from the Egyptian Financial Supervisory Authority

RIQUEZA  has been registered in the register of independent financial advisors at the General Authority for Financial Supervision under No. (1732) on 31/08/2009

RIQUEZA  Financial Consultancy Company was registered as an official sponsor of the Egyptian Stock Exchange on the decision of the Board of Directors of the Egyptian Stock Exchange at the session No. (1) for the year 2014 and registered with the Register of Certified Brokers in the Stock Exchange for small and medium enterprises under No. (26)

Name: Quantedge
Description:
Quantedge was founded in 2006 and currently manages more than USD 4 billion worth of assets. We have garnered numerous international awards and accolades over the years including Top 5 Large Hedge Funds by Bloomberg in 2014 and 2016, Best Asian Billion Dollar Hedge Fund by EurekaHedge in 2018 and Fund of the Year by AsiaHedge in 2014 and 2016.

Quantedge runs a systematic quantitative investment strategy that is diversified across multiple asset classes such as equities, bonds, commodities, currencies and insurance-linked securities. We are a specialised investment manager with only one investment strategy. Our employees are collectively the largest investor in the Fund, ensuring a strong alignment of interest between us and our external investors.

The Fund Manager, Quantedge Capital, holds a Capital Markets Services (CMS) License and is regulated by the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS).

Name: Pinpoint Asset Management
Description: Pinpoint is a multi-manager, multi-strategy investment firm, with a particular focus on Asian markets. The firm has deep-rooted presence and expertise in Asia since 1999.

Name: Jana Investment Holding Co. جنى الاستثمارية القابضة
Description:
Jana Investment Holding is a leading investment conglomerate, operating 
across multiple sectors with a mission to drive economic growth and social 
development. Since our inception, we've been committed to adhering to strong 
foundational principles and harnessing a culture of high professionalism. With 
our firm dedication to complying with Saudi laws and regulations, we strive to 
foster growth across our portfolio of companies while being mindful of our 
responsibility towards our community, environment, and beloved country.

Name: Dolan McEniry Capital Management, LLC
Description:
Dolan McEniry is an intermediate duration fixed income value investor with a specialty in corporate bonds. Since 1997, the Dolan McEniry team has worked to provide excellent service to a full range of clients, from foundations and pension funds to individuals, families and others. We have grown to over $10 billion in assets under management as of March 15th, 2024 by trusting our investment process and always putting our clients first.
 
We serve our clients with unwavering focus, bringing a contrarian mindset that is unmoved by trends and relies on research conducted in-house. Our steady, efficient process uncovers companies that we believe offer quality credit at attractive prices. We focus on strong free cash flow, considering it an indicator of the ability to generate long-term value.
 
Dolan McEniry works hard to uncover the most undervalued corporate bonds — those with low credit risk and attractive prices — to include in our client portfolios. In doing so, the firm takes a lender's mentality rather than a trader's and focuses intently on managing downside risk while striving to maximize returns for our clients. It’s a clear, honest approach that has guided our firm since the beginning.
 
Dolan McEniry currently offers five US fixed income products each utilizing varying degrees of investment grade, high yield, and Treasury securities.  Regardless of the product, our process is the same.  We do our credit analysis in-house, without relying on Wall Street research or the rating agencies, and invest where we see value.

Name: TDM Berhad
Description:
Incorporated in 1965, TDM Berhad is one of the Shariah-compliant securities listed on the Main Market of Bursa Malaysia Securities Berhad under the Plantations sector. Following a successful restructuring exercise and a new strategic direction in 2000, TDM has grown into a leading player in the oil palm plantation and healthcare sectors.

The Group’s plantation arm, TDM Plantation Sdn. Bhd. (TDMP), is a premium producer of Certified Sustainable Palm Oil (CSPO) and Certified Sustainable Palm Kernel (CSPK) with the Malaysian Sustainable Palm Oil (MSPO), Roundtable on Sustainable Palm Oil (RSPO) and International Sustainability and Carbon Certification approved by the European Commission (ISCC EU) certifications. This division manages 15 oil palm estates and three palm oil mills, three Bio-Composting plants and three Biogas plants located in Terengganu and Indonesia. 

Under Kumpulan Medic Iman Sdn. Bhd. (KMI Healthcare), TDM owns five community specialist hospitals that provide quality and affordable secondary healthcare services. The hospitals are KMI Kelana Jaya Medical Centre, Petaling Jaya, Selangor, KMI Kuantan Medical Centre, Kuantan, Pahang, KMI Kuala Terengganu Medical Centre, Kuala Terengganu, KMI Taman Desa Medical Centre, Kuala Lumpur and KMI Tawau Medical Centre, Sabah.

Name: Australian Unity Wealth
Description:
Established in 1840, we were Australia’s first member-owned wellbeing company, delivering health, wealth and care services. We’re committed to real wellbeing for all Australians, and for us, real wellbeing means so much more than physical health. It’s about your standard of living and feeling safe in your home. It’s your personal relationships and being connected to your community. It’s about what you want to achieve in life, while having the security to get out and do what makes you happy.

Being a member-owned company—also called a mutual— gives us the freedom to invest money back into the services and solutions that matter most to our members, customers and the Australian community.

A financially secure future doesn’t happen without smart guidance and solid decision making. With our financial planning, advice and banking services, we’ll support you to make the most of your income.

Name: Tech Invest Com
Description:
Tech Invest Com aims to maximize shareholders returns through value added investments in technology in the MENA region with focus on GCC countries.  We strive to take advantage of, and participate in the evolving business environment and emerging opportunities driven by rapid technology innovation and the Saudi Vision 2030.

 

We have invested circa SAR 600 Million in various technology businesses in the region, including telecom, ICT, web-based businesses and higher education, including verticals and adjacencies related to these sectors.

Our investments take one of the following forms:

- Equity investment and / or convertible securities in earlier stage innovative companies with growth and scale up potential.
- Strategic PE equity in larger established companies.
- Strategic holdings of shares in listed equities.

Name: Clartan Associés
Description:
Clartan Associés manages capital for individual and institutional clients. 
It is an independent Société de Gestion de Portefeuille (Portfolio Management Company), approved by the Autorité des Marchés Financiers (1990). Clartan Associés builds on a “Quality & Value” investment process, implemented collegially by the partners and fund managers. 
The management of financial assets takes place primarily through the Clartan SICAV which includes : 

- Clartan Patrimoine, launched in 1991, is a product suited for precautionary savings that seeks to preserve and increase invested capital over a period of more than 2 years, with low volatility (circa 3% since inception).

- Clartan Flexible, launched in 2012, seeks to optimize the risk/return profile relative to the main global stock markets, over a period of at least five years.

- Clartan Valeurs, launched in 1991, seeks to grow capital over time (minimum 5-year period), and to outperform global equity indices over the long run.

- Clartan Europe, launched in 2003, seeks to outperform the main European equity indices over a period of more than 5 years.

- Clartan Ethos ESG Europe Small & Mid Cap, launched in September 2020, invests in a responsible and sustainable manner (positive impact) in European small and mid-cap stocks. It aims to increase the value of invested capital and to outperform the main European euro-denominated small and mid-cap indices over a period of at least five years.

Clartan Associés ’ assets under management currently amount to €1.1 billion.

Name: Consonance
Description:
We are an Africa-focused investment management firm with a simple, yet powerful mission: to help early and growth-stage entrepreneurs build enduring, high-impact businesses that drive the African continent forward. Our investment approach emphasizes key sectors like clean energy, agribusiness, education, healthcare, fintech, digital infrastructure, creative economy.

As responsible investors, we pay close attention to Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) factors, working to create inclusive growth, jobs, gender equality, climate resilience, and financial inclusion within our diverse portfolio companies.

Our strategy is rooted in a thesis-driven, research-based methodology, allowing us to uncover exceptional opportunities that contribute to sustainable development, regional integration, and better access to essential services in Africa. By harnessing our expertise in frontier markets and our commitment to social and economic empowerment, Consonance Investment Managers is the go-to choice for global Limited Partners (LPs) eager to make a lasting, positive impact on the African continent.

For more information, send us an email at info@consonanceinvest.com.

Name: iLabs Hyderabad Technology Center Private Limited
Description:
iLabs group is an India centric, sector opportunistic investment platform.
Founded in 2000, We were one of the pioneers of the investment ecosystem in India. Over the years, we have grown our scope in terms of both investment and industry. Originally started as an angel investor, we have expanded into seed-stage, early-stage and growth-stage investments, as well as re-structures and buy-outs. Initially focused on technology and technology enabled ventures, we have extended into consumer products and services; health and wellness; education and skills-development; media and entertainment; corporate and industrial parks and Pharma. Our investment strategy has permitted us to be a part of the success of many companies. Today, we are one of the Cornerstones of the Indian investment landscape.

Name: Tioopo Capital
Description: Operationally driven, Tioopo Capital is a Private Equity Investment firm that aims to help SMEs in France and UK sustain their growth.

Name: Litestream Ventures
Description: Litestream Ventures blends entertainment and investment, creating engaging content and investment opportunities. We support Series A to Series C stage founders tackling global challenges by partnering with venture funds and our family office network.

Name: Invest Johor
Description:
Invest Johor is a one-stop-center that represents the state of Johor in dealing with investors and helps to position Johor as an attractive destination for investment. Invest Johor plays an important role in matters related to the promotion, facilitation, coordination, and development or investments in a broad sector of industries. Ultimately, Invest Johor strives to help transform Johor into a regional hub for high-technology, knowledge-based, and capital intensive industries

VISION:
To position Johor as the preferred investment destination in the regions.

MISSION:
To be the leader in generating investment in the regions.

What can Invest Johor do for you?
1) Provide information about Johor’s business climate and investment opportunities.
2) Assist interested investors via direct consultation and co-operation with relevant authorities at the federal and state level.
3) Help to facilitate meetings with relevant stakeholders.
4) Assist in presenting queries to different government services.
5) Provide guidance on matters pertaining to government policies and procedures.
6) Respond to enquiries and requests in the shortest possible time.

Name: Argentum Asset Management
Description:
Argentum is a specialized asset manager that has been dedicated to private equity since 2001. Our core expertise is evaluating and selecting private equity funds and fund managers, including both venture and buyout. We invest on behalf of the Norwegian state and professional investors, including pension funds, foundations and family offices.

Argentum has a total AUM of €3 bn and has invested in more than 250 funds and over 1,400 companies.

Name: SixPoint Capital Management
Description: SixPoint Capital is a FinTech for FinTech Lenders and the first dedicated hybrid capital investor to global emerging market FinTech lenders and embedded finance platforms.  We provide flexible growth capital to allow us to partner with platforms on a long term strategic basis.  We can aggregate small and early stage FinTech Lenders on our platform to allow large institutional Private Credit investors unparalleled access to highly diversified ABF warehouse facilities in consumer and micro SME using our proprietary technology platform.  We are active in all three major global EM regions - LatAm, MENA/SSA, and SE Asia.

Name: Texas Permanent School Fund Corporation
Description:
We are a special-purpose governmental corporation charged with prudently managing and investing the assets of the Texas Permanent School Fund. We strive to achieve exceptional investment performance to protect and grow the historic public endowment and sovereign wealth fund of Texas, generating essential resources for current and future Texas schoolchildren.

As the nation’s oldest sovereign wealth fund, Texas PSF supports public education in two important ways: First, the investment portfolio we manage generates returns which help fund a portion of educational expenses, including textbooks and technology. Since 1969, the fund has generated nearly $39 billion dollars to help fund public education. 

Second, through the Bond Guarantee Program, independent school districts and charter districts use the Fund’s AAA credit rating schools to lower interest rates on their debt guaranteed by the Fund, allowing more money to go toward school improvements instead of interest, and saving Texas taxpayers hundreds of millions of dollars each year.

Name: Virtus Real Estate Capital
Description:
Virtus Real Estate Capital is one of the longest tenured private equity real estate fund managers in the U.S. focused exclusively on cycle resilient needs-based property sectors, such as healthcare, education, storage, and middle-income workforce housing. The Firm was founded in 2003 in Austin, TX. The Firm has acquired or developed more than 300 commercial properties totaling over $7 billion throughout the U.S. Virtus is known across the industry for its deep expertise in social infrastructure sectors and its commitment to people, which is driven by a strong corporate culture around its four core values: Thoughtful Evolution, Resilience, Honorable Action, and Purposeful Work. 

For more information on investment strategy and portfolio, please visit www.virtusre.com

We have noted an increased rate of scams occurring in the current job market. Virtus will not ask a candidate to expend any of their own funds during the hiring or interview process. We also do not conduct interviews through Telegram Messenger.

Name: Ace Capital
Description:
Somos uma gestora de recursos independente, resultante do desejo de perpetuar uma cultura de investimento baseada em pesquisa, pensamento independente, debate aberto e abrangente de ideias e gerenciamento rigoroso de risco, para a busca de resultados significativos e recorrentes.

Formada na mesa proprietária da tesouraria de um dos maiores bancos no Brasil ao longo da última década, nossa equipe tem perfis diversificados e complementares, essenciais em nosso método de investimento embasado em análises criteriosas de fundamentos, preços dos ativos e condições técnicas de mercado, para que a relação entre o risco e retorno do portfólio seja potencializada. 

Entendemos que para cultura e valores serem verdadeiros, devem ser colocados em prática. Nossa estrutura societária é bem distribuída e nossa remuneração orientada por desempenho. Parte significativa do patrimônio dos sócios está investida nos fundos da gestora e parte relevante dos rendimentos distribuídos será reinvestida. 

Seriedade, competência e transparência são nossos guias para a contínua evolução e aprimoramento.

Name: Illusian Founder Office
Description: Illusian is the Founder Office of people who have founded and scaled companies like Supercell, Zalando, Wolt, Aiven, Pigment, and Smartly. While the group is still busy running their businesses, they've aligned their networks, capital, and expertise to simultaneously support the next generation of builders. Illusian backs teams through venture capital and philanthropy.

Name: IPI Partners
Description:
As of January 6, 2024, IPI Partners was acquired by Blue Owl Capital. 

IPI Partners, LLC is a global investment platform focused exclusively on data centers and other technology and connectivity-related real assets, with more than $5.25 billion in total equity capital commitments. Since its formation in 2016, IPI has executed on its strategy of building the essential infrastructure of the data economy by acquiring, developing, leasing, and operating data centers in partnership with leading global technology companies. IPI owns one of the world’s largest private data center portfolios focused on the hyperscale and enterprise markets. The firm is co-sponsored by ICONIQ Capital, LLC and an affiliate of Iron Point Partners, LLC. IPI is headquartered in Chicago, with investment professionals located in San Francisco, Amsterdam, and Singapore.

Name: Empresas Feria de Osorno S.A
Description:
Feria de Osorno y sus empresas forman parte de la cadena productiva agropecuaria del sur de Chile, de tradición centenaria y emplazada en un territorio privilegiado por su clima y su belleza. Aquí, en verdes y extensas praderas, el ganado pasta libre y en estrecha relación con quienes lo cuidan, para llevar desde este origen al país y el mundo productos naturales de alta calidad, con los sabores del sur y la autenticidad de su gente.

Fundada en 1945, en su destacada trayectoria Feria de Osorno ha dado pasos visionarios para avanzar en el desarrollo productivo local, que hoy la posicionan como una empresa regional con alcance mundial, liderando las exportaciones de carne bovina, las transacciones de ganado y la provisión de productos y servicios especializados para el desarrollo agropecuario del sur de Chile. 

Se plantea nuevos desafíos para crear, junto a sus clientes productores y colaboradores, un futuro sostenible que permita seguir agregando valor y diferenciación a la producción, y así, competitividad a los predios.

Pertenecen al grupo las empresas Fegosa, Frigosorno y Ferosor, filiales de reconocido liderazgo en sus respectivos rubros, y Ganadera Osorno, enfocada al nuevo objetivo de aumentar la masa ganadera.

Name: Vam Investments
Description:
Directed to Growth. 

VAM Investments is a private equity investor working closely with entrepreneurs and management teams with ambitious plans for growth and consolidation.
 
Since 2012, VAM systematically operates in the research, negotiation, structuring and management of private equity investments with size in the €25m-€200m range, through a team of 15 professionals. 

VAM deploys the capital of an international network of private and institutional investors and promotes the VAM Investments Club, a group of Family Offices seeking exposure to multiple private equity transactions.

Name: GMA Capital
Description:
A un mundo que evoluciona y a una realidad que cambia de manera vertiginosa, en GMA decidimos llamarlos desafío. Para nosotros significa una oportunidad para desplegar nuestra mirada experta y la posibilidad de brindar a nuestros clientes oportunidades únicas de inversión. 
- Web: https://www.gmacap.com
- IG: https://www.instagram.com/gmacapital
- Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@gmacapital

Name: THORNICO
Description:
In THORNICO, we operate in a diverse business portfolio, striving to create synergy between our businesses and our people. From our vast real estate business merging concrete with nature in the urban environment; our pioneering experience with natural and functional ingredients as well as the handling and processing equipment designed for this; our solid and reliable shipping services; our sustainable packaging products and machinery, our investments in innovative and cutting-edge business solutions and our creative design and manufacturing of sports & fashion apparel and footwear. And as our business keeps growing, we continuously add new dew drops, expanding our THORNICO spiderweb.
In the THORNICO group of companies, we see our interconnectedness as an opportunity to draw us closer to the people we work with, to ‘tear down silos’ and to think more holistically. We call this our Company Karma philosophy; our mantra on doing good whilst doing business. As a core value in our company culture, we believe that positive actions will send positive ripples across the infinite net, touching every dew drop, every company, every colleague on its way. In a cohesive world, this can act as a  never-ending spiral of positive change.

Name: Eithaf Investment Co.
Description:
Established in 1999 as a fashion retail, Eithaf was the franchisee of DIDER PARAKIAN. With the aim of expanding our portfolio as well as to go along with the Vision 2030, we have widened our opportunities and invested in other sectors. 
- Investing in entertainment sector using new technologies and concepts that meet market needs in KSA such as VR,AR…etc.
- Investing in F&B sector using new concepts and themes that meet the growth of F&B in KSA.

Name: THARAWAT HOLDING COMPANY
Description:
Saudi Arabia has recently witnessed a quantum leap in its various business sectors. There has been a steady growth in projects and plans that have reflected positively on most of services provided in the Saudi market, such as real estate marketing, investment, construction, education, sport development, food and beverage, telecommunications, steel and others.

Among the pioneer corporations in diverse investments that have an excellent status in the Saudi market is Tharawat Holding Company.

Tharawat was established in 2008 as a holding company for a diverse range of investments in Saudi Arabia. 

In line with the sustainable and increasing development and growth in all service activities and projects in Saudi Arabia, Tharawat is seeking to achieve the quality in service and speed in implementation as well as its customers’ satisfaction. 

Tharawat Group has strategic investments and partnerships with a lot of companies working in various investments such as Al-Olaibi Group for Transport, Arkan Al-Solb Steel Co, Kiram Investment & Development and Kanolli (Kimma Cone Ice Cream Biscuits).  

Tharawat Holding Company is building a strong portfolio of businesses that supply the Saudi market with top-class quality products and services. Our subsidiaries diverse businesses include real estate, construction, education, sport development, food and beverage, telecommunications, steel and others.

Name: Mint Tower Capital Management
Description: Mint Tower Capital, established in 2010, is an Amsterdam based investment adviser to the Mint Tower Arbitrage Fund a multi-strategy fund specialized in volatility arbitrage with a long volatility bias. Via a quantitative approach and a qualitative overlay the fund invests almost exclusively via liquid exchange cleared instruments in volatility strategies that span equities, credit and convertible bonds globally. The applied combined strategies provide consistent, uncorrelated, superior risk-adjusted returns throughout the economic cycle while decreasing the overall risk profile of a broader portfolio. Since the start of the fund, this resulted in a yearly positive net return, including the financial markets negative years (eg. 2011 and 2018). The fund's objective is a stable annual net return of approximately >5% over a period of 3-5 years, while focusing on capital preservation.

Name: Fakher Holding    هلدینگ فاخر

Fakher Holding has been established with the aim of creating a business ecosystem in the specialized fields of post, logistics, e-commerce, manufacturing and trades.

Rakiza targets assets in Renewable Energy, Power and Water, Social Infrastructure, Telecommunications, Regulated Utilities, Transport and Logistics, and Environmental Projects.

Description: Based in Charlottesville, Virginia, Investure was founded in 2003 to serve as the outsourced investment office to a select group of endowments and private foundations. Managing assets of approximately $19 billion as of June 2025, Investure is responsible for asset allocation and manager selection in multiple asset classes including but not limited to fixed income, global public equities, and alternative investments (hedge funds and private equity). Investure is a fast-paced, high-energy, mission-driven organization where there is vast opportunity for learning.

Name: Innovator ETFs
Description:
Innovator was established in 2017 by Bruce Bond and John Southard, founders of the PowerShares ETF lineup that has grown to be the fourth largest in the world. The listing of three Innovator Buffer ETFs in August 2018 marked the launch of the world’s first Defined Outcome ETFs. 
Innovator is dedicated to providing ETFs with built-in risk management that seek to offer investors a high level of predictability around their investment outcomes. Today, with more than 150 ETFs and $28 billion in AUM, as of October 1, 2025, Innovator is the industry’s leading provider of Defined Outcome ETFs.

Name: Lagata
Description:
Lagata invest in businesses in growth markets, with a specific expertise in emerging markets and particularly in sub-Saharan Africa. We put responsible investment at the core of what we do by focusing on businesses that can generate sustainable profits, creating positive social and environmental impact.

We add long-term value to the businesses we work with while aiming to improve the infrastructure where they operate. We do this through hands-on involvement in each company that we own or invest in, and by connecting them to our ecosystem of support services that we have built up throughout the region.

We operate in areas where we feel we can make a significant difference to the regional economic growth and long-term sustainability. We are strong believers that investments can be both profitable and produce a positive impact to their local communities and countries. Through ownership, we aim to drive that change.

Name: B-FLEXION
Description:
B-FLEXION is a private, entrepreneurial investment firm that partners with sophisticated capital to meet the shared goal of delivering exceptional value over generations, while also contributing positively to society.
 
With offices across Europe and in the US, B-FLEXION invests in – and partners with – asset managers across sectors including Private Equity, Venture Capital, Infrastructure, Technology, Real Estate, Hedge Funds, Public and Private Credit, and Public Securities. It also continues to drive expansion by growing operating businesses in transformative industries. In keeping with – and building upon – its heritage, these are principally in the fields of Life Sciences, Healthcare Services and Digital Health.

Name: Launchpad Venture Group
Description:
Launchpad Venture Group is a Boston-area angel investing group focused on locally based, early stage companies, primarily in high tech and life sciences.  

Launchpad is the most active Seed funder in the region having backed over 150 start ups. Launchpad specializes in leading priced equity raises. Launchpad invests approximately $10 million per year and actively syndicates with other Angel Groups and Venture Capitalists.

You can learn more at www.launchpadventuregroup.com.

Name: Grupo Newport
Description:
Grupo Newport is a number of companies which have a clear spirit to offer private clients as well as institutions, a wide range of products and services for real estate market. From the beginning our business vision has been consistent with the global economy established in our current world and from this perspective, the fulfilment of the mission of creating wealth and welfare involved the expansion of activities at a geographical level. Grupo Newport has been created with a clear vocation of international projection and proof of this are the different lines of business established in Europe and Africa.

Initially, the Newport Group has developed an implantation in the real estate markets of the Canary Islands (Gran Canaria, Fuerteventura, Tenerife and Lanzarote), Cape Verde (Sal, Boa Vista and Maio) and Morocco (Tarfaya) with several large-scale projects. We offer our clients a wide range of goods and real estate projects of all kinds: urban land, housing and residential complexes of any nature, buildings, premises and shopping centres, etc. 

At Grupo Newport, the important thing is our maximum professionalism and work, aimed at success with a very personalized attention, always pondering an excellent advice and service.

Our commitment is you.
Location: Las Palmas de Gran Canaria, Las Palmas

Description: Headquartered in Dubai, Dhow Holding stands as a beacon of innovation and progress in the MENA region. Managing a diverse portfolio of assets both within the UAE and internationally, we actively shape the future by investing in technology, e-commerce, media, and real estate sectors. Transform ideas into market-leading companies and helping business growth is at the core of our mission. We are passionate about fostering innovation, driving change, and creating a lasting impact on the planet.

Name: Hawksmoor Investment Management
Description:
Hawksmoor Investment Management specialises in providing high quality discretionary management services for private clients including trusts, pension schemes and charities. 

Our award-winning Fund Management team manages multi-asset funds-of-funds and a series of risk-based ‘Model Portfolios’ for Financial Advisers. 

With offices in Exeter, London, Taunton, Bath and Worcester, Hawksmoor is a leading specialist investment and fund management business.

Name: Scalare Partners
Description:
Scalare Partners Holdings Limited (ASX: SCP, www.scalarepartners.com) exists to empower visionary technology founders to transform their ideas into the great businesses of tomorrow.  As a dynamic force in the tech startup landscape, we offer a range of products and services to support all founders as they scale their early-stage businesses.

We are deeply involved in the broader technology ecosystem, driving change through impactful initiatives such as the Tech Ready Women and the Australian Technologies Competition, where we partner with government and corporates to support and promote the most promising technology businesses and founders. Our focus extends to working with female and culturally diverse founders, addressing the unique challenges they encounter in fundraising and scaling their businesses. This engagement not only enriches the tech landscape but also creates lucrative revenue and investment opportunities for Scalare Partners.

At the heart of our business model is the provision of products and services and expert advice tailored to the specific needs of early-stage businesses. We also provide direct investment into selected outstanding businesses and with a current emphasis on the Australian and USA technology sectors, we are building a portfolio spanning across diverse geographies, including Australia, USA, New Zealand, Singapore, UK, and Europe. Scalare Partners is not just an investor; we are architects of growth, collaborators in innovation, and catalysts for positive change in the technology landscape.

Name: Titan Wealth CI
Description:
Titan Wealth is a wealth management company with £35bn assets under management and more than 1,250 employees across eight jurisdictions, including the Channel Islands. Our experienced and qualified teams in Guernsey and Jersey offer a range of investment solutions for all types of client; from individuals and families to charities, intermediaries and corporations.
Whether you are looking to trade directly, discuss investment opportunities, purchase and store precious metals or achieve higher returns on your cash, our products and services are tailored to create a bespoke experience for every client.
With two decades of experience in the Channel Islands’ market, we have combined our local knowledge with the ambition of a growing global company. In 2021, Titan Wealth set out to create a top-to-bottom, fully integrated service to make wealth management more efficient - and more effective. Our unique structure brings funds, technology and service together in one single integrated business. We’re doing things differently: structured to power the ambitions of individuals, financial advisers, investment professionals, employers and colleagues through the provision of more efficient and effective.
Titan Wealth is licensed and regulated by the Guernsey Financial Services Commission and regulated by the Jersey Financial Services Commission.

Name: Meydan Group
Description:
The Meydan Group is one of Australia’s most entrepreneurial and diversified groups. Under a single parent company, we manage diverse operating businesses, investments and assets across multiple industries across the world. Our aim to create value at every opportunity.

Innovation, technology, people and finance are core to our portfolio regardless of the sector in which the business operates.  

Some of the businesses in our portfolio include: 
- Taking Shape, an award winning women's fashion retailer.
- Ocean Software, a world class, international enterprise software solutions provider.
- ABMT, a world class international textile and apparel manufacturer to major brands.
- Cosmopolitan Hotel, a four star boutique hotel in Melbourne.
- Cybring, an agile cyber security training platform developing cybersecurity resilience to clients globally. 
- Meydan Developments, delivering quality residential and mixed use property projects in Australia and abroad.  

The Meydan Group is always looking for intelligent, innovative and confident people to join their group. To find out more or to enquire about employment opportunities please contact our headquarters in Melbourne.

Name: Truvvo Partners
Description: Truvvo acts as an outsourced investment office for a select group of large, complex families by providing investment management, strategic advice and planning and direct private investing services. Our open-architecture platform is global and spans all asset classes, public and private. We provide bespoke, customized solutions and give families the opportunity to take part in direct investments alongside other investors in our network. We believe collaboration drives value and we encourage a confidential, interactive, peer to peer culture. As a privately held partnership, we remain aligned with our families by investing alongside them, offering no proprietary products and engaging in no fee-sharing agreements.

Name: Malacca Securities Sdn Bhd
Description:
Malacca Securities Sdn. Bhd. is an award-winning homegrown stockbroking company with over 60 years of experience providing investment solutions for retail investors and corporate organisations. Malacca Securities is listed as a participating organisation under Bursa Malaysia and licensed by the Securities Commission Malaysia. Malacca Securities is committed to revolutionising the financial landscape through technology and innovation, starting with the launch of M+ Online in 2012 to boost investors’ trading journey in the local scene. With its 60th anniversary in 2023, Malacca Securities launched M+ Global, a global trading platform with real-time market data, news, and alerts to help Malaysians make better-informed trading decisions to navigate the global market confidently. 

Company Registration Number:
MALACCA SECURITIES SDN. BHD.
197301002760 (16121-H)

Name: Master 222 - Asset Management - Université Paris-Dauphine
Description:
Créé en 2000 à la demande et en étroite collaboration avec les leaders du secteur, le parcours 222 est le premier à être spécialisé en gestion d’actifs. Proposé en alternance dès la 1ère année et sur deux ans, ou à partir de la 2ème année, le Master allie enseignement théorique et expérience pratique incluant formation en alternance, projets et gestion d’un fonds.

Depuis près de 20 ans, le Master 222 forme ses étudiants à l'ensemble des métiers de l'Asset Management, notamment à la gestion et à l'analyse financière, au travers d'un enseignement riche dispensé par des professionnels expérimentés : gestion alternative, private equity, analyse financière, gestion de portefeuille, macroéconomie, allocation d'actifs, etc.

Les étudiants du master 222 ont l'opportunité d'évoluer au sein des plus grandes sociétés de gestion, dans le cadre de leur formation, par le biais d'un contrat d'apprentissage leur permettant une parfaite immersion dans le monde de l'Asset Management.

Name: Richelieu International
Description:
Richelieu International est le leader de la gestion de patrimoine pour les Français expatriés. Nous aidons nos clients à atteindre leur indépendance financière grâce à une gamme très large de solutions d'investissements spécialement conçus pour les expatriés. Toutes nos solutions restent bien évidemment fiscalement avantageuses même après un retour en France.

Notre expertise couvre les domaines suivants :

*    Family Office

*    Asset Management

*    Assurance Vie
*    Placements Immobiliers

*    Conseil en Investissement
*    Transmission Patrimoniale

Name: Porto Asset
Description:
Há mais de 25 anos, transformamos o jeito de investir.
Começamos com a gestão dos recursos do Grupo Porto e, em 2014, abrimos novas fronteiras: passamos a oferecer fundos de investimento acessíveis a todos que desejam investir com estratégia e confiança. Desde então, inovamos em produtos, ampliamos nosso portfólio com soluções diversificadas e reunimos uma equipe de especialistas com olhar atento para o mercado financeiro. Já são mais de R$ 36 bilhões sob nossa gestão, sempre com foco no que realmente importa: os resultados dos nossos investidores com segurança, cuidado e solidez.

Name: Malawi Investment and Trade Centre
Description:
The Malawi Investment and Trade Centre (MITC) is a one-stop service centre for trade and investment in Malawi. Our mandate is to promote and facilitate investment, and to promote exports by providing market intelligence, export development services and other support services. 

We are committed to promoting a conducive business environment for investors, and to creating wealth through sustainable economic growth.

Name: Curmi & Partners Ltd.
Description:
Curmi & Partners are one of the leading investment services providers in Malta. Providing our clients with independent, wealth management solutions that are customised to their individual investment profiles and their appetite for risk.

Over the years, the firm has built a substantial knowledge base through the members of its professional staff. Our strength derives from the extensive research that we carry out on companies that we believe have the long term potential to yield attractive returns, both in Maltese financial markets and in the international arena. The partners believe this is the key to enabling the firm to provide a tailor made professional service focussed on delivering performance.

The investment ideas and solutions that we develop for our clients are the results of innovative thinking that have successfully addressed many corporate and investment objectives. Part of that service is to invest in the company’s strategic relationships with top international investment houses in the finance and investment sectors to ensure professional work ties that build better quality solutions.

Description:
Taaleri Energia is a renewable energy fund manager with one of the largest dedicated investment teams in Europe. We develop, construct and operate wind, solar and battery energy storage assets that drive the global transition to clean energy. We invest in high-impact, high-sustainability projects that deliver strong returns for our investors.

Name: Dar Al-Aila
Description:
Dar Al-Aila is a Saudi Investment & Venture Capital Company that aims to provide different shades of business solutions to empower and enable the entrepreneurship spirit within the local market.

Founded in 2016 by establishing its strategically located head office down-town of Riyadh-KSA, the team is diversified and capable to facilitate and transform the business opportunity from being an idea to being a fully registered & operated business within a short-time period.

Dar Al-Aila's unique portfolio shows that diversity is something we aimed to establish, and an advantage which we aim to sustain.

With this said, we would like to welcome you to explore our website and hopefully start another successful story together.

Name: Data Analyst
Description:
Welcome to our LinkedIn page! We are a dedicated team of Data Analysts, passionate about transforming raw data into meaningful insights. With a proven track record in extracting actionable information, we specialize in leveraging data to drive informed business decisions.

Currently, we are thrilled to introduce you to our cutting-edge platform that seamlessly integrates advanced analytics tools. Our platform is designed to empower professionals across diverse industries, providing intuitive interfaces and robust functionalities for data exploration and visualization.

Join us on this journey of unlocking the true potential of your data. Whether you are a seasoned analyst or a newcomer to the world of data, our user-friendly platform ensures a smooth experience for everyone. Let's explore the limitless possibilities together and elevate our data-driven decision-making skills to new heights. Connect with us to stay updated on the latest trends, insights, and opportunities in the dynamic field of data analytics.

Name: Pamplona Capital Management
Description: Pamplona Capital Management LLP is a privately owned hedge fund sponsor. The firm manages hedge fund of funds for its clients. It invests in the public equity and hedging markets across the globe. The firm employs a bottom-up approach to select the fund of fund managers for its clients. Pamplona Capital Management was founded in 2004 and is based in London.

Name: ViKtoria Ventures
Description: Since 2011, the ViKtoria team has been actively supporting the growth of entrepreneurial ecosystems in various sectors in East Africa. ViKtoria Ventures is the manager of the recently launched Viktoria Business Angels Network (VBAN) which is focused on investments into the tech sector in East Africa.

Name: Helaba Invest Kapitalanlagegesellschaft mbH
Description: Die Helaba Invest gehört in Deutschland zu den führenden Kapitalverwaltungsgesellschaften im institutionellen Asset Management. Als zuverlässiger Partner vertrauen institutionelle Anleger seit 30 Jahren auf unsere langjährige Erfahrung. Unsere Unternehmensstrategie basiert auf den drei Geschäftsbereichen "Asset Management", "Alternative Investments" sowie "Asset Servicing" verbunden mit unserer Dienstleistung als Master-KVG. Als Brücke zwischen Master-KVG und Asset Management bieten wir darüber hinaus seit mehreren Jahren ein Overlay Management an. Unser umfassendes Wissen über die Kapitalmärkte nutzen wir, um für unsere Anleger gute und stetige Anlageergebnisse bei kontrolliertem Risiko zu erzielen.

Name: RPS Capital – Investment Management
Description:
A RPS Capital começou como um sonho de um grupo de sócios de criar algo único. Com paixão e determinação semeamos a criação dessa gestora independente, pautada pela ética, transparência e visão de longo prazo.

Nossa missão é cuidar do patrimônio dos nossos clientes da mesma forma que cuidamos do nosso.

Sonhamos grande, nossa árvore possui raízes profundas e robustas. Buscamos incansavelmente ser únicos, levados pela paixão por gerir portfólios.

Respeito pelo investidor, Performance consistente e diversificada e Sustentabilidade formando a melhor equipe de gestão de ativos.

Name: Quadro Capital
Description:
Quadro Capital (QC Group) is a private investment group focusing on financial and infrastructural CONNECTIVITY in EU, MENA, and SEA.
CONNECTIVITY stands for logistics, data and financial infrastructure helping people and economies cooperate and grow via enhanced and seamless connection, removing boundaries in finance, data, material and human flows. 
Logistics, Capacity Management as well as Fintech, Sports and Entertainment are among our favourites. 
QC was launched in 2008 by Giedrius Pukas. Prior to that Mr. Pukas was managing over $4bn private equity and VC portfolio in CEE/Emerging markets for investors such as Temasek (Singapore), GSAM, Tisch/Loews. 
QC Group operates from Dubai, Abu Dhabi and Doha.
