Name: Escala
Description:
Escala Partners is the new standard in personalised wealth management.

Everything we do is designed to put our clients’ interests first and realise their financial aspirations. We develop tailored strategies focused on creating and preserving wealth; offer objective, considered advice based on market-leading research; and work collaboratively as a team so we can deliver superior outcomes. 

This is our point of difference: a completely new experience in wealth management.

Escala Partners Pty Ltd. is a Corporate Authorised Representative of Escala Wealth Management Pty Ltd (AFSL 456207). Our important information can be seen at https://escalapartners.com.au/important

Name: Initiative & Finance
Description:
Initiative & Finance, un investisseur spécialisé dans la transmission des PME depuis 1984.

Depuis plus de 30 ans, Initiative & Finance est un acteur majeur du capital investissement en France, entièrement consacré au financement et à la transmission des PME. Près de 300 investissements réalisés, de nombreuses croissances externes : Initiative & Finance bénéficie d’une expertise unique sur le segment des PME en France.

La mission d’Initiative & Finance est d’accompagner les managers entrepreneurs dans la réalisation de leurs projets : recomposition du capital, transmission, accélération de la croissance, stratégie d’acquisition...

Initiative & Finance...
- entre en capital aux côtés d’entrepreneurs,
- en qualité d’actionnaire majoritaire ou minoritaire,
- en misant sur des PME allant de 5 à 75 millions d’euros de chiffre d’affaires, 
- en investissant de 1 à 15 millions d’euros par opération,
- dans une dizaine d’opérations par an,
- et sans restriction sectorielle.

Les PME, plus que toutes autres entreprises, ont besoin d’investisseurs adaptés à leurs problématiques de transmission et de croissance. Bien plus qu’un investissement financier, c’est un engagement à partager ensemble un projet de développement que propose Initiative & Finance, une aventure humaine tournée vers le succès.

www.initiative-finance.com

Contact : info@initiative-finance.com

Name: Arisaig Partners
Description: Arisaig Partners is an independent investment management company that has been investing in the rise of the Asian consumer since 1996. A simple framing of the business models we like can be captured in the framing ‘Eat, Drink, Wash, Wear, Shop’ as this articulates the focus of our holdings to sell essential products to emerging market consumers. The business models we invest in are branded consumer, retail and subscription and we invest in those that are dominant in their space and have built deep moats through their brand strength, distribution reach and execution capabilities. We are business owners not traders and are known for our bottom-up, research driven investment approach based on local insights. When we invest, we aim to own a business forever and value all our holdings on a 20-year view. We have run an Asia Fund since inception. In addition to our head office in Singapore, we have a research office in Mumbai and in London. For more information please contact investorrelations@arisaig.com.

Name: Grupo EZOS
Description:
O Grupo Ezos é um grupo econômico que integra marcas consolidadas do sul de Santa Catarina nos segmentos de alimentos, bebidas e desenvolvimento urbano.

Com atuação estratégica e gestão profissionalizada, o grupo administra as empresas:

Fumacense Alimentos e Bebidas — detentora das marcas Kiarroz, Campeiro, RisoVita, Boby, e, Saint Bier, Coruja e Catarina;
JS Empreendimentos — referência na construção de loteamentos e condomínios horizontais com atuação em mais de 20 cidades de Santa Catarina. 

Criado oficialmente em 2020, o Grupo Ezos nasceu com o propósito de conectar tradição, inovação e crescimento sustentável, consolidando estruturas, marcas e pessoas em torno de uma visão empreendedora de longo prazo.

Name: Big Will Group N.V.
Description: The BIG Will Group of companies has several subsidiaries, which are operating internationally, in South America, Europe and the USA. All subsidiaries are independent operating entities. The Group provides strategic guidance, financial and administrative - IT services and acts as legal and human resource counsel.

Name: Richard Bernstein Advisors
Description:
Richard Bernstein Advisors LLC (“RBA”) is an investment manager focusing on long-only, global equity and asset allocation investment strategies. The Firm manages $17.5 billion (as of September 30, 2025) and is unique in its “top-down” research approach versus the traditional “bottom-up” style of most asset management firms.  RBA utilizes proprietary macro indicators to assess market dynamics and then forms portfolios with the assistance of quantitative tools.  Portfolios focus on allocating assets across various countries, sectors, size, and style to generate alpha, while minimizing the security selection risk of a more concentrated portfolio.  

RBA offers sub-advisory services and customized, separately-managed accounts for both their equity and asset allocation strategies. The Firm distributes products through partnerships with some of the world's leading financial institutions, including UBS Wealth Management, Merrill Lynch Wealth Management, Morgan Stanley Wealth Management, Ameriprise Financial, Wells Fargo and select RIA platforms, where RBA provides clients with tailored asset-allocation models comprised of ETFs in discretionary wrap programs; and First Trust Portfolios, where RBA creates equity-income and thematic equity-oriented portfolios in a series of unit investment trusts. Additionally, the Firm manages two indexes, the RBA American Industrial Renaissance Index and the RBA Quality Income Index. RBA is the index provider for two exchange-traded funds available through First Trust Portfolios: the First Trust RBA American Industrial Renaissance ETF and the First Trust RBA Deglobalization ETF. 

RBA was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in New York City.

Name: Blue Sea Capital LLC
Description:
Blue Sea Capital is a private equity firm specializing in growth-oriented lower middle market companies. We target opportunities in large, dynamic, secular growth manufacturing and service industries with special focus on a few sectors where we have deep collective prior experience: aerospace & defense, healthcare and industrial growth. 

Our strategy is to partner with talented managers and differentiated companies - typically as the first or second institutional investor - and deliver strategic and operational value-add that drives growth acceleration, industry outperformance and business transformation. We are a knowledgeable, active and transformational - not transactional - partner that supports companies in capitalizing upon opportunities to become industry leaders. 

The team is distinguished by its long-term lower middle market focus, deep vertical expertise, differentiated operational and partnering capabilities, selective investment orientation, strong entrepreneur and investor alignment, culture of dependability and passion for building great businesses.

Name: Citisoft
Description: With offices across North America and the UK, Citisoft partners with the world's leading investment management firms and service providers to create impactful and effective solutions to today’s complex business problems. Our sole focus is assessing, designing, and delivering results-oriented operations and technology change across the entire investment management process.

Name: Riello Investimenti SGR
Description:
Riello Investimenti SGR è una società indipendente di gestione del risparmio attiva da oltre 20 anni nel settore degli Investimenti Alternativi, nella gestione di fondi di private equity e di private debt.

Il background industriale costituisce un importante vantaggio competitivo, che può far leva su di un consolidato network di relazioni con imprenditori, managers ed advisors specializzati.

Operiamo sin dalle origini nel segmento delle PMI, combinando le nostre competenze, industriali e finanziarie, per contribuire al miglioramento delle performance aziendali.

La nostra strategia punta alla GESTIONE ATTIVA delle aziende nei portafogli d’investimento, allo sviluppo anche attraverso l’ingresso di nuove risorse manageriali, al miglioramento della corporate governance, al consolidamento e alla internazionalizzazione.

Name: WIT - Wealth, Investments & Trust
Description:
Riqueza, investimentos e confiança. 

Mais do que palavras, esses três pilares definem o nome e o propósito da WIT: oferecer a confiança necessária para uma gestão patrimonial sólida, garantindo que o patrimônio de seus clientes continue crescendo e atravessando gerações. 

A WIT nasce da convicção de que grandes fortunas não devem ser passageiras. Por isso, sua missão é romper com ciclos patrimoniais curtos e preservar o legado construído ao longo de uma vida — com estratégia, consistência e visão de futuro. 

Com um ecossistema completo, a empresa atua de forma integrada nas áreas de câmbio, investimentos, seguros, imóveis e crédito estruturado. Tudo para oferecer soluções personalizadas, alinhadas aos objetivos e ao momento de cada cliente. 

Com sede em Campinas, a WIT está presente nas capitais de São Paulo e Paraná, além de cidades estratégicas do interior paulista. 

A empresa segue em plena expansão, consolidando sua atuação como referência em gestão patrimonial no Brasil.

Name: Eqclique
Description: Eqclique is a first-of-its-kind membership community for sophisticated investors offering bespoke education programs, networking events, investing insights and a diverse range of alternative investments.

Name: RealtyShares
Description: RealtyShares is a real estate investment platform that gives investors direct access to quality commercial real estate investment opportunities. We connect our network of individual and institutional investors with experienced real estate operators looking to raise capital to improve properties for higher, better use. Venture-backed by premier investors such as 500 Startups, Union Square Ventures, General Catalyst, Cross Creek Advisors and Menlo Ventures, RealtyShares has deployed more than $840 million over 1,100 investment opportunities in 41 states.

Name: Rancilio Cube SICAF
Description:
We are financial investors with an industrial background.
We love innovation and progress.
We strive to remain humble and curious, every day.
We created from scratch a strategy to invest in the best venture capital opportunities globally.
We invest in people, supporting the journey of entrepreneurs and funds, and acting as a loyal limited partner.
We know how difficult it is to be an entrepreneur and we know how hard it is to get access to the best investments (we have been clients of financial institutions!).
We align our investors’ interests with ours by providing the access to the same outstanding opportunities, at the same conditions.
We put our investors and our investments first.

Rancilio Cube SICAF spa is a fixed capital investment company, supervised by the Bank of Italy, which offers an exclusive investment strategy in the international "venture capital" asset class, with a deep diversification through the best funds and direct investments held in the proprietary portfolio.

Aut. n. 59 del 13 luglio 2022  Albo SICAF ex art. 35 TER TUF
VAT n. / Partita Iva 12486720969

Name: BitQcode Capital
Description: BitQcode Capital is a premier asset management firm, focused on delivering attractive performance and tailored client solutions in multiple Crypto asset classes and strategies worldwide.

Name: Baker Street Advisors
Description:
Baker Street Advisors is a San Francisco based, SEC Registered Investment Adviser (RIA) with over $17 billion under advisement.  We serve as fiduciaries, providing customized wealth management and comprehensive investment advisory solutions to private clients, families and foundations.

Our client investment portfolios reflect the principles of simplicity, cost-effectiveness and tax-efficiency.

Please visit our website (www.bakerstreetadvisors.com) for more information.

Name: Brightwood Capital
Description:
Brightwood Capital Advisors, LLC is a private credit firm with a long-standing track record of investing in middle market businesses. Brightwood specializes in providing senior debt capital primarily to U.S. businesses with $5-$75 million of EBITDA within five core industries: technology & telecommunications, healthcare, business services, transportation & logistics and franchising. Brightwood partners with non-sponsored businesses as well as private equity sponsors to provide customized financing solutions for directly originated investments.

Founded in 2010, Brightwood is a minority-owned firm with a team of over 50 employees who manage more than $5 billion of assets on behalf of its primarily institutional investor base. Brightwood is headquartered in New York City.

Name: Nepean Capital
Description:
Nepean Capital, headquartered in Mumbai, manages funds that invest in Public & Private markets in India. The funds are structured as Alternative Investment Funds (AIF) Category II & III registered with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI).

Nepean Capital leverages the team’s financial industry experience and through a rigorous stock selection process, identifies and invests in Indian companies.

Name: Monarch Alternative Capital LP
Description:
Monarch Alternative Capital LP is an opportunistic credit manager with offices in New York and London. 
For over 30 years, professionals at the Firm have invested across various market segments including corporate, real estate, structured credit, government debt, and special situations. 
Monarch’s goal to deliver results for our clients is at the core of all we do. Our culture of partnership and transparency, driven by the collaborative spirit of our employees, accentuates beneficial relationships with our global and diverse investors, companies, operating partners, and advisors.

Name: Tios Capital, LLC
Description:
Tios Capital is a proprietary trading firm founded in 2012 with offices in Birmingham, Alabama and Alexandria, Virginia. We bring a rigorous quantitative approach, supported by scalable technologies, to our investment decisions across a variety of wholesale power markets, including CAISO, ERCOT, MISO, SPP, and PJM.

Our success requires specialized expertise in quantitative analytics, technology development, and a deep knowledge of market fundamentals. We are specialized, but not siloed. Our culture is marked by humility, resilience, balance, and a collaborative approach that promotes teamwork, cross-functional learning and the sharing of ideas. Over the last decade, our core commitment to continuous improvement has produced a robust tech platform, expanding trading profits, and a flourishing team environment.

Name: Sistema
Description:
"Sistema" is the largest diversified publicly-traded investment company in Russia and the CIS, which invests in and is a major shareholder of companies serving over 100 million customers in the sectors of telecommunications, high technology, oil and energy, radars and aerospace, banking, retail, mass-media, tourism and healthcare services. Founded in 1993, the company reported revenues of US$ 7.9 billion for the first quarter of 2012, and total assets of US$ 47.3 billion as at March 31, 2012. Sistema's global depository receipts are listed under the symbol "SSA" on the London Stock Exchange. Sistema's ordinary shares are listed under the symbol "AFKS" on the MICEX-RTS Stock Exchange, and under the symbol "SIST" on the Moscow Stock Exchange (MSE). Sistema was ranked number 342 in the 2010 edition of the Fortune Global 500 list. 

Assets Portfolio - 
MTS (Telecommunications)
Bashneft (Oil Production and Refining)
Bashkirenergo (Energy Production and Distribution)
Sistema Shyam TeleServices Ltd. (Telecommunications, India)
Sistema Mass-Media (Content Production and Media Distribution)
Detsky Mir (Retail)
MTS Bank (Finance)
Intourist (Tourism)
MEDSI (Healthcare)
RTI (Defence Solutions, Comprehensive Security Systems, Telecom Solutions, Microelectronics Solutions and System Integration)
Binnopharm (Biotechnologies and Pharma Productions)
NIS-GLONASS (Navigation Systems and Services) 

Website: www.sistema.com

Name: SPUERKEESS Asset Management
Description: C’est en avril 2006 que notre société de gestion d’actifs, alors dénommée Lux-Investment Advisors S.A., a lancé ses activités. Si elle menait à bien son rôle de société de gestion indépendante dans un premier temps, elle a su se rapprocher, en accord avec ses actionnaires, de son actionnaire principal, la Banque et Caisse d’Épargne de l’État. C’est dans ce contexte que notre société est devenue BCEE Asset Management S.A., laquelle assume aujourd'hui la gestion de près de 40 compartiments UCITS et portefeuilles institutionnels d’un montant global de plus de 5 milliards EUR en actifs nets. Parmi les rôles qu’elle endosse figurent également celui de Conseiller à l’égard de la Banque privée, de Gérant des mandats institutionnels sans oublier celui de Prestataire de services en matière de Risk Management. Aujourd’hui, Banque et Caisse d’Épargne de l’État est devenue Spuerkeess, et BCEE Asset Management lui a emboîté le pas en devenant Spuerkeess Asset Management.

Name: ThinkBot Research LLP
Description:
Thinkbot Research is a proprietary systematic trading firm. We combine rigorous statistical techniques with cutting-edge technology to develop automated trading systems.
We are always looking for top candidates to join our group. Our collegial culture gives the opportunity to openly express ideas in an informal, fun, and intellectually stimulating environment. We value innovation, collaboration, and perseverance. Join us for a long and fulfilling career.

Name: Zignago Holding S.p.A.
Zagros Capital
Description:
A Zagros Capital é uma gestora de recursos independente que se dedica especialmente à gestão de ativos imobiliários. Para além da gestão de fundos imobiliários, a Zagros expande suas áreas de atuação para incluir a gestão de patrimônio, consultoria e a estruturação de empreendimentos no setor imobiliário.

Atualmente, a Zagros detém um portfólio de mais de R$ 2 bilhões em ativos sob sua gestão, distribuídos entre fundos imobiliários (FII’s), sociedades de propósito específico (SPE´s) e investimentos coletivos estruturados (club deals).

O compromisso da Zagros é pautado por uma gestão transparente, que se fundamenta na construção de relações responsáveis, éticas e respeitosas com seus stakeholders. Buscamos a independência, robustez e consistência na criação de oportunidades no mercado imobiliário, sempre com o objetivo de gerar valor significativo para seus investidores.

Name: Industrial Promotion Services (IPS)
Description:
Industrial Promotion Services (IPS) is the industrial and infrastructure development arm of the Aga Khan Fund for Economic Development, which is dedicated to promoting private sector entrepreneurship and building economically sound enterprises in the developing world.

 IPS operates in East Africa, West Africa and Central Asia. We have a diverse portfolio of over 20 companies spanning across multiple sectors including agroindustry, renewable power, telecommunications and healthcare.

Sustainability is embedded in our purpose, we believe in building a future that is sustainable, resilient, and conducive to the well-being of all. Our mission is clear to enhance the quality of life for people by championing the development of sustainable businesses across various sectors. IPS and its group of companies have committed to achieving net zero by 2025.

Name: Azmont Investments
Description:
Azmont Investments is a Montenegro based company committed to apply its most adequate resources to achieve its mission: to create an efficient and sustainable investment portfolio focusing on accountability, environmental sustainability and corporate social responsibility. Company wish and commitment is to develop a positive collaborative synergy with the Government of Montenegro and local authorities, while durably engaging with local communities, through education, training, support and employment opportunities.
 
The corporate parent behind Azmont Investments is Azerbaijan Global Investments (AGI), a consortium of leading Azerbaijani Investment Holding companies. 
 
Growing Portonovi Resort, worth 650 mill eur, is developed by Azmont Investments as of 2012 when company has entered Montenegrin market. At the same time, this world-class resort with a state-of-the-art marina and the first One&Only in Europe is the biggest investment project of Azerbaijan outside of country, out of energetic sector. In 2016, Company has entered financial sector and has added to its portfolio another business by setting the new green-field commercial bank on Montenegrin market. With full spectra of usual banking products Nova Banka is registered with almost 12-million-euro capital.

As a responsible corporate citizen, company do its best to contribute to the good of society through well planned and continuous CSR programs.

Name: Caravel
Description:
Caravel est la première plateforme entièrement dédiée à l’anticipation, la planification et l'amélioration de sa retraite à l'aide d'outils et de produits d'épargne responsables qui répondent aux enjeux d'un monde en perpétuel changement.

À l'aide de solutions transparentes, simples, pédagogiques, engagées et accessibles, nous aidons tous les individus à reprendre le contrôle de leur retraite tout en s’engageant dans une démarche sociétale et environnementale indispensable.

Entreprise à mission, Caravel a été récompensé en 2021 par le prix de la meilleure fintech à impact par France Fintech, meilleur PER en 2022, 2023, 2024 et 2025. 

Caravel a rejoint le groupe Indexa Capital, en mars 2024.

Name: EB – Sustainable Investment Management (EB-SIM)
Description:
Die EB-SIM ist ein aktiver Asset Manager mit klarer Mission: Investments für eine bessere Welt. Denn wir sind überzeugt: Nachhaltigkeit und Geldanlage gehören zusammen.

Unser umfassendes Verständnis von Nachhaltigkeit wird getragen von unseren christlichen Werten, die wir gemeinsam mit der Evangelischen Bank-Gruppe leben und fördern. Für uns sind alle Dimensionen der Nachhaltigkeit wichtig. 

Unser Fokus liegt auf Multi-Asset-Anlagen sowie Investments in Erneuerbare-Energien-Projekte und zugehöriger Infrastruktur. Die Multi-Asset-Produkte der EB-SIM sind für private und institutionelle Anleger gleichermaßen gut geeignet. Durch die moderne Fondskonstruktion des offenen Infrastruktur-Sondervermögens ermöglichen wir erstmals auch Privatanlegern, über den Quadoro Erneuerbare Energien Europa (QEEE) mittelbar in Technologie für die Erzeugung erneuerbarer Energien und die Energiewende zu investieren. 

Als Vordenker ethisch-nachhaltiger Geldanlage sieht sich die EB-SIM zudem als Wertetreiber am Finanzmarkt. Mit Positionspapieren zu wichtigen Themen der Nachhaltigkeit, Kooperationen und durch engagiertes Eintreten bei Unternehmen treiben wir die Transformation aktiv voran. Für ihre Anleger setzt die EB-SIM im Auswahlprozess ihrer Anlagen Nachhaltigkeitskriterien gezielt ein, um mit ihren Fonds eine Überrendite für sie zu erzielen. Die Voraussetzungen dafür schafft unser eigens entwickelter, KI-gestützter EB ESG-Score, der erstmals eine in die Zukunft ausgerichtete Beurteilung der Nachhaltigkeit von Bestands- und Ziel-Unternehmen ermöglicht.

Name: Private Investment Forum Worldwide
Description:
The Private Investment Forum Worldwide is well known for its exclusivity, as it targets representatives of the global financial and investment elite and aimed to maintain personal, trustworthy and friendly relationships between them.
The main objectives of this forum are:
- conducting private negotiations with key investors and owners of investment projects, or funds;
- attracting investment to participants' investment projects and funds; 
- expanding the strategic needed contacts for companies' leaders

It can be stated with certainty that the Private Investment Forum has become one of the most prestigious and influential investment events in the world.

According to the opinions of the Forum participants (the heads of investment companies and funds, large investors and the heads of family offices), the Private Investment Forum is a new benchmark of a business reputation.

It has an absolutely innovative model networking for investment and business leaders. Only the decision makers attend such meetings. Very comfortable, very elite, very efficient - these are the most frequent appraisals of the quality of the event expressed by the Forum participants themselves.

Over 20,000  Founders, owners, and CEOs of large investment companies from Europe, UK, and the GCC region with the total equity of over $1 trillion became backers of the PIFW starting from 2017.

Name: Caisse des Dépôts et d'Investissements du Burkina Faso
Description:
La Caisse des Dépôts et d’Investissements du Burkina Faso (CDI-BF) est une institution financière publique à caractère spécial, investie d’une double vocation :
-  En sa qualité de tiers de confiance, elle assure la collecte, la conservation et la gestion sécurisée des fonds publics et privés qui lui sont confiés.
- Servir l'intérêt général en soutenant les politiques publiques conduites par l’État et les collectivités territoriales, notamment à travers des investissements stratégiques à forte valeur ajoutée.

Name: Emirates Advanced Investments
Description: Emirates Advanced Investments Group became Yas Holding LLC on 01 January 2018.

Name: India Alternatives Investment Advisors
Description:
India Alternatives Private Equity Fund is a leading domestic private equity fund founded by Ms. Shivani Bhasin Sachdeva. India Alternatives has built a team of professionals and industry veterans with a long investment track record coupled with demonstrated business building experience.

India Alternatives specializes in growth capital investments in India. The Fund takes significant minority stakes while investing in fast growing companies with a solid fundamental business model run by ethical and driven promoters.
 
We partner with promoters to help build market leading businesses by leveraging our advantage of being an entrepreneurial firm, backed by several financial powerhouses.

We provide access to seasoned industry veterans, 10,000 family offices, top Indian institutions that provide debt and dedicated resources to take companies public.

Name: Mountaingate Capital
Description: We partner with founders to achieve transformational growth — scaling and expanding capabilities, services, technologies and geographies to create more value for the end customer.

Name: Decarbonization Partners
Description:
Decarbonization Partners is a joint venture between Temasek and BlackRock focused on late-stage venture capital and early growth private equity investing in next-generation companies that provide solutions and technologies to help accelerate global efforts to achieve a net zero global economy by 2050. Decarbonization Partners combines Temasek and BlackRock's complementary platforms and expertise in sourcing and underwriting private investments, portfolio and risk management, and sustainable technology and analytics. Decarbonization Partners invests in a wide range of companies that have proven technology and need capital to scale. The partnership attracted $1.40 billion in capital from a diverse set of over 30 institutional investors across North America, Europe and Asia Pacific. 

Disclosures: http://bit.ly/2vmehgr

Name: W5 Group
Description:
W5 Group is a fully-integrated real estate investment firm founded in 2009 as the family investment office of Ralph Winter, a successful global real estate investor. In Europe, Ralph amassed a portfolio of 40,000+ student housing units and 100,000+ multifamily units, generating over €30 billion in investment transaction volume.

In the U.S., W5 has invested in Innovative Living residential real estate projects with a capitalization of ~$1.5 billion including 2,100 units and 4,600 beds. These investments include ground-up developments and value‐add acquisitions of multifamily, student housing, build-to-rent, and shared living.

W5 Group has offices in Miami, Frankfurt, and Zug. W5 Group’s investment platform consists of acquisitions, asset management, ﬁnance, operations, and investor relations teams that work collaboratively across the entire lifecycle of each investment.

Name: Marquest Asset Management Inc.
Description:
Marquest Asset Management Inc. is a rapidly growing private investment management company that provides a diversified suite of quality equity, and flow-through products to accredited and retail investors.

Since our inception in 1985, Marquest utilizes an active and disciplined investment management approach to take advantage of opportunities in a constantly changing market environment, in our quest to generate the highest possible risk-adjusted return for our clients. This commitment is the genesis of the company’s name, Marquest, which underscores our passion to meet our clients’ expectations.

Our goal is simple: to PURSUE and ACHIEVE what we set out to do for our clients. Our success is based on our vigilance, persistence, and confidence to act upon our convictions to deliver the superior returns our clients expect.

Name: Woodbridge Capital
Description:
From day one, our goal has been to offer something different to private credit investors — clarity and openness in every aspect of what we do.

We bring decades of proven experience to the table, with a track record spanning over 30 years in property finance, real estate investment, development, and construction. Over the past decade, we have deployed and managed more than $6 billion in loans, with zero loan impairments.

For investors, that means disciplined, transparent risk management and confidence that capital is prudently deployed. For borrowers, it means a lender who genuinely understands projects, communicates clearly, and partners through challenges. Our dual commitment to transparency and expertise ensures that every stakeholder benefits from resilient outcomes, sustainable growth, and enduring trust.

Name: Per Annum
Description:
Per Annum Money began its journey with P2P lending in 2015. Trusted by over 5 Lakh users, it has facilitated more than ₹10,000 Cr and grown into a leading alternative investment platform.

In March 2025, we launched our flagship product, Estates, focused on Fractional Real Estate. Starting in Gurugram and now expanding to Bangalore and Noida, Estates manages ₹250 Cr+ AUM and is on track to cross ₹500 Cr soon.

Our mission is to make wealth creation accessible, transparent, and rewarding through innovative financial opportunities.

Name: Technofounders
Description:
We create, finance and accelerate industrial deeptech ventures in Europe. 
 De-risking early-stage investment in deeptech
 Developing the most effective ecosystem to create and accelerate a deeptech startup
 Always looking for entrepreneurs, academic partners and investors

The studio was founded in 2014 by Pierre, Yves and Olivier, and later joined by Sébastien, our investment specialist, creating a partnering team of four science and technology enthusiasts. 

Today, we bring together hundreds of entrepreneurs, research scientists and investors around 6 sectors : agriculture, health, green chemistry, security and space, AI, energy. 

We invest from pre-seed to serie A, to develop industrial companies.

Technofounders in numbers :
- 10 years
- 16 startups created 
- 80% survival rate
- 70m€ funds raised
- 200+ collaborators

Name: Peninsula Capital Advisors
Description:
Peninsula is a long-term strategic investor seeking well managed companies supported by strong fundamentals and outstanding earnings power. We primarily focus on equity and equity linked securities in transactions such as Buyouts, Recapitalizations, Growth Equity Investments, Corporate Carve-Outs, Secondary Private Equity investments, Public-to-Private (P2P) and Private Investments in Public Entities (PIPE). 

We seek both controlling stakes and minority interests with significant influence on the Board of Directors and Executive Committee. Our core geographic focus is Southern Europe and Latin America where our Partners and Board members have unique access.

Peninsula Capital Advisors LLP is an independent advisory company seeking investment opportunities and providing financing advice to Peninsula Capital S.a.R.L. ("Peninsula").

Name: Miles Capital
Description:
A Miles Capital é uma gestora de recursos com foco no mercado acionário brasileiro, fundado em 2017 por um grupo de sócios com carreiras longas, relevantes e de sucesso no mercado financeiro. 

São +R$ 4Bi sob gestão e 3 fundos de investimento em renda variável, os quais estão disponíveis em diversos bancos e plataformas de investimentos: 

• Miles Acer - Long Biased 
• Miles Virtus - Long Only 
• Miles Virtus Prev - previdência privada 100% em ações 

Em todos os fundos, alia-se uma visão fundamentalista de longo prazo à percepção de que distorções e assimetrias de mercado geram oportunidades no curto e médio prazos para investidores preparados para agir.

Name: Fjärde AP-fonden (AP4)
Description:
The Fourth Swedish National Pension Fund (AP4) is one of five buffer funds in the Swedish pension system. AP4's mission is through the management of fund capital to maximize shareholder value over time, thus contributing to the stability of the pension system. AP4 has chosen two focus areas: Corporate Governance and Climate & the environment. These areas are chosen because they are considered to be important for return and the performance of all assets in the long term. 

 As of June, 2017 AP4's fund capital amounted to SEK 348 billion. The capital consists of both equities, fixed income, real estate and alternative assets.

AP4's work gets positive attention in several different contexts, both in Sweden and internationally. In recent years, AP4 has received numerous international awards and honors. During 2017 AP4 has received AAA-rating from Asset Owners Disclosure Project (AODP) for our efforts on climate risk. AODP also ranks AP4 as number 8 of 500 institutional investors. 

The staff are AP4's most important resource. Their commitment and expertise are critical success factors for the management of the fund capital. At mid-year 2017, 56 people worked at AP4. Our office is located in central Stockholm.

Vacancies are advertised on a regular basis on ap4.se and here on LinkedIn, but you are also welcome to submit a spontaneous application to info@ap4.se. If you are a student and interested in writing your thesis or working extra at AP4, we recommend a visit to ap4.se/student.

Name: Uni.Fund
Description:
Uni.Fund aspires to support the growth of successful ventures that address emerging market needs and leverage the hidden potential that exists in the Greek Universities, R&D and Tech Space. The Uni.Fund team combines a strong entrepreneurial mindset with deep experience in setting up and growing a business, supporting global expansion and scaling, management and exploitation of research, while acting with integrity, fairness and passion. Uni.Fund focuses on people and team development, enhancement of key strengths and implementation of successful go-to-market strategies. It aims to offer the ideal conditions for growth, surround teams with the right people, and work with them side by side for the whole journey.

“EquiFund investment platform is an initiative created by cooperation between the Hellenic Republic and ElF. It is financed by the Greek ESIF Fund of Funds TAESYM under the European Union / European Regional Development Fund / Operational Programme EPANEK, the ElF and private investors, with the objective to facilitate access to finance, mainly to SMEs, by developing the Venture Capital/Private Equity (“VC/PE”) in Greece in cooperation with selected Financial Intermediaries.”

Name: Novotempo
Description:
Novotempo, Gestión Estratégica de Negocios, es una empresa enfocada en la gestión, que busca generar valor a sus compañías a través del trabajo profesional, y las sinergias que se producen gracias a la interacción de sus unidades de negocio.

Entre nuestros desarrollos se encuentran empresas ligadas principalmente al ámbito Inmobiliario y Hotelero, teniendo como foco fundamental un segmento de mercado de alto nivel.

En área de negocio Hotelero, Novotempo cuenta con tres Hoteles Boutique: Hotel Isla Seca de Zapallar, Hotel Viña la Playa, ubicado en el Valle de Colchagua, y Hotel Puelche Patagonia, ubicado en la ciudad de Puerto Varas.

Name: RAM Active Investments
Description:
RAM Active Investments (RAM AI) is a Geneva-based institutional asset manager created in 2007 with the conviction that harnessing data, technology and human experience is pivotal to delivering sustainable returns and fulfilling investors' needs for innovative and active solutions.
With research at the forefront of its disciplined investment approach, RAM AI harnesses scientific data analysis and risk-led portfolio construction techniques to identify and exploit new market inefficiencies. The company manages almost EUR 2bn across ten strategies and three categories: Systematic Equity, Alternatives and Fixed Income.

Name: Skyline AI
Description:
Skyline AI is a  real estate investment technology platform using proprietary artificial intelligence to outperform commercial real estate investment benchmarks.

Mining data from hundreds of different sources and applying advanced artificial intelligence architectures to detect and exploit market anomalies, identify superior risk-reward investments, and discover untapped value creation opportunities. Skyline AI is creating a new, more precise way to invest in real estate.

Name: Hayaat Group
Description: An investment firm in a unique position to create growth and accelerate success, using entirely principal capital. Our interests are diverse, from next generation disruptors to real estate and urban regeneration.

Name: Elliott Advisors (UK) Limited
Description:
Elliott Advisors (UK) Limited is an affiliate of Elliott Investment Management L.P. Elliott Investment Management L.P. is one of the oldest fund managers of its kind under continuous management.

Elliott Investment Management L.P. is one of the oldest fund managers of its kind under continuous management.

As of December 31, 2023, Elliott manages approximately $65.5 billion in assets. The firm employs a staff of 499 people, including nearly half dedicated to portfolio management and analysis, trading and research, in its Florida headquarters and affiliated offices elsewhere.

Name: AWE FUNDS
Description: We are a Gender Lens focused fund investing in innovative enterprises to promote Gender Balance. We do this by investing in women owned, led, influenced businesses.

Name: Knighthead Capital Management, LLC
Description: Knighthead Capital Management, LLC is a New York-based SEC registered investment adviser founded in 2008. The firm focuses on long-short investments and specializes in event driven, distressed credit and special situation opportunities across a broad array of industries.

Name: Harvest Global Investments Limited
Description:
Harvest Global Investments Limited (HGI), established in Hong Kong in 2008, has offices in New York. HGI combines a deeply experienced international team with on-the-ground knowledge and insights to deliver superior returns from Asian and Chinese markets to global investors in the innovation-led Pacific Century.

As a firm, we have grown alongside Chinese markets. We believe that we are now entering the 'Golden Age' of asset management in China. Financial markets have evolved from a pure stock exchange in the 1990s to include secondary equity markets, private equity opportunities and real estate. To capture these complexities and anticipate the next opportunity, we harness the capabilities of big data and qualitative strategic analysis.

Name: Sforza Holding
Description: A Sforza é um private equity familiar pertencente a Carlos Wizard, que investe em negócios em alto potencial de crescimento nos mercados de varejo, esportes e real estate, tanto no Brasil quanto no exterior. Contando com um time executivo qualificado, atua de forma direta nos negócios que investe, com o objetivo de aprimorar a gestão e maximizar o retorno sobre o capital investido. A Sforza atua também como Family Office da família de Wizard.

Name: PHINMA
Description:
PHINMA is a proudly-Filipino conglomerate that seeks to make lives better and build the nation through successfully run and profitable businesses that uphold our core values of integrity, competence, professionalism and love of country. With professional and effective management as our distinctive edge, we aim to give communities, not only in the Philippines but wherever else we might find the need, improved access to the essentials of a dignified life. We have pursued our mission for over 65 years now in a broad range of industries and sectors including oil and gas, agriculture, steel and cement, energy, education, banking and finance, business process outsourcing, paper, insurance, housing and property development, hotels and hospitality, as well as business intelligence and consulting.
 
As we grow our current core businesses in education, construction materials, property development and hospitality, and as we expand to other sectors and industries, we will continue to demonstrate that private business can mutually serve the needs of society and the aspirations of shareholders—that we can do good and do well in business at the same time.
 
In the pursuit of our mission, we look to our tradition, our experience, our reputation, and above all, our people, as the principal factors that will allow us to achieve our lofty goals.

Name: Sager Group Company Ltd.
Description:
Since 1980, Abdulaziz O. Sager established and managed the Sager Group in Jeddah with branches in Riyadh Saudi Arabia, Dubai United Arab Emirates. The Group was active in various activities including construction, electrical and mechanical contracting, maintenance and operation, security services, general trading, agriculture, media, marketing representation/consultation of multinational companies in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Until 1998 the Group had a total of approximately 12,000 employees. 
In early 2000 the Sager Group restructured its operations by selling some of its activities and refocused on the following activities: 
-Real Estate: The real estate development division focuses on developing, investing and managing projects. Both group owned lands/projects and non-group owned.
-Investments: The groups own a portfolio of companies in various industries such as Information technology, Media and publications, O&M and more. We are also active in the field of both international and local equity investments.
-Commercial and Trading: The commercial and trading division focuses on reselling, distributing, franchising, and representing foreign companies in Saudi Arabia.

Name: Brazos Residential
Description:
Brazos Residential is a vertically integrated, real estate private equity company that focuses exclusively on acquiring multifamily assets. With current AUM of $425mm, the company seeks value-add and opportunistic acquisitions that produce superior risk-adjusted returns for our institutional partners and private capital investors. We target high-growth markets with strong long-term investment fundamentals throughout the Sun Belt region of the United States. Brazos Residential Management, a subsidiary property management company, works to successfully implement each asset’s unique business plan. The vertical integration with property management and in-house construction management provides a unique competitive advantage.  The company employs high-caliber, best-in-class professionals who exemplify our “integrity first and always” mission. 

The founders of Brazos Residential have extensive and broad-based experience in the multifamily industry. They have been directly involved in $12 billion/80,000 units of multifamily transactions and debt/equity capitalizations. This transaction volume has afforded the principals a keen eye for opportunity in today’s competitive market. Brazos prides itself on being a trustworthy steward of investor capital while providing residents an exceptional living experience.

www.brazosresidential.com

Name: TIFF Investment Management
Description:
TIFF is an asset management firm dedicated to delivering comprehensive outsourced CIO (OCIO) and private markets solutions to primarily endowments, foundations, and other charitable organizations. Our primary objective is to enhance investment returns for our clients while also optimizing their costs and reducing their administrative burden.

For over 30 years, TIFF has strived to be the nonprofit community’s most trusted investment partner. We specialize in providing investment solutions that help our members fulfill their mission and achieve their financial goals. We offer two primary solutions for our members – comprehensive advisory solutions, and more specialized asset class specific solutions.

Name: WizardQuant
Description:
Wizard Quant is a full-service quantitative hedge fund in China. Based on advanced research, trading and asset management system, we have sustainable profitability in domestic futures, stocks, options and other mainstream markets.

Founded in 2014, we have been working with the dream of building the world's top Chinese quantitative hedge fund, and continuously working diligently and eagerly looking forward to each and everyone of our fellow travellers.

Name: The Singularity Group
Description:
The Singularity Group (TSG) quantifies Applied Innovation for investors in listed equities. The Swiss investment boutique is the initiator of the Singularity Index (Bloomberg ticker: NQ2045), a global, all-sector benchmark and gold standard for Applied Innovation. The Singularity Strategies include The Singularity Fund (UCITS Lux), Singularity US Innovation Leaders (AMC), Singularity US Equity (LUKB AMC), Singularity Small&Mid (UBS AMC), and the partner product LUKB Smart Farming (AMC).

We work closely with the Singularity Think Tank, a network of entrepreneurs and academics with deep insights into innovation value chains. Their input forms the foundation of our proprietary innovation scoring system that quantifies the engagement of companies within a set of curated Singularity Sectors worldwide across all market capitalizations and industries. The Singularity Innovation Score (SI-Score) defines how much value listed companies generate through Applied Innovation.

Name: Liberty Group
Description: Liberty Group is a Single Family Office serving as a fully discretionary platform focused on preservation and diversification of capital across nearly $1Billion USD in portfolio investments.

Name: Karoll Capital Management
Description:
Карол Капитал Мениджмънт е едно от водещите управляващи дружества в страната. Oт 2003 г. насам предоставяме разнообразни инвестиционни решения на нашите индивидуални, корпоративни и институционални клиенти. Нашата мисия е да ви помогнем да изберете най-подходящия начин за управление на парите си с цел по-добро финансово бъдеще – ниско-рискови, балансирани и високо-доходни инвестиционни стратегии. 

След като създадохме първия в България фонд в акции и първи дадохме на клиентите си достъп до инвестиционни възможности в чужбина, днес екипът ни управлява четири взаимни фонда с различен фокус. За да отговорим на нуждата от глобални решения на местния пазар, си партнираме с един от глобалните лидери в асет мениджмънта — Schroders, със световно известната швейцарска банка Credit Suisse, и с лидера в животозастраховането - NN. Тези партньорства ни позволяват да предложим на нашите клиенти богато портфолио от продукти и услуги като спестовни планове, взаимни фондове, структурирани продукти, инвестиционни консултации и др.

За тези, които искат професионалист да управлява парите им вместо тях, за да могат да се съсредоточат върху по-важни неща в живота си, предлагаме услугата "доверително управление" - активно професионално управление на индивидуален портфейл, съобразен с личния инвеститорски профил и финансовите цели на клиента.

Карол Капитал е част от Финансова Група Карол, която над 25 години е пионер във въвеждането на иновативни решения на българския пазар и предлага пълен набор от финансови услуги като управление на активи, инвестиционно и застрахователно посредничество, инвестиции в земеделска земя, инвестиционно банкиране.

Name: Saba Capital Management, L.P.
Description:
Saba Capital Management, L.P. (“Saba”) is an Investment Adviser launched in 2009. Saba is a spin-out of one of the largest proprietary groups in the industry, ‘Saba Principal Strategies’, founded by Boaz Weinstein at Deutsche Bank in 1998. Saba’s senior members, having worked together for more than a decade, are best known for having pioneered credit relative value and capital structure trading strategies. Saba currently manages four core strategies: Credit Relative Value, Tail Hedge, SPACs and Closed-End Funds. Saba’s investors are predominately institutions and include corporate pensions, public pensions, foundations, fund of funds, endowments, and family offices. Saba is 100% self-owned. Saba is headquartered in the historic Chrysler Building in New York and is registered with the SEC and CFTC.

Company Headquarters

Saba Capital Management, L.P.
405 Lexington Avenue, 58th Floor
New York, New York 10024
Main Line: 212-542-3610

Name: Zoscales Partners
Description:
Zoscales Partners is a leading investment management firm specialized in private equity investments in East Africa. Focusing on growth capital in small and medium sized companies with superior return potential, Zoscales Partners identifies attractive investment opportunities with high value creation potential by applying our innovative and unique investment approach.

With a team of international investment professionals and successful local East African entrepreneurs, Zoscales Partners acknowledges that successful deals are done through the combination of a global investor base and an extensive local network.

East African economies are amongst the fastest growing economies in the world and are expected to outperform other frontier, emerging, and developed markets over the next decades. Pioneering East African businesses are contributing their share towards this trajectory. They demonstrate extraordinary financial growth and solid economic performance, turn visions into realities, create jobs and give people the opportunity to have descent lives. A key element shaping the convergence is transfer of capital and know-how. Our firm contributes to this trend via direct investments and strategic management, enabling African businesses to expand and grow, whilst striving for superior and sustainable returns for our investors. Our firm believes in this win-win concept for our investors and African businesses. In other words, we invest where it matters!

Name: Seven Pounds Asset Management
Description:
Seven Pounds Asset Management é uma gestora de investimentos, dedicada à excelência por meio da combinação de tecnologia, análises quantitativas e fundamentalistas. Somos especialistas em crédito, que representa a maior parte do patrimônio da gestora, abrangendo crédito imobiliário, agrícola, corporate, estruturado e special situations, com atuação tanto no Brasil quanto no exterior. Também atuamos no mercado de ações, de forma minoritária.
 
Desde nossa fundação, nossa equipe tem se empenhado em identificar e aproveitar oportunidades de longo prazo, desenvolvendo estratégias de investimento sob medida para maximizar retornos consistentes e superiores. Utilizamos nossa expertise setorial, análise de mercado e tecnologia para criar soluções robustas e eficazes.
 
Valorizamos o relacionamento de longo prazo com nossos stakeholders, buscando sempre a construção de parcerias duradouras e produtivas. Com uma abordagem orientada para resultados e uma visão global, garantimos uma gestão de investimentos de alto desempenho e alinhada com as melhores práticas do mercado.

Name: Bridgegold
Description:
Empowering Global Citizenship Through Investment

With roots tracing back nearly a decade, Bridgegold began as a private advisory in investment and development. Over the years, this expertise expanded to meet the rising global demand for residence and citizenship solutions.

Bridgegold today represents a new chapter of that heritage — a revitalized brand with a modern digital presence, global reach, and expanded network of specialists.

We provide access to more than 20 active programs through offices worldwide, uniting experts in immigration, law, real estate, tax, finance, and investment. Guided by our founding principle — enhancing the freedom and security of our clients — Bridgegold delivers discreet, bespoke solutions for individuals and families of exceptional vision.

Name: Wałbrzych Special Economic Zone "INVEST-PARK" (WSEZ "INVEST-PARK")
Description:
The Walbrzych Special Economic Zone “INVEST-PARK” sp. z o.o. is one of Poland's largest special economic zones and has supported large international companies and small, medium, and micro enterprises since 1997.

WSSE “INVEST PARK” in numbers:
- More than 20 thousand km² of investment areas
- We operate in over 174 municipalities in the Lower Silesian, Opole and Greater Poland Voivodeships
- We have won the trust of about 300 investors from 24 countries
- We have helped investors raise more than 11.6 billion euros
- We have helped create nearly 100,000 jobs

The Walbrzych Special Economic Zone “INVEST-PARK” is easily accessible thanks to international airports in Prague, Dresden, Wroclaw, and Poznan and major road and rail networks nearby.

What the WSEZ “INVEST-PARK” offers investors:
- Tax exemptions allowing recovery of up to 60% of the costs incurred for the investment for up to 15 years
- Attractive investment areas and production and warehouse halls (for purchase or lease)
- Support for investors in establishing international business relations
- Intermediation in contacts with public institutions and local administration and utility suppliers
- Access to industrial clusters and the INVEST IN EDU education cluster
- Access to the INNOVATION PARK training center
- Participation in online and offline training courses

The WSEZ “INVEST-PARK” is recommended for locating investments in Central and Eastern Europe and is appreciated for the quality and comprehensiveness of service for investors.

International brands that have located their investments in WSEZ "INVEST-PARK": Toyota

Name: Alkeon Capital
Description: Alkeon Capital is a privately owned SEC-registered investment adviser. The firm invests in the global equity markets across its long/short growth equity and venture capital innovation strategies. Through its crossover Innovation Strategy, Alkeon Capital seeks to invest in technology innovators and disruptors that are connected to an upcoming, transformative wave of technological innovation.  The firm has offices in New York, San Francisco and Hong Kong.

Name: Seraya Partners
Description:
Seraya Partners is Asia’s first Next-Generation Infrastructure investment manager, dedicated to building the infrastructure champions of the future. With USD 2.0 billion in assets under management, we invest in advanced infrastructure companies and projects that drive sustainable growth across the region.

Our proprietary platforms span Green Data Centers, Offshore Windfarm Vessels, and Renewable Energy, making up the sectors at the forefront of Asia’s energy transition and digital transformation.

What sets us apart is our team of entrepreneurs, engineers, and investment managers with a proven 20-year track record in Asia, creating local champions that deliver both strong financial returns and lasting impact.

 Connect with us to explore opportunities in building Asia’s next-generation infrastructure.

Name: Zouk Capital LLP
Description:
Zouk Capital is a fund manager focused on the opportunities emerging at the intersection of infrastructure, technology and sustainability.

Our Infrastructure track focuses on investing in, building, and scaling projects and companies in environmental infrastructure and renewable energy. Focus areas include electric vehicle charging infrastructure, waste-to-energy, energy efficiency, and distributed small-scale energy, primarily in Europe and the UK.

Our Technology track helps commercially proven, technology-enabled companies to accelerate their growth, increase market share, and create value while delivering scalable environmental and social impact in the process. Focus areas include cleantech, mobility solutions, and impact-oriented fintech in Europe, the US, and Africa.

Based in London, Zouk manages approximately €1billion.

Name: Acumen Capital Partners
Description: Our goal is to see you reach your financial goals. Acumen Capital Partners is a client-focused firm providing comprehensive wealth management and capital markets services and advice. Acumen is 100% employee-owned and truly independent. We are focused on providing individualized and comprehensive financial advice to Canadians from coast-to-coast. Our reputation of integrity, insight and value is the cornerstone of all our relationships. We pursue well vetted investment opportunities, always with the intention of providing excellent returns for our clients.

Name: RBC PH&N Investment Counsel
Description:
At RBC PH&N Investment Counsel, clients experience the sophistication and personalized service of an investment boutique, supported by the strength, stability and global reach of RBC – Canada’s largest financial institution.

RBC PH&N Investment Counsel provides discretionary wealth management services to high-net-worth individuals and families who typically have investable assets of $5 million or more, business owners and executives, as well as not-for-profit organizations.

Located in offices nationwide, our team of highly-qualified investment professionals enjoys a reputation for integrity, investment insight, personalized client service and a tailored approach to wealth management focused on our clients’ unique needs and circumstances. 

We draw upon the expertise of RBC Family Office Services to provide clients with an unparalleled, innovative range of solutions and services to effectively manage their wealth, including sophisticated investment management, private banking, international trusts and estate planning, business succession planning and more. 

For information about our legal terms of use, please visit www.rbc.com/legal/#social_media.

Name: MIT Investment Management Company
Description:
Our mission is to deliver outstanding long-term investment returns for MIT. We cultivate an ecosystem of exceptional people and enduring partnerships to sustain MIT’s pursuit of world-class education, cutting edge research, and groundbreaking innovation.

The returns earned on MIT’s investments support a wide array of academic and research activities. MIT is a catalyst for entrepreneurial innovation, scientific breakthroughs, and technological advances. At MITIMCo we draw inspiration from the remarkable work emerging across the campus. As financial stewards, we challenge ourselves daily to uphold the ethos and rigor of the Institute. MIT acts as a magnet for investment and entrepreneurship, as is made evident by the growing innovation cluster in Cambridge.

We are always on the lookout for investment management firms with the characteristics we seek. We invite you to contact us if you are interested in becoming one of our investment manager partners. You might want to partner with MITIMCo because your hard work would support MIT, we have a long time horizon, and we work hard to be great partners. If you think your firm is too small, too young, or too non-institutional, you might just be exactly who we are looking for.

We are also looking for dedicated and passionate team members to help us pursue our mission. As part of the MIT community we have access to fascinating and diverse opportunities across campus including music, theater, cultural associations, athletics, guest speakers, and workshops. Here at MITIMCo we try to carry the creative spirit of MIT into the social environment of the office. At MITIMCo we value constructive debate, continuous improvement, taking initiative, and having fun! Of course, we also offer MIT’s outstanding benefits package.

To learn more about our mission, our work, our partners, and our culture please visit our website: www.mitimco.org


Photo: MIT Killian Court, Brian Keegan, (C) 2008

Description: The Canadian Business Growth Fund (CBGF) provides long-term, patient, minority capital to ambitious entrepreneurs to fund growth and expansion of their mid-market Canadian businesses with investments between $5 and $20 million. An evergreen investment fund with capital commitments of $545 million, CBGF is committed to long-term partnerships with the companies it invests in. As part of its mission to drive growth, CBGF connects business leaders and sector experts to help its partner businesses achieve their full potential.

Description:
𝗜𝗻𝘃𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗶𝗻 𝗘𝗻𝘁𝗿𝗲𝗽𝗿𝗲𝗻𝗲𝘂𝗿𝘀 𝘁𝗼 𝗦𝗰𝗮𝗹𝗲 𝗧𝗵𝗲𝗶𝗿 𝗕𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗻𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗲𝘀
XSML Capital is now investing through our fourth fund, African Rivers Fund IV, providing tailored debt, equity, and mezzanine financing — plus hands-on support — to enable SMEs to scale in Angola, the DRC, Kenya, Uganda, and Zambia. 

Since 2010, we’ve invested in around 100 companies, delivering strong returns for investors while driving job creation and expanding access to goods and services in underserved markets. 

𝗙𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝘁 𝗚𝗮𝗽
Small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) are the backbone of economies worldwide — and Africa is no exception. Yet many African entrepreneurs lack access to affordable growth capital, limiting their ability to scale their businesses and help to foster economic growth.

𝗟𝗼𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝗣𝗿𝗲𝘀𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲, 𝗥𝗲𝗴𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗹 𝗥𝗲𝗮𝗰𝗵
For fifteen years, XSML (eXtra, Small, Medium, Large) has invested in SMEs in challenging markets. Our teams on the ground in Kampala, Kinshasa, Luanda, Lusaka, and Nairobi work directly with entrepreneurs to provide customised financing and strategic support, guiding businesses from small to medium and large enterprises.

𝗔 𝗨𝗻𝗶𝗾𝘂𝗲 𝗠𝗮𝗿𝗸𝗲𝘁 𝗣𝗼𝘀𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻
We combine debt, equity, and mezzanine solutions to meet each company’s needs, often filling a gap for investments between US$ 300k and 10m. ESG standards, sustainability support, and gender equality are central to our approach.

𝗣𝗿𝗼𝘃𝗲𝗻 𝗜𝗺𝗽𝗮𝗰𝘁 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗦𝘁𝗿𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗥𝗲𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗻𝘀
Since 2010, we have invested in around 100 enterprises, building deep market knowledge, sourcing the best opportunities, and staying close to our investments — generating attractive financial returns for our investors, including leading development finance institutions and dedicated impact investors.

With ARF IV, we are scaling our impact, following investees into new markets, and continuing to back entrepreneurs who fuel growth in frontier

Name: Weatherford Capital
Description:
Weatherford Capital prioritizes businesses across the technology, financials, and business and consumer services sectors—particularly companies operating in business-to-business (B2B), business-to-government (B2G), and highly regulated industries.

Name: Brevan Howard Digital
Description:
Brevan Howard Digital is the dedicated crypto and digital asset division of Brevan Howard, seeking to provide institutional investors access to the wide range of compelling opportunities presented by the structural disruption and innovation of blockchain technology.

About Brevan Howard:

Founded in 2002, Brevan Howard is a leading global alternative investment management platform, specialising in global macro. We manage assets for institutional investors around the world including sovereign wealth funds, corporate and public pension plans, foundations and endowments.

We have over 1,000 team members and more than 140 portfolio managers with global offices including London, New York, Geneva, Jersey, Hong Kong, Austin, Abu Dhabi-ADGM, Bengaluru and Singapore.

The firm is led by CEO, Aron Landy.

LIAN Group is an innovative investor and operator that builds and funds successful companies in the most impactful industries, while collaborating closely with accomplished entrepreneurial leaders and investors.

We employ an Investor-Operator Model which combines investment with hands-on operation. We focus on two axes:  Next-Gen Technology & Infrastructure and Healthcare Redefined. For high-potential opportunities, we maintain a Discretionary Direct Investment arm.

Name: P Capital Partners
Description:
P Capital Partners (PCP) is an active credit investor and loan provider to Northern and Western European companies in need of capital for expansion, acquisition financing, restructuring and refinancing. 
PCP also conducts secondary investments in traded corporate credits.

The funds of PCP have combined assets of EUR 3.5 billion and are managed by P Capital Partners AB, which is owned by management.

With an industrial focus, we create strong and profitable financials with a sustainable footprint.

Contributing to a sustainable society is rooted in our culture. All our business areas can and will make a difference - for the society we live in and the planet.

Description:
Oyster Property Group are property investment experts.

Oyster Group make it simple to invest in quality, sustainable commercial property assets – without the hassle of hands-on management.

We manage the entire commercial property lifecycle, from purchasing assets, establishing funds and capital raising through to leasing and property management. This gives us unique insight into our assets, the commercial property sector and the economic environment.

Oyster Property Group has delivered to both wholesale and retail investors for over 20 years by maximising the long-term fundamentals of commercial property investment.

When we say we invest in the real world, we mean it.

Name: Investment AB Latour
Description:
Investment AB Latour is the investment company investing in companies with their own products and with a great development potential based on key global megatrends to create a long-term sustainable value for its shareholders.

Latour's operations are primarily carried out in two business lines, a wholly owned industrial operations and a portfolio of listed holdings.

Latour is an active principal owner in the companies, regardless of whether the holdings are listed, wholly-owned or part-owned, where the work of the Board is an important platform for the value creation.

Name: HNA Holding 海航实业
Description:
HNA Holding is an international group dedicated to the real estate financial industry. It has developed steadily during the past 20 years of HNA Group’s rapid growth. As a leader in promoting the construction of the Hainan International Tourism Island in early 2010. HNA Holding comprehensively integrated HNA Group’s investment in real estate and infrastructure to develop resources and actively conduct businesses including reclamation, CBD construction, real estate development and commercial operations. Due to the diligent efforts of our colleagues, HNA Holding has implemented an admirable business plan, characterized by the coordinated development of multiple industries.
 This expansion of its businesses into numerous industries includes real estate, commerce, finance, education and medical treatment. The extension of its business landscape stretches from Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, Shenzhen and Hainan to international finance centers such as Hong Kong, New York and London. In addition, HNA Holding has continued to maintain the principle of integrating its general strategic deployment, focusing on its developmental goals and pursuing the approach of political and economic development at home and abroad. 
HNA Holding has been refining its business model to focus on integrating industry and finance and is continually improving its developmental methodology. By the end of 2016, HNA Holding had achieved over 52 billion yuan in revenue and general assets in excess of 350 billion yuan. Five listed companies are subordinates of HNA Holding, namely HNA Infrastructure (600515), CCOOP (000564), HNA Investment (000616), Hong Kong International Construction Investment Management Group Co., Ltd. (00687.HK) and Trans Service (834858).

Name: ValueAct Capital
Description:
ValueAct Capital invests for the long term, in high quality companies, offering data driven insights to managers and directors whom they view as partners.  

Founded in 2000, VAC invests on behalf of some of the world’s largest institutional investors. They have made over 100 core investments, served on over 40 public company boards, and their goal is to leave a company in a better position than when they first invested in it. They regularly hold positions for 3-5 years and occasionally for 10 years or more. They believe that investing and managing companies for the long term requires integrity, a deep understanding of industry structure and business strategy, and a consideration of relevant social, ethical and environmental issues.

Name: Sankore Investments
Description: Sankore is an investment and advisory firm that provides an array of wealth and fund management services to individuals and institutions.

Name: LetkoBrosseau
