Founded in 1987, Letko, Brosseau & Associates Inc. is an independent investment manager with offices in Montreal, Toronto and Calgary. The firm manages funds for both institutional investors and private clients.

Our aim is to safeguard and responsibly grow the assets that our clients have entrusted to us. We are committed to acting ethically, always serving clients’ interests.

Name: Vital Capital
Description:
Vital Capital is a high-performing investor in growth markets. We leverage our deep operational expertise to identify overlooked opportunities, building successful, scalable businesses that transform lives. We turn critical challenges associated with the provision of food, water, healthcare, and sustainable infrastructure into high-return opportunities that deliver impact at scale.
 
Since our Fund’s inception in 2011, we have improved the lives of millions of individuals and achieved above market-rate returns for investors.

Learn more at vital-capital.com.

Name: Ukrainian Venture Capital and Private Equity Association (UVCA)
Description: UVCA shapes the future direction of the private equity industry by promoting investment opportunities in Ukraine, representing interests of private equity investors to policymakers and improving investment and business climate in Ukraine. UVCA was founded in November 2014 by 30 key investors in Ukraine with an aim to promote investing in Ukraine and improve the investment climate.

Name: Sydney Angels
Description:
Sydney Angels is an angel group whose members invest in innovative early-stage companies with high growth potential.

Sydney Angels offers entrepreneurs an efficient path to capital, expertise and experience from its members, who are backed by the $10M Sydney Angels Sidecar Fund. Entrepreneurs should apply online via www.sydneyangels.net.au .

Sydney Angels provides its members with quality deal flow, a collaborative investment process, and an opportunity to support entrepreneurs and the early-stage ecosystem. Individuals interested in becoming a member of Sydney Angels should apply online via www.sydneyangels.net.au .

Name: Anacacia Capital
Description:
Leading small-medium enterprises (SMEs). Anacacia is an award winning fund manager that invests in private and public SMEs/mid-market businesses in Australia and globally.  

We invest in leading companies with great management teams, strong business models and with aligned interests.

The private portfolio companies typically each generate ~$20-400m pa revenues and ~$5-50m pa earnings. Target private companies are often managing ownership change, succession, expansion and/or acquisitions and looking for a partner.  

Anacacia manages >$800m in committed funds.

Investors include Anacacia's team, global institutions, pension and super funds, endowments, fund of funds, and high net worth families. Anacacia's funds regularly receive top tier rankings and awards.

Anacacia's investment philosophy is to develop long term relationships with exceptional investors, businesses and people and uphold the highest standards of integrity while focusing on growing long term value and making attractive absolute returns.    

The team includes some of Australia's leading business people.  They provide strategic insight and capital to outstanding management teams to help SMEs to grow and build long term shareholder value.

Anacacia's listed equities' holdings are available through public stock exchange releases and our private equity portfolio is available at www.anacacia.com.au

Recent awards for Anacacia and its portfolio companies include: Australian Investment Council Firm of the Year; Australian Fund Manager Best Analyst, AVCAL Best Investment in the Last 25 Years Recognition, AVCAL Chairman's Award, Small Buyout of the Year, Exit of the Year at the Australian Growth Company Awards, PwC/BRW Awards, AVCAL Best Expansion Award , Fast 100, Premier's Export Awards and Deloitte Fast 50.

Name: Belle Haven Investments
Description:
Belle Haven Investments is an independent asset management firm specializing in separately managed taxable and tax-exempt fixed income portfolios. Since 2002, we have been dedicated to delivering exceptional service, consistent reliability, and customized investment solutions designed to meet our clients’ needs. With more than $22 billion in assets under management today, we proudly serve a diverse clientele, including consultants, advisors, family offices, institutions, non-profit organizations, and high-net-worth individuals. Belle Haven’s expertise in fixed income and personalized approach to portfolio management have contributed to industry-recognized strategies and long-standing client relationships.

We are grateful for the trust our clients place in us and remain committed to serving their investment needs.

Content on this page is for informational purposes only and should not be viewed as investment advice or a recommendation. Past performance or recognition does not guarantee future results. For more details and important disclosures, please visit: https://www.bellehaven.com/disclosures

Name: Planet First Partners
Description:
Planet First Partners is a growth equity platform that invests in and partners with disruptive entrepreneurs to scale tech-enabled businesses that combine a purpose-driven mission, profitable growth, and a people-centric culture.

As an Article 9 fund, Planet First Partners applies rigorous methodology for sustainable investing and commits to always follow the highest standards and strictest criteria. Founded in 2020, Planet First Partners is made up of a highly experienced, qualified team of investment and sustainability experts focused on maximising and optimising sustainability. The team is complemented by a mission-aligned advisory board, made up of global business and political leaders.

Name: Goldman Whites Group
Description:
The Goldman Whites Group is a world pioneer in providing advanced options for business services, international trade, government contracting, and logistics. Since 1993, we have turned obstacles into opportunities and promoted long-term growth in industries such as retail trade, industrial management, energy, and oil and gas projects.

We surpass expectations by combining transparency, creativity, and collaboration with a reputable network of partners and a diversified, top-tier team. Together, our specialist businesses provide value that goes beyond financial gain, bringing about significant change in both communities and sectors.

Devoted to resiliency and moral behavior, we adjust to a changing global economy while preserving stability and our clients' trust. Come along with us as we create a future characterized by advancement, opportunity, and significant innovation.

Name: Taga Urbanic
Description: Taga Urbanic is a Development and Investment Group which operates and specializes in the Portuguese Real Estate Market.

Name: EDIS- Economic Development Innovations Singapore
Description: EDIS is a privately-owned investment and development firm. We acquire, invest in and manage businesses that develop specialized solutions to address the needs of the digital economy in areas such as deep tech, education and job creation. Our investments seek to create positive economic impact and long-term value for our partners. For more info: www.edis.sg

Name: EQT Foundation
Description: The EQT Foundation provides risk capital to entrepreneurs, who are building a more inclusive and regenerative tomorrow, and supports research projects accelerating impact investing.

Name: Safanad
Description: Founded in 2009, Safanad is a global holding company combining investment and operational excellence. We develop deep conviction behind investment sectors that have strong macroeconomic tailwinds, build powerful operating platforms to capitalize on these opportunities, and execute on fundamental value creation strategies to drive returns. Safanad invests in impact, with platforms in Education, Healthcare, Digital Infrastructure, and Real Estate. The firm has offices in New York, Riyadh and Dubai and the firm’s c. 40 professionals have completed more than 45 transactions totaling $11 billion. For more information, please visit www.safanad.com

Name: Beyond Investing
Description:
Beyond Investing www.beyondinvesting.com develops public market investment products for the vegan community and indeed all investors that care about animals and the environment, through ethical screening, proactive stock selection, smart beta tilts and strict controls on risk and concentration.

Receive more information on our programs by completing the form at this link: bit.ly/veganinvest

Name: Melvin Capital Management LP
Description: Melvin Capital Management LP is a registered investment advisor founded in 2014 by Gabriel Plotkin, the firm's Chief Investment Officer.  The firm uses a bottom-up, fundamental research-driven process to identify investments employing a long-short equity strategy.

Name: Alitheia Capital
Description: Alitheia Capital is an impact investing firm focused on channeling capital into businesses that enhance access to essential goods and services for small and growing businesses and low-income households.

Name: SA SME Fund
Description: The SA SME Fund is a registered standalone investment vehicle managed by an executive management team, which reports to an independent board of directors. An independent investment committee is responsible for approving investments into funds that will enable the Fund to fulfil its mandate.

Name: C5 Capital
Description: C5 Capital is a specialist Venture Capital Firm focused on cybersecurity, space and energy security.

Name: Angel Oak Capital Advisors, LLC
Description:
Angel Oak Capital Advisors is an investment management firm focused on providing compelling fixed income investment solutions for its clients. Backed by a value-driven approach, Angel Oak Capital seeks to deliver attractive risk-adjusted returns through a combination of stable current income and price appreciation. Its experienced investment team seeks the best opportunities in fixed income with a specialization in mortgage-backed securities and other areas of structured credit.

As of 9/30/25, Angel Oak Capital had an estimated $25.1 billion in assets under management (AUM) through a combination of mutual funds, ETFs, private funds and separately managed accounts. AUM represents the sum of assets managed or serviced, and committed but uncalled capital. Excludes assets invested in affiliated Funds.

https://angeloakcapital.com/social/

Name: IndiaP2P
Description:
RBI certified Peer to Peer lending platform (NBFC-P2P).
Enabling retail investors to earn monthly returns by investing in India's best borrowers - women and small business owners.

Name: Epiris
Description:
Epiris  invests in opportunities to transform and reposition businesses in partnership with exceptional management teams. We target control positions in UK-centric businesses with an enterprise value of between £75 million and £500 million. Over the past 25 years we have invested more than £5 billion in over 200 deals.

To find out more about Epiris please visit our website: www.epiris.co.uk

Name: Glade Brook Capital Partners LLC
Description: Glade Brook is a global investment firm that specializes in global growth equity, with a focus on internet, software and technology enabled businesses. The firm partners with entrepreneurs and management teams to accelerate growth and maximize long-term shareholder value, from growth stage through IPO and beyond.

Name: Asteria Investment Managers
Description:
Asteria IM was established in 2019 as a fully dedicated impact investment management firm based in Switzerland, focused on measurable social, environmental, and financial returns.
Since its inception, we have been steadfast in our commitment to harnessing our state-of-the-art technology, deep research capabilities and impact investment experts to offer a range of quantitative investment strategies across asset classes that solve for risk, return and impact. 
2023 marked the launch of a new partnership with Man Group, the global, technology-empowered active investment management firm, and leading private Italian bank Fideuram - Intesa Sanpaolo Private Banking (F-ISPB) as part of which Man Group owns 51% of Asteria, while F-ISPB holds 49%. 
The collaboration has enabled us focus on impact and systematic investing – while also giving us access to Man Group’s cutting-edge technology and data capabilities and empowering us to innovate and to diversify the range of products we offer to our clients.
In addition, gaining access to the firm’s extensive resources has further enhanced our capacity to offer customisation and bespoke solutions to meet the unique requirements of our clients.

Name: Ram Realty Advisors
Description:
Ram Realty Advisors LLC ("Ram") is a real estate investment management firm specializing in multifamily, mixed-use, and grocery-anchored retail in select high-growth markets throughout the Southeast. The firm’s portfolio comprises assets across the investment risk spectrum, including core-plus, value-add, and opportunistic strategies. Founded in 1978, Ram and its predecessor entities have deployed over $5.0 billion of capital on behalf of institutional partners. 

The firm is headquartered in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida, and has offices in Tampa, Florida; Charlotte and Chapel Hill, North Carolina; and Nashville, Tennessee.

Name: Trinity Investors
Description:
Hunting Alpha for our Investors

Founded by experienced entrepreneurs in 2006, Trinity is a lower middle-market private equity firm with a $5B+ portfolio of operating company and commercial real estate investments. Focused on providing strategic, flexible capital to companies and sponsors with sustainable growth potential, Trinity has a proven track record of helping businesses and individuals across a variety of industries and markets transform and expand their operations. Trinity’s investment professionals and partners have extensive experience founding, growing, operating, and selling companies.

Trinity targets companies with $20-100 million in revenue and $2-10 million in EBITDA with proven management teams, diversified customers/products/services, defensible competitive advantages, strategically viable growth prospects, and opportunities for operational improvements/efficiencies.

Trinity also has a significant commercial real estate portfolio, partnering with sponsors to invest across a variety of asset classes including multifamily, hospitality, senior living, and industrial. Investments include both new construction developments and existing value-add/rehabilitation projects.'

*Trinity Investors only works with accredited investors. Investments are illiquid, and diversification is key to a managed portfolio.

Name: V8 Capital
Description:
Fundada em 2017, a V8 Capital é uma gestora de fundos independente com um time de sócios com vasta experiência no mercado financeiro. 

Iniciamos nossa trajetória focando na gestão de fundos de renda fixa, mas ao longo do tempo ampliamos o nosso portfólio para produtos em renda variável e crédito privado, além de suas versões previdenciárias. 

Com mais de 60 mil investidores e R$ 6,3 bilhões em ativos sob gestão, a V8 Capital atende diversos tipos de clientes, sejam eles pessoas físicas, jurídicas, multi e single family offices, fundos de pensão (EFPC) e regimes próprios de previdência social (RPPS). 

Nosso time é formado por mais de 30 profissionais, segregados em cada equipe de gestão (renda fixa, renda variável e crédito estruturado), além dos times de risco, compliance e de relação com o investidor.

Entre em contato conosco e conheça mais sobre os nossos produtos.

ri@v8capital.com.br

Name: Baltech Group
Description:
Baltech, a group of companies operating in the construction, real estate, energy, agriculture and livestock sectors since 2009, always seeks to create value. With a highly competitive portfolio, it has proven itself to be reliable in every field in which it operates, and has demonstrated its creativity and understanding of sustainability by prioritizing humanity and nature.

One of the most important features that makes Baltech stand out both in Turkey and in the world with this understanding is that it has made significant investments by using current technology correctly and always following improvements in business functions. The feature of the company that has always maintained its strength is its belief in collective action. Baltech aims to be one with its employees, customers and all business partners.

Name: Pune Angels Network
Description:
Pune Angels Network is a dynamic platform that brings together visionary entrepreneurs and experienced investors to fuel the next generation of innovative startups. Our mission is to empower early-stage businesses by providing them with access to capital, mentorship, and a robust support system. By fostering connections between startups and high-net-worth individuals, angel investors, and industry experts, we aim to create a thriving ecosystem that accelerates business growth.

With a strong focus on fostering collaboration, our members benefit from exclusive deal flow, expert insights, and networking opportunities. We invite you to join our community and be a part of a transformative journey that shapes the future of entrepreneurship.

Name: RRG Capital Management (RRG)
Description: RRG is dedicated to sustainable natural capital investing - agriculture, water management, biodiversity and habitat conservation, and renewable energy - to deliver value and positive environmental and social impact for investors and partners. We believe the natural resource challenges of our time - rising demand for quality food, climate change, water resiliency, biodiversity loss, and more - require active engagement from private capital at scale. RRG is a global sustainable real assets investment firm, Certified B Corporation, signatory to the United Nations Principles for Responsible Investment, and active participant in numerous agricultural and impact investing initiatives. RRG Capital Management LLC is Renewable Resources Group LLC company (collectively, “RRG”).

Name: Artmax
Description: Artmax is a single family office with investment operations worldwide. The investment operations span across most investable asset classes in public and private markets.

Name: Percheron Capital
Description: Percheron Capital is a leading private equity firm focused on partnering with exceptional teams to build category-defining essential services businesses. Percheron has over $4 billion in assets under management and supports high-quality essential services businesses to accelerate growth and enhance long-term value.

Name: Signal Hill Equity Partners
Description:
Signal Hill Equity Partners is a middle-market private equity firm with offices in Washington, D.C. and Toronto. 

Led by a team of seasoned investors and business operators, we focus on building enduring partnerships with North American mid-market companies.
 
With over $500 million in committed capital, we invest with a long-term perspective, helping companies achieve sustainable growth and operational excellence across economic cycles. 

We specialize in partnering with market-leading businesses in essential services and regulated industries, working closely with management teams to execute strategic transitions and drive thoughtful growth.
 
Our professionals bring over 50 years of collective experience and have successfully completed more than 250 transactions. We pride ourselves on being patient, value-added partners who are committed to investing in people, culture, and long-term value creation.

Name: AFIG FUNDS
Description:
Advanced Finance & Investment Group LLC (“AFIG Funds”) is a private equity fund management company founded in 2005 in Mauritius with branches in Dakar (Senegal), Johannesburg (South Africa), and Washington D.C. (United States).

AFIG Funds seeks to create a new paradigm for African private equity investing by mobilizing substantial local private capital alongside international private investors and development finance institutions in investment vehicles managed by experienced African private equity professionals with a heavy emphasis on value addition beyond financial contributions.

These professionals combine developed markets investment expertise with local insight and relationships which enable AFIG Funds to turn what have been traditionally considered hindrances to doing business in Africa into proprietary opportunities by devising innovative and simple solutions.

The AFIG Funds team is driven by a strong commitment to excellence, an ambition to lead in the Private Equity sector, and a commitment to ethical investing. By combining international best practices with its deep knowledge of the target region’s economic environment, the AFIG Funds team offers proven expertise in private equity in Africa to achieve superior returns for its investors.

AFIG Funds wishes to play its part in integrating the African continent in a virtuous circle leading to wealth creation for both its investors and the economies in which AFIG Funds participates. AFIG Funds is also committed to respecting internationally accepted environment, health, and social standards.

Through its investments and its value added role alongside its portfolio companies, AFIG Funds aims to be a leading partner for the development of the African private sector.

Name: Jet Investment
Description:
We are a Czech-based, Central European, MIFID compliant, private equity investment company founded in 1997. Over more than 25 years, we have been entrusted with restructuring, reorganising and managing over 35 companies in the CE region. While we specialise in medium-sized industrial and manufacturing enterprises, the scope of our investments covers a broad range of industries.
 
Investors of Jet private equity funds, which are regulated by Czech National Bank and fully compliant with EU regulation, reap the rewards of our conservative approach towards finance management. They know that our steady growth is grounded in hard work and based on the hands-on involvement of our managing directors. Our team of experts, mainly specialised in the area of economics with an extensive experience in M&A, restructuring and management of companies, profits from a well-balanced ratio of senior and junior employees.
 
Currently, our assets under management amount to 600+ m EUR, while the companies in our portfolio employ approx. 4.100 people.

Name: MAKEDA ASSET MANAGEMENT
Description:
Créée en 2021, MAKEDA Asset Management est une Société 
Anonyme de droit Camerounais au capital de 300 000 000 XAF
agréée par la COSUMAF (Commission de Surveillance du Marché 
Financier de l’Afrique Centrale) dans la sous-région CEMAC 
(Cameroun, Congo, Gabon, RCA, Gabon et Guinée Equatoriale)
sous la référence N° COSUMAF-SGP-06/2021. Nous adoptons

durable et responsable.

NOS VALEURS

- Innovation
- Inclusion

CE QUE NOUS FAISONS

- Gestion collective
- Conseil financier
Location: Rue Dubois Saligny, Akwa Douala - Cameroun

Name: GRE Assets
Description:
GRE Assets is a specialist in property and investment management of UK and Spanish real estate. 

GRE Assets formally started its operations in 2006 and quickly became an international real estate investment company, serving a vast portfolio of clients around the globe. With offices in the UK, KSA, Barcelona and the UAE, GRE Assets primarily focuses on delivering secure and profitable assets in the UK property market.

Where GRE Assets stand apart from its competition is in the service it offers, from investment and legal advisory to property acquisition and management, its cross-functional divisions provide a one-stop solution to all of its clients. GRE Assets works with their clients from the initial investment all the way through to exit, offering a service like no other.

GRE Assets takes pride in its human capital that has, over the years, nurtured clients' investments with excellent results. The team comprises talented and highly experienced property professionals with wide ranging expertise in investment management, legal services, UK tax consultation, property management and strategic advisory. 

GRE Assets property portfolio largely spans but is not limited to the residential sector in the UK real estate market. And with the knowledge the group has acquired, GRE Assets has seen further successes in Europe with its recent investment opportunities in Spain. The company’s goal is to continue its success and growth with professionalism, integrity and innovation driven by its vision to become the first choice for the UK and international property investors.

Name: VittNivesh - The Investment Club of NIBM
Description:
VittNivesh is the investment club of NIBM, Pune. The club is an epicentre of a variety of investment analysis and management activities. The foundational objective of the club is the creation and management of a student-driven fund that has investments in a number of asset classes and brings in respectable returns to the investors. 
VittNivesh also has initiatives in place that cater to various domains of finance specifically investment and asset management. These initiatives include interactive social media posts, articles, blog posts, etc. on various topics of finance.
Club mail id: vittniveshnibm@gmail.com
Instagram Page: https://www.instagram.com/vittnivesh.nibm/?utm_medium=copy_link
You can also reach out to us at FrontPage: https://front.page/@VittNiveshNIBM

Name: Avantis Investors
Description:
Avantis Investors is built on financial science.

Our academic-based framework analyzes current prices with the goal of capturing higher expected returns—and delivering value to clients. And our well-diversified solutions are managed according to an efficient, repeatable and cost-sensitive process.

Despite the complexity of the theoretical and empirical analysis and data, we do not miss the common-sense concept that underpins our approach: Paying less for an expected stream of cash flows, or the equity of a company, means higher expected returns.

Learn more about us www.AvantisInvestors.com.

Name: Emefin
Description:
Somos la oficina corporativa de un Grupo Empresarial Familiar peruano con más de 80 años de experiencia en inmobiliario, manufactura, distribución, logística y retail en categorías de salud, consumo masivo y productos industriales.  Invertimos en y gestionamos empresas operativas a nivel mundial con alto potencial de crecimiento y creación de valor. Emefin trabaja de cerca con las compañías del grupo en temas de estrategia, asignación de capital y gestión de talento para posicionarlas como líderes en cada uno de los mercados en los que operamos.

Tenemos una estructura de capital permanente y un flexible mandato de inversión. Lo primero nos permite tener una visión estratégica de largo plazo en los negocios que participamos. Por otro lado, nuestro mandato nos da la libertad táctica para actuar como acreedor, inversionista, dueño y/u operador. 
Emefin gestiona los negocios enfocado en los siguientes cuatro pilares:

Estrategia
En primer lugar analizamos mercados y la capacidad del grupo para definir en qué industrias y en que activos queremos participar y bajo que estructura. En segundo lugar tenemos conversaciones extensas con el equipo de Gerencia de nuestras compañías para llegar a una visión compartida del negocio para definir una estrategia y plan de ejecución. 

Talento
Somo responsables de seleccionar y gestionar a los líderes de nuestras empresas. Definimos la estructura de remuneración de los líderes de las compañías y ayudamos a los Gerentes en selección de su primera línea de reportes. 

Alocación de capital
Proponemos la distribución y estructura del capital del grupo familiar para maximizar los retornos de los accionistas a largo plazo

Apoyo y seguimiento a los negocios
En línea con la estrategia de cada negocio somos responsables de revisar y apoyar a los líderes de cada negocio en el desarrollo de sus presupuestos anuales y después hacerle seguimiento a la ejecución.

Name: Azalea Investment Management
Description:
Set up in 2015, Azalea is a wholly-owned subsidiary of Seviora, and indirectly owned by Temasek Holdings (Private) Limited. Azalea is in the business of investing in private equity (“PE”), with a focus on the development and innovation of new investment platforms and products. Its goal is to bring private assets to a wider investor base through a phased approach, starting with PE. It is also committed to educating the investing public.

One such innovation is the Astrea Platform, a series of investment products based on diversified portfolios of PE funds. It represents a phased approach to develop products for long term minded Singapore retail investors to co-invest in private equity with Azalea. Started in 2006, there are nine in the series to date, with Astrea 9 being the latest addition to the Astrea Platform.

Besides the Astrea PE Bonds, Azalea Investment Management Pte. Ltd., the management arm of the Azalea Group, also manages other PE fund products through its Altrium platform, that allows accredited investors to co-invest with Azalea and access strong performing PE fund managers globally, while at the same time helping investors overcome traditional challenges in accessing PE.

Name: Trium Capital
Description:
We launch and accelerate specialist liquid alternative strategies in partnership with our carefully selected Portfolio Managers. Together, we aim to deliver superior risk-adjusted returns for our investors within a supportive environment where talent can thrive.

*Investors should be aware that there is a risk of loss.

Name: BondBloxx
Description:
BondBloxx Investment Management Corporation (BondBloxx) is the first ETF issuer to focus solely on bringing more choice and flexibility to fixed income investors, offering a range of exposures spanning  U.S. Treasuries, investment grade and high yield corporate bonds, emerging markets bonds, tax-aware strategies, and private credit. To learn more about BondBloxx's fixed income-first mission, visit BondBloxxETF.com.


Investors should consider the investment objectives, risks, charges and expenses carefully before investing. This and other important information can be found in the BondBloxx ETF's statutory and summary prospectuses. To obtain a free prospectus, please visit bondbloxxetf.com. Please read the prospectus carefully before investing. The BondBloxx ETFs are distributed by Foreside Fund Services, LLC.

Name: Bluesky Capital
Description: Bluesky Capital is a company focused on investment and strategic partnerships, aiming to inspire innovation and build sustainable economic ecosystems. We are committed to collaborating with visionary and creative enterprises to drive fundamental transformations in global connectivity and access.

Name: Indiassetz
Description:
Established by visionary ex-bankers, Indiassetz began its journey on October 5, 2014, with an ambitious goal: to revolutionize Wealth Management, focusing specifically on the real estate asset class. Recognizing a gap in the market, especially for HNIs and NRIs, Indiassetz aimed to offer professional, white-glove services - a stark contrast to the generic solutions then available, which largely overlooked the nuanced needs of affluent clients.

Now, after nine years, Indiassetz has impressively grown its Assets Under Management to over $3 billion. This growth is a testament to its commitment to providing a seamless, technology-driven experience, akin to the simplicity and speed of stock trading. By consolidating a myriad of services under one roof, Indiassetz has simplified the complexities of real estate wealth management.

Our partnerships with esteemed institutions like HSBC, ICICI, and renowned Wealth Management Companies such as Anandrathi, ASK, and Client Associates, underscore our credibility and trustworthiness in the realm of wealth management. These collaborations reflect our shared dedication to managing the real estate wealth of clients with unparalleled expertise and care.

Indiassetz's pioneering approach and success have not gone unnoticed. Our achievements and insights have been featured in leading media outlets like The Economic Times, Business Standard, Times of India, and Deccan Herald, further establishing our thought leadership and influence in the industry.

As a market leader, Indiassetz continues to champion transparency and a customer-first philosophy. We remain steadfast in our mission to offer unmatched wealth management services, with a keen focus on real estate, ensuring that our clients' investments are not just managed, but are nurtured and grown with the utmost professionalism and strategic insight.

Name: Taxus Fund S.A.
Description:
(więcej o budowanym Innowacyjnym Funduszu Mieszkaniowym można inwestować już od 1 tys. zł. do 210 mln. zł. w tej publikacji -> https://lnkd.in/dtkRxSv3 zapraszam zainteresowanych do kontaktu w wiadomości prywatnej )
Taxus Fund S.A. staje się pierwszym publicznym Funduszem Mieszkaniowym w Polsce. Emitent swoją obecną działalność kieruje w szczególności ku mieszkaniom na wynajem dla najuboższej warstwy społecznej której nie stać na wynajęcie całego mieszkania nawet kawalerki lub studentów tzw. wynajem mieszkań na pokoje. Taki sposób wynajmu jest także najbardziej bezpieczny patrząc przez pryzmat właściciela nieruchomości. Fundusz przewiduje utrzymanie wysokich stawek najmu w dłuższym okresie czasu oraz zakłada przyjęcie na rynku Polskim trendu z Europy Zachodniej o zwrocie w kierunku najmowania mieszkań a nie ich kupowania.


Fundusz będzie nabywał mieszkania zarówno używane jak i nowe. W dalszej wieloletniej perspektywie jest również utworzenie własnego dewelopera w celu budowy mieszkań na wynajem. Mieszkania duże są najtańsze za metr kwadratowy na rynku wtórnym więc Fundusz liczy dodatkowo na ich duży wzrost wartości w czasie.


W pierwszych krokach Fundusz będzie działał na rynku Polskim na którym się skupi jednakże nie wykluczone jest w późniejszych latach działanie również na rynkach zagranicznych. 


Zarząd będzie rekomendował walnym zgromadzeniom akcjonariuszy Taxus Fund S.A.  aby przyszłe zyski były inwestowane ponownie w rozwój biznesu (w szczególności zakup następnych mieszkań na wynajem) co podniesienie wartości spół dla Akcjonariuszy. Przy dużej ilości docelowej mieszkań na wynajem będą to znaczne środki w ujęciu rocznym. 

,,Najlepszą metodą przewidywania przyszłości jest jej tworzenie” - Peter Drucker



Zapraszamy osoby chcące zainwestować w Fundusz do kontaktu, Firma jest zainteresowana również przejmowaniem nieruchomości w szczególności mieszkań za akcje własne  -info@taxusfund.pl

Name: Margetts
Description:
The Margetts name has been a feature of Birmingham business life, going back to the early years following the formation of the Birmingham Stock Exchange in 1845. Our long and rich family history has been a prominent feature throughout our growth, providing stability and long-term thinking. Our success is achieved through two operating divisions: Margetts Fund Management and MGTS.

Margetts Fund Management is a boutique investment firm, offering a comprehensive range of fund management services, with over 30 years’ experience in managing risk rated multi-manager funds. Operating and managing Australian agribusiness assets is a privilege which we do not take for granted.  Commitment to environmental sustainability and high levels of animal welfare are at the forefront of our thinking, and contribute positively to our long term value goals.

In achieving long term investor value, we recognise that productive assets must be acquired in an expert manner, operated and maintained to preserve value and produce optimal return, and divested at opportune times, given market factors and investor requirements.

Name: Red Ribbon Asset Management Plc
Description:
About 
Founded in 2007, Red Ribbon Asset Management Plc is an Indo-British financial services group building on the legacy of historical, cultural and socio-economic ties between the two countries. As India’s global economic role has burgeoned and it looks to a golden decade of growth – following the pattern of China’s trajectory template 20 years ago – the UK is shifting into a post-Brexit phase where trading and commercial relationships outside the EU are coming to the fore.


Strategy
Red Ribbon’s prospects are intrinsically intertwined with India’s forecast evolution from currently the world’s 5th biggest economy to the 3rd biggest, overtaking Japan by 2029. The Company believes these macro-economic changes will yield significant niche opportunities to be exploited in the bidirectional flows of capital between the UK and India.


Management Team
Red Ribbon is led by Suchit Punnose (www.linkedin.com/in/suchitpunnose) the CEO and Founder, an entrepreneur and experienced investor with expertise in investing and operating in India. Suchit and his team are pioneering cutting edge investment strategies in India and are focussed in translating knowledge and know-how from the UK into optimised capital formation in India. The entrepreneurial talent and diverse knowledge of the cultures of the UK and India have equipped the team with the skills required to develop projects with the same rigour, ethos and professionalism expected of a UK public limited company.


Philosophy
Running through the entire organisation is a culture and underlying investment approach which reflects the management team’s conviction that the transition to a more resilient economy must inevitably be led by well-governed businesses striving to reduce the environmental impact of creating value for society. This is encapsulated in Red Ribbon’s “Triple P Bottomline statement - Planet, People, Profit”, delivered via Mainstream Impact Investment precepts, which create wealth responsibly.

Name: LetterOne
Description:
LetterOne is an international investment business headquartered in Luxembourg. We invest our own capital in companies that we think have unrealised potential and where we believe our strategic involvement can improve their performance and build significant value. 

We are very selective about the sectors in which we invest. We only invest in sectors where we have developed deep industry expertise. As businesspeople we bring, sector experience, strategic expertise, and our own permanent capital, to those companies in which we choose to invest. 

We are long-term growth investors – with no fixed investment time horizons. We know that building a better performing business takes time and determination. 

People need energy, food retail, and technology. As demographics change, people are increasingly concerned about their health. They need energy to power homes and grow economies. Therefore, these sectors have longevity and opportunity. 

Many industries are in significant flux because of changes in society, demographics and technology. Companies around the world are transforming their operating models and deepening their relationships and knowledge of their consumers. 

Our vision is to build on our proven track record of successful investments to create one of the world's leading international investment businesses. 

We have successfully managed companies through volatile periods like these and will undoubtedly do so again. 

We are disciplined when it comes to the execution of strategy. We have an operational mindset. 

Our investments are focused on the Energy, Retail, Telecoms & Health sectors through our business units, L1 Energy, L1 Retail, L1 Technology and L1 Health. Our liquidity is managed by L1 Treasury.

Name: Folketrygdfondet
Description:
Folketrygdfondet er et særlovsselskap som forvalter Statens Pensjonsfond Norge (SPN) og Statens Obligasjonsfond (SOF) på vegne av det norske folk. 

Vi er en ansvarlig, aktiv og langsiktig investor med mål om høyest mulig avkastning over tid, i tråd med mandatet vårt som er fastsatt av Finansdepartementet. 

Folketrygdfondet ble i sin tid etablert i 1967 for å forvalte overskuddene i folketrygden, og i løpet av de tolv første årene ble det overført 11,8 milliarder kroner til fondet. Siden 1979 har det ikke vært overskudd å sette inn og koblingen til folketrygden opphørte på 80-tallet. Stortinget har vedtatt et årlig uttak fra SPN på 3 prosent og de første utbetalingene var i 2025.

I dag er Folketrygdfondet den største institusjonelle investoren på Oslo Børs og eier om lag 12 prosent av hovedindeksen.

CCC’s advisory business provided financial, strategic and policy advice to energy-intensive industries, financial institutions, cleantech companies and governments.

Description: Yemnak Management Consultancy L.L.C. was established in 2013 in Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates. Yemnak is a bedouin word that literally translates  to ”Your Right Arm”. At Yemnak we are committed to support our customers in achieving outstanding results, maintaining sustainable growths and meeting the shareholders’ expectations.  We are a team of experienced, passionate and dedicated consultants who accumulated a wealth of knowledge, skills and expertise over long years working for mutli-nationals and serving a wide range of customers.  Yemnak takes pride in the fact that the team goes out of their way to assist clients through hands-on implementation and execution to ensure that we deliver results and that every project is an enduring success story.

Name: Addenda Capital
Description:
Addenda Capital est une entreprise de gestion de placements qui propose des solutions à sa clientèle institutionnelle et privée à valeur nette élevée. Nous offrons des services d’experts pour une vaste gamme de classes d’actif. Notre mission consiste à ajouter de la valeur au moyen de l’innovation, de la discipline et de l’intégrité, en plus d’entretenir des relations étroites avec nos clients.

Avec son réseau de bureaux à Montréal, Guelph, Regina et Toronto, Addenda Capital est en mesure de proposer à sa clientèle des solutions de placement classiques ou novatrices.
___________________________________________________________________________________

Addenda Capital is an investment management firm providing solutions for institutional and high net worth clients. We offer our clients expert services in a broad range of asset classes. Our mission is to add value through innovation, discipline and integrity, and to nurture genuine partnerships with our clients. 

With offices in Montréal, Guelph, Regina and Toronto and a team of over 70 investment professionals, Addenda Capital offers traditional and alternative investment solutions that meet clients' needs.

Name: Glenfarne Group, LLC
Description:
Glenfarne Group, LLC is a New York headquartered, privately held and privately funded proprietary investment platform that seeks to generate superior risk adjusted returns from investments in the broader Real Asset space, which includes service providers and industrial suppliers within Transportation, Infrastructure, Government Services, Energy and other Recurring assets such as Resources and Real Estate.

Glenfarne’s unique approach exploits the optionality and diverse range of adjacent opportunities around an investment in order to realize the maximum value.

Name: SIC
Description:
تأسست شركة الصندوق الصناعي للاستثمار لتعزيز التطور الصناعي في المملكة. ودعم مشاركة القطاع الخاص في المشاريع النوعية والاستراتيجية، من خلال تقديم استراتيجيات استثمارية مبتكرة. والتركيز على دعم القطاعات الحيوية مثل الصناعة، التعدين، الطاقة، والخدمات اللوجستية، بهدف بناء منظومة صناعية متكاملة ومستدامة.


الرؤية:
أن نصبح الشريك الاستثماري المفضل للمستثمرين في القطاع الصناعي لتمكين النمو والابتكار و التنوع في القاعدة الصناعية في المملكة العربية السعودية




الرسالة:
تحفيز التقدم الصناعي في المملكة من خلال جذب استثمارات القطاع الخاص في المؤسسات الصناعية، وتطبيق استراتيجيات استثمارية مخصصة في أدوات الدين وأدوات رأس المال من أجل تعزيز منظومة صناعية تنافسية ومستدامة.

الأهداف الاستراتيجية:
1-	دفع عجلة النمو الاقتصادي والتنمية الصناعية للمؤسسات الصناعية.
2-	دفع الابتكار والتقدم التقني للمؤسسات الصناعية.
3-	تعزيز استثمارات القطاع الخاص.
4-	الاستدامة مالياَ وتشغيلياَ.



The Saudi Industrial Development Fund (“SIDF”) established The SIDF Investment Company (“SIC”) to complement the financial offerings from SIDF and the industrial ecosystem. SIC aims to actively support the development of industrial enterprises in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia through capital solutions that offer greater accessibility to funding, innovative investment strategies, and sector-focused approaches.

Vision:
Become the preferred partner for industrial investors enabling growth, innovation and diversification of KSA’s industrial sector.

Mission:
Catalyze industrial advancement in KSA by crowding-in private sector investments in industrial enterprises through tailored equity and debt investment strategies nurturing a competitive and sustainable industrial ecosystem.


Key Strategic Objectives:
1-	Drive economic growth and sector development for industrial enterprises.
2-	Drive innovation and tech advancement
3-	Attract private capital funding. 
4-	Be financially and operationally sustainable.

Name: KawiSafi Ventures
Description: KawiSafi Ventures is a for-profit impact Fund which aims to catalyze an emerging high growth potential off-grid solar energy ecosystem in East Africa.

Name: Brunel Pension Partnership Limited
Description:
Brunel Pension Partnership Limited is an LGPS pension pool responsible for the pooled assets (36bn+) of ten Local Government Pension Schemes (LGPS). The participating funds are Avon, Buckinghamshire, Cornwall, Devon, Dorset, the Environment Agency Pension Fund, Gloucestershire, Oxfordshire, Somerset and Wiltshire. 
We are owned by our clients and invest on behalf of more than 800,000 LGPS members and over 2,000 employers. 
The primary objective of the Brunel Pension Partnership is to enable each fund to deliver its fiduciary duty to act in the best long-term interests of their members.
Our Investment Principles can be accessed on our website: https://www.brunelpensionpartnership.org/investing-responsibly/investment-principles/

Brunel is approved as a MiFID full scope Investment Firm. Authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority No. 790168

Name: Sweef Capital
Description:
Sweef Capital is a Singapore-based impact investment firm investing in the potential of women and the future of Southeast Asia. 

As a private equity firm, our focus is on investing equity and quasi-equity capital in growth-stage companies, primarily in Vietnam, Indonesia and the Philippines. 

Sweef Capital was established to provide a trusted flagship for quality investment at scale that improves peoples’ lives and showcases the potential of women and of our region. Investing in scalable solutions that drive value through diversity and inclusion is at the core of our mission. Southeast Asia is where we live and work; it is home. Our professional experience reinforces a shared belief in the rich opportunities for capital to be directed to solutions for people in our region, particularly women.

Name: Grupo WT
Description:
Seja qual for o segmento, nossas empresas entram na vida dos clientes para trazer soluções que fazem a diferença.

Nossa missão é garantir bem-estar e eficiência por meio de soluções inovadoras, fortalecendo vínculos de confiança com clientes e colaboradores.

Somos uma holding  com atuação nos estados do Rio Grande do Norte, Ceará, Paraíba e Pernambuco. As nossas empresas ofertam soluções de higiene e limpeza profissional, nutrição clínica, terapêutica e esportiva, terceirização de frota corporativa e locação de usinas fotovoltaicas. 

Empresas do GRUPO WT

WT Distribuição e Serviços
Com atuação no Rio Grande do Norte, Ceará, Paraíba e Pernambuco, somos uma distribuidora de Higiene e Limpeza Profissional. Atendemos todos aqueles produtos de Limpeza e contemplam em nosso portfólio as marcas Higindoor, Essenz, Lunes, Performa, Christeyns, Grow Química, Ruhof, Tork, Santher Professional, Alliance Laundry Systems, Alfa Tennant, Hobart e TTS. 

Nutrir Saúde
Especializada em Nutrição Clínica e Terapêutica, oferece soluções de Terapia Nutricional Enteral (TNE), Fórmulas Infantis e Suplementos Esportivos.  Mantém parcerias com marcas de referência no mercado, como Nestlé Health Science, Essential Nutrition, Vitafor Suplementos, Puravida e Sanavita.

3A Locadora
Atua no segmento de locação de veículos, e investe em gestão de processos e tecnologia para garantir agilidade e eficiência na terceirização de veículos para o segmento corporativo.

Helos Plus Energias Renováveis
Empresa criada em 2021 focada em democratizar o acesso da energia renovável a todos os tipos de estabelecimentos, por meio da locação de Usinas Solares.

Name: Bank of China Group Investment Limited
Description: Bank of China Group Investment Limited (BOCGI) is a wholly owned subsidiary of Bank of China Company Limited since 1984. As the only professional investment company of the BOC based in Hong Kong, BOCGI has invested in a great number of large infrastructures and major projects in the Hong Kong and Macao areas, mainland China and Overseas, covering such sectors as real estate, industry, energy, transportation, media, hotels and finance. BOCGI clearly repositioned itself strategically, expanded new business fields, perfected risk control mechanism and optimized its investment structure. With its return on investment mounting year by year, it has become an effective means and important carrier of BOC in the sphere of investment banking focusing on the business of direct investment and asset management.

Name: Augme Capital
Description: Somos uma gestora independente, focada em crédito, com fundos diferenciados e que entregam consistentemente retorno entre os melhores de sua classe.

Name: Invico Capital Corporation
Description: Invico Capital Corporation is an award-winning Canadian investment fund management firm providing alternative investing and financing solutions in Canada and the U.S. The firm offers a range of private debt, syndicated credit, and energy financing solutions that assist corporations in pursuing strategic acquisitions, financing capital expenditures and growth programs, and supporting working capital requirements.

Name: Scout Energy Partners
Description: Scout Energy Partners Scout is a private investment firm, acquiring and operating energy assets for institutional partners.

Name: Carrillo Royalty
Description:
Somos Carrillo Royalty, especialistas en asesorías sobre inversiones con más de 20 años de experiencia en el rubro.

Nuestro compromiso siempre será garantizar una elección de inversión exitosa con una experiencia de calidad. Por ello, contamos con nuestro staff de asesores quienes están siempre disponibles para brindar sus conocimientos y guiar a los inversores en la elección de su cartera, proporcionando un seguimiento constante hasta el final de la inversión.

La honestidad, responsabilidad y transparencia son nuestros pilares principales, los mismos que nos permiten tener una amplia cartera de inversores fidelizados que confían en nuestro trabajo.

Encuéntranos en el centro financiero Av. República de Panamá 3418, San Isidro.

Invierte hoy, disfruta el mañana! Asesórate con nosotros!

#CarrilloRoyalty

Name: Tork Capital
Description:
A Tork Capital é uma gestora independente de recursos fundada em Agosto de 2018, no Rio de janeiro, com foco em ações.

Somos uma equipe de profissionais com comprovada experiência em gestão de recursos de terceiros, tendo atuado em empresas de elevada reputação na indústria de fundos de investimento, antes de juntar-se à Tork Capital.

Adotamos um modelo de partnership, que julgamos ser essencial para atrair e reter profissionais hiper comprometidos, que pensem e ajam como donos.

Name: Gelber Group LLC
Description:
Gelber Group, a Chicago-based global proprietary trading company, has set the bar as one of the industry’s most innovative and enduring firms. Our success is driven by our relentless pursuit of new trading ideas and our emphasis on technological innovation.

Established in 1982, Gelber Group is privately funded and trades on major exchanges in the United States and worldwide, operating in a variety of asset classes including foreign exchange, fixed income, equities, and commodities. Gelber has over 200 employees and offices located in Chicago, IL (headquarters); White Plains, NY; and Amsterdam/Gelber Coöperatief U.A.

Name: Eventide Asset Management
Description:
Eventide Asset Management is a values-based asset management firm, rooted in a biblical worldview, that is pursuing Investing that Makes the World Rejoice. Since our founding in 2008, we have remained singularly committed to investing in morally good companies. Our rigorous moral evaluation framework, called Business 360, identifies companies that are creating true value in the world through good products and good practices. 

We believe high-quality companies that excel at creating value for others and trade at a discount to intrinsic value offer superior long-term risk-adjusted returns. By combining Business 360’s moral evaluation framework with the deep domain and industry expertise of our investment team, we pursue investments that offer integrity, impact, and performance.

Social Media Guidelines: https://www.eventideinvestments.com/social-media-guidelines/

Name: Alphadyne Asset Management
Description:
Alphadyne Asset Management is an alternative investment management firm led by founding member and Chief Investment Officer Philippe Khuong-Huu. Investors include pension funds, insurance companies, asset managers, investment consultants and sovereign wealth funds. Alphadyne, launched in 2005, has offices in New York, London and Tokyo.

Alphadyne pursues macro and fixed income relative value investment strategies in global interest rate, foreign exchange, equity, commodity and credit markets. Investments are made in both developed and emerging market countries. The firm’s activity is weighted to interest rate and foreign exchange markets and to execution via swaps, futures, options and cash instruments. Alphadyne seeks to generate superior risk-adjusted returns with low correlations to the main asset classes.

Name: Wittington Investments, Limited
Description:
Wittington Investments, Limited, a private Canadian company, is the holding company of the Weston group of companies, which includes George Weston Limited, Loblaw Companies Limited and Choice Properties REIT.

George Weston Limited is a Canadian public company, founded in 1882. George Weston has two operating segments: Loblaw Companies Limited, Canada’s largest food and drug retailer and a provider of financial services, and Choice Properties Real Estate Investment Trust, Canada’s largest and preeminent diversified REIT. With over 200,000 employees working at George Weston and its operating segments, the group of companies represent one of Canada’s largest private sector employers.

Name: Shanduka Group
Description:
Shanduka Group was founded in 2001 as a black-owned investment holding company. It is invested in a diverse portfolio of listed and unlisted companies, with key holdings in the resources and food and beverage industries. Shanduka is also invested in the financial services, energy, telecoms, property and industrial sectors. The group has investments in South Africa, Mozambique, Mauritius, Ghana and Nigeria.

The company's investment philosophy rests on partnering with firms that have a history of delivering profitable earnings and capable management teams that embrace transformation.

Shanduka’s broad-based ownership demonstrates its commitment to empowerment and transformation. Part of its shareholding is held by trusts that invest in education and small business development. Total black ownership is 51%, of which an 18% shareholding is held by broad-based trusts.

In 2004, Shanduka Group launched the Shanduka Foundation and made a commitment to spend R100 million on corporate social investments over ten years. Shanduka has spent R82 million to date. The Shanduka Foundation has a number of entities through which it carries out its social investments:

•	Adopt-a-School Foundation
•	Shanduka Black Umbrellas
•	Cyril Ramaphosa Education Trust
•	Shanduka internship programme

Name: FRAM Capital
Description: A FRAM Capital nasce em 2007 como uma gestora de recursos independente idealizada por uma equipe de profissionais com ampla experiência tanto na gestão de recursos quanto na condução de negócios. Seus fundadores lideraram, nos 15 anos precedentes, a criação de um dos maiores bancos de investimento do país. Em 2013 diversifica seu negócio oferecendo gestão de patrimônio e administração fiduciária.

Name: Al-Rafidain International Enterprises
Description:
Established in 1996, Alrafidain International Enterprises began as a specialized team of commercial, economic, and legal consultants and experts. Planning with meticulous precision, they embarked on a quest to integrate all companies to align with an integrated, cohesive, and comprehensive management framework that would unify and consolidate administrative and financial strengths to manage and supervise a large group of companies efficiently.
Alrafidain International Enterprises ranks among the leading conglomerates in Iraq that have under its wing a vast portfolio of companies that are rooted deep in diverse industries and commercial sectors. These included pharmaceuticals, real estate, construction, tourism, entertainment, food and beverages, and the retail industry. The success of the Alrafidain International Enterprises can be largely attributed to the astute management of its resources, including its human capital and its excellence in ably handling its vast financial reserves to reap rich dividends.
In depth experience and fine-tuned expertise in operations, logistics, and
marketing communication help Alrafidain International Enterprises consistently achieve its ambitious goals.
Alrafidain International Enterprises has a variety of investments and expansion ambitions within service sectors that aim to improve the quality of the customer's life in diverse ways. These include entertainment, healthcare, tourism, food and beverage, retail shopping, and commercial activities. The Group has a long-term investment perspective and prefers to grow through acquisitions in fields where the management has significant experience.
Alrafidain International Enterprises includes large and specialized companies that have proven to the Iraqi market that properly planned and structured management is the secret to the success of projects and that aligning to high quality in every parameter defines the drive towards the long-term goals of the group.

Name: Ghadir Cement Holding Co.
Description: GIIDC is a second biggest cement group in Iran with six subsidiaries including Sepahan , Shargh , Kordestan, Dashtestan, Monddashti and Shargh White cement. The group has 10 percent of the market share and in the recent years achieved 17 percent of export share of whole cement companies

Name: PROVEN Arabia | بروفن العربية
Description:
Proven Arabia is a holding company based in Saudi Arabia with a number of brands offering a diverse spectrum of consulting and solutions.

We help organisations from across the globe unlock opportunities through consulting and advisory with a range of business services.

Name: Gray Matters Capital
Description:
Finding Purpose with 100 million women

We are an impact investor in the global south. Our deep roots in microfinance and education finance have demonstrated profit with purpose. We focus on self-development and skilling technology for women to find meaningful work.

Over two decades, we have played the role of an impact bridge enabling convergence of high social impact with strong financial returns. We have helped build replicable business models that are scalable to other markets.

Founded by serial entrepreneur Bob Pattillo, our approach to achieving our mission is to invest in early-stage entrepreneurs & portfolio of funds, seed new ventures to fill market gaps, pioneer alternate financing approaches and collaborate with partners.

Through investments in 78+ enterprises, we have found purpose with 21 million low-resourced women and girls in the areas of learning, skilling, economic participation and well-being.

Name: Mercatus is now Charles River for Private Markets
Description:
Mercatus has officially rebranded to Charles River for Private Markets in order to simplify how we represent ourselves to our clients and the marketplace. Please Follow us @Charles River Development for further private markets updates

This rebrand will streamline our conversations with prospective clients, especially those that are increasingly looking for holistic solutions across their public and private portfolios.

If any of the challenges below sound familiar, Charles River for Private Markets is for you:

  We are too dependent on manual & error-prone processes to report our investment data.
  We cannot run rapid valuation & scenario analyses across our portfolio.
  We are overly reliant on Microsoft Excel.
  We can’t meet the growing transparency demands from our LPs.
  We can’t keep hiring more people as we raise more capital.
  Our existing systems are too rigid to meet our unique investment requirements.

If your current system struggles with any of the above, it's likely time to reassess your technology.

Request a demo of Charles River for Private Markets (formerly Mercatus) to see what you're missing: https://www.crd.com/solutions/private-markets/

Charles River for Private Markets (formerly Mercatus) is an investment management solution for institutions investing in Private Credit, Private Equity, Real Estate, Infrastructure, and Funds. Our cloud-based technology solution helps investors who need both flexibility and centralization for their investment data.

Name: Grupo Colpatria
Description: Mercantil Colpatria. Somos un grupo empresarial con un portafolio de compañías e inversiones diversificado. Generamos negocios, proyectos en construcción, tecnología, banca, seguros, minería, puertos, concesiones viales. Nuestro propósito es hacer actividad empresarial aportando al desarrollo de las personas y de los territorios donde operamos. Somos una organización que progresa, haciendo progresar.

Name: Galleon Wealth Management
Description: Galleon Wealth Management is like no other. We take a distinctive family approach to serving our unique clients and their loved ones, and we provide personalized private wealth management services that extend internationally. Through our Global Custody Network, we can help you access and unlock potential opportunities in different regions of the world.

Name: CIMB-Principal Asset Management
Description:
CIMB-Principal Asset Management Berhad ("CIMB-Principal") provides equity and fixed income management services for large corporations, small businesses and individuals. CIMB-Principal grants investors access to a skillful, knowledge-driven, and highly credible team of investment professionals with proven performance management capabilities.

 
CIMB-Principal

    * Manufactures, manages, and distributes a comprehensive range of unit trust funds. 
    * Manages customized portfolio mandates for corporates and institutions.

CIMB-Principal  is a joint venture between Southeast Asia’s premier investment banking group, the CIMB Group and the Principal Financial Group, a leading Fortune 500 diversified global financial services group.

CIMB-Principal was formerly known as Commerce Trust Berhad.

 
CIMB-Principal Shareholders

The shareholders of CIMB-Principal are CIMB Group and Principal Financial Group, which respectively own 60% and 40% of the company.

CIMB Group is an investment holding company listed on the Main Board of Bursa Malaysia and it is part of Malaysia's second largest financial services group, Bumiputra-Commerce Holdings Berhad. CIMB Group owns 100% of Commerce International Merchant Bankers Berhad ("CIMB"), the biggest and fully integrated investment bank in Malaysia that offers a full range of services in the debt markets, equity markets and corporate advisory. CIMB also provides services in lending, private banking, private equity and Islamic capital markets as well as research capability in economics, equity and debt markets.

Principal Financial Group is a leading Fortune 500 global financial services group established over 125 years ago. The Group offers a wide range of financial products and services including retirement and investment services, life and health insurance and mortgage banking through its diverse family of financial services companies.

Name: WCM Investment Management
Description:
We believe that passionate individuals are the driving force behind progress, inspiring others along the way. By being heartfelt, we foster a culture of candor and trust, creating an environment where people feel free. When our people are free, they can fully explore their unique talents and creativity. This freedom to innovate leads to unique and differentiated approaches to investing which, in turn, can lead to outsized returns in this fiercely competitive industry.

We are dedicated to delivering differentiated portfolios, providing exceptional client service, and building lasting relationships with our clients. We challenge conventional investment wisdom by pushing the boundaries of creativity in the industry, while actively cultivating a vibrant company culture that elevates all the talented individuals who drive our success.

Name: Power Sustainable
Description:
Power Sustainable is a sustainability-focused alternative asset manager which finances companies and projects that aim for both competitive returns and positive sustainability outcomes. The firm offers institutional investors exposure to alternative assets, which aim to accelerate and scale sustainable solutions across multiple industries.

Power Sustainable is a subsidiary of Power Corporation of Canada (TSX: POW) (TSX: POW.PR.E), an international management and holding company that focuses on financial services in North America, Europe, and Asia.

With CAD 3.9B in assets under management (as of June 30, 2024), Power Sustainable’s mission is to catalyze capital towards clean global solutions.

//

Power Sustainable est un gestionnaire d’actifs alternatifs durables qui finance des entreprises et des projets visant à la fois des rendements concurrentiels et des résultats positifs en matière de développement durable. Cette firme offre aux investisseurs institutionnels une exposition aux actifs alternatifs afin d’accélérer et de mettre à l’échelle des solutions durables dans de nombreux secteurs.

Power Sustainable est une filiale de Power Corporation du Canada (TSX : POW) (TSX : POW.PR.E), une société internationale de gestion et de portefeuille axée sur les services financiers en Amérique du Nord, en Europe et en Asie.

Avec un actif géré de 3,9 milliards de dollars canadiens (en date du 30 juin 2024), Power Sustainable a pour mission de catalyser les capitaux vers l’adoption de solutions mondiales propres.

Name: Arab Palestinian Investment Company- APIC
Description:
The Arab Palestinian Investment Company (APIC) is a leading investment holding company that was founded by a number of Arab and Palestinian businessmen aiming at steering investments towards Palestine that ultimately contribute to building a viable Palestinian economy.
 
APIC was established and registered in the British Virgins Island as a private shareholding company in 1994. In 1996, it was registered in Palestine as a foreign limited private shareholding company. APIC transformed into a foreign public shareholding company on 23 December 2013 and was listed on the Palestine Exchange on 2 March 2014.

APIC aims at providing superior products and services of quality and value leaving a positive and lasting impact in the market. APIC owns a group of subsidiaries operating across manufacturing, retail, distribution and services sectors with presence in Palestine, Jordan, Saudi Arabia, UAE, Iraq & Turkey.

Subsidiaries of APIC offer a wide array of products and services through distribution rights agreements with multinational companies that include Philip Morris, Procter & Gamble, Kellogg's, Hyundai, Chrysler, Dodge, Jeep, XL Energy, Abbott, B. Braun, Eli Lilly, GlaxoSmithKline, Sanofi Aventis and Nivea, among many others

APIC Subsidiaries:

Manufacturing:
1- National Aluminum & Profile Company (NAPCO).
2- Siniora Food Industries Company (Siniora).
3- Reema Hygienic Paper Company.

Retail, Trade & Distribution:
4- Palestine Automobile Company (PAC).
5- Medical Supplies and Services Company (MSS).
6- UNIPAL General Trading Company (Unipal).

Services: 
7- Sky Advertising, Public Relations and Event Management (Sky).
8- Arab Leasing Company.
9- Arab Palestinian Storage and Cooling Company.

Name: Fund for SME - Southeast Asia
Description:
Our Business Development Service (BDS) drives capital mobilization and sustainable enterprise growth by supporting green SMEs, startups, and social enterprises to access grants, crowdfunding, ESG financing, and impact investments. Through strategic advisory and fund facilitation, we help mission-driven businesses translate innovation into scalable, investable, and measurable impact.

The Fund for SMEs serves as a blended-finance vehicle connecting grassroots entrepreneurs with strategic investors, donors, and financial institutions. It aims to accelerate inclusive, resilient, and climate-smart economic development in align. We are focusing on: 

1. Climate-Smart Agriculture & Food-Processing
2. Healthcare
3. Renewable Energy
4. Education & TVET
5. Financial Inclusion
6. Climate & Healthcare Technology
7. Clean Water & Sanitation
9. Sustainable mobility and Transportation

Our Core Service Portfolio
- Fundraising & Capital Mobilization: Structuring and preparing competitive grant proposals, CSR applications, and impact investment pitches to unlock sustainable financing.

-CSR & ESG Partnership Matchmaking: Connecting enterprises with corporate CSR portfolios and ESG-aligned investors to scale responsible business initiatives.

-Investment Readiness & Compliance Advisory: Supporting MSMEs and social enterprises to strengthen financial management, governance, and compliance for investor confidence.

-Capacity Building & Technical Coaching: Delivering customized training and technical assistance to enhance entrepreneurial capacity, sustainability practices, and donor/investor engagement.

-Digital Funding Platform (SME-Fund Portal): Operating language digital investment and funding platform, enabling transparent and accessible finance for MSMEs and social enterprises.

-Impact Investment & Fund Management Services: Providing professional fund administration, due diligence, and impact monitoring for corporates, donors.

Name: LINUS Digital Finance
Description:
Our mission is to advance real estate investing into the digital age.

We combine technology and expertise to give our co-investors access to high-quality investments whilst providing a best-in-class investing experience through our digital platform.

We believe in creating long-term partnerships through a genuine alignment of interests with our clients and partners.

We invest together. Their success is our success.

Name: Organo Group
Description:
Organo Group for Feed and Poultry Manufacturing was founded in 2008 in  IDG-North Extension of Industrial Zone – 6th October - EGYPT.

Organo Group was founded to be a step on the road to achieving integrated development in the poultry industry to become one of the largest poultry companies in the Middle East with new concepts in nutrition and feed and high quality specifications to ensure the profitability of farmers and healthy food is safe for the consumer.

Name: ALAIN
Description:
ALAIN is a UAE-based development and investment company shaping communities since 1996.
We operate across Real Estate, Hospitality, Education, and Capital, creating places defined by trust, legacy, and long-term value.

Our work brings together modern vision and local heritage to build environments where people feel connected, inspired, and at home.

تُعد ALAIN شركة تطوير واستثمار مقرّها دولة الإمارات، تُشكّل المجتمعات منذ عام 1996.
نعمل في قطاعات العقارات والضيافة والتعليم ورأس المال، ونُنشئ أماكن ترتكز على الثقة والإرث والقيمة المستدامة.

Name: Silverstrand Capital
Description:
Silverstrand is a Singapore-based impact investor focusing on biodiversity. 

Through both impact investments and philanthropic capital, we aim to catalyse systems change for both the restoration and conservation of nature, and to turn existing extractive, ecologically-destructive practices into regenerative ones.

Name: Lio Factory

Name: Third Avenue Management
Description:
Since 1986, Third Avenue Management has consistently pursued a fundamental, bottom-up approach to deep value.  We focus on a company's balance sheet and capital structure in order to identify undervalued companies with high-quality assets and strong potential to create significant value over the long term.  Our value-oriented investment strategies leverage the collective expertise across investment teams.  We believe our team approach enables us to generate and evaluate ideas from multiple perspectives and to efficiently identify the part of the asset class or capital structure that offers the most compelling risk/return opportunity. 

Third Avenue Management LLC offers its services to private and institutional clients and is partially owned by Affiliated Managers Group, a publicly-traded asset management firm holding company.  Third Avenue Funds are distributed by Foreside Fund Services, LLC and are offered by prospectus only.

Name: ParaFi Capital
Description: ParaFi Capital LP (“ParaFi” or the “Firm”) is an alternative asset management firm that operates hedge fund and venture capital strategies focused on the digital asset ecosystem. Founded in 2018, ParaFi was among the earliest investors in the blockchain industry and has evolved into a trusted partner by leading institutions globally. ParaFi’s investment and technology team pursues idiosyncratic opportunities across venture, digital asset, and quantitative strategies. As a firm, ParaFi is committed to a culture of rigorous research, technical development, and institutional underwriting to enable exceptional results for our partners and portfolio companies. ParaFi operates with headquarters in Greenwich and offices in New York City.
