Description:
Century Private Wealth is a Dubai Financial Services Authority (DFSA) regulated Asset and Wealth Manager, entrusted with the legacies of some of Middle-East’s most successful entrepreneurs, innovators, visionaries, and their families.

We are a category 3C licensed firm, regulated by the Dubai Financial Services Authority (DFSA), offering independent and unbiased advice, while revitalizing our client’s portfolios.

Our clients are successful individuals who want to focus their energy on core businesses, not digressing from the priority and passion to grow and secure their legacy. We as asset managers align ourselves as their family office to meet these goals.

Name: HDFC Pension
Description:
HDFC Pension is appointed as a Pension Fund Manager (PFM) by Pension Fund Regulatory & Development Authority (PFRDA) to manage pension corpus of NPS subscribers. HDFC Pension is a well-focused entity, managed by seasoned and well-tested executives with vast experience in Insurance & Pension Administration, Risk Management, Banking, Capital Market and Asset Management. HDFC Pension is committed to giving the most fulfilling and rewarding investment experience in pension administration and management.

HDFC Pension has also been provided with Point of Presence (POP) license by PFRDA for distribution, marketing and servicing of NPS scheme through physical as well as online platform. In line with our values of customer centricity and excellence, we have been providing the best of NPS services to all subscribers with the help of our trusted partners and stakeholders.

HDFC Pension Fund Management Company is the largest Pension Fund Manager in terms of AUM under Retail and Corporate NPS. 

HDFC Pension POP is the largest Point of Presence under new Corporate NPS business.

Name: York Holding Group
Description: At York Holding Group, we shape environments, create sustainable investment opportunities, and empower global citizens to build their future. Committed to long-term growth, responsible development, and lasting value, we invest in excellence at every step.

Name: Oak Hill Capital
Description: Oak Hill’s philosophy of alignment of interests has been a guiding principle of the Firm’s success. The Firm seeks to partner with exceptional entrepreneurs, management teams, and corporations that share a common vision for maximizing value creation and structures each investment to align the economic interests of all constituencies. Oak Hill believes that creating transaction structures and incentive programs that reward management teams for value creation and that align management’s economic outcomes with those of the Oak Hill team and Limited Partners significantly enhance its investment returns. In addition, Oak Hill has offered significant co-investment opportunities to Limited Partners, which further aligns these constituencies.

Name: Continental Grain Company
Description:
Continental Grain Company is a global investor, owner and operator of companies across the food, agribusiness and commodities spectrum. We create long-term value by applying deep industry knowledge, capital and talent to businesses ranging from established market leaders to promising innovators.

With more than 200 years of industry experience, Conti manages a portfolio of more than 30 investments across 18 subsectors and several different asset classes, including private equity, publicly-traded securities and venture capital. Our portfolio includes assets in the United States, China and Latin America, employing over 10,000 people.

Continental Grain Company is an Equal Opportunity Employer.

Name: Gama Investimentos
Description:
Gama Investimentos is an independent asset management company focused on structuring and managing Feeder Funds, which are funds domiciled and regulated in Brazil, designed to feed investment strategies abroad. 

Our focus is to give local investors access to the best global managers, while optimizing the operational work of both partner distributors in Brazil and international managers.

Name: ACON Investments, L.L.C.
Description: ACON Investments is a private equity investment firm led by a cohesive team that has been investing together for over 25 years. We are focused on finding and creating opportunities at the intersection of Sector and Situation, all through the lens of Strategic Sustainability, which allows us to achieve both sustainable outcomes and strong financial returns. We have developed deep expertise across the Consumer, Industrials and Business Services sectors, and we identify situations in which we are able to create value through brand repositioning, industry consolidation, corporate carve-outs or as the first institutional capital for family-owned businesses. Since our founding in 1996, ACON has managed approximately $6.9 billion across 80 platform investments and 104 add-on acquisitions.

Name: Patriarch Partners
Description:
Patriarch Partners, LLC, is a holding company with investments in more than 75 companies across 14 industry sectors. Founded by Lynn Tilton in 2000, Patriarch was built upon a proprietary patented financial model designed to manage and monetize the distressed portfolios of financial institutions.

Patriarch focuses on the acquisition and invigoration of undervalued iconic American brands where time, capital and sound strategy can rescue a business and restore value, creating and preserving jobs in America. The firm is devoted to rebuilding America one company at a time, one job at a time. Since 2000, through affiliated investment funds, Tilton has had ownership in and restructured more than 200 companies with combined revenues in excess of $100 billion, representing more than 675,000 jobs. Current investments include Dura Automotive, Spiegel Catalogs, MD Helicopters, Rand McNally, and Stila Cosmetics. Tilton’s platform is the largest woman-owned business in the country.

The firm’s belief system and strategy in value investing does not waver or change with market fluctuations. It takes time, stability, liquidity and an appropriate capital structure to rebuild businesses. Challenging conditions often mean the need to improve operations from the ground up; the situations require equal concentration and adeptness between financial engineering and operational execution. Patriarch Partners Management Group, established in 2005, is a team of seasoned and connected global professionals strategically placed among portfolio companies to fortify management and to unearth and implement necessary efficiencies, new technologies and unique strategies.

Name: BluePeak Private Capital
Description: BluePeak Private Capital is an alternative asset management firm established in 2019.

Name: University of Tehran Science & Technology Park
Description:
پارک علم و فناوری دانشگاه تهران، به دنبال ایجاد نظام کامل نوآوری از دانشگاه تا بازارهای محلی، ملی، منطقه ای و بین المللی می باشد. ما به دنبال تمهید سامانه لازم برای ایجاد شرکت های دانش بنیان زایشی دانشگاه تهران می باشیم. ثروت آفرینی برای دانشگاه از طریق ثروت تولید شده از شرکت های زایشی، تربیت نسل جدیدی از صنعت گران و فناوران با اخلاق و متعهد به کیفیت و توسعه فرهنگ کارآفرینی و نوآوری، محورهای اصلی فعالیت پارک علم و فناوری دانشگاه تهران می باشد.


ارزش و اهداف پارک:

تحول دانشگاه تهران به دانشگاه کارآفرین
تولد صنعت ملی از دانش ملی
کسب استقلال مالی دانشگاه
تحول اقتصاد ایران به اقتصاد دانش بنیان و مقاومتی

Name: HBAN
Description:
HBAN is a platform that connects individual angels and syndicates to startups across the island of Ireland.

Angels on the HBAN platform have invested over €170m from private investors into more than 700 deals and exits with renowned companies such as Decawave ($400m), Glofox (€200m plus), Aventamed (undisclosed), Boxever (€130m) and several others.

The mission of HBAN is to foster a thriving angel investment ecosystem across the island of Ireland. We represent the views of angel investors and provide data-informed policy recommendations to the government, we championing inclusivity and diversity within the angel ecosystem and provide angel education. 
 
HBAN is a joint initiative of Enterprise Ireland and InterTrade Ireland.

Name: Invesis

Whether it be transportation or social infrastructure our team has the expertise, knowledge and commitment to ensure every project succeeds. 

Find out more at www.invesis.com.

Name: Swiss Life Asset Managers UK
Description:
We support our clients in achieving their long-term investment objectives. This in turn helps their clients to plan long term and act in a financially self-determined manner.

We are the UK arm of Swiss Life Asset Managers, one of the largest institutional real estate investors in Europe.

Swiss Life Asset Managers UK Limited is a real estate specialist with a successful track record of investing across core, core-plus, value-add and opportunistic strategies. Our service is tailored to each client to reflect their return requirements and appetite for risk.

Swiss Life Asset Managers UK is authorised and regulated by the FCA as a full-scope AIFM under the Alternative Investment Fund Managers Directive.

With competitive pricing, minimal fees, and secure storage and insurance included, we simplify gold ownership. Access live gold pricing and daily expert insights to make confident, informed decisions.

Name: Thebe Investment Corporation
Description:
Thebe Investment Corporation (Thebe) is a strategic investment partner of choice, backed by leading South African and international groups. Founded in 1992 as a pioneering black-owned company, Thebe is one of South Africa’s leading investment companies, managing assets over R6 billion. The investment portfolio spans tourism, mining, resources, infrastructure, renewable energy, petrochemicals, telecommunications, financial services, and healthcare.

As a business partner Thebe believes in mutual value. Investments are made off a solid balance sheet, strong cash flows, business models that support potential synergies, and an excellent track record of competent management.

With a diversified investment base, Thebe actively works to promote mutually beneficial economic partnerships by investing in or developing businesses that create value for our stakeholders through the origination, execution and prudent management of our investments.
Investors choose Thebe for its diversified portfolio of assets across a wide range of industries and its exemplary commitment to corporate governance.  Thebe is highly respected in the field of transformation and with a strong emphasis on sustainable returns we are driven by a commitment to serve economically marginalised communities and promote socio-economic transformation and development in South Africa.

Throughout our history, we have raised over $34 billion of aggregate capital investment and have developed operational expertise built from over 750 transactions, including platform investments and add-on acquisitions, on six continents.  First Reserve has built an enduring network of global relationships in our target markets, which we believe is an important advantage in proprietary sourcing, evaluating opportunities and growing the value of our investments.

contact@arkitektventures.com

Over the last 19 years, Lotus Capital has consistently delivered Shariah-compliant Investment Management Services, and Asset Management Services, developed unique investment solutions, and contributed to the growth of the Nigerian Non-Interest Finance industry and Capital Market. 

Lotus Capital manages 3 mutual funds listed on the Nigerian Stock Exchange and was a co-developer of the NGX-Lotus Islamic Index - an index of 15 compliant stocks on the Nigerian Stock Exchange.

The funds managed include:
-Lotus Halal Investment Fund
-Lotus Halal Fixed Income Fund (FIF)
-Lotus Halal Equity Fund (ETF)

Name: Stafford Capital Partners
Description:
Stafford Capital Partners ("Stafford") is an independent private markets investment and advisory firm with USD 8.8bn in assets under management and advice for more than 150+ institutional clients worldwide.

Founded in 2000, it has a global team of 90+ professionals investing in timberland, infrastructure, and sustainable private equity and private credit through secondaries, primaries and co-investments.

Stafford has been a UN PRI signatory since 2010 and has committed to the Net Zero Asset Managers initiative. It puts sustainability at the centre of its investment process and implements a well-defined ESG program across all strategies.

* Assets under management and advice as at 31 December 2025

Name: ELIX
Description:
En ELIX llevamos más de 20 años acompañando a líderes del mercado inmobiliario en sus estrategias de inversión en el sector living español. Nuestro compromiso y pasión por lo que hacemos, junto con la experiencia adquirida en estos años, nos han posicionado como una de las gestoras independientes de inversión inmobiliaria de referencia en el mercado.

Desde 2003, año en el que Jorge Benjumeda y Jaime Lacasa fundaron Elix, nuestro principal objetivo ha sido crear valor para nuestros inversores a través de la implementación y ejecución de estrategias de inversión innovadoras con un elevado impacto social y medioambiental.

Estamos orgullosos de aportar valor a nuestros inversores privados, family offices e institucionales entre los que destacan KKR, Allianz RE (PIMCO), AltamarCAM Partners y CBRE Investment Management.

Name: Roc Partners
Description:
Roc Partners is a specialist private markets investment firm with over 60 employees across four offices globally. Delivering successful outcomes for our companies, investors, team and community through growth that is positive, sustainable and always forward-looking drives everything we do. For over 25 years, we have managed and advised clients on private markets investments across private equity, real assets and private credit. Today, with ~A$9.5bn in funds under management or advice (as of 30 September 2025), we have a highly experienced global private markets investment team dedicated to generating lasting value.

For more information about Roc Partners visit www.rocp.com

Name: Finax SK
Description:
Finax je obchodník s cennými papiermi licencovaný Národnou bankou Slovenska. Prinášame revolučný produkt, ktorý sprístupnil efektívne investovanie Slovákom, Čechom, Poliakom, Chorvátom a Maďarom. 

V čom revolučný? V jeho jednoduchosti, online riešení a transparentnosti. No dôležitejšími parametrami Finax inteligentného investovania sú jedny z najnižších poplatkov na trhu, výnosy prekonávajúce konkurenciu a oslobodenie od daní z výnosov. 

Naším cieľom je sprístupniť a rozšíriť jednoduché investovanie do každej domácnosti. Chceme zmeniť pohľad ľudí na investície. Chceme im dokázať, že investovanie je jednoduchý proces, že je to cesta, ktorá prináša ovocie a ktorá by sa mala stať neoddeliteľnou súčasťou ich života. 

Finax je investovanie prostredníctvom indexových fondov ETF. Na slovenský trh prinášame moderný produkt 21. storočia.

Description: Amber Capital is an alternative asset management firm that employs a value and event-driven approach.  Founded in 2005, Amber is based in London with offices in Milan and New York.

Name: Rally Assets
Description:
Rally Assets is an impact investment management firm. We help investors generate positive social and environmental impact alongside a financial return.

We create specialized solutions for corporate and institutional investors, foundations, family offices and individual accredited investors. 

We are one of three fund-of-funds managers for the Government of Canada's Social Finance Fund, through our joint venture Realize Capital Partners.

We're a Portfolio Manager and Exempt Market Dealer registered in Alberta, British Columbia, Ontario and Quebec with the respective provincial securities commissions.

We're a certified B Corporation. Certified B Corporations meet the highest standards of verified social and environmental performance, public transparency and legal accountability to balance profit and purpose.

Description:
Pengana Capital Group (ASX: PCG) is an ASX-listed diversified funds management group specialising in global and Australian equities, with distinct investment strategies that aim to deliver superior risk-adjusted returns to investors.

Founded in 2003 and headquartered in Sydney, with offices in Melbourne and Brisbane, we have investment teams based in Sydney, Melbourne, Chicago, Boston, and London.

Our investment managers are equity partners, aligning their goals with those of our investors. All teams share a commitment to detailed company analysis and active, benchmark-unaware management.

Pengana also provides responsible investment solutions that align portfolios with investor principles without compromising returns.

-------

Pengana Capital Ltd (ABN 30 103 800 568, AFSL 226566) (“Pengana”) is the issuer of units in the Pengana Emerging Companies Fund (ARSN 111 894 510), Pengana Australian Equities Fund (ARSN 146 346 929), Pengana Global Small Companies Fund (ARSN 604 292 677), Pengana WHEB Sustainable Impact Fund (ARSN 121 915 526), Pengana Harding Loevner International Fund (ARSN 604 292 677), Pengana Axiom International Fund  (ARSN 093 079 906), Pengana Axiom International Fund (Hedged) (ARSN 098 586 282), Pengana High Conviction Property Securities Fund (ARSN 639 011 180), Pengana High Conviction Equities Fund (ARSN 602 546 332) and TermPlus (ARSN 668 902 323). Name: Declaration Partners
Description: Declaration Partners is a private investment firm that seeks to be a value-added capital partner and strategic resource to founders & entrepreneurs, management teams, and asset owners. Anchored by the family office of private equity veteran and philanthropist David M. Rubenstein, Declaration invests on behalf of family offices and like-minded institutional investors. Declaration’s approach emphasizes partnership born from its family office heritage while seeking to achieve favorable long-term outcomes with strong alignment. Declaration has approximately $2.2 billion in assets under management across its private investment strategies, which include tactical growth equity, real estate, GP solutions, and other opportunistic strategies. The firm was founded in 2017 and is headquartered in New York with an office in the Washington, DC area.

Name: SIA - Startup Investor Accelerator
Description:
𝐒𝐈𝐀 - 𝐒𝐭𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐮𝐩 𝐈𝐧𝐯𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐫 𝐀𝐜𝐜𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐨𝐫 runs hands-on angel investor training programs designed for professionals who want to start investing in startups, or sharpen their existing investing skills alongside a global network of peers.
Our “learning-by-doing” methodology puts participants at the center of real investment decisions. Through a structured, guided process, they evaluate live deals, join due diligence teams, and invest real capital. Along the way, they gain deep, practical experience in every step of the angel investing journey, from sourcing and screening to negotiating and closing.
SIA attracts a diverse community of angel investors, VCs, family offices, and other investment professionals who want to enhance their practice and collaborate across borders.
We are the European counterpart to Mossy Ventures’ flagship program, the Seattle Angel Conference (SAC), which has been growing investor and founder ecosystems in the U.S. since 2012.
To date, the program has trained 1,000+ angel investors and supported over 1,800 startups, with alumni collectively investing over $300 million into early-stage companies around the world.

Name: Sarona Asset Management
Description:
Sarona Asset Management (Sarona) is a global impact investment firm, focusing on performance and purpose in private equity emerging markets. We believe that applying social and environmental values to each investment decision builds a better world for current and future generations. We further believe that such values help generate strong businesses and strong financial returns.

Name: Aermont Capital
Description:
Aermont Capital (“Aermont”) is a European asset management group, focused on real estate and real estate related investment activities. 
 
Aermont takes an operator-oriented approach, emphasising investments that offer long-term value creation opportunities for the associated assets and businesses.
 
To date, Aermont has raised a succession of five pan-European investment funds. Aggregate commitments to the funds and related vehicles total around €13 billion. Investors include some of the most prominent sovereign wealth funds, public and private pension plans and other institutions, from Europe, the U.S., Asia and the Middle East. 

The funds are mandated to invest in real estate and real estate related opportunities in Europe, under direct asset, corporate and credit situations. Investments have featured prime assets or projects at top locations in major cities such as London, Paris, Berlin, Frankfurt, Barcelona, Amsterdam, Florence, Milan and Lisbon, as well as leading operating businesses in growth sectors such as film studio infrastructure, student housing, luxury hospitality and workforce housing.

Name: Summit Agricultural Group
Description:
For decades, we had been bound to our partners through a shared commitment to sound agricultural practices and enduring personal values. As farmers, we are informed by our many years of hands-on experience across a wide range of agricultural disciplines. As investors, we believe in bottom up investment strategies that achieve sustainable, profitable growth. 
Our company is connected to an extensive network of farmers, investors and advisors working together to support capital investments and manage agricultural assets throughout the Midwest and in locations around the world. 
We are a leading private network of agricultural operators, investment professionals and intellectual leaders, and we are well-resourced and fully prepare to work diligently for our clients. 
Summit Agricultural Group provides a principled approach in all that we do.

Name: Nasser Bin Abdullatif Alserkal Est.
Description:
Nasser Bin Abdullatif Alserkal Est. is the sole importer and distributor of Bridgestone brand tires for Dubai and the Northern Emirates within the UAE.

 
Nasser Bin Abdullatif Alserkal Est. was established in 1947 by Nasser Bin Abdullatif Alserkal.
 
He not only established his company but with great foresight and initiative he played a major role in the development of the UAE.

He was instrumental in bringing the essential services like electricity and telecommunications in this country.
He also founded some of the local banks and supported local companies by investing in shares and stocks.
 
Today under the able administration of Mr. Eisa Bin Nasser Alserkal the company has grown in many facets:
Real estate
General trading
To Industrial and engineering
Also still having major dealings in the financial, stocks and shares market
 
The company has developed strong trade links throughout the GCC Countries.
 
Of Nasser Bin Abdullatif Est. Bridgestone Division is an integral part of the group's diverse activities managed by Mr. Ahmad Bin Eisa Alserkal.

 
The story in the UAE is also not very different from the rest of the world, with Bridgestone leading the market in the sales of tires. The company holds approximately 30% of the total market share among all brands in Dubai and Northern Emirates and 45% share among all Japanese tires available.
 
The hard work and efforts made by the dedicated team in Nasser Bin Abdullatif Alserkal and combination of Bridgestone quality and Nasser Bin Abdullatif Alserkal family management style has established Bridgestone as the No 1 tire brand within the region.

 
Nasser Bin Abdullatif Alserkal has a dedicated team of tire professional who manage the day to day activities of the business. Apart from sales, Nasser Bin Abdullatif Alserkal also provides technical support to all its valued clients by conducting regular training sessions on tire care and maintenance.

The union of these investment expertise and financial management skills allow us to harness the power of the collective, and offer our clients holistic investment solutions and services through an advice led philosophy. 

Supported by world class digital functionalities, we hope to make investment products accessible and easy to understand to more FNB clients. It is our vision is to help more people invest to improve their financial future.

Description:
Starlight Capital is a proudly independent Canadian asset management firm. We manage Global and North American diversified private and public equity investments across traditional and alternative asset classes, including real estate, infrastructure and private equity. Our goal is to deliver superior risk-adjusted, total returns to investors through a disciplined investment approach: Focused Business Investing. 

Focused Business Investing means we invest in great businesses when they offer us enough return for the risk we are exposed to. Great businesses are characterized by strong recurring cash flow, irreplaceable assets, low leverage, and strong management teams. The result is concentrated portfolios of great businesses that reward investors with rising dividends.

Name: SquadS ventures
Description:
SquadS ventures is a distinctive company builder focusing on the creation of sustainable and bootstrapped startups. Our model is centered on developing a portfolio of 20 high-growth potential B2B SaaS startups, characterized by their efficient use of resources.

With a collective experience of 90 years in entrepreneurship, bootstrapping, fundraising, learning from both successes and failures, our team of four founders brings a wealth of knowledge to the table. Our experience extends to angel investing and participation within a Venture Capital (VC) firm, equipping us with a comprehensive understanding of the startup ecosystem.

Our value propositions are tailored to meet the needs of various stakeholders:

For Junior Founders: We operate as a Founders Builder, offering a hands-on learning experience in entrepreneurship alongside us. Over a two-year period, participants progress through roles as an Intern, Operator in Residence, and Entrepreneur in Residence. The top performers are then positioned to take on leadership roles within portfolio startups that they have contributed to developing and which have demonstrated traction.

For Corporations: We offer a novel format for innovation through partnerships that begin from defining pain points to commercial synergies. Once Product-Market Fit (PMF), tech validation, team, and synergies are confirmed, there is an opportunity for corporations to acquire strategic startups for their businesses.

For Investors: Our model focuses on Early Exits, aiming for a 6x return for initial investors and a return of the initial capital in less than four years. This approach establishes a different Asset Class, offering excellent risk management for Angel Investors.

Our Values
-Build Trust
-Build Teams
-Build Value
-Build Community

At SquadS Ventures, our mission is to revolutionize the way startups are built, providing a robust platform for growth, innovation, and investment success.

Name: Invest for Impact Nepal
Description:
Invest for Impact Nepal (IIN) is a ground-breaking collaboration between 
Development Finance Institutions (DFIs) and Development Partners to 
unlock and accelerate transformative foreign investments to speed up 
growth, create jobs, and assist in the development of an equitable and 
sustainable economy in Nepal. IIN aims to achieve this by enabling Financial 
Institutions (FIs) and Private Equity and Venture Capital (PEVC) funds access 
resources and expertise from DFIs and impact investors for investment 
into Nepali businesses and develop the emerging investment ecosystem. It 
has been recognised by the Oxford Fragility Forum, the leading forum that 
brings together DFIs for an action-oriented discussion on how to improve 
investment in fragile and conflict-affected environments, as one of the most 
successful global examples of collaboration. 
IIN is established by British International Investment (BII), the Dutch 
Entrepreneurial Development Bank (FMO), and the Swiss Agency for 
Development Cooperation (SDC) to complement existing efforts to 
attract DFI investment to support private sector growth. The IIN initiative 
commenced in February 2021 to research and understand the investment 
market and ecosystem constraints. Since August 2022, it translated these 
findings into implementation. This phase of the programme will run until July 
2025.

Name: Homes and Communities Agency
Description:
The Homes and Communities Agency (HCA) helps create successful communities by making more homes and business premises available to the residents and businesses who need them. We also regulate social housing providers in England.

The HCA is an executive non-departmental public body, sponsored by the Department for Communities and Local Government.

We work locally in individual communities to help meet local priorities.

We own public land, which we sell to house builders and others. This is one of the ways in which we overcome barriers to development and help increase the speed with which house builders can build new homes.

We also regulate social housing providers (mostly housing associations) in England. We do this to protect social housing assets - making sure that social homes remain available to tenants, and that the taxpayers’ investment in those homes is protected.

Name: BoCG Ventures
Description:

• Since 2014, our advisory firm has been serving private equity, family offices, and venture capital firms with scaling their underperforming, outdated, and distressed assets as well as transactional counsel. 
• In 2019, we developed our antifragility thesis, focusing on investing in ventures with the potential for substantial growth through technology opportunities and restructuring their capital formation and architecture throughout the various stages of venture development.
• In 2023, we diversified our strategy into global emerging markets across the Middle East and Southeast Asia and started growing teams across the regions.

We are a multinational organization with diversity in skillsets, expertise, education, cultures, and geographies. 

____________

About BoCG Ventures 

BoCG Ventures is an antifragile investment fund and venture operating firm that specializes in technology-enabled ventures. With their hands-on operational framework, Venture Operating Model (VOM), they create strategic roadmaps and operational frameworks for scalable projects. BoCG Ventures focuses on investing in antifragile brands that leverage technology for long-term, risk-adjusted returns.

Description:
We are a meritocratic partnership fully dedicated to long-term equity investing in Brazilian companies.

For over a decade, we have focused on building value through excellence and a long-term view.

Our essence is to unite a group of people whose main objective is to build value. People who made the decision to work together because they share the principles and values about how to achieve this goal.

People who seek excellence in everything they do, and who believe that building value in a consistent and sustainable fashion over time requires the utmost dedication, diligence and the very best that every person has to offer.

Always with a truly long-term view, ranging from investments to building relationships, both institutional and personal.

People who understand that the building blocks of long-lasting, sustainable relationships are ethics and transparency.

–

Somos uma empresa independente de gestão de recursos focada em investimentos de longo prazo em empresas brasileiras.

Há mais de 10 anos acreditamos na construção de valor por meio de excelência e visão de longo prazo.

A nossa essência é unir um grupo de pessoas que tem como objetivo principal a construção de valor, e que decidem trabalhar juntas por compartilhar valores e princípios sobre como alcançar esse objetivo.

Pessoas que buscam excelência em tudo que fazem, pois acreditam que construir valor de forma consistente e sustentável exige muita dedicação, diligência e o melhor de cada um.

Sempre tendo como norte uma verdadeira visão de longo prazo, desde investimentos até na construção de relações, sejam institucionais ou pessoais.

E que acreditam que relações duradouras só podem ser construídas com ética e transparência como princípios fundamentais.

Name: China Asset Management (Hong Kong)
Description: China Asset Management (Hong Kong) is a wholly-owned subsidiary of China Asset Management Co., Ltd and was incorporated in Hong Kong in September 2008. As a top Chinese fund management company in Hong Kong, ChinaAMC (HK) is committed to developing offshore and cross-border asset management businesses by leveraging the expertise of its experienced investment and research teams and its shareholder companies’ resources, services and connections in Mainland China. Our vision is to become a pillar of the international financial architecture, helping to bridge the markets between China and the rest of the world. As an advocate of globalized financial markets, ChinaAMC (HK) is a diversified and integrated asset management company. We have a broad range of product lines, including long-only funds, hedge funds, exchange traded funds (ETF), leveraged/inverse products, bond funds, segregated accounts, funds of funds (FOF) and private equity funds (PE Funds). Our team of experts offers in-depth knowledge and experience, and they provide advisory services aimed at achieving great outcomes for both individual and institutional investors in Asia, Europe and the U.S.

Name: Guinness Global Investors
Description:
Guinness is independent and focused purely on investment management. Our in-house economic, industry and company research allows us to take an independent view and not be led by the market. Our size and specialist nature also means we have the ability to respond quickly and efficiently to any market movements.

At heart Guinness Global Investors is a value (or growth at reasonable value) investor. We combine strategic sector-selection with a fundamental screening process to identify stock opportunities.

None of our funds are benchmark-constrained, which means we can select stocks without the influence of index weightings. We believe investment managers should have a high conviction about the stocks in their portfolio. All our funds have a relatively high concentration. We have found this approach provides an excellent balance between the benefits of diversification and the risk of diluting investment returns.

Guinness Global Investors is 100% owned by its directors and employees, which we believe helps to align our interests with those of our investors.

We believe that the best returns for investors are achieved by:

1. Identifying the right asset classes and niche growth themes in which to invest

2. Selecting specialist funds that invest in those areas with conviction and discipline

Guinness Global Investors provides actively managed portfolios in a selection of asset classes and specialist growth themes to assist investors in this aim.

Name: CFA Society France
Description:
CFA Society France is an association of local investment professionals who promotes the highest ethical standards and professional excellence within the local investment community since 1998. 

Our mission is to provide our members with professional development, sense of community and networking opportunities primarily via regular conferences and events. We also seek to maintain constructive relations with local financial and regulatory institutions and promote the professional and ethical standards of CFA Institute. 
CFA Society France is one of 147 CFA societies around the world.

We promote:

* ethical and professional standards within the investment industry
* professional development through the CFA Program and continuing education
* the exchange of information and opinions among people within the local investment community and beyond
* we work to further the public's understanding of the CFA designation and the investment industry

Name: Badia
Description:
Badia, The Holding Group

We own and operate a diverse portfolio of companies across various regions, including Portugal, Saudi Arabia, Palestine, Jordan, Turkey, and the UAE. Each of our companies serves as a cornerstone in Badia’s strategy to enhance diversity and achieve sustainable growth.

What sets us apart is our well-planned strategic diversity; we know precisely which sectors and countries to invest in, enabling us to manage risks and seize opportunities effectively. We believe that strong, effective partnerships are key to achieving success and growth in global markets. Our ability to swiftly adapt to market changes and meet customer needs with high efficiency is a hallmark of our approach.

Name: IGI Holding
Description:
The International Group for Investments (IGI), established in 1973, is one of the foremost
private sector groups in Egypt. IGI is the parent of several growing, diversified companies
whose activities range from construction to petroleum and industrial support services, the
trading of various commodities and consumer goods, agricultural activities and food
processing, touristic and real estate development. IGI is also a partner in several joint
ventures.

 IGI is a prominent private sector conglomerate, with several business segments across a diverse array of sectors. The Group is engaged in the following sectors:

‒ Real Estate Development
‒ Construction
‒ Petroleum
‒ Industrial Support Services
‒ Commodity Trading
‒ Consumer Goods and Services
‒ Agri-business
‒ Food Processing

IGI develops well-rounded real estate projects, with top-class amenities and facilities to compliment its core residential compounds. In its higher-end, more exclusive ‘Gardenia branded’ compounds, In addition to the large-scale compound of Hay Al Ashgar & Ashgar City

Name: Revetas Capital
Description:

Today Revetas has active investments across Europe, focusing on value-add real estate, capital recovery, as well as distressed opportunities and special situations.
 
Our team is highly specialized in special situations real estate with 30+ years of international investment experience across multiple cycles. We pride ourselves on our local presence, boots on the ground, and relationship-driven approach with our investors, tenants, banks, and partners.

Building on its long-standing expertise in European equities, ELEVA Capital has gradually developed other areas of expertise in small & mid caps, impact investing, fixed income, multi-asset and structured products through its subsidiary ELEVA Solutions. ELEVA Capital is authorized and regulated by the Autorité des Marchés Financiers (the “AMF”) in France under number GP-17000015; ELEVA Solutions is registered with ORIAS as a tied agent and insurance broker (registration number 23001946).

Name: Alceon
Description: Alceon is a leading multi-strategy alternative investment manager and trusted capital partner, managing $5.4 billion in assets across real estate, private equity, credit, and liquid market strategies. We create superior value by delivering superior, risk-adjusted returns for investors and through providing flexible, value-added capital solutions to the businesses and asset owners we partner with. With the agility of a boutique firm and the rigor and discipline of an institutional platform, we efficiently structure and execute complex transactions, leveraging our strong balance sheet, underwriting expertise, and extensive investor network. Name: Ambani Business

Name: Mogno Capital
Description:
Created in 2015, with the union of former partners of Hedging Griffo and financial market executives. For some time, we worked by ourselves. Each one investing his/her own capital in the most different/unique market opportunities. But then came the time when we realized: all this combined experience could make way for an opportunity to build something bigger.

In Brazil, we have already survived a lot of economic storms. And that is why we know exactly which seeds must be planted.

That is how we got inspired to create an asset management company, 100% free and independent.

We have an open architecture, so as to ride the most favorable winds, without limiting ourselves to standardized investment options presented by the big financial institutions. We believe this is the best way for us to offer original, customized solutions matching your profile, making capital management a true partnership.

We know how difficult it is to find someone to trust. That is why at Mogno Capital we invest with you. Your investments are our investments. The assets of the partners are invested across all the opportunities we offer. We want you to have the peace of mind of knowing that we are cultivating your assets using the best local and global solutions.

Name: Cendana Capital

Name: Grain Management, LLC
Description:
We believe broadband and digital infrastructure are foundational to the tech-enabled transformation occurring across all industries and facets of society. And our global team of seasoned and diverse professionals share a collective passion for the power of connectivity to strengthen communities and unlock human potential for all.

Tiger Infrastructure maintains offices in New York and London.

We are aiming to build a competitive Chinese brand in the global market. 

YanFu is a quantitative hedge fund with a strong academic atmosphere and research orientation. We are committed to establishing an engineering culture and believe that a free and open culture can make excellent talents give full play to their creativity. Our founder has always been active in the front line of strategy development, training new members. State-of-the-art level skills of quantitative investments can be cultivated in YanFu. Feel free to reach out: hr@yanfuinvestments.com

Name: The Haverford Trust Company
Description:
The Haverford Trust Company was founded in 1979 on Philadelphia’s landmark Rittenhouse Square. Since our founding more than four decades ago, one thing has remained unchanged…our commitment to quality. 

The Haverford Quality Investing philosophy is committed to maximizing returns while minimizing risk throughout the entire market cycle. Our philosophy is supported by the integrity and expertise of our people, not to mention the reputation and track record of our company. Our unwavering commitment to quality is the foundation of our company. In fact, we believe our dedication to quality, in all aspects of our relationships with clients and in everything we do, has singularly driven Haverford’s success. 

We invite you to learn more about our approach, our beliefs, and our commitment to Quality Investing at www.HaverfordQuality.com.

For the full terms and conditions of use of this page and for all Haverford Trust social media, visit https://haverfordquality.com/social-media-terms-conditions/

Name: BlackPeak Capital
Description:

Our mission is to deliver for our investors capital appreciation and diversification by investing and supporting the region’s outstanding entrepreneurs in building world-class companies. Our efforts and capital foster economic development by providing a model for innovation, job creation, and growth. 

Geographic Focus: Romania, Bulgaria, Slovenia, Croatia, Serbia
Company Characteristics: Companies with established business model and history of double-digit growth led by visionary founders
Investment Approach: Team up with ambitious founders/managers and provide them with strategic and financial guidance to facilitate accelerated growth  
Investment Instruments: Focus on growth equity with possibly small buy-out components
Investment Size: Ticket size of €5-15m per transaction invested in single or multiple tranches
Industries: Generalist
Investment Stakes: Significant minority or majority stakes

Name: STAMINA Ventures
Description:
STAMINA VENTURE CAPITAL

The Power Of Meaningful Connections

Significado de Stamina: a capacidade de sustentar um esforço físico ou mental prolongado: o segredo dela é a resistência, e não a velocidade.

Energia constante gerada pelas conexões criadas no círculo de confiança, que alimenta, inspira
e recarrega o empreendedor, para que ele chegue nos melhores resultados de longo prazo.
 
Somos um Venture Capital diferente:


Dar tempo ao tempo não parece muito factível quando você tem que gerar resultados rápidos também, não é mesmo? Corrida contra o relógio, pressão, relações fugazes, voracidade. Desconfiança. Essa parece ter sido a energia dominante no empreendedorismo até hoje.
Mas agora chegou a STAMINA para mudar tudo isso.
Nós somos a energia que quer convidar o empreendedor brasileiro a enxergar e vivenciar o longo prazo.
Como? Primeiro, mostrando que, na STAMINA, ele não está sozinho: aqui, fundadores das startups, parceiros e investidores criam laços profundos e duradouros, através da colaboração genuína em um ecossistema onde a confiança é a moeda mais valiosa.
É à partir daí que ele ganha a resistência e a tranquilidade necessárias para recarregar as baterias e pensar no futuro, ao contrário do que se vê por aí. Na STAMINA não nos interessa ir rápido, nos interessa ir longe.
E para isso é preciso ter senso de coletivo, confiança e energia e visão de longo prazo. É por isso que na STAMINA ninguém pára pelo caminho.

STAMINA. 
The power of meaningful connections

Name: Westfield Capital Management
Description:
Westfield Capital Management is an independent, employee-owned investment firm specializing in U.S. growth equity strategies across the market capitalization spectrum. Since our founding in 1989, we’ve remained dedicated to identifying underappreciated growth at reasonable valuations—a philosophy rooted in deep fundamental research and carried out through disciplined, team-based execution.

Our high-conviction portfolios are built by experienced career analysts who apply sector-specific expertise and collaborative insight. We serve a diverse institutional client base—including public pension plans, corporations, endowments, and sub-advisory partners—offering strategies across small, mid, large, and all cap growth, as well as specialized approaches like Dividend Growth and Health Care.

Our structure fosters alignment and accountability. Employee ownership drives long-term thinking, while our culture of curiosity, transparency, and continuous improvement ensures we stay focused on delivering consistent performance through changing market environments.

At Westfield, we don’t just invest in companies—we invest in relationships, process, and outcomes that stand the test of time.

LinkedIn is the only external platform on which Westfield and its employees operate business.

For social media disclosures, please visit: https://www.westfieldcapital.com/social-media-disclosures/

Name: AAAIM
Description: The Association of Asian American Investment Managers (AAAIM) is a non-profit organization promoting ethnic and gender diversity within the investment industry. AAAIM is an official partner to the largest US public pension plans in their emerging manager and diversity & inclusion efforts. An alliance of prominent, successful Asian American leaders, AAAIM is the voice of Asian American investment managers. Our expansive network of seasoned and rising investment managers handle over one trillion in assets under management. Our network continues to grow as we further engage more people and raise awareness of our organization and importance of our mission internationally. Please visit www.aaaim.org or e-mail info@aaaim.org for more information.

Name: Doha Tech Angels LLC
Description:
Doha Tech Angels (DTA) is a company led by a group of individuals who have extensive experience in disruptive technology. They are passionate about entrepreneurs who have energy and ambition to take their ideas from concepts to market. Most of DTA’s members are seasoned investors and senior executives who have founded, managed, and invested in digital ventures and have engaged in the digital technology and media ventures in MENA and beyond. The fund is managed by a very diversified and talented investment committee. 

What do we do ?

Doha TechAngels (DTA) provides seed funding for early stage disruptive technology startups in Qatar, the Middle East, and beyond. DTA is not just a fund; DTA, its Board of Directors and its Investment Committee use their time, experience and networks to mentor and guide startups to support their growth and business development. DTA encourages the new generation of entrepreneurs to develop their ideas and gain profitability by filling the funding gap. The company's objective is to be a player in Qatar’s path towards self-sufficiency and economic diversification by creating jobs in the market while building internal capabilities.

Name: T. Rowe Price Italy
Description:
T. Rowe Price è una società di gestione degli investimenti fondata nel 1937 con un unico scopo: conoscere i bisogni dei clienti e aiutarli a raggiungere i loro obiettivi finanziari. 

Siamo un gestore attivo con oltre 80 anni di storia, in grado di andare oltre i numeri e solcare con sicurezza anche le acque finanziarie più turbolente. 

Offriamo un’ampia gamma di strategie azionarie, obbligazionarie e multi-asset, ciascuna valorizzata da un approccio strategico agli investimenti e alimentata da una piattaforma di ricerca proprietaria tra le più grandi al mondo. I nostri analisti e gestori lavorano a stretto contatto e condividono idee e analisi per identificare le migliori opportunità di investimento su paesi, settori e società che ad altri potrebbero sfuggire. 

Abbiamo sedi in 16 paesi e siamo presenti in Italia dal dicembre 2014. 

Le informazioni fornite in questa pagina sono rivolte a clienti professionali e pubblicate a solo scopo informativo. Non costituiscono offerta, invito o raccomandazione personale o generale, a vendere o comprare titoli in alcuna giurisdizione o a condurre specifiche attivitá d’investimento. Il contenuto non è stato verificato da alcuna autorità di vigilanza. 

La pagina non costituisce né intende costituire consulenza di alcuna natura e gli investitori sono invitati a richiedere un parere legale, finanziario e fiscale indipendente prima di investire. Le società del gruppo T. Rowe Price 
percepiscono ricavi dai prodotti di investimento e dai servizi di T.Rowe Price. 
Prima dell’adesione leggere il prospetto ed il KIID. 

Questa pagina è pubblicata e approvata da T. Rowe Price (Lux) Management S.à r.l. 35 Boulevard du Prince Henri L-1724 Luxembourg autorizzata e regolamentata dalla Luxembourg Commission de Surveillance du Secteur Financier.

Name: Cascade Asset Management Company
Description:
Investing to support and advance the vital work of the Gates Foundation Trust and Gates Family.

Founded in 1994, Cascade applies a fundamental, long horizon investment approach across asset classes and geographies.

While Cascade manages the assets of the Trust, which funds the Gates Foundation, neither Cascade nor the Trust play a role in the grantmaking or operations of the foundation. Additionally, the foundation does not control or participate in the Trust’s investment activities.
